authors_text: Loizos Hadjiloizou,Evagoras Makridis,Themistoklis Charalambous,Kyriakos M. Deliparaschos
title: Maximum Correntropy Criterion Kalman Filter For Indoor Quadrotor Navigation Under Intermittent Measurements
title_zh: 用于间歇测量下室内四旋翼飞行器导航的最大互熵准则卡尔曼滤波器
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, MED Control Conference. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2212.01599
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, MED Control Conference. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2212.01599
abstract: We present a multisensor fusion framework for the onboard real-time navigation of a quadrotor in an indoor environment. The framework integrates sensor readings from an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), a camera-based object detection algorithm, and an Ultra-WideBand (UWB) localisation system. Often the sensor readings are not always readily available, leading to inaccurate pose estimation and hence poor navigation performance. To effectively handle and fuse sensor readings, and accurately estimate the pose of the quadrotor for tracking a predefined trajectory, we design a Maximum Correntropy Criterion Kalman Filter (MCC-KF) that can manage intermittent observations. The MCC-KF is designed to improve the performance of the estimation process when is done with a Kalman Filter (KF), since KFs are likely to degrade dramatically in practical scenarios in which noise is non-Gaussian (especially when the noise is heavy-tailed). To evaluate the performance of the MCC-KF, we compare it with a previously designed Kalman filter by the authors. Through this comparison, we aim to demonstrate the effectiveness of the MCC-KF in handling indoor navigation missions. The simulation results show that our presented framework offers low positioning errors, while effectively handling intermittent sensor measurements.
summary: We present a multisensor fusion framework for the onboard real-time navigation of a quadrotor in an indoor environment. The framework integrates sensor readings from an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), a camera-based object detection algorithm, and an Ultra-WideBand (UWB) localisation system. Often the sensor readings are not always readily available, leading to inaccurate pose estimation and hence poor navigation performance. To effectively handle and fuse sensor readings, and accurately estimate the pose of the quadrotor for tracking a predefined trajectory, we design a Maximum Correntropy Criterion Kalman Filter (MCC-KF) that can manage intermittent observations. The MCC-KF is designed to improve the performance of the estimation process when is done with a Kalman Filter (KF), since KFs are likely to degrade dramatically in practical scenarios in which noise is non-Gaussian (especially when the noise is heavy-tailed). To evaluate the performance of the MCC-KF, we compare it with a previously designed Kalman filter by the authors. Through this comparison, we aim to demonstrate the effectiveness of the MCC-KF in handling indoor navigation missions. The simulation results show that our presented framework offers low positioning errors, while effectively handling intermittent sensor measurements.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多传感器融合框架，用于室内环境中四旋翼飞行器的机载实时导航。该框架集成了惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的传感器读数、基于摄像头的物体检测算法和超宽带 (UWB) 定位系统。通常，传感器读数并不总是容易获得，导致姿态估计不准确，从而导致导航性能不佳。为了有效处理和融合传感器读数，并准确估计四旋翼飞行器的姿态以跟踪预定义的轨迹，我们设计了一个可以管理间歇观测的最大熵准则卡尔曼滤波器（MCC-KF）。 MCC-KF 旨在提高使用卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 进行估计过程的性能，因为在噪声非高斯的实际场景中（尤其是当噪声为重尾噪声时），KF 可能会急剧下降。为了评估 MCC-KF 的性能，我们将其与作者之前设计的卡尔曼滤波器进行了比较。通过这种比较，我们的目的是证明 MCC-KF 在处理室内导航任务方面的有效性。模拟结果表明，我们提出的框架提供了较低的定位误差，同时有效地处理间歇性传感器测量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大相关熵准则卡尔曼滤波器（MCC-KF）的多传感器融合框架，用于室内四旋翼飞行器在间歇性测量下的实时导航。
AI.motivation: 传统卡尔曼滤波器（KF）在非高斯噪声（尤其是重尾噪声）环境下性能显著下降，而室内导航中传感器数据常因间歇性测量导致定位误差增大，需改进估计方法。
AI.method: 设计MCC-KF算法融合IMU、视觉检测和UWB传感器数据，利用最大相关熵准则提升非高斯噪声下的估计鲁棒性，并通过仿真对比验证其有效性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该框架在间歇性测量条件下实现了较低的定位误差，验证了MCC-KF在处理非高斯噪声和间歇性数据时的优越性。
AI.conclusion: MCC-KF能够有效提升室内四旋翼飞行器在传感器数据间歇性缺失场景下的导航精度，为复杂环境下的多传感器融合提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Laura Duarte,Pedro Neto
title: Classification of Primitive Manufacturing Tasks from Filtered Event Data
title_zh: 根据过滤的事件数据对原始制造任务进行分类
comment: ef:Journal of Manufacturing Systems, Volume 68, 2023
comments: ef:Journal of Manufacturing Systems, Volume 68, 2023
abstract: Collaborative robots are increasingly present in industry to support human activities. However, to make the human-robot collaborative process more effective, there are several challenges to be addressed. Collaborative robotic systems need to be aware of the human activities to (1) anticipate collaborative/assistive actions, (2) learn by demonstration, and (3) activate safety procedures in shared workspace. This study proposes an action classification system to recognize primitive assembly tasks from human motion events data captured by a Dynamic and Active-pixel Vision Sensor (DAVIS). Several filters are compared and combined to remove event data noise. Task patterns are classified from a continuous stream of event data using advanced deep learning and recurrent networks to classify spatial and temporal features. Experiments were conducted on a novel dataset, the dataset of manufacturing tasks (DMT22), featuring 5 classes of representative manufacturing primitives (PickUp, Place, Screw, Hold, Idle) from 5 participants. Results show that the proposed filters remove about 65\% of all events (noise) per recording, conducting to a classification accuracy up to 99,37\% for subjects that trained the system and 97.08\% for new subjects. Data from a left-handed subject were successfully classified using only right-handed training data. These results are object independent.
summary: Collaborative robots are increasingly present in industry to support human activities. However, to make the human-robot collaborative process more effective, there are several challenges to be addressed. Collaborative robotic systems need to be aware of the human activities to (1) anticipate collaborative/assistive actions, (2) learn by demonstration, and (3) activate safety procedures in shared workspace. This study proposes an action classification system to recognize primitive assembly tasks from human motion events data captured by a Dynamic and Active-pixel Vision Sensor (DAVIS). Several filters are compared and combined to remove event data noise. Task patterns are classified from a continuous stream of event data using advanced deep learning and recurrent networks to classify spatial and temporal features. Experiments were conducted on a novel dataset, the dataset of manufacturing tasks (DMT22), featuring 5 classes of representative manufacturing primitives (PickUp, Place, Screw, Hold, Idle) from 5 participants. Results show that the proposed filters remove about 65\% of all events (noise) per recording, conducting to a classification accuracy up to 99,37\% for subjects that trained the system and 97.08\% for new subjects. Data from a left-handed subject were successfully classified using only right-handed training data. These results are object independent.
abstract_zh: 协作机器人越来越多地出现在工业中以支持人类活动。然而，为了使人机协作过程更加有效，还有一些挑战需要解决。协作机器人系统需要了解人类活动，以（1）预测协作/辅助动作，（2）通过演示进行学习，以及（3）激活共享工作空间中的安全程序。本研究提出了一种动作分类系统，用于从动态和主动像素视觉传感器（DAVIS）捕获的人体运动事件数据中识别原始装配任务。比较并组合多个过滤器以消除事件数据噪声。使用先进的深度学习和循环网络对空间和时间特征进行分类，从连续的事件数据流中对任务模式进行分类。在一个新颖的数据集（制造任务数据集 (DMT22)）上进行了实验，该数据集具有来自 5 位参与者的 5 类代表性制造基元（拾取、放置、拧紧、保持、空闲）。结果表明，所提出的过滤器消除了每个记录中约 65% 的所有事件（噪声），对于训练系统的受试者来说，分类准确度高达 99.37%，对于新受试者来说，分类准确度高达 97.08%。仅使用右手训练数据即可成功对左撇子受试者的数据进行分类。这些结果是独立于对象的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于过滤事件数据的原始制造任务分类系统，利用动态像素视觉传感器（DAVIS）捕捉的人体运动事件数据，结合深度学习和循环网络进行分类。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人需要准确识别人类活动以实现有效协作，但现有技术在噪声处理、任务分类和跨对象适应性方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过比较组合多种滤波器去除事件数据噪声，采用深度学习和循环网络提取时空特征，使用包含5类制造任务（PickUp、Place、Screw、Hold、Idle）的DMT22数据集进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 滤波器可去除每段记录中约65%的噪声，系统在训练对象上达到99.37%分类准确率，在新对象上达97.08%，且仅用右撇子训练数据即可成功分类左撇子数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高精度、噪声鲁棒且对象无关的制造任务分类，为协作机器人的人机交互提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Tiankai Hang,Shuyang Gu,Chen Li,Jianmin Bao,Dong Chen,Han Hu,Xin Geng,Baining Guo
title: Efficient Diffusion Training via Min-SNR Weighting Strategy
title_zh: 通过最小信噪比加权策略进行高效扩散训练
abstract: Denoising diffusion models have been a mainstream approach for image generation, however, training these models often suffers from slow convergence. In this paper, we discovered that the slow convergence is partly due to conflicting optimization directions between timesteps. To address this issue, we treat the diffusion training as a multi-task learning problem, and introduce a simple yet effective approach referred to as Min-SNR-$γ$. This method adapts loss weights of timesteps based on clamped signal-to-noise ratios, which effectively balances the conflicts among timesteps. Our results demonstrate a significant improvement in converging speed, 3.4$\times$ faster than previous weighting strategies. It is also more effective, achieving a new record FID score of 2.06 on the ImageNet $256\times256$ benchmark using smaller architectures than that employed in previous state-of-the-art. The code is available at https://github.com/TiankaiHang/Min-SNR-Diffusion-Training.
summary: Denoising diffusion models have been a mainstream approach for image generation, however, training these models often suffers from slow convergence. In this paper, we discovered that the slow convergence is partly due to conflicting optimization directions between timesteps. To address this issue, we treat the diffusion training as a multi-task learning problem, and introduce a simple yet effective approach referred to as Min-SNR-$γ$. This method adapts loss weights of timesteps based on clamped signal-to-noise ratios, which effectively balances the conflicts among timesteps. Our results demonstrate a significant improvement in converging speed, 3.4$\times$ faster than previous weighting strategies. It is also more effective, achieving a new record FID score of 2.06 on the ImageNet $256\times256$ benchmark using smaller architectures than that employed in previous state-of-the-art. The code is available at https://github.com/TiankaiHang/Min-SNR-Diffusion-Training.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散模型一直是图像生成的主流方法，然而，训练这些模型通常会遇到收敛速度慢的问题。在本文中，我们发现收敛速度慢的部分原因是时间步之间的优化方向冲突。为了解决这个问题，我们将扩散训练视为多任务学习问题，并引入一种简单而有效的方法，称为 Min-SNR-$γ$。该方法根据钳位信噪比调整时间步长的损失权重，有效平衡时间步长之间的冲突。我们的结果表明收敛速度显着提高，比以前的加权策略快 3.4$\times$。它也更有效，使用比之前最先进的架构更小的架构，在 ImageNet $256\times256$ 基准上取得了 2.06 的新纪录 FID 分数。代码可在 https://github.com/TiankaiHang/Min-SNR-Diffusion-Training 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Min-SNR-γ的权重策略，通过平衡扩散模型训练中不同时间步的冲突，提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型训练存在收敛速度慢的问题，主要原因是不同时间步的优化方向冲突，需寻找有效方法解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 将扩散训练视为多任务学习问题，根据截断信噪比（SNR）动态调整时间步的损失权重，实现冲突平衡。
AI.result: 收敛速度较之前方法提升3.4倍，在ImageNet 256×256数据集上以更小模型取得新纪录的FID得分2.06。
AI.conclusion: Min-SNR-γ策略有效解决了扩散训练中的冲突问题，在训练速度和生成质量上均优于现有方法。

It is also more effective, achieving a new record FID score of 2.06 on the ImageNet $256\times256$ benchmark using smaller architectures than that employed in previous state-of-the-art. authors_text: Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Pingchuan Ma,Andrew Everett Spielberg,Zhou Xian,Hao Zhang,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Daniela Rus,Chuang Gan
title: SoftZoo: A Soft Robot Co-design Benchmark For Locomotion In Diverse Environments
title_zh: SoftZoo：不同环境下运动的软机器人协同设计基准
comment: ICLR 2023. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/softzoo-iclr-2023
comments: ICLR 2023. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/softzoo-iclr-2023
abstract: While significant research progress has been made in robot learning for control, unique challenges arise when simultaneously co-optimizing morphology. Existing work has typically been tailored for particular environments or representations. In order to more fully understand inherent design and performance tradeoffs and accelerate the development of new breeds of soft robots, a comprehensive virtual platform with well-established tasks, environments, and evaluation metrics is needed. In this work, we introduce SoftZoo, a soft robot co-design platform for locomotion in diverse environments. SoftZoo supports an extensive, naturally-inspired material set, including the ability to simulate environments such as flat ground, desert, wetland, clay, ice, snow, shallow water, and ocean. Further, it provides a variety of tasks relevant for soft robotics, including fast locomotion, agile turning, and path following, as well as differentiable design representations for morphology and control. Combined, these elements form a feature-rich platform for analysis and development of soft robot co-design algorithms. We benchmark prevalent representations and co-design algorithms, and shed light on 1) the interplay between environment, morphology, and behavior; 2) the importance of design space representations; 3) the ambiguity in muscle formation and controller synthesis; and 4) the value of differentiable physics. We envision that SoftZoo will serve as a standard platform and template an approach toward the development of novel representations and algorithms for co-designing soft robots' behavioral and morphological intelligence.
summary: While significant research progress has been made in robot learning for control, unique challenges arise when simultaneously co-optimizing morphology. Existing work has typically been tailored for particular environments or representations. In order to more fully understand inherent design and performance tradeoffs and accelerate the development of new breeds of soft robots, a comprehensive virtual platform with well-established tasks, environments, and evaluation metrics is needed. In this work, we introduce SoftZoo, a soft robot co-design platform for locomotion in diverse environments. SoftZoo supports an extensive, naturally-inspired material set, including the ability to simulate environments such as flat ground, desert, wetland, clay, ice, snow, shallow water, and ocean. Further, it provides a variety of tasks relevant for soft robotics, including fast locomotion, agile turning, and path following, as well as differentiable design representations for morphology and control. Combined, these elements form a feature-rich platform for analysis and development of soft robot co-design algorithms. We benchmark prevalent representations and co-design algorithms, and shed light on 1) the interplay between environment, morphology, and behavior; 2) the importance of design space representations; 3) the ambiguity in muscle formation and controller synthesis; and 4) the value of differentiable physics. We envision that SoftZoo will serve as a standard platform and template an approach toward the development of novel representations and algorithms for co-designing soft robots' behavioral and morphological intelligence.
abstract_zh: 尽管在机器人控制学习方面取得了重大研究进展，但同时协同优化形态时出现了独特的挑战。现有的作品通常是针对特定环境或表现形式量身定制的。为了更全面地了解固有的设计和性能权衡并加速新型软机器人的开发，需要一个具有完善的任务、环境和评估指标的综合虚拟平台。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 SoftZoo，一个用于在不同环境中运动的软体机器人协同设计平台。 SoftZoo 支持广泛的、受自然启发的材质集，包括模拟平坦地面、沙漠、湿地、粘土、冰、雪、浅水和海洋等环境的能力。此外，它还提供与软机器人相关的各种任务，包括快速运动、敏捷转向和路径跟踪，以及形态和控制的可微设计表示。这些元素相结合，形成了一个功能丰富的平台，用于分析和开发软机器人协同设计算法。我们对流行的表示和协同设计算法进行了基准测试，并阐明了 1）环境、形态和行为之间的相互作用； 2）设计空间表征的重要性； 3）肌肉形成和控制器合成的模糊性； 4）可微物理的价值。我们设想 SoftZoo 将作为一个标准平台和模板方法来开发新颖的表示和算法，以共同设计软机器人的行为和形态智能。

AI.tldr: 介绍一个名为SoftZoo的软体机器人协同设计基准平台，用于在多种环境中测试移动能力。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人研究多针对特定环境，缺乏统一平台分析形态与行为的权衡，需建立综合基准以加速发展。
AI.method: 构建包含多种环境和任务的虚拟平台，结合可微分形态与控制表示，支持不同环境下的移动任务测试。
AI.result: 基准测试显示环境与形态的交互、设计空间表示的重要性、肌肉形成与控制器合成的模糊性，以及可微分物理的价值。
AI.conclusion: SoftZoo为软体机器人协同设计提供标准平台，促进形态与行为智能的算法创新。

authors_text: Konstantinos Tertikas,Despoina Paschalidou,Boxiao Pan,Jeong Joon Park,Mikaela Angelina Uy,Ioannis Emiris,Yannis Avrithis,Leonidas Guibas
title: PartNeRF: Generating Part-Aware Editable 3D Shapes without 3D Supervision
title_zh: PartNeRF：无需 3D 监督即可生成零件感知的可编辑 3D 形状
comment: To appear in CVPR 2023, Project Page: https://ktertikas.github.io/part_nerf
comments: To appear in CVPR 2023, Project Page: https://ktertikas.github.io/part_nerf
abstract: Impressive progress in generative models and implicit representations gave rise to methods that can generate 3D shapes of high quality. However, being able to locally control and edit shapes is another essential property that can unlock several content creation applications. Local control can be achieved with part-aware models, but existing methods require 3D supervision and cannot produce textures. In this work, we devise PartNeRF, a novel part-aware generative model for editable 3D shape synthesis that does not require any explicit 3D supervision. Our model generates objects as a set of locally defined NeRFs, augmented with an affine transformation. This enables several editing operations such as applying transformations on parts, mixing parts from different objects etc. To ensure distinct, manipulable parts we enforce a hard assignment of rays to parts that makes sure that the color of each ray is only determined by a single NeRF. As a result, altering one part does not affect the appearance of the others. Evaluations on various ShapeNet categories demonstrate the ability of our model to generate editable 3D objects of improved fidelity, compared to previous part-based generative approaches that require 3D supervision or models relying on NeRFs.
summary: Impressive progress in generative models and implicit representations gave rise to methods that can generate 3D shapes of high quality. However, being able to locally control and edit shapes is another essential property that can unlock several content creation applications. Local control can be achieved with part-aware models, but existing methods require 3D supervision and cannot produce textures. In this work, we devise PartNeRF, a novel part-aware generative model for editable 3D shape synthesis that does not require any explicit 3D supervision. Our model generates objects as a set of locally defined NeRFs, augmented with an affine transformation. This enables several editing operations such as applying transformations on parts, mixing parts from different objects etc. To ensure distinct, manipulable parts we enforce a hard assignment of rays to parts that makes sure that the color of each ray is only determined by a single NeRF. As a result, altering one part does not affect the appearance of the others. Evaluations on various ShapeNet categories demonstrate the ability of our model to generate editable 3D objects of improved fidelity, compared to previous part-based generative approaches that require 3D supervision or models relying on NeRFs.
abstract_zh: 生成模型和隐式表示方面取得的令人瞩目的进展催生了可以生成高质量 3D 形状的方法。然而，能够本地控制和编辑形状是另一个基本属性，可以解锁多个内容创建应用程序。局部控制可以通过零件感知模型来实现，但现有方法需要 3D 监督并且无法生成纹理。在这项工作中，我们设计了 PartNeRF，一种新颖的零件感知生成模型，用于可编辑 3D 形状合成，不需要任何显式 3D 监督。我们的模型将对象生成为一组本地定义的 NeRF，并通过仿射变换进行增强。这可以实现多种编辑操作，例如对零件应用变换、混合来自不同对象的零件等。为了确保零件不同、可操作，我们强制将光线硬分配给零件，以确保每条光线的颜色仅由单个 NeRF 确定。因此，改变一个部分不会影响其他部分的外观。对各种 ShapeNet 类别的评估表明，与之前需要 3D 监督的基于部件的生成方法或依赖 NeRF 的模型相比，我们的模型能够生成保真度更高的可编辑 3D 对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PartNeRF，一种无需3D监督即可生成可编辑的部件感知3D形状的新型生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖3D监督且无法生成纹理，难以实现局部控制和编辑，限制了内容创作应用。
AI.method: 将物体分解为局部定义的NeRF组件并配以仿射变换，通过硬分配光线到部件确保编辑独立性。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet多个类别上生成的3D物体在保真度上优于需3D监督的部件生成方法及基于NeRF的模型。

search_text: PartNeRF: Generating Part-Aware Editable 3D Shapes without 3D Supervision PartNeRF：无需 3D 监督即可生成零件感知的可编辑 3D 形状 Impressive progress in generative models and implicit representations gave rise to methods that can generate 3D shapes of high quality. However, being able to locally control and edit shapes is another essential property that can unlock several content creation applications. Local control can be achieved with part-aware models, but existing methods require 3D supervision and cannot produce textures. In this work, we devise PartNeRF, a novel part-aware generative model for editable 3D shape synthesis that does not require any explicit 3D supervision. Our model generates objects as a set of locally defined NeRFs, augmented with an affine transformation. This enables several editing operations such as applying transformations on parts, mixing parts from different objects etc. To ensure distinct, manipulable parts we enforce a hard assignment of rays to parts that makes sure that the color of each ray is only determined by a single NeRF. As a result, altering one part does not affect the appearance of the others. Evaluations on various ShapeNet categories demonstrate the ability of our model to generate editable 3D objects of improved fidelity, compared to previous part-based generative approaches that require 3D supervision or models relying on NeRFs. 生成模型和隐式表示方面取得的令人瞩目的进展催生了可以生成高质量 3D 形状的方法。然而，能够本地控制和编辑形状是另一个基本属性，可以解锁多个内容创建应用程序。局部控制可以通过零件感知模型来实现，但现有方法需要 3D 监督并且无法生成纹理。在这项工作中，我们设计了 PartNeRF，一种新颖的零件感知生成模型，用于可编辑 3D 形状合成，不需要任何显式 3D 监督。我们的模型将对象生成为一组本地定义的 NeRF，并通过仿射变换进行增强。这可以实现多种编辑操作，例如对零件应用变换、混合来自不同对象的零件等。为了确保零件不同、可操作，我们强制将光线硬分配给零件，以确保每条光线的颜色仅由单个 NeRF 确定。因此，改变一个部分不会影响其他部分的外观。对各种 ShapeNet 类别的评估表明，与之前需要 3D 监督的基于部件的生成方法或依赖 NeRF 的模型相比，我们的模型能够生成保真度更高的可编辑 3D 对象。 本文提出PartNeRF，一种无需3D监督即可生成可编辑的部件感知3D形状的新型生成模型。 Konstantinos Tertikas,Despoina Paschalidou,Boxiao Pan,Jeong Joon Park,Mikaela Angelina Uy,Ioannis Emiris,Yannis Avrithis,Leonidas Guibas cs.CV

authors_text: Justin Kerr,Chung Min Kim,Ken Goldberg,Angjoo Kanazawa,Matthew Tancik
title: LERF: Language Embedded Radiance Fields
title_zh: LERF：语言嵌入辐射场
comment: Project website can be found at https://lerf.io
comments: Project website can be found at https://lerf.io
abstract: Humans describe the physical world using natural language to refer to specific 3D locations based on a vast range of properties: visual appearance, semantics, abstract associations, or actionable affordances. In this work we propose Language Embedded Radiance Fields (LERFs), a method for grounding language embeddings from off-the-shelf models like CLIP into NeRF, which enable these types of open-ended language queries in 3D. LERF learns a dense, multi-scale language field inside NeRF by volume rendering CLIP embeddings along training rays, supervising these embeddings across training views to provide multi-view consistency and smooth the underlying language field. After optimization, LERF can extract 3D relevancy maps for a broad range of language prompts interactively in real-time, which has potential use cases in robotics, understanding vision-language models, and interacting with 3D scenes. LERF enables pixel-aligned, zero-shot queries on the distilled 3D CLIP embeddings without relying on region proposals or masks, supporting long-tail open-vocabulary queries hierarchically across the volume. The project website can be found at https://lerf.io .
summary: Humans describe the physical world using natural language to refer to specific 3D locations based on a vast range of properties: visual appearance, semantics, abstract associations, or actionable affordances. In this work we propose Language Embedded Radiance Fields (LERFs), a method for grounding language embeddings from off-the-shelf models like CLIP into NeRF, which enable these types of open-ended language queries in 3D. LERF learns a dense, multi-scale language field inside NeRF by volume rendering CLIP embeddings along training rays, supervising these embeddings across training views to provide multi-view consistency and smooth the underlying language field. After optimization, LERF can extract 3D relevancy maps for a broad range of language prompts interactively in real-time, which has potential use cases in robotics, understanding vision-language models, and interacting with 3D scenes. LERF enables pixel-aligned, zero-shot queries on the distilled 3D CLIP embeddings without relying on region proposals or masks, supporting long-tail open-vocabulary queries hierarchically across the volume. The project website can be found at https://lerf.io .
abstract_zh: 人类使用自然语言描述物理世界，以指代基于各种属性的特定 3D 位置：视觉外观、语义、抽象关联或可操作的可供性。在这项工作中，我们提出了语言嵌入辐射场 (LERF)，这是一种将语言嵌入从现成模型（如 CLIP）基础到 NeRF 的方法，它可以在 3D 中实现这些类型的开放式语言查询。 LERF 通过沿训练射线体积渲染 CLIP 嵌入来学习 NeRF 内部的密集、多尺度语言场，跨训练视图监督这些嵌入，以提供多视图一致性并平滑底层语言场。经过优化后，LERF 可以实时交互式地提取各种语言提示的 3D 相关性图，这在机器人技术、理解视觉语言模型以及与 3D 场景交互等方面具有潜在的用例。 LERF 可以在精炼的 3D CLIP 嵌入上实现像素对齐、零样本查询，而无需依赖区域提议或掩模，从而支持跨卷分层的长尾开放词汇查询。该项目网站可以在 https://lerf.io 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LERF方法，将语言嵌入整合到NeRF中，实现3D场景中基于开放语言描述的实时交互查询。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖区域提议或掩码限制了开放词汇查询，而人类通过自然语言可灵活描述3D空间属性，需更通用的3D语言理解框架。
AI.method: 通过体积渲染CLIP嵌入到NeRF训练光线中，利用多视图监督学习密集多尺度语言场，实现像素对齐的零样本查询。
AI.result: 优化后模型可实时生成3D相关性图，支持机器人、视觉语言模型等场景的长尾开放词汇交互查询。
AI.conclusion: LERF无需区域提议即可实现3D语言场建模，为开放词汇的3D场景理解与交互提供了新范式。

authors_text: Andrei Paleyes,Siyuan Guo,Bernhard Schölkopf,Neil D. Lawrence
title: Dataflow graphs as complete causal graphs
title_zh: 作为完整因果图的数据流图
comment: Accepted to 2nd International Conference on AI Engineering - Software Engineering for AI (CAIN 23)
comments: Accepted to 2nd International Conference on AI Engineering - Software Engineering for AI (CAIN 23)
abstract: Component-based development is one of the core principles behind modern software engineering practices. Understanding of causal relationships between components of a software system can yield significant benefits to developers. Yet modern software design approaches make it difficult to track and discover such relationships at system scale, which leads to growing intellectual debt. In this paper we consider an alternative approach to software design, flow-based programming (FBP), and draw the attention of the community to the connection between dataflow graphs produced by FBP and structural causal models. With expository examples we show how this connection can be leveraged to improve day-to-day tasks in software projects, including fault localisation, business analysis and experimentation.
summary: Component-based development is one of the core principles behind modern software engineering practices. Understanding of causal relationships between components of a software system can yield significant benefits to developers. Yet modern software design approaches make it difficult to track and discover such relationships at system scale, which leads to growing intellectual debt. In this paper we consider an alternative approach to software design, flow-based programming (FBP), and draw the attention of the community to the connection between dataflow graphs produced by FBP and structural causal models. With expository examples we show how this connection can be leveraged to improve day-to-day tasks in software projects, including fault localisation, business analysis and experimentation.
abstract_zh: 基于组件的开发是现代软件工程实践背后的核心原则之一。了解软件系统组件之间的因果关系可以为开发人员带来巨大的好处。然而，现代软件设计方法使得在系统规模上跟踪和发现此类关系变得困难，这导致智力债务不断增加。在本文中，我们考虑了另一种软件设计方法，即基于流的编程（FBP），并引起社区对 FBP 生成的数据流图与结构因果模型之间的联系的关注。通过说明性示例，我们展示了如何利用这种联系来改进软件项目中的日常任务，包括故障定位、业务分析和实验。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了流基编程（FBP）生成的数据流图与结构因果模型之间的联系，并提出利用这种关系优化软件开发中的因果分析任务。
AI.motivation: 现代软件系统中组件间因果关系难以追踪，导致智力债务增加，亟需更有效的分析方法。
AI.method: 通过分析FBP的数据流图结构，将其映射为结构因果模型，并结合实例展示其在故障定位等场景的应用。
AI.result: 验证了数据流图作为因果图的完备性，并证明该方法可提升软件项目中的因果推理效率与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 数据流图与因果模型的结合为软件工程提供了新视角，有助于系统化解决因果关系分析难题。

authors_text: Yi Wei,Linqing Zhao,Wenzhao Zheng,Zheng Zhu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: SurroundOcc: Multi-Camera 3D Occupancy Prediction for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SurroundOcc：自动驾驶的多摄像头 3D 占用预测
comment: Accepted to ICCV 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundOcc
comments: Accepted to ICCV 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundOcc
abstract: 3D scene understanding plays a vital role in vision-based autonomous driving. While most existing methods focus on 3D object detection, they have difficulty describing real-world objects of arbitrary shapes and infinite classes. Towards a more comprehensive perception of a 3D scene, in this paper, we propose a SurroundOcc method to predict the 3D occupancy with multi-camera images. We first extract multi-scale features for each image and adopt spatial 2D-3D attention to lift them to the 3D volume space. Then we apply 3D convolutions to progressively upsample the volume features and impose supervision on multiple levels. To obtain dense occupancy prediction, we design a pipeline to generate dense occupancy ground truth without expansive occupancy annotations. Specifically, we fuse multi-frame LiDAR scans of dynamic objects and static scenes separately. Then we adopt Poisson Reconstruction to fill the holes and voxelize the mesh to get dense occupancy labels. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundOcc
summary: 3D scene understanding plays a vital role in vision-based autonomous driving. While most existing methods focus on 3D object detection, they have difficulty describing real-world objects of arbitrary shapes and infinite classes. Towards a more comprehensive perception of a 3D scene, in this paper, we propose a SurroundOcc method to predict the 3D occupancy with multi-camera images. We first extract multi-scale features for each image and adopt spatial 2D-3D attention to lift them to the 3D volume space. Then we apply 3D convolutions to progressively upsample the volume features and impose supervision on multiple levels. To obtain dense occupancy prediction, we design a pipeline to generate dense occupancy ground truth without expansive occupancy annotations. Specifically, we fuse multi-frame LiDAR scans of dynamic objects and static scenes separately. Then we adopt Poisson Reconstruction to fill the holes and voxelize the mesh to get dense occupancy labels. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundOcc
abstract_zh: 3D场景理解在基于视觉的自动驾驶中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然大多数现有方法专注于 3D 对象检测，但它们很难描述任意形状和无限类别的现实世界对象。为了更全面地感知 3D 场景，在本文中，我们提出了一种 SurroundOcc 方法来预测多摄像机图像的 3D 占用情况。我们首先为每个图像提取多尺度特征，并采用空间 2D-3D 注意力将它们提升到 3D 体积空间。然后，我们应用 3D 卷积来逐步对体积特征进行上采样，并对多个级别进行监督。为了获得密集占用预测，我们设计了一个管道来生成密集占用地面实况，而无需扩展占用注释。具体来说，我们分别融合动态物体和静态场景的多帧激光雷达扫描。然后我们采用泊松重建来填充孔并对网格进行体素化以获得密集的占用标签。 nuScenes 和 SemanticKITTI 数据集上的大量实验证明了我们方法的优越性。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundOcc 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多摄像头图像的3D占用预测方法，用于自动驾驶中的场景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在3D物体检测方面存在局限，难以描述任意形状和无限类别的现实世界物体，因此需要更全面的3D场景感知方法。
AI.method: 该方法首先从每张图像中提取多尺度特征，并采用空间2D-3D注意力机制将其提升到3D体积空间。然后通过3D卷积逐步上采样体积特征，并在多个层次上施加监督。为获得密集的占用预测，设计了一种生成密集占用真实值的管道，无需大量占用标注。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SurroundOcc方法通过多摄像头图像实现了高效的3D占用预测，为自动驾驶提供了更全面的场景感知能力。

While most existing methods focus on 3D object detection, they have difficulty describing real-world objects of arbitrary shapes and infinite classes. Then we adopt Poisson Reconstruction to fill the holes and voxelize the mesh to get dense occupancy labels. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. authors_text: Zijie J. Wang,Duen Horng Chau
title: WebSHAP: Towards Explaining Any Machine Learning Models Anywhere
title_zh: WebSHAP：解释任何地方的任何机器学习模型
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. Accepted at the ACM Web Conference 2023 (WWW 2023). For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/webshap/. Code is open-source at https://github.com/poloclub/webshap
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures. Accepted at the ACM Web Conference 2023 (WWW 2023). For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/webshap/. Code is open-source at https://github.com/poloclub/webshap
abstract: As machine learning (ML) is increasingly integrated into our everyday Web experience, there is a call for transparent and explainable web-based ML. However, existing explainability techniques often require dedicated backend servers, which limit their usefulness as the Web community moves toward in-browser ML for lower latency and greater privacy. To address the pressing need for a client-side explainability solution, we present WebSHAP, the first in-browser tool that adapts the state-of-the-art model-agnostic explainability technique SHAP to the Web environment. Our open-source tool is developed with modern Web technologies such as WebGL that leverage client-side hardware capabilities and make it easy to integrate into existing Web ML applications. We demonstrate WebSHAP in a usage scenario of explaining ML-based loan approval decisions to loan applicants. Reflecting on our work, we discuss the opportunities and challenges for future research on transparent Web ML. WebSHAP is available at https://github.com/poloclub/webshap.
summary: As machine learning (ML) is increasingly integrated into our everyday Web experience, there is a call for transparent and explainable web-based ML. However, existing explainability techniques often require dedicated backend servers, which limit their usefulness as the Web community moves toward in-browser ML for lower latency and greater privacy. To address the pressing need for a client-side explainability solution, we present WebSHAP, the first in-browser tool that adapts the state-of-the-art model-agnostic explainability technique SHAP to the Web environment. Our open-source tool is developed with modern Web technologies such as WebGL that leverage client-side hardware capabilities and make it easy to integrate into existing Web ML applications. We demonstrate WebSHAP in a usage scenario of explaining ML-based loan approval decisions to loan applicants. Reflecting on our work, we discuss the opportunities and challenges for future research on transparent Web ML. WebSHAP is available at https://github.com/poloclub/webshap.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习 (ML) 越来越多地融入我们的日常 Web 体验中，人们需要透明且可解释的基于 Web 的 ML。然而，现有的可解释性技术通常需要专用的后端服务器，随着 Web 社区转向浏览器内机器学习以降低延迟和提高隐私性，这限制了它们的实用性。为了满足对客户端可解释性解决方案的迫切需求，我们推出了 WebSHAP，这是第一个将最先进的模型无关可解释性技术 SHAP 应用于 Web 环境的浏览器内工具。我们的开源工具是利用 WebGL 等现代 Web 技术开发的，它利用客户端硬件功能，并且可以轻松集成到现有的 Web ML 应用程序中。我们在向贷款申请人解释基于 ML 的贷款审批决策的使用场景中演示了 WebSHAP。回顾我们的工作，我们讨论了透明 Web ML 未来研究的机遇和挑战。 WebSHAP 可在 https://github.com/poloclub/webshap 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebSHAP，首个支持在浏览器端运行的机器学习模型解释工具，通过适配SHAP算法实现网页环境下的模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习在网页端的广泛应用，传统依赖后端服务器的模型解释方法难以满足隐私保护和低延迟需求，亟需客户端解决方案。
AI.method: 基于WebGL等现代网页技术，将SHAP（模型无关解释方法）移植到浏览器环境，利用客户端硬件加速实现模型解释。
AI.result: 在贷款审批场景中验证了WebSHAP的有效性，开源工具可集成至现有网页ML应用，并探讨了透明化网页ML的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: WebSHAP为网页端机器学习可解释性提供了可行方案，但需进一步解决性能优化和复杂模型支持等挑战。

authors_text: Zhenzhen Weng,Laura Bravo-Sánchez,Serena Yeung-Levy
title: Diffusion-HPC: Synthetic Data Generation for Human Mesh Recovery in Challenging Domains
title_zh: Diffusion-HPC：在具有挑战性的领域中用于人体网格恢复的合成数据生成
abstract: Recent text-to-image generative models have exhibited remarkable abilities in generating high-fidelity and photo-realistic images. However, despite the visually impressive results, these models often struggle to preserve plausible human structure in the generations. Due to this reason, while generative models have shown promising results in aiding downstream image recognition tasks by generating large volumes of synthetic data, they are not suitable for improving downstream human pose perception and understanding. In this work, we propose a Diffusion model with Human Pose Correction (Diffusion-HPC), a text-conditioned method that generates photo-realistic images with plausible posed humans by injecting prior knowledge about human body structure. Our generated images are accompanied by 3D meshes that serve as ground truths for improving Human Mesh Recovery tasks, where a shortage of 3D training data has long been an issue. Furthermore, we show that Diffusion-HPC effectively improves the realism of human generations under varying conditioning strategies.
summary: Recent text-to-image generative models have exhibited remarkable abilities in generating high-fidelity and photo-realistic images. However, despite the visually impressive results, these models often struggle to preserve plausible human structure in the generations. Due to this reason, while generative models have shown promising results in aiding downstream image recognition tasks by generating large volumes of synthetic data, they are not suitable for improving downstream human pose perception and understanding. In this work, we propose a Diffusion model with Human Pose Correction (Diffusion-HPC), a text-conditioned method that generates photo-realistic images with plausible posed humans by injecting prior knowledge about human body structure. Our generated images are accompanied by 3D meshes that serve as ground truths for improving Human Mesh Recovery tasks, where a shortage of 3D training data has long been an issue. Furthermore, we show that Diffusion-HPC effectively improves the realism of human generations under varying conditioning strategies.
abstract_zh: 最近的文本到图像生成模型在生成高保真和逼真图像方面表现出了卓越的能力。然而，尽管在视觉上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，这些模型往往难以在几代人中保存合理的人体结构。由于这个原因，虽然生成模型通过生成大量合成数据在帮助下游图像识别任务方面显示出了有希望的结果，但它们不适合改善下游人体姿势感知和理解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有人体姿势校正的扩散模型（Diffusion-HPC），这是一种文本条件方法，通过注入有关人体结构的先验知识，生成具有合理姿势的人类的照片般逼真的图像。我们生成的图像附带 3D 网格，作为改进人体网格恢复任务的基本事实，而 3D 训练数据的短缺长期以来一直是一个问题。此外，我们还表明，Diffusion-HPC 在不同的调节策略下有效地提高了人类世代的真实感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diffusion-HPC方法，通过注入人体结构先验知识生成包含合理人体姿态的高质量图像及对应3D网格，用于提升复杂场景下的人体网格恢复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型虽能生成逼真图像，但难以保持合理的人体结构，导致无法有效支持人体姿态感知等下游任务，尤其缺乏3D训练数据制约了人体网格恢复的发展。
AI.method: 设计基于扩散模型的文本条件生成框架，通过注入人体骨骼结构先验知识，在生成图像时同步输出高精度3D人体网格作为监督信号，解决姿态合理性与数据稀缺问题。
AI.result: 生成的图像在视觉质量与人体结构合理性上优于基线方法，所生成的3D网格显著提升人体网格恢复模型的性能，且在不同条件策略下保持生成效果稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion-HPC通过结构先验注入有效解决了生成模型在人体姿态保真度与3D数据生成方面的不足，为复杂场景下的人体网格恢复提供了高质量合成数据支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Diffusion-HPC方法，通过注入人体结构先验知识生成包含合理人体姿态的高质量图像及对应3D网格，用于提升复杂场景下的人体网格恢复任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型虽能生成逼真图像，但难以保持合理的人体结构，导致无法有效支持人体姿态感知等下游任务，尤其缺乏3D训练数据制约了人体网格恢复的发展。
ai_content.method: 设计基于扩散模型的文本条件生成框架，通过注入人体骨骼结构先验知识，在生成图像时同步输出高精度3D人体网格作为监督信号，解决姿态合理性与数据稀缺问题。
ai_content.result: 生成的图像在视觉质量与人体结构合理性上优于基线方法，所生成的3D网格显著提升人体网格恢复模型的性能，且在不同条件策略下保持生成效果稳定性。
ai_content.conclusion: Diffusion-HPC通过结构先验注入有效解决了生成模型在人体姿态保真度与3D数据生成方面的不足，为复杂场景下的人体网格恢复提供了高质量合成数据支持。

search_text: Diffusion-HPC: Synthetic Data Generation for Human Mesh Recovery in Challenging Domains Diffusion-HPC：在具有挑战性的领域中用于人体网格恢复的合成数据生成 Recent text-to-image generative models have exhibited remarkable abilities in generating high-fidelity and photo-realistic images. However, despite the visually impressive results, these models often struggle to preserve plausible human structure in the generations. Due to this reason, while generative models have shown promising results in aiding downstream image recognition tasks by generating large volumes of synthetic data, they are not suitable for improving downstream human pose perception and understanding. In this work, we propose a Diffusion model with Human Pose Correction (Diffusion-HPC), a text-conditioned method that generates photo-realistic images with plausible posed humans by injecting prior knowledge about human body structure. Our generated images are accompanied by 3D meshes that serve as ground truths for improving Human Mesh Recovery tasks, where a shortage of 3D training data has long been an issue. Furthermore, we show that Diffusion-HPC effectively improves the realism of human generations under varying conditioning strategies. 最近的文本到图像生成模型在生成高保真和逼真图像方面表现出了卓越的能力。然而，尽管在视觉上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，这些模型往往难以在几代人中保存合理的人体结构。由于这个原因，虽然生成模型通过生成大量合成数据在帮助下游图像识别任务方面显示出了有希望的结果，但它们不适合改善下游人体姿势感知和理解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有人体姿势校正的扩散模型（Diffusion-HPC），这是一种文本条件方法，通过注入有关人体结构的先验知识，生成具有合理姿势的人类的照片般逼真的图像。我们生成的图像附带 3D 网格，作为改进人体网格恢复任务的基本事实，而 3D 训练数据的短缺长期以来一直是一个问题。此外，我们还表明，Diffusion-HPC 在不同的调节策略下有效地提高了人类世代的真实感。 本文提出Diffusion-HPC方法，通过注入人体结构先验知识生成包含合理人体姿态的高质量图像及对应3D网格，用于提升复杂场景下的人体网格恢复任务。 Zhenzhen Weng,Laura Bravo-Sánchez,Serena Yeung-Levy cs.CV

authors_text: Amro Abbas,Kushal Tirumala,Dániel Simig,Surya Ganguli,Ari S. Morcos
title: SemDeDup: Data-efficient learning at web-scale through semantic deduplication
title_zh: SemDeDup：通过语义重复数据删除实现网络规模的数据高效学习
abstract: Progress in machine learning has been driven in large part by massive increases in data. However, large web-scale datasets such as LAION are largely uncurated beyond searches for exact duplicates, potentially leaving much redundancy. Here, we introduce SemDeDup, a method which leverages embeddings from pre-trained models to identify and remove semantic duplicates: data pairs which are semantically similar, but not exactly identical. Removing semantic duplicates preserves performance and speeds up learning. Analyzing a subset of LAION, we show that SemDeDup can remove 50% of the data with minimal performance loss, effectively halving training time. Moreover, performance increases out of distribution. Also, analyzing language models trained on C4, a partially curated dataset, we show that SemDeDup improves over prior approaches while providing efficiency gains. SemDeDup provides an example of how simple ways of leveraging quality embeddings can be used to make models learn faster with less data.
summary: Progress in machine learning has been driven in large part by massive increases in data. However, large web-scale datasets such as LAION are largely uncurated beyond searches for exact duplicates, potentially leaving much redundancy. Here, we introduce SemDeDup, a method which leverages embeddings from pre-trained models to identify and remove semantic duplicates: data pairs which are semantically similar, but not exactly identical. Removing semantic duplicates preserves performance and speeds up learning. Analyzing a subset of LAION, we show that SemDeDup can remove 50% of the data with minimal performance loss, effectively halving training time. Moreover, performance increases out of distribution. Also, analyzing language models trained on C4, a partially curated dataset, we show that SemDeDup improves over prior approaches while providing efficiency gains. SemDeDup provides an example of how simple ways of leveraging quality embeddings can be used to make models learn faster with less data.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的进步在很大程度上是由数据的大量增加推动的。然而，像 LAION 这样的大型网络规模数据集除了搜索精确的重复项之外，基本上没有经过整理，可能会留下很多冗余。在这里，我们介绍 SemDeDup，一种利用预训练模型中的嵌入来识别和删除语义重复项的方法：语义上相似但不完全相同的数据对。删除语义重复可以保持性能并加快学习速度。通过分析 LAION 的一个子集，我们发现 SemDeDup 可以以最小的性能损失删除 50% 的数据，有效地将训练时间减半。此外，性能随着分布的增加而增加。此外，通过分析在 C4（部分策划的数据集）上训练的语言模型，我们发现 SemDeDup 比之前的方法有所改进，同时提供了效率提升。 SemDeDup 提供了一个示例，说明如何使用利用质量嵌入的简单方法使模型以更少的数据更快地学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemDeDup方法，通过语义去重实现大规模数据下的高效学习。
AI.motivation: 大规模网络数据集存在大量语义重复冗余，仅去除精确重复无法有效提升效率，需更智能的数据清洗方法。
AI.method: 利用预训练模型的嵌入向量识别语义相似但非完全重复的数据对，通过去重减少训练数据量。
AI.result: 在LAION子集上可去除50%数据且性能损失极小，训练时间减半；在C4数据集上优于现有方法并提升效率。
AI.conclusion: 高质量嵌入的简单应用可显著提升模型训练效率，减少数据需求，为大规模数据优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel
title: Deep Metric Learning for Unsupervised Remote Sensing Change Detection
title_zh: 用于无监督遥感变化检测的深度度量学习
comment: Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD
comments: Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD
abstract: Remote Sensing Change Detection (RS-CD) aims to detect relevant changes from Multi-Temporal Remote Sensing Images (MT-RSIs), which aids in various RS applications such as land cover, land use, human development analysis, and disaster response. The performance of existing RS-CD methods is attributed to training on large annotated datasets. Furthermore, most of these models are less transferable in the sense that the trained model often performs very poorly when there is a domain gap between training and test datasets. This paper proposes an unsupervised CD method based on deep metric learning that can deal with both of these issues. Given an MT-RSI, the proposed method generates corresponding change probability map by iteratively optimizing an unsupervised CD loss without training it on a large dataset. Our unsupervised CD method consists of two interconnected deep networks, namely Deep-Change Probability Generator (D-CPG) and Deep-Feature Extractor (D-FE). The D-CPG is designed to predict change and no change probability maps for a given MT-RSI, while D-FE is used to extract deep features of MT-RSI that will be further used in the proposed unsupervised CD loss. We use transfer learning capability to initialize the parameters of D-FE. We iteratively optimize the parameters of D-CPG and D-FE for a given MT-RSI by minimizing the proposed unsupervised ``similarity-dissimilarity loss''. This loss is motivated by the principle of metric learning where we simultaneously maximize the distance between change pair-wise pixels while minimizing the distance between no-change pair-wise pixels in bi-temporal image domain and their deep feature domain. The experiments conducted on three CD datasets show that our unsupervised CD method achieves significant improvements over the state-of-the-art supervised and unsupervised CD methods. Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD
summary: Remote Sensing Change Detection (RS-CD) aims to detect relevant changes from Multi-Temporal Remote Sensing Images (MT-RSIs), which aids in various RS applications such as land cover, land use, human development analysis, and disaster response. The performance of existing RS-CD methods is attributed to training on large annotated datasets. Furthermore, most of these models are less transferable in the sense that the trained model often performs very poorly when there is a domain gap between training and test datasets. This paper proposes an unsupervised CD method based on deep metric learning that can deal with both of these issues. Given an MT-RSI, the proposed method generates corresponding change probability map by iteratively optimizing an unsupervised CD loss without training it on a large dataset. Our unsupervised CD method consists of two interconnected deep networks, namely Deep-Change Probability Generator (D-CPG) and Deep-Feature Extractor (D-FE). The D-CPG is designed to predict change and no change probability maps for a given MT-RSI, while D-FE is used to extract deep features of MT-RSI that will be further used in the proposed unsupervised CD loss. We use transfer learning capability to initialize the parameters of D-FE. We iteratively optimize the parameters of D-CPG and D-FE for a given MT-RSI by minimizing the proposed unsupervised ``similarity-dissimilarity loss''. This loss is motivated by the principle of metric learning where we simultaneously maximize the distance between change pair-wise pixels while minimizing the distance between no-change pair-wise pixels in bi-temporal image domain and their deep feature domain. The experiments conducted on three CD datasets show that our unsupervised CD method achieves significant improvements over the state-of-the-art supervised and unsupervised CD methods. Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD
abstract_zh: 遥感变化检测（RS-CD）旨在检测多时相遥感图像（MT-RSI）的相关变化，有助于各种遥感应用，例如土地覆盖、土地利用、人类发展分析和灾害响应。现有 RS-CD 方法的性能归因于对大型注释数据集的训练。此外，大多数模型的可移植性较差，因为当训练数据集和测试数据集之间存在领域差距时，训练后的模型通常表现很差。本文提出了一种基于深度度量学习的无监督 CD 方法，可以解决这两个问题。给定 MT-RSI，所提出的方法通过迭代优化无监督 CD 损失来生成相应的变化概率图，而无需在大型数据集上进行训练。我们的无监督CD方法由两个互连的深度网络组成，即深度变化概率生成器（D-CPG）和深度特征提取器（D-FE）。 D-CPG 旨在预测给定 MT-RSI 的变化和无变化概率图，而 D-FE 用于提取 MT-RSI 的深层特征，这些特征将进一步用于所提出的无监督 CD 损失。我们使用迁移学习能力来初始化 D-FE 的参数。我们通过最小化所提出的无监督“相似性-相异性损失”，迭代优化给定 MT-RSI 的 D-CPG 和 D-FE 参数。这种损失是由度量学习原理驱动的，其中我们同时最大化变化成对像素之间的距离，同时最小化双时态图像域及其深层特征域中无变化成对像素之间的距离。在三个 CD 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的无监督 CD 方法比最先进的监督和无监督 CD 方法取得了显着改进。代码可在 https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度度量学习的无监督遥感变化检测方法，无需大规模标注数据即可生成变化概率图。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感变化检测方法依赖大规模标注数据且跨域泛化能力差，难以应对训练与测试数据域差距问题。
AI.method: 设计双网络架构（D-CPG生成变化概率图，D-FE提取深度特征），通过迭代优化无监督相似-差异损失函数，同时最大化变化像素对距离并最小化未变化像素对距离。
AI.result: 在三个变化检测数据集上显著优于现有监督和无监督方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度度量学习有效解决了无监督遥感变化检测中的数据依赖性和域适应性问题。

search_text: Deep Metric Learning for Unsupervised Remote Sensing Change Detection 用于无监督遥感变化检测的深度度量学习 Remote Sensing Change Detection (RS-CD) aims to detect relevant changes from Multi-Temporal Remote Sensing Images (MT-RSIs), which aids in various RS applications such as land cover, land use, human development analysis, and disaster response. The performance of existing RS-CD methods is attributed to training on large annotated datasets. Furthermore, most of these models are less transferable in the sense that the trained model often performs very poorly when there is a domain gap between training and test datasets. This paper proposes an unsupervised CD method based on deep metric learning that can deal with both of these issues. Given an MT-RSI, the proposed method generates corresponding change probability map by iteratively optimizing an unsupervised CD loss without training it on a large dataset. Our unsupervised CD method consists of two interconnected deep networks, namely Deep-Change Probability Generator (D-CPG) and Deep-Feature Extractor (D-FE). The D-CPG is designed to predict change and no change probability maps for a given MT-RSI, while D-FE is used to extract deep features of MT-RSI that will be further used in the proposed unsupervised CD loss. We use transfer learning capability to initialize the parameters of D-FE. We iteratively optimize the parameters of D-CPG and D-FE for a given MT-RSI by minimizing the proposed unsupervised ``similarity-dissimilarity loss''. This loss is motivated by the principle of metric learning where we simultaneously maximize the distance between change pair-wise pixels while minimizing the distance between no-change pair-wise pixels in bi-temporal image domain and their deep feature domain. The experiments conducted on three CD datasets show that our unsupervised CD method achieves significant improvements over the state-of-the-art supervised and unsupervised CD methods. Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD 遥感变化检测（RS-CD）旨在检测多时相遥感图像（MT-RSI）的相关变化，有助于各种遥感应用，例如土地覆盖、土地利用、人类发展分析和灾害响应。现有 RS-CD 方法的性能归因于对大型注释数据集的训练。此外，大多数模型的可移植性较差，因为当训练数据集和测试数据集之间存在领域差距时，训练后的模型通常表现很差。本文提出了一种基于深度度量学习的无监督 CD 方法，可以解决这两个问题。给定 MT-RSI，所提出的方法通过迭代优化无监督 CD 损失来生成相应的变化概率图，而无需在大型数据集上进行训练。我们的无监督CD方法由两个互连的深度网络组成，即深度变化概率生成器（D-CPG）和深度特征提取器（D-FE）。 D-CPG 旨在预测给定 MT-RSI 的变化和无变化概率图，而 D-FE 用于提取 MT-RSI 的深层特征，这些特征将进一步用于所提出的无监督 CD 损失。我们使用迁移学习能力来初始化 D-FE 的参数。我们通过最小化所提出的无监督“相似性-相异性损失”，迭代优化给定 MT-RSI 的 D-CPG 和 D-FE 参数。这种损失是由度量学习原理驱动的，其中我们同时最大化变化成对像素之间的距离，同时最小化双时态图像域及其深层特征域中无变化成对像素之间的距离。在三个 CD 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的无监督 CD 方法比最先进的监督和无监督 CD 方法取得了显着改进。代码可在 https://github.com/wgcban/Metric-CD 获取 本文提出一种基于深度度量学习的无监督遥感变化检测方法，无需大规模标注数据即可生成变化概率图。 Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Chenyang Qi,Xiaodong Cun,Yong Zhang,Chenyang Lei,Xintao Wang,Ying Shan,Qifeng Chen
title: FateZero: Fusing Attentions for Zero-shot Text-based Video Editing
title_zh: FateZero：融合注意力进行基于零镜头文本的视频编辑
comment: Accepted to ICCV 2023 as an Oral Presentation. Project page: https://fate-zero-edit.github.io ; GitHub repository: https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/FateZero
comments: Accepted to ICCV 2023 as an Oral Presentation. Project page: https://fate-zero-edit.github.io ; GitHub repository: https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/FateZero
abstract: The diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in text-based image generation. However, since it contains enormous randomness in generation progress, it is still challenging to apply such models for real-world visual content editing, especially in videos. In this paper, we propose FateZero, a zero-shot text-based editing method on real-world videos without per-prompt training or use-specific mask. To edit videos consistently, we propose several techniques based on the pre-trained models. Firstly, in contrast to the straightforward DDIM inversion technique, our approach captures intermediate attention maps during inversion, which effectively retain both structural and motion information. These maps are directly fused in the editing process rather than generated during denoising. To further minimize semantic leakage of the source video, we then fuse self-attentions with a blending mask obtained by cross-attention features from the source prompt. Furthermore, we have implemented a reform of the self-attention mechanism in denoising UNet by introducing spatial-temporal attention to ensure frame consistency. Yet succinct, our method is the first one to show the ability of zero-shot text-driven video style and local attribute editing from the trained text-to-image model. We also have a better zero-shot shape-aware editing ability based on the text-to-video model. Extensive experiments demonstrate our superior temporal consistency and editing capability than previous works.
summary: The diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in text-based image generation. However, since it contains enormous randomness in generation progress, it is still challenging to apply such models for real-world visual content editing, especially in videos. In this paper, we propose FateZero, a zero-shot text-based editing method on real-world videos without per-prompt training or use-specific mask. To edit videos consistently, we propose several techniques based on the pre-trained models. Firstly, in contrast to the straightforward DDIM inversion technique, our approach captures intermediate attention maps during inversion, which effectively retain both structural and motion information. These maps are directly fused in the editing process rather than generated during denoising. To further minimize semantic leakage of the source video, we then fuse self-attentions with a blending mask obtained by cross-attention features from the source prompt. Furthermore, we have implemented a reform of the self-attention mechanism in denoising UNet by introducing spatial-temporal attention to ensure frame consistency. Yet succinct, our method is the first one to show the ability of zero-shot text-driven video style and local attribute editing from the trained text-to-image model. We also have a better zero-shot shape-aware editing ability based on the text-to-video model. Extensive experiments demonstrate our superior temporal consistency and editing capability than previous works.
abstract_zh: 基于扩散的生成模型在基于文本的图像生成方面取得了显着的成功。然而，由于它在生成过程中包含巨大的随机性，因此将此类模型应用于现实世界的视觉内容编辑（尤其是视频）仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 FateZero，一种基于零镜头文本的真实视频编辑方法，无需按提示进行训练或使用特定的掩模。为了一致地编辑视频，我们提出了几种基于预训练模型的技术。首先，与直接的 DDIM 反演技术相比，我们的方法在反演过程中捕获中间注意力图，从而有效地保留结构和运动信息。这些图在编辑过程中直接融合，而不是在去噪过程中生成。为了进一步减少源视频的语义泄漏，我们将自注意力与通过源提示的交叉注意力特征获得的混合掩模融合。此外，我们还对UNet去噪中的自注意力机制进行了改革，引入时空注意力来确保框架的一致性。然而，简而言之，我们的方法是第一个展示零镜头文本驱动视频风格和从经过训练的文本到图像模型进行本地属性编辑的能力的方法。我们还拥有基于文本转视频模型的更好的零镜头形状感知编辑能力。大量的实验证明了我们比以前的作品优越的时间一致性和编辑能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FateZero方法，实现无需特定训练或掩码的真实世界视频零样本文本编辑。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在文本生成图像中表现优异，但因生成过程随机性高，难以应用于视频编辑任务。
AI.method: 通过预训练模型捕捉中间注意力图并融合结构与运动信息，结合交叉注意力生成混合掩码，改进UNet时空注意力机制保证帧一致性。
AI.result: 实验显示方法在时间一致性和编辑能力上优于现有技术，首次实现零样本视频风格与局部属性编辑。
AI.conclusion: FateZero有效解决了视频编辑中的随机性问题，验证了零样本文本驱动编辑的可行性与优越性。

search_text: FateZero: Fusing Attentions for Zero-shot Text-based Video Editing FateZero：融合注意力进行基于零镜头文本的视频编辑 The diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in text-based image generation. However, since it contains enormous randomness in generation progress, it is still challenging to apply such models for real-world visual content editing, especially in videos. In this paper, we propose FateZero, a zero-shot text-based editing method on real-world videos without per-prompt training or use-specific mask. To edit videos consistently, we propose several techniques based on the pre-trained models. Firstly, in contrast to the straightforward DDIM inversion technique, our approach captures intermediate attention maps during inversion, which effectively retain both structural and motion information. These maps are directly fused in the editing process rather than generated during denoising. To further minimize semantic leakage of the source video, we then fuse self-attentions with a blending mask obtained by cross-attention features from the source prompt. Furthermore, we have implemented a reform of the self-attention mechanism in denoising UNet by introducing spatial-temporal attention to ensure frame consistency. Yet succinct, our method is the first one to show the ability of zero-shot text-driven video style and local attribute editing from the trained text-to-image model. We also have a better zero-shot shape-aware editing ability based on the text-to-video model. authors_text: Mai Nishimura,Shohei Nobuhara,Ko Nishino
title: InCrowdFormer: On-Ground Pedestrian World Model From Egocentric Views
title_zh: InCrowdFormer：以自我为中心的观点的地面行人世界模型
abstract: We introduce an on-ground Pedestrian World Model, a computational model that can predict how pedestrians move around an observer in the crowd on the ground plane, but from just the egocentric-views of the observer. Our model, InCrowdFormer, fully leverages the Transformer architecture by modeling pedestrian interaction and egocentric to top-down view transformation with attention, and autoregressively predicts on-ground positions of a variable number of people with an encoder-decoder architecture. We encode the uncertainties arising from unknown pedestrian heights with latent codes to predict the posterior distributions of pedestrian positions. We validate the effectiveness of InCrowdFormer on a novel prediction benchmark of real movements. The results show that InCrowdFormer accurately predicts the future coordination of pedestrians. To the best of our knowledge, InCrowdFormer is the first-of-its-kind pedestrian world model which we believe will benefit a wide range of egocentric-view applications including crowd navigation, tracking, and synthesis.
summary: We introduce an on-ground Pedestrian World Model, a computational model that can predict how pedestrians move around an observer in the crowd on the ground plane, but from just the egocentric-views of the observer. Our model, InCrowdFormer, fully leverages the Transformer architecture by modeling pedestrian interaction and egocentric to top-down view transformation with attention, and autoregressively predicts on-ground positions of a variable number of people with an encoder-decoder architecture. We encode the uncertainties arising from unknown pedestrian heights with latent codes to predict the posterior distributions of pedestrian positions. We validate the effectiveness of InCrowdFormer on a novel prediction benchmark of real movements. The results show that InCrowdFormer accurately predicts the future coordination of pedestrians. To the best of our knowledge, InCrowdFormer is the first-of-its-kind pedestrian world model which we believe will benefit a wide range of egocentric-view applications including crowd navigation, tracking, and synthesis.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了地面行人世界模型，这是一种计算模型，可以预测行人如何在地面人群中的观察者周围移动，但仅根据观察者的自我中心视图。我们的模型 InCrowdFormer 通过对行人交互进行建模以及以自我为中心到自上而下的注意力视图转换来充分利用 Transformer 架构，并通过编码器-解码器架构自回归预测可变数量的人的地面位置。我们用潜在代码对未知行人高度产生的不确定性进行编码，以预测行人位置的后验分布。我们在真实运动的新颖预测基准上验证了 InCrowdFormer 的有效性。结果表明，InCrowdFormer 能够准确预测行人未来的协调情况。据我们所知，InCrowdFormer 是首个同类行人世界模型，我们相信它将有利于各种以自我为中心的视图应用程序，包括人群导航、跟踪和合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于第一视角的行人世界模型InCrowdFormer，用于预测地面人群中行人的移动轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从第一视角准确建模人群中的行人交互及空间分布，限制了拥挤场景下的导航与追踪应用。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构，通过注意力机制建模行人交互及视角转换，结合编码器-解码器结构实现可变人数的地面位置自回归预测，并利用潜在编码处理行人高度不确定性。
AI.result: 在新型真实运动预测基准测试中，InCrowdFormer准确预测了行人未来坐标，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: InCrowdFormer是首个此类行人世界模型，可广泛应用于第一视角下的人群导航、追踪与合成任务。

authors_text: Johannes Kopp,Dominik Kellner,Aldi Piroli,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Tackling Clutter in Radar Data -- Label Generation and Detection Using PointNet++
title_zh: 解决雷达数据中的混乱问题——使用 PointNet++ 进行标签生成和检测
comment: To be published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), London, UK, 2023
comments: To be published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), London, UK, 2023
abstract: Radar sensors employed for environment perception, e.g. in autonomous vehicles, output a lot of unwanted clutter. These points, for which no corresponding real objects exist, are a major source of errors in following processing steps like object detection or tracking. We therefore present two novel neural network setups for identifying clutter. The input data, network architectures and training configuration are adjusted specifically for this task. Special attention is paid to the downsampling of point clouds composed of multiple sensor scans. In an extensive evaluation, the new setups display substantially better performance than existing approaches. Because there is no suitable public data set in which clutter is annotated, we design a method to automatically generate the respective labels. By applying it to existing data with object annotations and releasing its code, we effectively create the first freely available radar clutter data set representing real-world driving scenarios. Code and instructions are accessible at www.github.com/kopp-j/clutter-ds.
summary: Radar sensors employed for environment perception, e.g. in autonomous vehicles, output a lot of unwanted clutter. These points, for which no corresponding real objects exist, are a major source of errors in following processing steps like object detection or tracking. We therefore present two novel neural network setups for identifying clutter. The input data, network architectures and training configuration are adjusted specifically for this task. Special attention is paid to the downsampling of point clouds composed of multiple sensor scans. In an extensive evaluation, the new setups display substantially better performance than existing approaches. Because there is no suitable public data set in which clutter is annotated, we design a method to automatically generate the respective labels. By applying it to existing data with object annotations and releasing its code, we effectively create the first freely available radar clutter data set representing real-world driving scenarios. Code and instructions are accessible at www.github.com/kopp-j/clutter-ds.
abstract_zh: 用于环境感知的雷达传感器，例如在自动驾驶汽车中，会产生大量不需要的杂波。这些点不存在对应的真实对象，是对象检测或跟踪等后续处理步骤中的主要错误来源。因此，我们提出了两种新颖的神经网络设置来识别杂波。输入数据、网络架构和训练配置都是专门针对该任务进行调整的。特别关注由多个传感器扫描组成的点云的下采样。在广泛的评估中，新设置显示出比现有方法更好的性能。由于没有合适的公共数据集来标注杂波，我们设计了一种方法来自动生成各自的标签。通过将其应用到带有对象注释的现有数据并发布其代码，我们有效地创建了第一个免费提供的代表真实驾驶场景的雷达杂波数据集。代码和说明可从 www.github.com/kopp-j/clutter-ds 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用PointNet++神经网络解决雷达数据中的杂波问题，并生成标注数据以提升目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 雷达传感器在自动驾驶等场景中会产生大量无意义的杂波点，导致后续目标检测和跟踪出现误差，而现有方法缺乏有效的杂波标注数据集。
AI.method: 设计两种基于PointNet++的神经网络架构，优化点云下采样处理流程，并提出自动标注方法生成真实驾驶场景的雷达杂波数据集。
AI.result: 新方法在杂波识别任务中显著优于现有方案，同时发布了首个公开的雷达杂波标注数据集clutter-ds。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进网络架构与标注方法，有效解决了雷达点云中的杂波问题，并为后续研究提供了关键数据支持。

authors_text: Amin Falah,Shibashis Guha,Ashutosh Trivedi
title: Reinforcement Learning for Omega-Regular Specifications on Continuous-Time MDP
title_zh: 连续时间 MDP 的 Omega-Regular 规范的强化学习
comment: Full version of paper accepted to ICAPS 2023
comments: Full version of paper accepted to ICAPS 2023
abstract: Continuous-time Markov decision processes (CTMDPs) are canonical models to express sequential decision-making under dense-time and stochastic environments. When the stochastic evolution of the environment is only available via sampling, model-free reinforcement learning (RL) is the algorithm-of-choice to compute optimal decision sequence. RL, on the other hand, requires the learning objective to be encoded as scalar reward signals. Since doing such translations manually is both tedious and error-prone, a number of techniques have been proposed to translate high-level objectives (expressed in logic or automata formalism) to scalar rewards for discrete-time Markov decision processes (MDPs). Unfortunately, no automatic translation exists for CTMDPs. We consider CTMDP environments against the learning objectives expressed as omega-regular languages. Omega-regular languages generalize regular languages to infinite-horizon specifications and can express properties given in popular linear-time logic LTL. To accommodate the dense-time nature of CTMDPs, we consider two different semantics of omega-regular objectives: 1) satisfaction semantics where the goal of the learner is to maximize the probability of spending positive time in the good states, and 2) expectation semantics where the goal of the learner is to optimize the long-run expected average time spent in the ``good states" of the automaton. We present an approach enabling correct translation to scalar reward signals that can be readily used by off-the-shelf RL algorithms for CTMDPs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms by evaluating it on some popular CTMDP benchmarks with omega-regular objectives.
summary: Continuous-time Markov decision processes (CTMDPs) are canonical models to express sequential decision-making under dense-time and stochastic environments. When the stochastic evolution of the environment is only available via sampling, model-free reinforcement learning (RL) is the algorithm-of-choice to compute optimal decision sequence. RL, on the other hand, requires the learning objective to be encoded as scalar reward signals. Since doing such translations manually is both tedious and error-prone, a number of techniques have been proposed to translate high-level objectives (expressed in logic or automata formalism) to scalar rewards for discrete-time Markov decision processes (MDPs). Unfortunately, no automatic translation exists for CTMDPs. We consider CTMDP environments against the learning objectives expressed as omega-regular languages. Omega-regular languages generalize regular languages to infinite-horizon specifications and can express properties given in popular linear-time logic LTL. To accommodate the dense-time nature of CTMDPs, we consider two different semantics of omega-regular objectives: 1) satisfaction semantics where the goal of the learner is to maximize the probability of spending positive time in the good states, and 2) expectation semantics where the goal of the learner is to optimize the long-run expected average time spent in the ``good states" of the automaton. We present an approach enabling correct translation to scalar reward signals that can be readily used by off-the-shelf RL algorithms for CTMDPs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms by evaluating it on some popular CTMDP benchmarks with omega-regular objectives.
abstract_zh: 连续时间马尔可夫决策过程（CTMDP）是表达密集时间和随机环境下顺序决策的规范模型。当环境的随机演化只能通过采样获得时，无模型强化学习 (RL) 是计算最佳决策序列的首选算法。另一方面，强化学习要求将学习目标编码为标量奖励信号。由于手动进行此类转换既乏味又容易出错，因此人们提出了多种技术来将高级目标（以逻辑或自动机形式表示）转换为离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的标量奖励。不幸的是，CTMDP 不存在自动翻译。我们根据 omega-regular 语言表达的学习目标来考虑 CTMDP 环境。 Omega 正则语言将正则语言推广到无限范围规范，并且可以表达流行的线性时间逻辑 LTL 中给出的属性。为了适应 CTMDP 的密集时间性质，我们考虑欧米茄正则目标的两种不同语义：1）满意度语义，其中学习者的目标是最大化在良好状态下花费积极时间的概率，2）期望语义，其中学习者的目标是优化在自动机的“良好状态”中花费的长期预期平均时间。我们提出了一种方法，能够正确转换为标量奖励信号，该信号可以很容易地被现成使用CTMDP 的 RL 算法通过在一些具有 omega-regular 目标的流行 CTMDP 基准上进行评估，展示了所提出算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将omega-regular规范转换为连续时间马尔可夫决策过程（CTMDP）标量奖励信号的方法，以支持强化学习在密集时间环境下的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法自动将高阶逻辑规范转换为CTMDP的标量奖励，导致手动转换繁琐且易出错，而omega-regular语言能有效表达长期时序逻辑需求。
AI.method: 针对CTMDP的密集时间特性，提出两种语义解释（满足度语义和期望语义），并设计对应的奖励信号转换机制，兼容现成RL算法。
AI.result: 在多个CTMDP基准测试中验证了该方法的有效性，成功实现了omega-regular目标的优化决策。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了CTMDP与omega-regular规范自动转换的空白，为连续时间强化学习提供了理论支持与实用工具。

authors_text: Arindam Khan,Aditya Lonkar,Saladi Rahul,Aditya Subramanian,Andreas Wiese
title: Online and Dynamic Algorithms for Geometric Set Cover and Hitting Set
title_zh: 几何套盖和击球的在线动态算法
abstract: Set cover and hitting set are fundamental problems in combinatorial optimization which are well-studied in the offline, online, and dynamic settings. We study the geometric versions of these problems and present new online and dynamic algorithms for them. In the online version of set cover (resp. hitting set), $m$ sets (resp.~$n$ points) are give $n$ points (resp.~$m$ sets) arrive online, one-by-one. In the dynamic versions, points (resp. sets) can arrive as well as depart. Our goal is to maintain a set cover (resp. hitting set), minimizing the size of the computed solution. For online set cover for (axis-parallel) squares of arbitrary sizes, we present a tight $O(\log n)$-competitive algorithm. In the same setting for hitting set, we provide a tight $O(\log N)$-competitive algorithm, assuming that all points have integral coordinates in $[0,N)^{2}$. No online algorithm had been known for either of these settings, not even for unit squares (apart from the known online algorithms for arbitrary set systems). For both dynamic set cover and hitting set with $d$-dimensional hyperrectangles, we obtain $(\log m)^{O(d)}$-approximation algorithms with $(\log m)^{O(d)}$ worst-case update time. This partially answers an open question posed by Chan et al. [SODA'22]. Previously, no dynamic algorithms with polylogarithmic update time were known even in the setting of squares (for either of these problems). Our main technical contributions are an \emph{extended quad-tree }approach and a \emph{frequency reduction} technique that reduces geometric set cover instances to instances of general set cover with bounded frequency.

We study the geometric versions of these problems and present new online and dynamic algorithms for them. In the online version of set cover (resp. hitting set), $m$ sets (resp.~$n$ points) are give $n$ points (resp.~$m$ sets) arrive online, one-by-one. In the same setting for hitting set, we provide a tight $O(\log N)$-competitive algorithm, assuming that all points have integral coordinates in $[0,N)^{2}$. No online algorithm had been known for either of these settings, not even for unit squares (apart from the known online algorithms for arbitrary set systems). For both dynamic set cover and hitting set with $d$-dimensional hyperrectangles, we obtain $(\log m)^{O(d)}$-approximation algorithms with $(\log m)^{O(d)}$ worst-case update time. This partially answers an open question posed by Chan et al. [SODA'22]. Previously, no dynamic algorithms with polylogarithmic update time were known even in the setting of squares (for either of these problems). Our main technical contributions are an \emph{extended quad-tree }approach and a \emph{frequency reduction} technique that reduces geometric set cover instances to instances of general set cover with bounded frequency.
abstract_zh: 集合覆盖和击球集合是组合优化中的基本问题，在离线、在线和动态设置中都得到了充分研究。我们研究这些问题的几何版本，并为它们提出新的在线动态算法。在在线版本的套套（分别是击球套）中，$m$套（分别~$n$点）将获得$n$点（分别~$m$套）在线到达，一一对应。在动态版本中，点（或集合）可以到达也可以离开。我们的目标是维持设定覆盖（或命中设定），最小化计算解决方案的大小。对于任意大小的（轴平行）正方形的在线集合覆盖，我们提出了一个严格的 $O(\log n)$ 竞争算法。在相同的击球设置中，我们提供了严格的 $O(\log N)$ 竞争算法，假设所有点都在 $[0,N)^{2}$ 中具有积分坐标。对于这些设置中的任何一个，都没有已知的在线算法，甚至对于单位平方也没有已知的在线算法（除了用于任意集合系统的已知在线算法）。对于具有 $d$ 维超矩形的动态集覆盖和命中集，我们获得 $(\log m)^{O(d)}$ 近似算法，其最坏情况更新时间为 $(\log m)^{O(d)}$。这部分回答了 Chan 等人提出的一个悬而未决的问题。 [苏打'22]。以前，即使在平方的设置中（对于这些问题中的任何一个），也没有已知具有多对数更新时间的动态算法。我们的主要技术贡献是\emph{扩展四叉树}方法和\emph{频率降低}技术，该技术将几何集覆盖实例减少为具有有限频率的一般集覆盖实例。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了几何集合覆盖和击中集问题的在线与动态算法，提出了针对轴对齐矩形和高维超矩形的新算法。
AI.motivation: 传统集合覆盖和击中集问题在离线场景下已有较多研究，但针对几何场景的在线和动态算法仍存在空白，尤其缺乏对动态数据高效维护的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出扩展四叉树结构和频率降低技术，将几何问题转化为通用集合覆盖问题，并设计适用于动态环境的近似算法。
AI.result: 为在线平方覆盖和击中集问题分别提供了O(log n)和O(log N)竞争比算法；针对高维超矩形动态问题，实现了多项式对数时间更新的近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 首次在几何场景下构建了在线和动态集合覆盖/击中集算法，部分解决了Chan等人提出的开放问题，为后续研究提供了关键技术框架。

search_text: Online and Dynamic Algorithms for Geometric Set Cover and Hitting Set 几何套盖和击球的在线动态算法 Set cover and hitting set are fundamental problems in combinatorial optimization which are well-studied in the offline, online, and dynamic settings. We study the geometric versions of these problems and present new online and dynamic algorithms for them. In the online version of set cover (resp. hitting set), $m$ sets (resp.~$n$ points) are give $n$ points (resp.~$m$ sets) arrive online, one-by-one. In the dynamic versions, points (resp. sets) can arrive as well as depart. Our goal is to maintain a set cover (resp. hitting set), minimizing the size of the computed solution. For online set cover for (axis-parallel) squares of arbitrary sizes, we present a tight $O(\log n)$-competitive algorithm. In the same setting for hitting set, we provide a tight $O(\log N)$-competitive algorithm, assuming that all points have integral coordinates in $[0,N)^{2}$. No online algorithm had been known for either of these settings, not even for unit squares (apart from the known online algorithms for arbitrary set systems). For both dynamic set cover and hitting set with $d$-dimensional hyperrectangles, we obtain $(\log m)^{O(d)}$-approximation algorithms with $(\log m)^{O(d)}$ worst-case update time. This partially answers an open question posed by Chan et al. [SODA'22]. Previously, no dynamic algorithms with polylogarithmic update time were known even in the setting of squares (for either of these problems). Our main technical contributions are an \emph{extended quad-tree }approach and a \emph{frequency reduction} technique that reduces geometric set cover instances to instances of general set cover with bounded frequency. 集合覆盖和击球集合是组合优化中的基本问题，在离线、在线和动态设置中都得到了充分研究。我们研究这些问题的几何版本，并为它们提出新的在线动态算法。在在线版本的套套（分别是击球套）中，$m$套（分别~$n$点）将获得$n$点（分别~$m$套）在线到达，一一对应。在动态版本中，点（或集合）可以到达也可以离开。我们的目标是维持设定覆盖（或命中设定），最小化计算解决方案的大小。对于任意大小的（轴平行）正方形的在线集合覆盖，我们提出了一个严格的 $O(\log n)$ 竞争算法。在相同的击球设置中，我们提供了严格的 $O(\log N)$ 竞争算法，假设所有点都在 $[0,N)^{2}$ 中具有积分坐标。对于这些设置中的任何一个，都没有已知的在线算法，甚至对于单位平方也没有已知的在线算法（除了用于任意集合系统的已知在线算法）。对于具有 $d$ 维超矩形的动态集覆盖和命中集，我们获得 $(\log m)^{O(d)}$ 近似算法，其最坏情况更新时间为 $(\log m)^{O(d)}$。这部分回答了 Chan 等人提出的一个悬而未决的问题。 [苏打'22]。以前，即使在平方的设置中（对于这些问题中的任何一个），也没有已知具有多对数更新时间的动态算法。我们的主要技术贡献是\emph{扩展四叉树}方法和\emph{频率降低}技术，该技术将几何集覆盖实例减少为具有有限频率的一般集覆盖实例。 本文研究了几何集合覆盖和击中集问题的在线与动态算法，提出了针对轴对齐矩形和高维超矩形的新算法。 Arindam Khan,Aditya Lonkar,Saladi Rahul,Aditya Subramanian,Andreas Wiese cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Somoballi Ghoshal,Shremoyee Goswami,Amlan Chakrabarti,Susmita Sur-Kolay
title: Fast 3D Volumetric Image Reconstruction from 2D MRI Slices by Parallel Processing
title_zh: 通过并行处理从 2D MRI 切片快速重建 3D 体积图像
comment: 19 pages, figure 14
comments: 19 pages, figure 14
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is a technology for non-invasive imaging of anatomical features in detail. It can help in functional analysis of organs of a specimen but it is very costly. In this work, methods for (i) virtual three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction from a single sequence of two-dimensional (2D) slices of MR images of a human spine and brain along a single axis, and (ii) generation of missing inter-slice data are proposed. Our approach helps in preserving the edges, shape, size, as well as the internal tissue structures of the object being captured. The sequence of original 2D slices along a single axis is divided into smaller equal sub-parts which are then reconstructed using edge preserved kriging interpolation to predict the missing slice information. In order to speed up the process of interpolation, we have used multiprocessing by carrying out the initial interpolation on parallel cores. From the 3D matrix thus formed, shearlet transform is applied to estimate the edges considering the 2D blocks along the $Z$ axis, and to minimize the blurring effect using a proposed mean-median logic. Finally, for visualization, the sub-matrices are merged into a final 3D matrix. Next, the newly formed 3D matrix is split up into voxels and marching cubes method is applied to get the approximate 3D image for viewing. To the best of our knowledge it is a first of its kind approach based on kriging interpolation and multiprocessing for 3D reconstruction from 2D slices, and approximately 98.89\% accuracy is achieved with respect to similarity metrics for image comparison. The time required for reconstruction has also been reduced by approximately 70\% with multiprocessing even for a large input data set compared to that with single core processing.
summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is a technology for non-invasive imaging of anatomical features in detail. It can help in functional analysis of organs of a specimen but it is very costly. In this work, methods for (i) virtual three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction from a single sequence of two-dimensional (2D) slices of MR images of a human spine and brain along a single axis, and (ii) generation of missing inter-slice data are proposed. Our approach helps in preserving the edges, shape, size, as well as the internal tissue structures of the object being captured. The sequence of original 2D slices along a single axis is divided into smaller equal sub-parts which are then reconstructed using edge preserved kriging interpolation to predict the missing slice information. In order to speed up the process of interpolation, we have used multiprocessing by carrying out the initial interpolation on parallel cores. From the 3D matrix thus formed, shearlet transform is applied to estimate the edges considering the 2D blocks along the $Z$ axis, and to minimize the blurring effect using a proposed mean-median logic. Finally, for visualization, the sub-matrices are merged into a final 3D matrix. Next, the newly formed 3D matrix is split up into voxels and marching cubes method is applied to get the approximate 3D image for viewing. To the best of our knowledge it is a first of its kind approach based on kriging interpolation and multiprocessing for 3D reconstruction from 2D slices, and approximately 98.89\% accuracy is achieved with respect to similarity metrics for image comparison. The time required for reconstruction has also been reduced by approximately 70\% with multiprocessing even for a large input data set compared to that with single core processing.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像（MRI）是一种对解剖特征进行非侵入性详细成像的技术。它可以帮助对标本器官进行功能分析，但成本非常高。在这项工作中，提出了以下方法：(i) 从人类脊柱和大脑的 MR 图像沿单轴的二维 (2D) 切片的单个序列进行虚拟三维 (3D) 重建，以及 (ii) 生成丢失的切片间数据。我们的方法有助于保留被捕获物体的边缘、形状、尺寸以及内部组织结构。沿单轴的原始 2D 切片序列被分成较小的相等子部分，然后使用边缘保留克里金插值来重建这些子部分以预测丢失的切片信息。为了加速插值过程，我们通过在并行核心上执行初始插值来使用多处理。根据由此形成的 3D 矩阵，应用剪切波变换来估计沿 $Z$ 轴的 2D 块的边缘，并使用建议的均值中值逻辑最小化模糊效果。最后，为了可视化，子矩阵被合并成最终的 3D 矩阵。接下来，新形成的 3D 矩阵被分割为体素，并应用移动立方体方法来获得近似的 3D 图像以供观看。据我们所知，这是基于克里格插值和多重处理的同类方法中的第一个，用于从 2D 切片进行 3D 重建，并且在图像比较的相似性度量方面实现了大约 98.89% 的准确度。与单核处理相比，即使对于大型输入数据集，重建所需的时间也减少了约 70%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于克里金插值和并行处理的快速3D体积图像重建方法，用于从2D MRI切片生成3D图像。
AI.motivation: MRI技术成本高昂且重建过程耗时，需开发高效方法以提升3D重建速度并保持图像质量。
AI.method: 将2D切片分割为子块，采用边缘保留克里金插值预测缺失数据，结合多核并行处理加速计算；通过剪切波变换优化边缘检测，并利用Marching Cubes算法生成3D可视化模型。
AI.result: 实现98.89%的图像相似度，处理时间较单核模式缩短70%，有效保留组织结构细节。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次将克里金插值与并行计算结合用于3D重建，显著提升效率和精度，为医学影像分析提供新思路。
