authors_text: Andrey Voynov,Qinghao Chu,Daniel Cohen-Or,Kfir Aberman
title: P+: Extended Textual Conditioning in Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: P+：文本到图像生成中的扩展文本调节
abstract: We introduce an Extended Textual Conditioning space in text-to-image models, referred to as $P+$. This space consists of multiple textual conditions, derived from per-layer prompts, each corresponding to a layer of the denoising U-net of the diffusion model. We show that the extended space provides greater disentangling and control over image synthesis. We further introduce Extended Textual Inversion (XTI), where the images are inverted into $P+$, and represented by per-layer tokens. We show that XTI is more expressive and precise, and converges faster than the original Textual Inversion (TI) space. The extended inversion method does not involve any noticeable trade-off between reconstruction and editability and induces more regular inversions. We conduct a series of extensive experiments to analyze and understand the properties of the new space, and to showcase the effectiveness of our method for personalizing text-to-image models. Furthermore, we utilize the unique properties of this space to achieve previously unattainable results in object-style mixing using text-to-image models. Project page: https://prompt-plus.github.io
summary: We introduce an Extended Textual Conditioning space in text-to-image models, referred to as $P+$. This space consists of multiple textual conditions, derived from per-layer prompts, each corresponding to a layer of the denoising U-net of the diffusion model. We show that the extended space provides greater disentangling and control over image synthesis. We further introduce Extended Textual Inversion (XTI), where the images are inverted into $P+$, and represented by per-layer tokens. We show that XTI is more expressive and precise, and converges faster than the original Textual Inversion (TI) space. The extended inversion method does not involve any noticeable trade-off between reconstruction and editability and induces more regular inversions. We conduct a series of extensive experiments to analyze and understand the properties of the new space, and to showcase the effectiveness of our method for personalizing text-to-image models. Furthermore, we utilize the unique properties of this space to achieve previously unattainable results in object-style mixing using text-to-image models. Project page: https://prompt-plus.github.io
abstract_zh: 我们在文本到图像模型中引入了扩展文本条件空间，称为 $P+$。该空间由多个文本条件组成，这些文本条件源自每层提示，每个条件对应于扩散模型的去噪 U 网的一层。我们表明，扩展的空间提供了对图像合成的更好的解理和控制。我们进一步引入扩展文本反转（XTI），其中图像被反转为$P+$，并由每层标记表示。我们证明 XTI 比原始文本反转 (TI) 空间更具表现力和精确性，并且收敛速度更快。扩展的反演方法不涉及重建和可编辑性之间的任何明显的权衡，并且引起更规则的反演。我们进行了一系列广泛的实验来分析和理解新空间的属性，并展示我们个性化文本到图像模型的方法的有效性。此外，我们利用该空间的独特属性，使用文本到图像模型在对象样式混合中实现了以前无法实现的结果。项目页面：https://prompt-plus.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展文本条件空间P+，用于改进文本到图像生成模型的控制和解耦能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到图像生成模型在控制和解耦方面存在局限性，难以实现更精细的图像合成和个性化。
AI.method: 本文引入了P+扩展文本条件空间，该空间基于扩散模型中去噪U-net的每层提示生成多个文本条件，并提出扩展文本反转（XTI）方法，将图像反转为P+中的每层标记。
AI.result: 实验表明，P+空间提供了更好的解耦和控制能力，XTI方法比传统文本反转更高效、精确，并且在对象风格混合方面实现了前所未有的结果。
AI.conclusion: P+和XTI方法显著提升了文本到图像模型的控制和个性化能力，为未来的研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Nicolás Ayobi,Alejandra Pérez-Rondón,Santiago Rodríguez,Pablo Arbeláez
title: MATIS: Masked-Attention Transformers for Surgical Instrument Segmentation
title_zh: MATIS：用于手术器械分割的 Masked-Attention Transformer
comment: ISBI 2023 (Oral). Winning method of the 2022 SAR-RARP50 Challenge (arXiv:2401.00496). Official extension published at arXiv:2401.11174 . Code available at https://github.com/BCV-Uniandes/MATIS
comments: ISBI 2023 (Oral). Winning method of the 2022 SAR-RARP50 Challenge (arXiv:2401.00496). Official extension published at arXiv:2401.11174 . Code available at https://github.com/BCV-Uniandes/MATIS
abstract: We propose Masked-Attention Transformers for Surgical Instrument Segmentation (MATIS), a two-stage, fully transformer-based method that leverages modern pixel-wise attention mechanisms for instrument segmentation. MATIS exploits the instance-level nature of the task by employing a masked attention module that generates and classifies a set of fine instrument region proposals. Our method incorporates long-term video-level information through video transformers to improve temporal consistency and enhance mask classification. We validate our approach in the two standard public benchmarks, Endovis 2017 and Endovis 2018. Our experiments demonstrate that MATIS' per-frame baseline outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods and that including our temporal consistency module boosts our model's performance further.
summary: We propose Masked-Attention Transformers for Surgical Instrument Segmentation (MATIS), a two-stage, fully transformer-based method that leverages modern pixel-wise attention mechanisms for instrument segmentation. MATIS exploits the instance-level nature of the task by employing a masked attention module that generates and classifies a set of fine instrument region proposals. Our method incorporates long-term video-level information through video transformers to improve temporal consistency and enhance mask classification. We validate our approach in the two standard public benchmarks, Endovis 2017 and Endovis 2018. Our experiments demonstrate that MATIS' per-frame baseline outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods and that including our temporal consistency module boosts our model's performance further.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于手术器械分割的掩模注意力变换器（MATIS），这是一种两阶段、完全基于变换器的方法，利用现代像素式注意力机制进行器械分割。 MATIS 通过使用屏蔽注意力模块来生成和分类一组精细仪器区域建议，从而利用任务的实例级性质。我们的方法通过视频转换器合并长期视频级信息，以提高时间一致性并增强掩模分类。我们在两个标准公共基准（Endovis 2017 和 Endovis 2018）中验证了我们的方法。我们的实验表明，MATIS 的每帧基线优于以前最先进的方法，并且包含我们的时间一致性模块可以进一步提高我们模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的两阶段手术器械分割方法MATIS，利用像素级注意力机制和视频Transformer提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有手术器械分割方法在处理复杂场景和时序一致性方面存在不足，需改进分割精度与动态信息建模能力。
AI.method: MATIS采用两阶段架构：第一阶段通过masked attention模块生成器械区域提议，第二阶段结合视频Transformer建模长期时序信息以增强分类与分割一致性。
AI.result: 在Endovis 2017和2018数据集上，MATIS的单帧基线模型优于现有SOTA方法，加入时序模块后性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: MATIS通过融合像素级注意力与时序建模有效解决了手术器械分割任务中的复杂场景与动态一致性挑战。

authors_text: Duolikun Danier,Fan Zhang,David Bull
title: LDMVFI: Video Frame Interpolation with Latent Diffusion Models
title_zh: LDMVFI：使用潜在扩散模型的视频帧插值
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2024
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2024
abstract: Existing works on video frame interpolation (VFI) mostly employ deep neural networks that are trained by minimizing the L1, L2, or deep feature space distance (e.g. VGG loss) between their outputs and ground-truth frames. However, recent works have shown that these metrics are poor indicators of perceptual VFI quality. Towards developing perceptually-oriented VFI methods, in this work we propose latent diffusion model-based VFI, LDMVFI. This approaches the VFI problem from a generative perspective by formulating it as a conditional generation problem. As the first effort to address VFI using latent diffusion models, we rigorously benchmark our method on common test sets used in the existing VFI literature. Our quantitative experiments and user study indicate that LDMVFI is able to interpolate video content with favorable perceptual quality compared to the state of the art, even in the high-resolution regime. Our code is available at https://github.com/danier97/LDMVFI.
summary: Existing works on video frame interpolation (VFI) mostly employ deep neural networks that are trained by minimizing the L1, L2, or deep feature space distance (e.g. VGG loss) between their outputs and ground-truth frames. However, recent works have shown that these metrics are poor indicators of perceptual VFI quality. Towards developing perceptually-oriented VFI methods, in this work we propose latent diffusion model-based VFI, LDMVFI. This approaches the VFI problem from a generative perspective by formulating it as a conditional generation problem. As the first effort to address VFI using latent diffusion models, we rigorously benchmark our method on common test sets used in the existing VFI literature. Our quantitative experiments and user study indicate that LDMVFI is able to interpolate video content with favorable perceptual quality compared to the state of the art, even in the high-resolution regime. Our code is available at https://github.com/danier97/LDMVFI.
abstract_zh: 现有的视频帧插值 (VFI) 工作大多采用深度神经网络，这些网络通过最小化输出与地面实况帧之间的 L1、L2 或深度特征空间距离（例如 VGG 损失）来进行训练。然而，最近的研究表明，这些指标并不能很好地反映感知 VFI 质量。为了开发面向感知的 VFI 方法，在这项工作中，我们提出了基于潜在扩散模型的 VFI，LDMVFI。通过将 VFI 问题表述为条件生成问题，从生成角度解决了 VFI 问题。作为使用潜在扩散模型解决 VFI 问题的首次尝试，我们在现有 VFI 文献中使用的常见测试集上严格对我们的方法进行基准测试。我们的定量实验和用户研究表明，与现有技术相比，LDMVFI 能够以良好的感知质量插入视频内容，即使在高分辨率状态下也是如此。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/danier97/LDMVFI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型（LDM）的视频帧插值方法LDMVFI，旨在提升视频插值的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频帧插值方法依赖L1/L2或深度特征距离损失，但这些指标无法准确反映人眼感知的插值质量，亟需从生成模型角度改进。
AI.method: 将视频帧插值建模为条件生成问题，首次采用潜在扩散模型框架进行插值，通过扩散过程生成高质量中间帧。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上定量实验和用户研究显示，LDMVFI在感知质量上优于现有方法，尤其在高分辨率场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: LDMVFI验证了生成模型在视频插值任务中的潜力，为感知导向的VFI研究提供了新方向。

Towards developing perceptually-oriented VFI methods, in this work we propose latent diffusion model-based VFI, LDMVFI. As the first effort to address VFI using latent diffusion models, we rigorously benchmark our method on common test sets used in the existing VFI literature. Our quantitative experiments and user study indicate that LDMVFI is able to interpolate video content with favorable perceptual quality compared to the state of the art, even in the high-resolution regime. Our code is available at https://github.com/danier97/LDMVFI. 现有的视频帧插值 (VFI) 工作大多采用深度神经网络，这些网络通过最小化输出与地面实况帧之间的 L1、L2 或深度特征空间距离（例如 VGG 损失）来进行训练。然而，最近的研究表明，这些指标并不能很好地反映感知 VFI 质量。为了开发面向感知的 VFI 方法，在这项工作中，我们提出了基于潜在扩散模型的 VFI，LDMVFI。通过将 VFI 问题表述为条件生成问题，从生成角度解决了 VFI 问题。作为使用潜在扩散模型解决 VFI 问题的首次尝试，我们在现有 VFI 文献中使用的常见测试集上严格对我们的方法进行基准测试。我们的定量实验和用户研究表明，与现有技术相比，LDMVFI 能够以良好的感知质量插入视频内容，即使在高分辨率状态下也是如此。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/danier97/LDMVFI 获取。 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型（LDM）的视频帧插值方法LDMVFI，旨在提升视频插值的感知质量。 Duolikun Danier,Fan Zhang,David Bull eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jonathan Timcheck,Sumit Bam Shrestha,Daniel Ben Dayan Rubin,Adam Kupryjanow,Garrick Orchard,Lukasz Pindor,Timothy Shea,Mike Davies
title: The Intel Neuromorphic DNS Challenge
title_zh: 英特尔神经形态 DNS 挑战
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
abstract: A critical enabler for progress in neuromorphic computing research is the ability to transparently evaluate different neuromorphic solutions on important tasks and to compare them to state-of-the-art conventional solutions. The Intel Neuromorphic Deep Noise Suppression Challenge (Intel N-DNS Challenge), inspired by the Microsoft DNS Challenge, tackles a ubiquitous and commercially relevant task: real-time audio denoising. Audio denoising is likely to reap the benefits of neuromorphic computing due to its low-bandwidth, temporal nature and its relevance for low-power devices. The Intel N-DNS Challenge consists of two tracks: a simulation-based algorithmic track to encourage algorithmic innovation, and a neuromorphic hardware (Loihi 2) track to rigorously evaluate solutions. For both tracks, we specify an evaluation methodology based on energy, latency, and resource consumption in addition to output audio quality. We make the Intel N-DNS Challenge dataset scripts and evaluation code freely accessible, encourage community participation with monetary prizes, and release a neuromorphic baseline solution which shows promising audio quality, high power efficiency, and low resource consumption when compared to Microsoft NsNet2 and a proprietary Intel denoising model used in production. We hope the Intel N-DNS Challenge will hasten innovation in neuromorphic algorithms research, especially in the area of training tools and methods for real-time signal processing. We expect the winners of the challenge will demonstrate that for problems like audio denoising, significant gains in power and resources can be realized on neuromorphic devices available today compared to conventional state-of-the-art solutions.

abstract_zh: 神经拟态计算研究取得进展的一个关键推动因素是能够透明地评估重要任务上的不同神经拟态解决方案，并将它们与最先进的传统解决方案进行比较。英特尔神经拟态深度噪声抑制挑战赛（英特尔 N-DNS 挑战赛）受到 Microsoft DNS 挑战赛的启发，旨在解决一项普遍存在的商业相关任务：实时音频降噪。由于其低带宽、时间特性及其与低功耗设备的相关性，音频去噪可能会受益于神经形态计算。英特尔 N-DNS 挑战赛包含两个赛道：鼓励算法创新的基于模拟的算法赛道和严格评估解决方案的神经形态硬件 (Loihi 2) 赛道。对于这两个轨道，除了输出音频质量之外，我们还指定了基于能量、延迟和资源消耗的评估方法。我们免费提供英特尔 N-DNS 挑战赛数据集脚本和评估代码，通过奖金鼓励社区参与，并发布神经形态基线解决方案，与 Microsoft NsNet2 和生产中使用的专有英特尔去噪模型相比，该解决方案显示出良好的音频质量、高能效和低资源消耗。我们希望英特尔 N-DNS 挑战赛能够加速神经形态算法研究的创新，特别是在实时信号处理的训练工具和方法领域。我们预计挑战赛的获胜者将证明，对于音频降噪等问题，与传统的最先进的解决方案相比，当今可用的神经形态设备可以在功率和资源方面实现显着的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了英特尔神经形态DNS挑战赛，旨在通过算法和硬件赛道推动神经形态计算在实时音频降噪任务中的研究与应用。
AI.motivation: 神经形态计算的进步需要透明评估不同解决方案的能力，而音频降噪作为低带宽、低功耗场景的关键任务，适合验证神经形态计算的优势。
AI.method: 设立算法仿真赛道和Loihi 2硬件赛道，以能量消耗、延迟、资源占用及音频质量为评估标准，并提供开源数据集和基准方案。
AI.result: 发布的神经形态基准方案在音频质量、功耗效率和资源消耗方面优于微软NsNet2及英特尔生产模型，验证了神经形态硬件的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛将加速神经形态算法创新，尤其在实时信号处理的训练工具与方法领域，有望证明当前神经形态设备在功耗和资源利用上的显著优势。

authors_text: Krisztian Balog,Filip Radlinski,Andrey Petrov
title: Measuring the Impact of Explanation Bias: A Study of Natural Language Justifications for Recommender Systems
title_zh: 衡量解释偏差的影响：推荐系统自然语言论证的研究
comment: Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI EA '23), 2023
comments: Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI EA '23), 2023
abstract: Despite the potential impact of explanations on decision making, there is a lack of research on quantifying their effect on users' choices. This paper presents an experimental protocol for measuring the degree to which positively or negatively biased explanations can lead to users choosing suboptimal recommendations. Key elements of this protocol include a preference elicitation stage to allow for personalizing recommendations, manual identification and extraction of item aspects from reviews, and a controlled method for introducing bias through the combination of both positive and negative aspects. We study explanations in two different textual formats: as a list of item aspects and as fluent natural language text. Through a user study with 129 participants, we demonstrate that explanations can significantly affect users' selections and that these findings generalize across explanation formats.
summary: Despite the potential impact of explanations on decision making, there is a lack of research on quantifying their effect on users' choices. This paper presents an experimental protocol for measuring the degree to which positively or negatively biased explanations can lead to users choosing suboptimal recommendations. Key elements of this protocol include a preference elicitation stage to allow for personalizing recommendations, manual identification and extraction of item aspects from reviews, and a controlled method for introducing bias through the combination of both positive and negative aspects. We study explanations in two different textual formats: as a list of item aspects and as fluent natural language text. Through a user study with 129 participants, we demonstrate that explanations can significantly affect users' selections and that these findings generalize across explanation formats.
abstract_zh: 尽管解释对决策具有潜在影响，但缺乏量化解释对用户选择影响的研究。本文提出了一个实验协议，用于测量积极或消极的偏见解释可能导致用户选择次优推荐的程度。该协议的关键要素包括偏好诱导阶段，以允许个性化推荐、手动识别和从评论中提取项目方面，以及通过积极和消极方面的组合引入偏见的受控方法。我们研究两种不同文本格式的解释：项目方面的列表和流畅的自然语言文本。通过对 129 名参与者进行的用户研究，我们证明解释可以显着影响用户的选择，并且这些发现可以推广到各种解释格式。

AI.tldr: 本文设计实验协议量化偏差解释对用户推荐选择的影响，并比较不同文本格式的解释效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对推荐系统中解释影响的量化分析，需验证偏差解释如何引导用户选择次优推荐。
AI.method: 通过偏好收集、评论属性提取、控制偏差注入及两种文本格式（属性列表/自然语言）的用户实验（129人）进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明解释显著影响用户选择，且该结论在两种文本格式中均成立。
AI.conclusion: 解释内容偏差会显著改变用户决策，推荐系统需谨慎设计解释以避免误导。

authors_text: Ziyue Huang,Lujuan Dang,Yuqing Xie,Wentao Ma,Badong Chen
title: Gate Recurrent Unit Network based on Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion for State-of-Health Estimation
title_zh: 基于健康状况估计的希尔伯特-施密特独立准则的门循环单元网络
abstract: State-of-health (SOH) estimation is a key step in ensuring the safe and reliable operation of batteries. Due to issues such as varying data distribution and sequence length in different cycles, most existing methods require health feature extraction technique, which can be time-consuming and labor-intensive. GRU can well solve this problem due to the simple structure and superior performance, receiving widespread attentions. However, redundant information still exists within the network and impacts the accuracy of SOH estimation. To address this issue, a new GRU network based on Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (GRU-HSIC) is proposed. First, a zero masking network is used to transform all battery data measured with varying lengths every cycle into sequences of the same length, while still retaining information about the original data size in each cycle. Second, the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) bottleneck, which evolved from Information Bottleneck (IB) theory, is extended to GRU to compress the information from hidden layers. To evaluate the proposed method, we conducted experiments on datasets from the Center for Advanced Life Cycle Engineering (CALCE) of the University of Maryland and NASA Ames Prognostics Center of Excellence. Experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves higher accuracy than other recurrent models.
summary: State-of-health (SOH) estimation is a key step in ensuring the safe and reliable operation of batteries. Due to issues such as varying data distribution and sequence length in different cycles, most existing methods require health feature extraction technique, which can be time-consuming and labor-intensive. GRU can well solve this problem due to the simple structure and superior performance, receiving widespread attentions. However, redundant information still exists within the network and impacts the accuracy of SOH estimation. To address this issue, a new GRU network based on Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (GRU-HSIC) is proposed. First, a zero masking network is used to transform all battery data measured with varying lengths every cycle into sequences of the same length, while still retaining information about the original data size in each cycle. Second, the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) bottleneck, which evolved from Information Bottleneck (IB) theory, is extended to GRU to compress the information from hidden layers. To evaluate the proposed method, we conducted experiments on datasets from the Center for Advanced Life Cycle Engineering (CALCE) of the University of Maryland and NASA Ames Prognostics Center of Excellence. Experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves higher accuracy than other recurrent models.
abstract_zh: 健康状态（SOH）评估是确保电池安全可靠运行的关键步骤。由于不同周期的数据分布和序列长度不同等问题，大多数现有方法需要健康特征提取技术，这可能是耗时且费力的。 GRU由于结构简单、性能优越，很好地解决了这一问题，受到广泛关注。然而，网络中仍然存在冗余信息，影响SOH估计的准确性。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（GRU-HSIC）的新GRU网络。首先，使用零掩码网络将每个周期以不同长度测量的所有电池数据转换为相同长度的序列，同时仍然保留每个周期中原始数据大小的信息。其次，从信息瓶颈（IB）理论演变而来的希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（HSIC）瓶颈被扩展到GRU以压缩来自隐藏层的信息。为了评估所提出的方法，我们对来自马里兰大学高级生命周期工程中心 (CALCE) 和 NASA 艾姆斯预测卓越中心的数据集进行了实验。实验结果表明，我们的模型比其他循环模型具有更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则（HSIC）的门控循环单元（GRU）网络，用于提高电池健康状态（SOH）估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有SOH估计方法因数据分布差异和序列长度变化需耗时提取特征，而传统GRU网络存在冗余信息影响精度，需改进以提升估计效果。
AI.method: 首先采用零掩码网络将不同循环长度的电池数据转换为统一长度序列；其次引入HSIC瓶颈结构压缩隐藏层信息，减少冗余。
AI.result: 在CALCE和NASA数据集上的实验表明，该模型在SOH估计精度上优于其他循环神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: GRU-HSIC通过标准化数据处理和信息压缩机制，有效解决了SOH估计中的数据异构性和冗余问题，提升了模型性能。

authors_text: Yiming Li,Qi Fang,Jiamu Bai,Siheng Chen,Felix Juefei-Xu,Chen Feng
title: Among Us: Adversarially Robust Collaborative Perception by Consensus
title_zh: 我们之中：共识的对抗性鲁棒协作感知
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023
abstract: Multiple robots could perceive a scene (e.g., detect objects) collaboratively better than individuals, although easily suffer from adversarial attacks when using deep learning. This could be addressed by the adversarial defense, but its training requires the often-unknown attacking mechanism. Differently, we propose ROBOSAC, a novel sampling-based defense strategy generalizable to unseen attackers. Our key idea is that collaborative perception should lead to consensus rather than dissensus in results compared to individual perception. This leads to our hypothesize-and-verify framework: perception results with and without collaboration from a random subset of teammates are compared until reaching a consensus. In such a framework, more teammates in the sampled subset often entail better perception performance but require longer sampling time to reject potential attackers. Thus, we derive how many sampling trials are needed to ensure the desired size of an attacker-free subset, or equivalently, the maximum size of such a subset that we can successfully sample within a given number of trials. We validate our method on the task of collaborative 3D object detection in autonomous driving scenarios.
summary: Multiple robots could perceive a scene (e.g., detect objects) collaboratively better than individuals, although easily suffer from adversarial attacks when using deep learning. This could be addressed by the adversarial defense, but its training requires the often-unknown attacking mechanism. Differently, we propose ROBOSAC, a novel sampling-based defense strategy generalizable to unseen attackers. Our key idea is that collaborative perception should lead to consensus rather than dissensus in results compared to individual perception. This leads to our hypothesize-and-verify framework: perception results with and without collaboration from a random subset of teammates are compared until reaching a consensus. In such a framework, more teammates in the sampled subset often entail better perception performance but require longer sampling time to reject potential attackers. Thus, we derive how many sampling trials are needed to ensure the desired size of an attacker-free subset, or equivalently, the maximum size of such a subset that we can successfully sample within a given number of trials. We validate our method on the task of collaborative 3D object detection in autonomous driving scenarios.
abstract_zh: 多个机器人可以比个体更好地协作感知场景（例如，检测物体），尽管在使用深度学习时很容易遭受对抗性攻击。这可以通过对抗性防御来解决，但其训练需要通常未知的攻击机制。不同的是，我们提出了 ROBOSAC，一种新颖的基于采样的防御策略，可推广到看不见的攻击者。我们的关键思想是，与个人感知相比，协作感知应该在结果上达成共识，而不是分歧。这引出了我们的假设和验证框架：对随机团队成员协作和不协作的感知结果进行比较，直到达成共识。在这样的框架中，采样子集中更多的队友通常需要更好的感知性能，但需要更长的采样时间来拒绝潜在的攻击者。因此，我们得出需要多少次采样试验才能确保无攻击者子集的所需大小，或者等效地，我们可以在给定次数的试验内成功采样的此类子集的最大大小。我们在自动驾驶场景中的协作 3D 对象检测任务上验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROBOSAC方法，通过共识机制提升协作感知系统在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多机器人协作感知易受对抗攻击影响，现有防御方法依赖未知的攻击机制，需提出通用性解决方案。
AI.method: 基于采样框架，通过比较随机子集协作与非协作感知结果的共识性，推导所需采样次数以确保攻击者自由子集大小。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶场景的3D物体检测任务中验证方法有效性，平衡采样数量与攻击者排除效率。
AI.conclusion: ROBOSAC通过共识机制实现无需攻击模型的对抗鲁棒性，为协作感知提供通用防御框架。

authors_text: Eddardaa Ben Loussaief,Hatem Rashwan,Mohammed Ayad,Mohammed Zakaria Hassan,Domenec Puig
title: Knowledge Distillation for Adaptive MRI Prostate Segmentation Based on Limit-Trained Multi-Teacher Models
title_zh: 基于极限训练多教师模型的自适应 MRI 前列腺分割知识蒸馏
abstract: With numerous medical tasks, the performance of deep models has recently experienced considerable improvements. These models are often adept learners. Yet, their intricate architectural design and high computational complexity make deploying them in clinical settings challenging, particularly with devices with limited resources. To deal with this issue, Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been proposed as a compression method and an acceleration technology. KD is an efficient learning strategy that can transfer knowledge from a burdensome model (i.e., teacher model) to a lightweight model (i.e., student model). Hence we can obtain a compact model with low parameters with preserving the teacher's performance. Therefore, we develop a KD-based deep model for prostate MRI segmentation in this work by combining features-based distillation with Kullback-Leibler divergence, Lovasz, and Dice losses. We further demonstrate its effectiveness by applying two compression procedures: 1) distilling knowledge to a student model from a single well-trained teacher, and 2) since most of the medical applications have a small dataset, we train multiple teachers that each one trained with a small set of images to learn an adaptive student model as close to the teachers as possible considering the desired accuracy and fast inference time. Extensive experiments were conducted on a public multi-site prostate tumor dataset, showing that the proposed adaptation KD strategy improves the dice similarity score by 9%, outperforming all tested well-established baseline models.
summary: With numerous medical tasks, the performance of deep models has recently experienced considerable improvements. These models are often adept learners. Yet, their intricate architectural design and high computational complexity make deploying them in clinical settings challenging, particularly with devices with limited resources. To deal with this issue, Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been proposed as a compression method and an acceleration technology. KD is an efficient learning strategy that can transfer knowledge from a burdensome model (i.e., teacher model) to a lightweight model (i.e., student model). Hence we can obtain a compact model with low parameters with preserving the teacher's performance. Therefore, we develop a KD-based deep model for prostate MRI segmentation in this work by combining features-based distillation with Kullback-Leibler divergence, Lovasz, and Dice losses. We further demonstrate its effectiveness by applying two compression procedures: 1) distilling knowledge to a student model from a single well-trained teacher, and 2) since most of the medical applications have a small dataset, we train multiple teachers that each one trained with a small set of images to learn an adaptive student model as close to the teachers as possible considering the desired accuracy and fast inference time. Extensive experiments were conducted on a public multi-site prostate tumor dataset, showing that the proposed adaptation KD strategy improves the dice similarity score by 9%, outperforming all tested well-established baseline models.
abstract_zh: 在众多的医疗任务中，深度模型的性能最近经历了相当大的改进。这些模型通常都是熟练的学习者。然而，其复杂的架构设计和高计算复杂性使得在临床环境中部署它们具有挑战性，特别是在资源有限的设备上。为了解决这个问题，知识蒸馏（KD）作为压缩方法和加速技术被提出。 KD是一种高效的学习策略，可以将知识从繁重的模型（即教师模型）转移到轻量级的模型（即学生模型）。因此，我们可以获得一个低参数的紧凑模型，同时保持教师的表现。因此，我们在这项工作中通过将基于特征的蒸馏与 Kullback-Leibler 散度、Lovasz 和 Dice 损失相结合，开发了一种基于 KD 的前列腺 MRI 分割深度模型。我们通过应用两个压缩程序进一步证明了其有效性：1）从一位训练有素的教师那里将知识提炼到学生模型中，2）由于大多数医学应用程序都有一个小数据集，我们训练了多名教师，每个教师都用一小组图像进行训练，以学习尽可能接近教师的自适应学生模型，考虑到所需的准确性和快速推理时间。在公共多站点前列腺肿瘤数据集上进行了大量实验，表明所提出的适应 KD 策略将骰子相似度得分提高了 9%，优于所有经过测试的成熟基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于知识蒸馏的自适应MRI前列腺分割方法，通过多教师模型提升小数据集下的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 深度模型在医学影像任务中表现优异，但其复杂结构和高计算量限制了临床部署，尤其在资源受限设备上。知识蒸馏可压缩模型并保持性能，但需解决小数据集下的模型适应性问题。
AI.method: 结合特征蒸馏与KL散度、Lovasz和Dice损失函数，设计两阶段压缩策略：1）单教师模型蒸馏；2）多教师模型联合训练，每个教师使用小数据集训练，使学生模型在精度与推理速度间取得平衡。
AI.result: 在公开多中心前列腺肿瘤数据集上，所提方法将Dice相似度提升9%，优于所有基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应知识蒸馏策略有效提升了小数据场景下的分割精度与效率，为临床资源受限环境提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Knowledge Distillation for Adaptive MRI Prostate Segmentation Based on Limit-Trained Multi-Teacher Models 基于极限训练多教师模型的自适应 MRI 前列腺分割知识蒸馏 With numerous medical tasks, the performance of deep models has recently experienced considerable improvements. These models are often adept learners. Yet, their intricate architectural design and high computational complexity make deploying them in clinical settings challenging, particularly with devices with limited resources. To deal with this issue, Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been proposed as a compression method and an acceleration technology. KD is an efficient learning strategy that can transfer knowledge from a burdensome model (i.e., teacher model) to a lightweight model (i.e., student model). Hence we can obtain a compact model with low parameters with preserving the teacher's performance. Therefore, we develop a KD-based deep model for prostate MRI segmentation in this work by combining features-based distillation with Kullback-Leibler divergence, Lovasz, and Dice losses. We further demonstrate its effectiveness by applying two compression procedures: 1) distilling knowledge to a student model from a single well-trained teacher, and 2) since most of the medical applications have a small dataset, we train multiple teachers that each one trained with a small set of images to learn an adaptive student model as close to the teachers as possible considering the desired accuracy and fast inference time. Extensive experiments were conducted on a public multi-site prostate tumor dataset, showing that the proposed adaptation KD strategy improves the dice similarity score by 9%, outperforming all tested well-established baseline models. 在众多的医疗任务中，深度模型的性能最近经历了相当大的改进。这些模型通常都是熟练的学习者。然而，其复杂的架构设计和高计算复杂性使得在临床环境中部署它们具有挑战性，特别是在资源有限的设备上。为了解决这个问题，知识蒸馏（KD）作为压缩方法和加速技术被提出。 KD是一种高效的学习策略，可以将知识从繁重的模型（即教师模型）转移到轻量级的模型（即学生模型）。因此，我们可以获得一个低参数的紧凑模型，同时保持教师的表现。因此，我们在这项工作中通过将基于特征的蒸馏与 Kullback-Leibler 散度、Lovasz 和 Dice 损失相结合，开发了一种基于 KD 的前列腺 MRI 分割深度模型。我们通过应用两个压缩程序进一步证明了其有效性：1）从一位训练有素的教师那里将知识提炼到学生模型中，2）由于大多数医学应用程序都有一个小数据集，我们训练了多名教师，每个教师都用一小组图像进行训练，以学习尽可能接近教师的自适应学生模型，考虑到所需的准确性和快速推理时间。在公共多站点前列腺肿瘤数据集上进行了大量实验，表明所提出的适应 KD 策略将骰子相似度得分提高了 9%，优于所有经过测试的成熟基线模型。 本文提出基于知识蒸馏的自适应MRI前列腺分割方法，通过多教师模型提升小数据集下的分割性能。 Eddardaa Ben Loussaief,Hatem Rashwan,Mohammed Ayad,Mohammed Zakaria Hassan,Domenec Puig eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Zhang,Khaled K. Saab,Michael Poli,Tri Dao,Karan Goel,Christopher Ré
title: Effectively Modeling Time Series with Simple Discrete State Spaces
title_zh: 使用简单的离散状态空间有效地建模时间序列
comment: 45 pages, 8 figures, 20 tables, ICLR 2023
comments: 45 pages, 8 figures, 20 tables, ICLR 2023
abstract: Time series modeling is a well-established problem, which often requires that methods (1) expressively represent complicated dependencies, (2) forecast long horizons, and (3) efficiently train over long sequences. State-space models (SSMs) are classical models for time series, and prior works combine SSMs with deep learning layers for efficient sequence modeling. However, we find fundamental limitations with these prior approaches, proving their SSM representations cannot express autoregressive time series processes. We thus introduce SpaceTime, a new state-space time series architecture that improves all three criteria. For expressivity, we propose a new SSM parameterization based on the companion matrix -- a canonical representation for discrete-time processes -- which enables SpaceTime's SSM layers to learn desirable autoregressive processes. For long horizon forecasting, we introduce a "closed-loop" variation of the companion SSM, which enables SpaceTime to predict many future time-steps by generating its own layer-wise inputs. For efficient training and inference, we introduce an algorithm that reduces the memory and compute of a forward pass with the companion matrix. With sequence length $\ell$ and state-space size $d$, we go from $\tilde{O}(d \ell)$ naïvely to $\tilde{O}(d + \ell)$. In experiments, our contributions lead to state-of-the-art results on extensive and diverse benchmarks, with best or second-best AUROC on 6 / 7 ECG and speech time series classification, and best MSE on 14 / 16 Informer forecasting tasks. Furthermore, we find SpaceTime (1) fits AR($p$) processes that prior deep SSMs fail on, (2) forecasts notably more accurately on longer horizons than prior state-of-the-art, and (3) speeds up training on real-world ETTh1 data by 73% and 80% relative wall-clock time over Transformers and LSTMs.
summary: Time series modeling is a well-established problem, which often requires that methods (1) expressively represent complicated dependencies, (2) forecast long horizons, and (3) efficiently train over long sequences. State-space models (SSMs) are classical models for time series, and prior works combine SSMs with deep learning layers for efficient sequence modeling. However, we find fundamental limitations with these prior approaches, proving their SSM representations cannot express autoregressive time series processes. We thus introduce SpaceTime, a new state-space time series architecture that improves all three criteria. For expressivity, we propose a new SSM parameterization based on the companion matrix -- a canonical representation for discrete-time processes -- which enables SpaceTime's SSM layers to learn desirable autoregressive processes. For long horizon forecasting, we introduce a "closed-loop" variation of the companion SSM, which enables SpaceTime to predict many future time-steps by generating its own layer-wise inputs. For efficient training and inference, we introduce an algorithm that reduces the memory and compute of a forward pass with the companion matrix. With sequence length $\ell$ and state-space size $d$, we go from $\tilde{O}(d \ell)$ naïvely to $\tilde{O}(d + \ell)$. In experiments, our contributions lead to state-of-the-art results on extensive and diverse benchmarks, with best or second-best AUROC on 6 / 7 ECG and speech time series classification, and best MSE on 14 / 16 Informer forecasting tasks. Furthermore, we find SpaceTime (1) fits AR($p$) processes that prior deep SSMs fail on, (2) forecasts notably more accurately on longer horizons than prior state-of-the-art, and (3) speeds up training on real-world ETTh1 data by 73% and 80% relative wall-clock time over Transformers and LSTMs.
abstract_zh: 时间序列建模是一个公认的问题，通常需要方法（1）表达复杂的依赖关系，（2）预测长范围，以及（3）有效地训练长序列。状态空间模型（SSM）是时间序列的经典模型，先前的工作将 SSM 与深度学习层结合起来以实现高效的序列建模。然而，我们发现这些先前方法的根本局限性，证明它们的 SSM 表示无法表达自回归时间序列过程。因此，我们引入了 SpaceTime，一种新的状态空间时间序列架构，它改进了所有三个标准。为了表达性，我们提出了一种基于伴随矩阵（离散时间过程的规范表示）的新 SSM 参数化，这使得 SpaceTime 的 SSM 层能够学习所需的自回归过程。对于长期预测，我们引入了配套 SSM 的“闭环”变体，它使 SpaceTime 能够通过生成自己的分层输入来预测许多未来的时间步骤。为了高效训练和推理，我们引入了一种算法，可以减少伴随矩阵前向传递的内存和计算量。有了序列长度 $\ell$ 和状态空间大小 $d$，我们就可以简单地从 $\tilde{O}(d \ell)$ 转到 $\tilde{O}(d + \ell)$。在实验中，我们的贡献在广泛和多样化的基准上取得了最先进的结果，在 6 / 7 ECG 和语音时间序列分类上获得了最佳或第二好的 AUROC，在 14 / 16 Informer 预测任务上获得了最佳 MSE。此外，我们发现 SpaceTime (1) 适合之前的深度 SSM 失败的 AR($p$) 过程，(​​2) 在更长的时间范围内的预测比之前最先进的技术更加准确，(3) 与 Transformer 和 LSTM 相比，将真实世界 ETTh1 数据的训练速度加快了 73% 和 80% 的相对挂钟时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SpaceTime的新状态空间模型架构，旨在有效解决时间序列建模中的表达能力、长期预测和训练效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有状态空间模型（SSMs）与深度学习结合的方法在表达自回归时间序列、长期预测及训练效率方面存在根本性限制，需改进模型设计以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 基于伴随矩阵提出新型SSM参数化方法，引入闭环伴随SSM实现长期预测，设计降低计算复杂度的算法，将时间复杂度从$\	ilde{O}(d\\ell)$优化至$\	ilde{O}(d+\\ell)$。
AI.result: 在ECG和语音分类任务中6/7指标达最优或次优，14/16预测任务MSE最优，ETTh1数据集训练速度较Transformer和LSTM提升73%和80%。
AI.conclusion: SpaceTime通过伴随矩阵参数化、闭环机制和高效算法，在表达能力、长期预测和训练效率三方面均超越现有方法，验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Nima Hatami,Laura Mechtouff,David Rousseau,Tae-Hee Cho,Omer Eker,Yves Berthezene,Carole Frindel
title: A Novel Autoencoders-LSTM Model for Stroke Outcome Prediction using Multimodal MRI Data
title_zh: 使用多模态 MRI 数据预测中风结果的新型自编码器 LSTM 模型
comment: The IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.05545
comments: The IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.05545
abstract: Patient outcome prediction is critical in management of ischemic stroke. In this paper, a novel machine learning model is proposed for stroke outcome prediction using multimodal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). The proposed model consists of two serial levels of Autoencoders (AEs), where different AEs at level 1 are used for learning unimodal features from different MRI modalities and a AE at level 2 is used to combine the unimodal features into compressed multimodal features. The sequences of multimodal features of a given patient are then used by an LSTM network for predicting outcome score. The proposed AE2-LSTM model is proved to be an effective approach for better addressing the multimodality and volumetric nature of MRI data. Experimental results show that the proposed AE2-LSTM outperforms the existing state-of-the art models by achieving highest AUC=0.71 and lowest MAE=0.34.
summary: Patient outcome prediction is critical in management of ischemic stroke. In this paper, a novel machine learning model is proposed for stroke outcome prediction using multimodal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). The proposed model consists of two serial levels of Autoencoders (AEs), where different AEs at level 1 are used for learning unimodal features from different MRI modalities and a AE at level 2 is used to combine the unimodal features into compressed multimodal features. The sequences of multimodal features of a given patient are then used by an LSTM network for predicting outcome score. The proposed AE2-LSTM model is proved to be an effective approach for better addressing the multimodality and volumetric nature of MRI data. Experimental results show that the proposed AE2-LSTM outperforms the existing state-of-the art models by achieving highest AUC=0.71 and lowest MAE=0.34.
abstract_zh: 患者结果预测对于缺血性中风的治疗至关重要。在本文中，提出了一种使用多模态磁共振成像（MRI）来预测中风结果的新型机器学习模型。所提出的模型由两个串行级别的自动编码器（AE）组成，其中级别 1 的不同 AE 用于从不同 MRI 模态学习单峰特征，级别 2 的 AE 用于将单峰特征组合成压缩的多峰特征。然后，LSTM 网络使用给定患者的多模态特征序列来预测结果评分。所提出的 AE2-LSTM 模型被证明是更好地解决 MRI 数据的多模态和体积性质的有效方法。实验结果表明，所提出的 AE2-LSTM 通过实现最高 AUC=0.71 和最低 MAE=0.34 优于现有的最先进模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态MRI数据的自编码器-LSTM模型，用于预测中风患者预后。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理MRI数据的多模态特性和体积特征，需更精准的预测模型辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 采用双层自编码器结构：第一层提取各模态MRI的单模态特征，第二层融合生成多模态压缩特征，再通过LSTM网络预测结局评分。
AI.result: 在实验中取得最高AUC=0.71和最低MAE=0.34，优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过分层特征融合有效解决了多模态MRI数据的复杂性，显著提升了中风预后预测性能。

search_text: A Novel Autoencoders-LSTM Model for Stroke Outcome Prediction using Multimodal MRI Data 使用多模态 MRI 数据预测中风结果的新型自编码器 LSTM 模型 Patient outcome prediction is critical in management of ischemic stroke. In this paper, a novel machine learning model is proposed for stroke outcome prediction using multimodal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). The proposed model consists of two serial levels of Autoencoders (AEs), where different AEs at level 1 are used for learning unimodal features from different MRI modalities and a AE at level 2 is used to combine the unimodal features into compressed multimodal features. The sequences of multimodal features of a given patient are then used by an LSTM network for predicting outcome score. The proposed AE2-LSTM model is proved to be an effective approach for better addressing the multimodality and volumetric nature of MRI data. Experimental results show that the proposed AE2-LSTM outperforms the existing state-of-the art models by achieving highest AUC=0.71 and lowest MAE=0.34. 患者结果预测对于缺血性中风的治疗至关重要。在本文中，提出了一种使用多模态磁共振成像（MRI）来预测中风结果的新型机器学习模型。所提出的模型由两个串行级别的自动编码器（AE）组成，其中级别 1 的不同 AE 用于从不同 MRI 模态学习单峰特征，级别 2 的 AE 用于将单峰特征组合成压缩的多峰特征。然后，LSTM 网络使用给定患者的多模态特征序列来预测结果评分。所提出的 AE2-LSTM 模型被证明是更好地解决 MRI 数据的多模态和体积性质的有效方法。实验结果表明，所提出的 AE2-LSTM 通过实现最高 AUC=0.71 和最低 MAE=0.34 优于现有的最先进模型。 本文提出一种基于多模态MRI数据的自编码器-LSTM模型，用于预测中风患者预后。 Nima Hatami,Laura Mechtouff,David Rousseau,Tae-Hee Cho,Omer Eker,Yves Berthezene,Carole Frindel cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sanghwan Kim,Lorenzo Noci,Antonio Orvieto,Thomas Hofmann
title: Achieving a Better Stability-Plasticity Trade-off via Auxiliary Networks in Continual Learning
title_zh: 通过持续学习中的辅助网络实现更好的稳定性-可塑性权衡
comment: CVPR 2023
comments: CVPR 2023
abstract: In contrast to the natural capabilities of humans to learn new tasks in a sequential fashion, neural networks are known to suffer from catastrophic forgetting, where the model's performances on old tasks drop dramatically after being optimized for a new task. Since then, the continual learning (CL) community has proposed several solutions aiming to equip the neural network with the ability to learn the current task (plasticity) while still achieving high accuracy on the previous tasks (stability). Despite remarkable improvements, the plasticity-stability trade-off is still far from being solved and its underlying mechanism is poorly understood. In this work, we propose Auxiliary Network Continual Learning (ANCL), a novel method that applies an additional auxiliary network which promotes plasticity to the continually learned model which mainly focuses on stability. More concretely, the proposed framework materializes in a regularizer that naturally interpolates between plasticity and stability, surpassing strong baselines on task incremental and class incremental scenarios. Through extensive analyses on ANCL solutions, we identify some essential principles beneath the stability-plasticity trade-off.
summary: In contrast to the natural capabilities of humans to learn new tasks in a sequential fashion, neural networks are known to suffer from catastrophic forgetting, where the model's performances on old tasks drop dramatically after being optimized for a new task. Since then, the continual learning (CL) community has proposed several solutions aiming to equip the neural network with the ability to learn the current task (plasticity) while still achieving high accuracy on the previous tasks (stability). Despite remarkable improvements, the plasticity-stability trade-off is still far from being solved and its underlying mechanism is poorly understood. In this work, we propose Auxiliary Network Continual Learning (ANCL), a novel method that applies an additional auxiliary network which promotes plasticity to the continually learned model which mainly focuses on stability. More concretely, the proposed framework materializes in a regularizer that naturally interpolates between plasticity and stability, surpassing strong baselines on task incremental and class incremental scenarios. Through extensive analyses on ANCL solutions, we identify some essential principles beneath the stability-plasticity trade-off.
abstract_zh: 与人类以顺序方式学习新任务的自然能力相反，众所周知，神经网络会遭受灾难性遗忘，即模型在针对新任务进行优化后在旧任务上的性能急剧下降。从那时起，持续学习（CL）社区提出了几种解决方案，旨在使神经网络具有学习当前任务的能力（可塑性），同时仍然在先前的任务上实现高精度（稳定性）。尽管取得了显着的进步，但塑性与稳定性之间的权衡仍远未得到解决，而且其基本机制仍知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们提出了辅助网络持续学习（ANCL），这是一种新的方法，它应用了一个额外的辅助网络，提高了主要关注稳定性的持续学习模型的可塑性。更具体地说，所提出的框架在一个正则化器中具体化，该正则化器自然地在可塑性和稳定性之间进行插值，超越了任务增量和类增量场景的强大基线。通过对 ANCL 解决方案的广泛分析，我们确定了稳定性与可塑性权衡下的一些基本原则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过辅助网络改进持续学习中稳定性与可塑性平衡的新方法。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在持续学习新任务时易出现灾难性遗忘，现有方法难以有效解决稳定性与可塑性的权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计辅助网络（ANCL）与主网络协同工作，通过正则化方法在可塑性与稳定性之间进行自然插值。
AI.result: 在任务增量和类别增量场景中超越现有基线方法，并揭示了稳定性-可塑性权衡的核心原理。
AI.conclusion: ANCL框架有效缓解了持续学习中的遗忘问题，为理解该权衡机制提供了新视角。

authors_text: Chris Lu,Sebastian Towers,Jakob Foerster
title: Arbitrary Order Meta-Learning with Simple Population-Based Evolution
title_zh: 具有简单的基于群体的进化的任意顺序元学习
abstract: Meta-learning, the notion of learning to learn, enables learning systems to quickly and flexibly solve new tasks. This usually involves defining a set of outer-loop meta-parameters that are then used to update a set of inner-loop parameters. Most meta-learning approaches use complicated and computationally expensive bi-level optimisation schemes to update these meta-parameters. Ideally, systems should perform multiple orders of meta-learning, i.e. to learn to learn to learn and so on, to accelerate their own learning. Unfortunately, standard meta-learning techniques are often inappropriate for these higher-order meta-parameters because the meta-optimisation procedure becomes too complicated or unstable. Inspired by the higher-order meta-learning we observe in real-world evolution, we show that using simple population-based evolution implicitly optimises for arbitrarily-high order meta-parameters. First, we theoretically prove and empirically show that population-based evolution implicitly optimises meta-parameters of arbitrarily-high order in a simple setting. We then introduce a minimal self-referential parameterisation, which in principle enables arbitrary-order meta-learning. Finally, we show that higher-order meta-learning improves performance on time series forecasting tasks.
summary: Meta-learning, the notion of learning to learn, enables learning systems to quickly and flexibly solve new tasks. This usually involves defining a set of outer-loop meta-parameters that are then used to update a set of inner-loop parameters. Most meta-learning approaches use complicated and computationally expensive bi-level optimisation schemes to update these meta-parameters. Ideally, systems should perform multiple orders of meta-learning, i.e. to learn to learn to learn and so on, to accelerate their own learning. Unfortunately, standard meta-learning techniques are often inappropriate for these higher-order meta-parameters because the meta-optimisation procedure becomes too complicated or unstable. Inspired by the higher-order meta-learning we observe in real-world evolution, we show that using simple population-based evolution implicitly optimises for arbitrarily-high order meta-parameters. First, we theoretically prove and empirically show that population-based evolution implicitly optimises meta-parameters of arbitrarily-high order in a simple setting. We then introduce a minimal self-referential parameterisation, which in principle enables arbitrary-order meta-learning. Finally, we show that higher-order meta-learning improves performance on time series forecasting tasks.
abstract_zh: 元学习，即学会学习的概念，使学习系统能够快速、灵活地解决新任务。这通常涉及定义一组外循环元参数，然后使用它们更新一组内循环参数。大多数元学习方法使用复杂且计算成本昂贵的双层优化方案来更新这些元参数。理想情况下，系统应该执行多个顺序的元学习，即学习学习学习等等，以加速自身的学习。不幸的是，标准元学习技术通常不适合这些高阶元参数，因为元优化过程变得过于复杂或不稳定。受到我们在现实世界进化中观察到的高阶元学习的启发，我们证明使用简单的基于群体的进化可以隐式优化任意高阶元参数。首先，我们从理论上证明并从经验上证明，基于种群的进化在简单的设置中隐式地优化了任意高阶的元参数。然后，我们引入最小的自参考参数化，原则上它可以实现任意顺序的元学习。最后，我们表明高阶元学习可以提高时间序列预测任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于简单种群进化的任意阶元学习方法，解决了传统元学习在高阶元参数优化中的复杂性和不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统元学习方法依赖复杂的双层优化方案，难以有效处理高阶元参数的优化问题，而现实中的进化过程隐含了高阶元学习机制。
AI.method: 通过理论证明和实验验证，利用种群进化隐式优化任意阶元参数，并引入自指参数化方法实现任意阶元学习。
AI.result: 在时间序列预测任务中，高阶元学习方法相比传统方法表现出更优的性能，验证了种群进化在元参数优化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 种群进化为高阶元学习提供了简单且有效的解决方案，为自主学习系统的持续优化提供了新思路。

Finally, we show that higher-order meta-learning improves performance on time series forecasting tasks. 元学习，即学会学习的概念，使学习系统能够快速、灵活地解决新任务。这通常涉及定义一组外循环元参数，然后使用它们更新一组内循环参数。大多数元学习方法使用复杂且计算成本昂贵的双层优化方案来更新这些元参数。理想情况下，系统应该执行多个顺序的元学习，即学习学习学习等等，以加速自身的学习。不幸的是，标准元学习技术通常不适合这些高阶元参数，因为元优化过程变得过于复杂或不稳定。受到我们在现实世界进化中观察到的高阶元学习的启发，我们证明使用简单的基于群体的进化可以隐式优化任意高阶元参数。首先，我们从理论上证明并从经验上证明，基于种群的进化在简单的设置中隐式地优化了任意高阶的元参数。然后，我们引入最小的自参考参数化，原则上它可以实现任意顺序的元学习。最后，我们表明高阶元学习可以提高时间序列预测任务的性能。 本文提出了一种基于简单种群进化的任意阶元学习方法，解决了传统元学习在高阶元参数优化中的复杂性和不稳定性问题。 Chris Lu,Sebastian Towers,Jakob Foerster cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Rishi Veerapaneni,Muhammad Suhail Saleem,Maxim Likhachev
title: Learning Local Heuristics for Search-Based Navigation Planning
title_zh: 学习基于搜索的导航规划的局部启发式
comment: Published at the International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling 2023 (ICAPS 2023)
comments: Published at the International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling 2023 (ICAPS 2023)
abstract: Graph search planning algorithms for navigation typically rely heavily on heuristics to efficiently plan paths. As a result, while such approaches require no training phase and can directly plan long horizon paths, they often require careful hand designing of informative heuristic functions. Recent works have started bypassing hand designed heuristics by using machine learning to learn heuristic functions that guide the search algorithm. While these methods can learn complex heuristic functions from raw input, they i) require a significant training phase and ii) do not generalize well to new maps and longer horizon paths. Our contribution is showing that instead of learning a global heuristic estimate, we can define and learn local heuristics which results in a significantly smaller learning problem and improves generalization. We show that using such local heuristics can reduce node expansions by 2-20x while maintaining bounded suboptimality, are easy to train, and generalize to new maps & long horizon plans.
summary: Graph search planning algorithms for navigation typically rely heavily on heuristics to efficiently plan paths. As a result, while such approaches require no training phase and can directly plan long horizon paths, they often require careful hand designing of informative heuristic functions. Recent works have started bypassing hand designed heuristics by using machine learning to learn heuristic functions that guide the search algorithm. While these methods can learn complex heuristic functions from raw input, they i) require a significant training phase and ii) do not generalize well to new maps and longer horizon paths. Our contribution is showing that instead of learning a global heuristic estimate, we can define and learn local heuristics which results in a significantly smaller learning problem and improves generalization. We show that using such local heuristics can reduce node expansions by 2-20x while maintaining bounded suboptimality, are easy to train, and generalize to new maps & long horizon plans.
abstract_zh: 用于导航的图搜索规划算法通常严重依赖启发式方法来有效规划路径。因此，虽然此类方法不需要训练阶段并且可以直接规划长期路径，但它们通常需要仔细手工设计信息丰富的启发式函数。最近的工作已经开始通过使用机器学习来学习指导搜索算法的启发式函数，从而绕过手工设计的启发式方法。虽然这些方法可以从原始输入中学习复杂的启发式函数，但它们 i）需要大量的训练阶段，并且 ii）不能很好地推广到新地图和更长的地平线路径。我们的贡献表明，我们可以定义和学习局部启发式，而不是学习全局启发式估计，从而显着减小学习问题并提高泛化能力。我们证明，使用这种局部启发式方法可以将节点扩展减少 2-20 倍，同时保持有界次优性，易于训练，并可推广到新地图和长期计划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习局部启发式函数来改进基于搜索的导航规划方法。
AI.motivation: 传统导航规划依赖人工设计的启发式函数，存在训练成本高且泛化能力差的问题。
AI.method: 定义并学习局部启发式函数，替代全局启发式以降低学习复杂度并提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 局部启发式减少2-20倍节点扩展，保持次优性，且易于训练和适应新地图及长路径规划。
AI.conclusion: 局部启发式函数在导航规划中优于全局方法，可有效平衡效率与泛化性。

authors_text: Bin Xia,Yulun Zhang,Shiyin Wang,Yitong Wang,Xinglong Wu,Yapeng Tian,Wenming Yang,Luc Van Gool
title: DiffIR: Efficient Diffusion Model for Image Restoration
title_zh: DiffIR：用于图像恢复的高效扩散模型
comment: This paper is accepted by ICCV2023. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/DiffIR
comments: This paper is accepted by ICCV2023. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/DiffIR
abstract: Diffusion model (DM) has achieved SOTA performance by modeling the image synthesis process into a sequential application of a denoising network. However, different from image synthesis, image restoration (IR) has a strong constraint to generate results in accordance with ground-truth. Thus, for IR, traditional DMs running massive iterations on a large model to estimate whole images or feature maps is inefficient. To address this issue, we propose an efficient DM for IR (DiffIR), which consists of a compact IR prior extraction network (CPEN), dynamic IR transformer (DIRformer), and denoising network. Specifically, DiffIR has two training stages: pretraining and training DM. In pretraining, we input ground-truth images into CPEN$_{S1}$ to capture a compact IR prior representation (IPR) to guide DIRformer. In the second stage, we train the DM to directly estimate the same IRP as pretrained CPEN$_{S1}$ only using LQ images. We observe that since the IPR is only a compact vector, DiffIR can use fewer iterations than traditional DM to obtain accurate estimations and generate more stable and realistic results. Since the iterations are few, our DiffIR can adopt a joint optimization of CPEN$_{S2}$, DIRformer, and denoising network, which can further reduce the estimation error influence. We conduct extensive experiments on several IR tasks and achieve SOTA performance while consuming less computational costs. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/DiffIR}.
summary: Diffusion model (DM) has achieved SOTA performance by modeling the image synthesis process into a sequential application of a denoising network. However, different from image synthesis, image restoration (IR) has a strong constraint to generate results in accordance with ground-truth. Thus, for IR, traditional DMs running massive iterations on a large model to estimate whole images or feature maps is inefficient. To address this issue, we propose an efficient DM for IR (DiffIR), which consists of a compact IR prior extraction network (CPEN), dynamic IR transformer (DIRformer), and denoising network. Specifically, DiffIR has two training stages: pretraining and training DM. In pretraining, we input ground-truth images into CPEN$_{S1}$ to capture a compact IR prior representation (IPR) to guide DIRformer. In the second stage, we train the DM to directly estimate the same IRP as pretrained CPEN$_{S1}$ only using LQ images. We observe that since the IPR is only a compact vector, DiffIR can use fewer iterations than traditional DM to obtain accurate estimations and generate more stable and realistic results. Since the iterations are few, our DiffIR can adopt a joint optimization of CPEN$_{S2}$, DIRformer, and denoising network, which can further reduce the estimation error influence. We conduct extensive experiments on several IR tasks and achieve SOTA performance while consuming less computational costs. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/DiffIR}.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型 (DM) 通过将图像合成过程建模为去噪网络的顺序应用，实现了 SOTA 性能。然而，与图像合成不同，图像恢复（IR）对于生成符合地面实况的结果有很强的约束。因此，对于 IR，传统的 DM 在大型模型上运行大量迭代来估计整个图像或特征图是低效的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种高效的红外DM（DiffIR），它由紧凑的红外先验提取网络（CPEN）、动态红外变换器（DIRformer）和去噪网络组成。具体来说，DiffIR有两个训练阶段：预训练和训练DM。在预训练中，我们将真实图像输入 CPEN$_{S1}$ 中，以捕获紧凑的红外先验表示 (IPR) 来指导 DIRformer。在第二阶段，我们训练 DM 仅使用 LQ 图像直接估计与预训练 CPEN$_{S1}$ 相同的 IRP。我们观察到，由于 IPR 只是一个紧凑向量，因此 DiffIR 可以使用比传统 DM 更少的迭代来获得准确的估计并生成更稳定和真实的结果。由于迭代次数很少，我们的DiffIR可以采用CPEN$_{S2}$、DIRformer和去噪网络的联合优化，这可以进一步减少估计误差的影响。我们对多个 IR 任务进行了广泛的实验，并在消耗更少的计算成本的同时实现了 SOTA 性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/DiffIR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的扩散模型DiffIR，用于图像修复任务，通过减少迭代次数和计算成本实现更优性能。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型在图像修复中因需大量迭代和复杂计算而效率低下，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: DiffIR包含紧凑的先验提取网络（CPEN）、动态变压器（DIRformer）和去噪网络，分两阶段训练：预训练阶段提取紧凑的修复先验表示（IPR），第二阶段仅用低质量图像训练扩散模型以直接估计IPR。
AI.result: 在多个图像修复任务中达到SOTA性能，同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: DiffIR通过紧凑先验表示和联合优化策略，在保证修复质量的同时提升了效率，为图像修复提供了新思路。

authors_text: Farooq Ahmad Wani,Maria Sofia Bucarelli,Fabrizio Silvestri
title: Learning with Noisy Labels through Learnable Weighting and Centroid Similarity
title_zh: 通过可学习的权重和质心相似度来学习噪声标签
abstract: We introduce a novel method for training machine learning models in the presence of noisy labels, which are prevalent in domains such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving and have the potential to degrade a model's generalization performance. Inspired by established literature that highlights how deep learning models are prone to overfitting to noisy samples in the later epochs of training, we propose a strategic approach. This strategy leverages the distance to class centroids in the latent space and incorporates a discounting mechanism, aiming to diminish the influence of samples that lie distant from all class centroids. By doing so, we effectively counteract the adverse effects of noisy labels. The foundational premise of our approach is the assumption that samples situated further from their respective class centroid in the initial stages of training are more likely to be associated with noise. Our methodology is grounded in robust theoretical principles and has been validated empirically through extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets. Our results show that our method consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art techniques, achieving significant improvements in classification accuracy in the presence of noisy labels. The code for our proposed loss function and supplementary materials is available at https://github.com/wanifarooq/NCOD
summary: We introduce a novel method for training machine learning models in the presence of noisy labels, which are prevalent in domains such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving and have the potential to degrade a model's generalization performance. Inspired by established literature that highlights how deep learning models are prone to overfitting to noisy samples in the later epochs of training, we propose a strategic approach. This strategy leverages the distance to class centroids in the latent space and incorporates a discounting mechanism, aiming to diminish the influence of samples that lie distant from all class centroids. By doing so, we effectively counteract the adverse effects of noisy labels. The foundational premise of our approach is the assumption that samples situated further from their respective class centroid in the initial stages of training are more likely to be associated with noise. Our methodology is grounded in robust theoretical principles and has been validated empirically through extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets. Our results show that our method consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art techniques, achieving significant improvements in classification accuracy in the presence of noisy labels. The code for our proposed loss function and supplementary materials is available at https://github.com/wanifarooq/NCOD
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种在存在噪声标签的情况下训练机器学习模型的新方法，这种标签在医疗诊断和自动驾驶等领域很普遍，并且有可能降低模型的泛化性能。受现有文献的启发，这些文献强调了深度学习模型在训练的后期阶段如何容易过度拟合噪声样本，我们提出了一种战略方法。该策略利用了潜在空间中到类质心的距离，并结合了折扣机制，旨在减少远离所有类质心的样本的影响。通过这样做，我们有效地抵消了噪声标签的不利影响。我们方法的基本前提是假设在训练的初始阶段距离各自类质心较远的样本更有可能与噪声相关。我们的方法基于强大的理论原理，并通过对多个基准数据集的广泛实验得到了实证验证。我们的结果表明，我们的方法始终优于现有的最先进技术，在存在噪声标签的情况下实现了分类准确性的显着提高。我们提出的损失函数和补充材料的代码可在 https://github.com/wanifarooq/NCOD 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过可学习加权和类中心相似性处理噪声标签的新方法，以提升机器学习模型在噪声环境下的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 噪声标签在医疗诊断和自动驾驶等领域普遍存在，会导致模型过拟合并损害泛化能力，尤其在训练后期深度学习模型易受噪声样本影响。
AI.method: 基于样本与类中心在潜在空间的距离，结合折扣机制，动态降低远离所有类中心样本的权重，假设初始阶段远离类中心的样本更可能包含噪声。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在噪声标签场景下显著优于现有最先进技术，分类准确率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 该方法理论严谨且经实验证明有效，为噪声标签学习提供了新的解决方案，代码已开源供验证与扩展。

search_text: Learning with Noisy Labels through Learnable Weighting and Centroid Similarity 通过可学习的权重和质心相似度来学习噪声标签 We introduce a novel method for training machine learning models in the presence of noisy labels, which are prevalent in domains such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving and have the potential to degrade a model's generalization performance. Inspired by established literature that highlights how deep learning models are prone to overfitting to noisy samples in the later epochs of training, we propose a strategic approach. This strategy leverages the distance to class centroids in the latent space and incorporates a discounting mechanism, aiming to diminish the influence of samples that lie distant from all class centroids. By doing so, we effectively counteract the adverse effects of noisy labels. The foundational premise of our approach is the assumption that samples situated further from their respective class centroid in the initial stages of training are more likely to be associated with noise. Our methodology is grounded in robust theoretical principles and has been validated empirically through extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets. Our results show that our method consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art techniques, achieving significant improvements in classification accuracy in the presence of noisy labels. The code for our proposed loss function and supplementary materials is available at https://github.com/wanifarooq/NCOD 我们引入了一种在存在噪声标签的情况下训练机器学习模型的新方法，这种标签在医疗诊断和自动驾驶等领域很普遍，并且有可能降低模型的泛化性能。受现有文献的启发，这些文献强调了深度学习模型在训练的后期阶段如何容易过度拟合噪声样本，我们提出了一种战略方法。该策略利用了潜在空间中到类质心的距离，并结合了折扣机制，旨在减少远离所有类质心的样本的影响。通过这样做，我们有效地抵消了噪声标签的不利影响。我们方法的基本前提是假设在训练的初始阶段距离各自类质心较远的样本更有可能与噪声相关。我们的方法基于强大的理论原理，并通过对多个基准数据集的广泛实验得到了实证验证。我们的结果表明，我们的方法始终优于现有的最先进技术，在存在噪声标签的情况下实现了分类准确性的显着提高。我们提出的损失函数和补充材料的代码可在 https://github.com/wanifarooq/NCOD 获取 本文提出一种通过可学习加权和类中心相似性处理噪声标签的新方法，以提升机器学习模型在噪声环境下的泛化性能。 Farooq Ahmad Wani,Maria Sofia Bucarelli,Fabrizio Silvestri cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Chanyoung Jung,Andrea Finazzi,Hyunki Seong,Daegyu Lee,Seungwook Lee,Bosung Kim,Gyuri Gang,Seungil Han,David Hyunchul Shim
title: An Autonomous System for Head-to-Head Race: Design, Implementation and Analysis; Team KAIST at the Indy Autonomous Challenge
title_zh: 一对一竞赛的自主系统：设计、实现和分析； KAIST 团队参加印地自主挑战赛
comment: 35 pages, 31 figures, 5 tables, Field Robotics (accepted)
comments: 35 pages, 31 figures, 5 tables, Field Robotics (accepted)
abstract: While the majority of autonomous driving research has concentrated on everyday driving scenarios, further safety and performance improvements of autonomous vehicles require a focus on extreme driving conditions. In this context, autonomous racing is a new area of research that has been attracting considerable interest recently. Due to the fact that a vehicle is driven by its perception, planning, and control limits during racing, numerous research and development issues arise. This paper provides a comprehensive overview of the autonomous racing system built by team KAIST for the Indy Autonomous Challenge (IAC). Our autonomy stack consists primarily of a multi-modal perception module, a high-speed overtaking planner, a resilient control stack, and a system status manager. We present the details of all components of our autonomy solution, including algorithms, implementation, and unit test results. In addition, this paper outlines the design principles and the results of a systematical analysis. Even though our design principles are derived from the unique application domain of autonomous racing, they can also be applied to a variety of safety-critical, high-cost-of-failure robotics applications. The proposed system was integrated into a full-scale autonomous race car (Dallara AV-21) and field-tested extensively. As a result, team KAIST was one of three teams who qualified and participated in the official IAC race events without any accidents. Our proposed autonomous system successfully completed all missions, including overtaking at speeds of around $220 km/h$ in the IAC@CES2022, the world's first autonomous 1:1 head-to-head race.

abstract_zh: 虽然大多数自动驾驶研究都集中在日常驾驶场景上，但自动驾驶汽车的进一步安全和性能改进需要关注极端驾驶条件。在此背景下，自动驾驶赛车成为最近引起人们广泛关注的一个新研究领域。由于赛车在比赛过程中受到其感知、规划和控制限制的驱动，因此出现了许多研究和开发问题。本文全面概述了 KAIST 团队为印地自动驾驶挑战赛 (IAC) 构建的自动驾驶赛车系统。我们的自主堆栈主要由多模态感知模块、高速超车规划器、弹性控制堆栈和系统状态管理器组成。我们展示了自主解决方案所有组件的详细信息，包括算法、实现和单元测试结果。此外，本文还概述了设计原理和系统分析的结果。尽管我们的设计原则源自自动驾驶赛车的独特应用领域，但它们也可以应用于各种安全关键、高故障成本的机器人应用。所提出的系统被集成到全尺寸自动驾驶赛车（​​Dallara AV-21）中并进行了广泛的现场测试。结果，KAIST 队成为三支获得资格并参加 IAC 正式比赛且没有发生任何事故的队伍之一。我们提出的自动驾驶系统成功完成了所有任务，包括在 IAC@CES2022（世界上首次自动驾驶 1:1 正面交锋）中以约 220 公里/小时的速度超车。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了韩国科学技术院（KAIST）团队为印第安纳波利斯自动驾驶挑战赛（IAC）设计的自动驾驶赛车系统，包括感知、规划、控制等模块的实现与测试。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶研究多集中于日常场景，但极端驾驶条件下的安全性和性能提升仍需探索。自动驾驶赛车作为新兴领域，能推动高难度场景下的技术突破。
AI.method: 构建包含多模态感知模块、高速超车规划器、鲁棒控制栈及系统状态管理器的自动驾驶系统，并集成至全尺寸赛车（Dallara AV-21）进行实地测试。
AI.result: KAIST团队成功通过IAC资格赛并完成所有任务，包括以约220km/h速度实现超车，且无任何事故。
AI.conclusion: 本系统的设计原则可扩展至其他高安全性、高失败代价的机器人应用领域，验证了自动驾驶技术在极限场景下的可行性。

authors_text: Andreas Zinonos,Alexandros Haliassos,Pingchuan Ma,Stavros Petridis,Maja Pantic
title: Learning Cross-lingual Visual Speech Representations
title_zh: 学习跨语言视觉语音表示
abstract: Cross-lingual self-supervised learning has been a growing research topic in the last few years. However, current works only explored the use of audio signals to create representations. In this work, we study cross-lingual self-supervised visual representation learning. We use the recently-proposed Raw Audio-Visual Speech Encoders (RAVEn) framework to pre-train an audio-visual model with unlabelled multilingual data, and then fine-tune the visual model on labelled transcriptions. Our experiments show that: (1) multi-lingual models with more data outperform monolingual ones, but, when keeping the amount of data fixed, monolingual models tend to reach better performance; (2) multi-lingual outperforms English-only pre-training; (3) using languages which are more similar yields better results; and (4) fine-tuning on unseen languages is competitive to using the target language in the pre-training set. We hope our study inspires future research on non-English-only speech representation learning.
summary: Cross-lingual self-supervised learning has been a growing research topic in the last few years. However, current works only explored the use of audio signals to create representations. In this work, we study cross-lingual self-supervised visual representation learning. We use the recently-proposed Raw Audio-Visual Speech Encoders (RAVEn) framework to pre-train an audio-visual model with unlabelled multilingual data, and then fine-tune the visual model on labelled transcriptions. Our experiments show that: (1) multi-lingual models with more data outperform monolingual ones, but, when keeping the amount of data fixed, monolingual models tend to reach better performance; (2) multi-lingual outperforms English-only pre-training; (3) using languages which are more similar yields better results; and (4) fine-tuning on unseen languages is competitive to using the target language in the pre-training set. We hope our study inspires future research on non-English-only speech representation learning.
abstract_zh: 跨语言自我监督学习在过去几年中一直是一个日益增长的研究课题。然而，当前的作品仅探索使用音频信号来创建表示。在这项工作中，我们研究跨语言自我监督视觉表征学习。我们使用最近提出的原始视听语音编码器（RAVEn）框架来使用未标记的多语言数据预训练视听模型，然后在标记的转录上微调视觉模型。我们的实验表明：（1）具有更多数据的多语言模型优于单语言模型，但是，当保持数据量固定时，单语言模型往往会达到更好的性能； (2) 多语言预训练优于纯英语预训练； (3) 使用更相似的语言会产生更好的结果； (4) 对未见过的语言进行微调与在预训练集中使用目标语言相比具有竞争力。我们希望我们的研究能够激发未来对非英语语音表征学习的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨语言自监督视觉语音表示学习，通过预训练音频-视觉模型并微调视觉模块，探索多语言与单语言模型的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言自监督学习主要依赖音频信号，而视觉信息在不同语言间可能更具共性，需探索视觉表示的学习潜力以提升多语言模型性能。
AI.method: 采用RAVEN框架，利用未标记多语言数据预训练音频-视觉模型，随后在有标签转录数据上微调视觉部分，对比多语言与单语言模型表现。
AI.result: 多语言模型在数据充足时优于单语言模型；固定数据量下单语言表现更优；多语言优于仅英语预训练；语言相似性越高效果越好；微调未见过的语言仍具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为非英语语音表示学习提供新方向，强调多语言数据与语言相似性的重要性，鼓励未来探索跨语言视觉表征的潜力。

search_text: Learning Cross-lingual Visual Speech Representations 学习跨语言视觉语音表示 Cross-lingual self-supervised learning has been a growing research topic in the last few years. However, current works only explored the use of audio signals to create representations. In this work, we study cross-lingual self-supervised visual representation learning. We use the recently-proposed Raw Audio-Visual Speech Encoders (RAVEn) framework to pre-train an audio-visual model with unlabelled multilingual data, and then fine-tune the visual model on labelled transcriptions. Our experiments show that: (1) multi-lingual models with more data outperform monolingual ones, but, when keeping the amount of data fixed, monolingual models tend to reach better performance; (2) multi-lingual outperforms English-only pre-training; (3) using languages which are more similar yields better results; and (4) fine-tuning on unseen languages is competitive to using the target language in the pre-training set. We hope our study inspires future research on non-English-only speech representation learning. 跨语言自我监督学习在过去几年中一直是一个日益增长的研究课题。然而，当前的作品仅探索使用音频信号来创建表示。在这项工作中，我们研究跨语言自我监督视觉表征学习。我们使用最近提出的原始视听语音编码器（RAVEn）框架来使用未标记的多语言数据预训练视听模型，然后在标记的转录上微调视觉模型。我们的实验表明：（1）具有更多数据的多语言模型优于单语言模型，但是，当保持数据量固定时，单语言模型往往会达到更好的性能； (2) 多语言预训练优于纯英语预训练； (3) 使用更相似的语言会产生更好的结果； (4) 对未见过的语言进行微调与在预训练集中使用目标语言相比具有竞争力。我们希望我们的研究能够激发未来对非英语语音表征学习的研究。 本文研究跨语言自监督视觉语音表示学习，通过预训练音频-视觉模型并微调视觉模块，探索多语言与单语言模型的性能差异。 Andreas Zinonos,Alexandros Haliassos,Pingchuan Ma,Stavros Petridis,Maja Pantic cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Jie Wang,Yash Vardhan Pant,Zhihao Jiang
title: Learning-Based Modeling of Human-Autonomous Vehicle Interaction for Improved Safety in Mixed-Vehicle Platooning Control
title_zh: 基于学习的人机交互建模，提高混合车辆编队控制的安全性
abstract: The rising presence of autonomous vehicles (AVs) on public roads necessitates the development of advanced control strategies that account for the unpredictable nature of human-driven vehicles (HVs). This study introduces a learning-based method for modeling HV behavior, combining a traditional first-principles approach with a Gaussian process (GP) learning component. This hybrid model enhances the accuracy of velocity predictions and provides measurable uncertainty estimates. We leverage this model to develop a GP-based model predictive control (GP-MPC) strategy to improve safety in mixed vehicle platoons by integrating uncertainty assessments into distance constraints. Comparative simulations between our GP-MPC approach and a conventional model predictive control (MPC) strategy reveal that the GP-MPC ensures safer distancing and more efficient travel within the mixed platoon. By incorporating sparse GP modeling for HVs and a dynamic GP prediction in MPC, we significantly reduce the computation time of GP-MPC, making it only marginally longer than standard MPC and approximately 100 times faster than previous models not employing these techniques. Our findings underscore the effectiveness of learning-based HV modeling in enhancing safety and efficiency in mixed-traffic environments involving AV and HV interactions.
summary: The rising presence of autonomous vehicles (AVs) on public roads necessitates the development of advanced control strategies that account for the unpredictable nature of human-driven vehicles (HVs). This study introduces a learning-based method for modeling HV behavior, combining a traditional first-principles approach with a Gaussian process (GP) learning component. This hybrid model enhances the accuracy of velocity predictions and provides measurable uncertainty estimates. We leverage this model to develop a GP-based model predictive control (GP-MPC) strategy to improve safety in mixed vehicle platoons by integrating uncertainty assessments into distance constraints. Comparative simulations between our GP-MPC approach and a conventional model predictive control (MPC) strategy reveal that the GP-MPC ensures safer distancing and more efficient travel within the mixed platoon. By incorporating sparse GP modeling for HVs and a dynamic GP prediction in MPC, we significantly reduce the computation time of GP-MPC, making it only marginally longer than standard MPC and approximately 100 times faster than previous models not employing these techniques. Our findings underscore the effectiveness of learning-based HV modeling in enhancing safety and efficiency in mixed-traffic environments involving AV and HV interactions.
abstract_zh: 公共道路上自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 的数量不断增加，因此需要开发先进的控制策略来解决人类驾驶车辆 (HV) 的不可预测性。本研究引入了一种基于学习的 HV 行为建模方法，将传统的第一原理方法与高斯过程 (GP) 学习组件相结合。这种混合模型提高了速度预测的准确性并提供可测量的不确定性估计。我们利用该模型开发基于 GP 的模型预测控制 (GP-MPC) 策略，通过将不确定性评估集成到距离约束中来提高混合车辆排的安全性。我们的 GP-MPC 方法与传统模型预测控制 (MPC) 策略之间的比较模拟表明，GP-MPC 可确保混合排内更安全的距离和更高效的行驶。通过将 HV 的稀疏 GP 建模和 MPC 中的动态 GP 预测相结合，我们显着减少了 GP-MPC 的计算时间，使其仅比标准 MPC 稍长，并且比不采用这些技术的先前模型快约 100 倍。我们的研究结果强调了基于学习的 HV 建模在提高涉及 AV 和 HV 交互的混合交通环境中的安全性和效率方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的人车交互建模方法，用于提升混合车队中自动驾驶车辆的安全性。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶车辆增多，需应对人类驾驶车辆的不可预测性，传统控制策略难以保障混合车队安全。
AI.method: 融合物理原理模型与高斯过程学习组件构建混合模型，并基于不确定性评估设计GP-MPC控制策略。
AI.result: GP-MPC策略实现更安全的车距控制与高效行驶，计算时间较传统方法缩短约100倍。
AI.conclusion: 学习驱动的建模方法能有效提升自动驾驶与人类驾驶车辆混合场景下的安全性和通行效率。

This hybrid model enhances the accuracy of velocity predictions and provides measurable uncertainty estimates. authors_text: Jakub Kowalski,Elliot Doe,Mark H. M. Winands,Daniel Górski,Dennis J. N. J. Soemers
title: Proof Number Based Monte-Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 基于证明数的蒙特卡罗树搜索
comment: Extended version of IEEE Transactions on Games 2024 article (which is a journal version of IEEE CoG 2022 paper available at arXiv:2206.03965)
comments: Extended version of IEEE Transactions on Games 2024 article (which is a journal version of IEEE CoG 2022 paper available at arXiv:2206.03965)
abstract: This paper proposes a new game-search algorithm, PN-MCTS, which combines Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and Proof-Number Search (PNS). These two algorithms have been successfully applied for decision making in a range of domains. We define three areas where the additional knowledge provided by the proof and disproof numbers gathered in MCTS trees might be used: final move selection, solving subtrees, and the UCB1 selection mechanism. We test all possible combinations on different time settings, playing against vanilla UCT on several games: Lines of Action ($7$$\times$$7$ and $8$$\times$$8$ board sizes), MiniShogi, Knightthrough, and Awari. Furthermore, we extend this new algorithm to properly address games with draws, like Awari, by adding an additional layer of PNS on top of the MCTS tree. The experiments show that PN-MCTS is able to outperform MCTS in all tested game domains, achieving win rates up to 96.2% for Lines of Action.
summary: This paper proposes a new game-search algorithm, PN-MCTS, which combines Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and Proof-Number Search (PNS). These two algorithms have been successfully applied for decision making in a range of domains. We define three areas where the additional knowledge provided by the proof and disproof numbers gathered in MCTS trees might be used: final move selection, solving subtrees, and the UCB1 selection mechanism. We test all possible combinations on different time settings, playing against vanilla UCT on several games: Lines of Action ($7$$\times$$7$ and $8$$\times$$8$ board sizes), MiniShogi, Knightthrough, and Awari. Furthermore, we extend this new algorithm to properly address games with draws, like Awari, by adding an additional layer of PNS on top of the MCTS tree. The experiments show that PN-MCTS is able to outperform MCTS in all tested game domains, achieving win rates up to 96.2% for Lines of Action.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的博弈搜索算法PN-MCTS，该算法结合了蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）和证明数搜索（PNS）。这两种算法已成功应用于一系列领域的决策。我们定义了三个领域，可以使用 MCTS 树中收集的证明和反证数提供的附加知识：最终着法选择、求解子树和 UCB1 选择机制。我们在不同的时间设置上测试了所有可能的组合，在几款游戏中与普通 UCT 进行比赛：Lines of Action（$7$$\times$$7$ 和 $8$$\times$$8$ 棋盘尺寸）、MiniShogi、Knightthrough 和 Awari。此外，我们通过在 MCTS 树的顶部添加额外的 PNS 层，扩展了这个新算法，以正确解决带有抽签的游戏，例如 Awari。实验表明，PN-MCTS 在所有测试的游戏领域均优于 MCTS，行动线胜率高达 96.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和证明数搜索（PNS）的新算法PN-MCTS，用于改进博弈决策。
AI.motivation: MCTS在探索性决策中表现优异，而PNS能提供证明数和反证数以辅助求解游戏。两者结合可提升搜索效率与准确性。
AI.method: 将PNS的证明数机制融入MCTS框架，应用于最终移动选择、子树求解及UCB1选择机制，并扩展至支持平局处理（如Awari游戏）。
AI.result: 在Lines of Action（7×7和8×8）、MiniShogi、Knightthrough和Awari等游戏中，PN-MCTS均优于传统MCTS，Lines of Action胜率达96.2%。
AI.conclusion: PN-MCTS通过整合MCTS与PNS的优势，显著提升了博弈搜索性能，尤其在处理平局规则时表现突出。

ai_content.motivation: MCTS在探索性决策中表现优异，而PNS能提供证明数和反证数以辅助求解游戏。两者结合可提升搜索效率与准确性。
ai_content.method: 将PNS的证明数机制融入MCTS框架，应用于最终移动选择、子树求解及UCB1选择机制，并扩展至支持平局处理（如Awari游戏）。

ai_content.conclusion: PN-MCTS通过整合MCTS与PNS的优势，显著提升了博弈搜索性能，尤其在处理平局规则时表现突出。

search_text: Proof Number Based Monte-Carlo Tree Search 基于证明数的蒙特卡罗树搜索 This paper proposes a new game-search algorithm, PN-MCTS, which combines Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and Proof-Number Search (PNS). These two algorithms have been successfully applied for decision making in a range of domains. We define three areas where the additional knowledge provided by the proof and disproof numbers gathered in MCTS trees might be used: final move selection, solving subtrees, and the UCB1 selection mechanism. We test all possible combinations on different time settings, playing against vanilla UCT on several games: Lines of Action ($7$$\times$$7$ and $8$$\times$$8$ board sizes), MiniShogi, Knightthrough, and Awari. Furthermore, we extend this new algorithm to properly address games with draws, like Awari, by adding an additional layer of PNS on top of the MCTS tree. The experiments show that PN-MCTS is able to outperform MCTS in all tested game domains, achieving win rates up to 96.2% for Lines of Action. 本文提出了一种新的博弈搜索算法PN-MCTS，该算法结合了蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）和证明数搜索（PNS）。这两种算法已成功应用于一系列领域的决策。我们定义了三个领域，可以使用 MCTS 树中收集的证明和反证数提供的附加知识：最终着法选择、求解子树和 UCB1 选择机制。我们在不同的时间设置上测试了所有可能的组合，在几款游戏中与普通 UCT 进行比赛：Lines of Action（$7$$\times$$7$ 和 $8$$\times$$8$ 棋盘尺寸）、MiniShogi、Knightthrough 和 Awari。此外，我们通过在 MCTS 树的顶部添加额外的 PNS 层，扩展了这个新算法，以正确解决带有抽签的游戏，例如 Awari。实验表明，PN-MCTS 在所有测试的游戏领域均优于 MCTS，行动线胜率高达 96.2%。 本文提出了一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和证明数搜索（PNS）的新算法PN-MCTS，用于改进博弈决策。 Jakub Kowalski,Elliot Doe,Mark H. M. Winands,Daniel Górski,Dennis J. N. J. Soemers cs.AI

authors_text: Zhuowei Li,Long Zhao,Zizhao Zhang,Han Zhang,Di Liu,Ting Liu,Dimitris N. Metaxas
title: Steering Prototypes with Prompt-tuning for Rehearsal-free Continual Learning
title_zh: 通过快速调整来控制原型，以实现免排练的持续学习
comment: Accept to WACV 2024. Code is available at https://github.com/LzVv123456/Contrastive-Prototypical-Prompt
comments: Accept to WACV 2024. Code is available at https://github.com/LzVv123456/Contrastive-Prototypical-Prompt
abstract: In the context of continual learning, prototypes-as representative class embeddings-offer advantages in memory conservation and the mitigation of catastrophic forgetting. However, challenges related to semantic drift and prototype interference persist. In this study, we introduce the Contrastive Prototypical Prompt (CPP) approach. Through task-specific prompt-tuning, underpinned by a contrastive learning objective, we effectively address both aforementioned challenges. Our evaluations on four challenging class-incremental benchmarks reveal that CPP achieves a significant 4% to 6% improvement over state-of-the-art methods. Importantly, CPP operates without a rehearsal buffer and narrows the performance divergence between continual and offline joint-learning, suggesting an innovative scheme for Transformer-based continual learning systems.
summary: In the context of continual learning, prototypes-as representative class embeddings-offer advantages in memory conservation and the mitigation of catastrophic forgetting. However, challenges related to semantic drift and prototype interference persist. In this study, we introduce the Contrastive Prototypical Prompt (CPP) approach. Through task-specific prompt-tuning, underpinned by a contrastive learning objective, we effectively address both aforementioned challenges. Our evaluations on four challenging class-incremental benchmarks reveal that CPP achieves a significant 4% to 6% improvement over state-of-the-art methods. Importantly, CPP operates without a rehearsal buffer and narrows the performance divergence between continual and offline joint-learning, suggesting an innovative scheme for Transformer-based continual learning systems.
abstract_zh: 在持续学习的背景下，原型作为代表性的类嵌入在记忆保存和减轻灾难性遗忘方面具有优势。然而，与语义漂移和原型干扰相关的挑战仍然存在。在本研究中，我们介绍了对比原型提示（CPP）方法。通过针对特定任务的提示调整，以对比学习目标为基础，我们有效地解决了上述两个挑战。我们对四个具有挑战性的类增量基准的评估表明，CPP 比最先进的方法实现了 4% 到 6% 的显着改进。重要的是，CPP 在没有排练缓冲区的情况下运行，并缩小了持续学习和离线联合学习之间的性能差异，为基于 Transformer 的持续学习系统提出了一种创新方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需重放缓存的持续学习方法，通过提示调优优化原型，解决语义漂移和原型干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有原型方法在持续学习中存在语义漂移和原型干扰问题，且依赖重放缓存机制。
AI.method: 提出对比原型提示（CPP）方法，通过任务特定提示调优和对比学习目标优化原型表示。
AI.result: 在四个增量学习基准上优于现有方法4-6%，且无需重放缓存，缩小了持续学习与离线学习的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: CPP为Transformer持续学习系统提供了创新方案，证明了提示调优在原型优化中的有效性。
