authors_text: Dan Andrei Iliescu,Devang Savita Ram Mohan,Tian Huey Teh,Zack Hodari
title: Controllable Prosody Generation With Partial Inputs
title_zh: 具有部分输入的可控韵律生成
comment: 5 pages
comments: 5 pages
abstract: We address the problem of human-in-the-loop control for generating prosody in the context of text-to-speech synthesis. Controlling prosody is challenging because existing generative models lack an efficient interface through which users can modify the output quickly and precisely. To solve this, we introduce a novel framework whereby the user provides partial inputs and the generative model generates the missing features. We propose a model that is specifically designed to encode partial prosodic features and output complete audio. We show empirically that our model displays two essential qualities of a human-in-the-loop control mechanism: efficiency and robustness. With even a very small number of input values (~4), our model enables users to improve the quality of the output significantly in terms of listener preference (4:1).
summary: We address the problem of human-in-the-loop control for generating prosody in the context of text-to-speech synthesis. Controlling prosody is challenging because existing generative models lack an efficient interface through which users can modify the output quickly and precisely. To solve this, we introduce a novel framework whereby the user provides partial inputs and the generative model generates the missing features. We propose a model that is specifically designed to encode partial prosodic features and output complete audio. We show empirically that our model displays two essential qualities of a human-in-the-loop control mechanism: efficiency and robustness. With even a very small number of input values (~4), our model enables users to improve the quality of the output significantly in terms of listener preference (4:1).
abstract_zh: 我们解决了在文本到语音合成的背景下生成韵律的人机循环控制问题。控制韵律具有挑战性，因为现有的生成模型缺乏有效的界面，用户可以通过该界面快速而精确地修改输出。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的框架，用户提供部分输入，生成模型生成缺失的特征。我们提出了一种专门设计用于编码部分韵律特征并输出完整音频的模型。我们凭经验证明，我们的模型显示了人在环控制机制的两个基本品质：效率和鲁棒性。即使输入值的数量非常少 (~4)，我们的模型也能让用户根据听众偏好 (4:1) 显着提高输出质量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在文本到语音合成中通过部分输入实现可控韵律生成的问题，提出了一种新型框架以提升用户交互效率。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型缺乏高效的人机交互接口，用户难以快速精确地调整语音合成的韵律输出，亟需提升控制效率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计一种新型框架，允许用户输入部分韵律特征，模型通过编码部分输入生成缺失的完整音频特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需约4个输入值即可显著提升输出质量，听众偏好比例达4:1，验证了模型的高效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效实现了人机协同控制，为少样本输入下的高质量语音合成提供了新思路，未来可拓展至更多交互场景。

authors_text: Boren Hu,Yun Zhu,Jiacheng Li,Siliang Tang
title: SmartBERT: A Promotion of Dynamic Early Exiting Mechanism for Accelerating BERT Inference
title_zh: SmartBERT：加速BERT推理的动态提前退出机制的推广
comment: Accepted by IJCAI2023
comments: Accepted by IJCAI2023
abstract: Dynamic early exiting has been proven to improve the inference speed of the pre-trained language model like BERT. However, all samples must go through all consecutive layers before early exiting and more complex samples usually go through more layers, which still exists redundant computation. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic early exiting combined with layer skipping for BERT inference named SmartBERT, which adds a skipping gate and an exiting operator into each layer of BERT. SmartBERT can adaptively skip some layers and adaptively choose whether to exit. Besides, we propose cross-layer contrastive learning and combine it into our training phases to boost the intermediate layers and classifiers which would be beneficial for early exiting. To keep the consistent usage of skipping gates between training and inference phases, we propose a hard weight mechanism during training phase. We conduct experiments on eight classification datasets of the GLUE benchmark. Experimental results show that SmartBERT achieves 2-3x computation reduction with minimal accuracy drops compared with BERT and our method outperforms previous methods in both efficiency and accuracy. Moreover, in some complex datasets like RTE and WNLI, we prove that the early exiting based on entropy hardly works, and the skipping mechanism is essential for reducing computation.
summary: Dynamic early exiting has been proven to improve the inference speed of the pre-trained language model like BERT. However, all samples must go through all consecutive layers before early exiting and more complex samples usually go through more layers, which still exists redundant computation. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic early exiting combined with layer skipping for BERT inference named SmartBERT, which adds a skipping gate and an exiting operator into each layer of BERT. SmartBERT can adaptively skip some layers and adaptively choose whether to exit. Besides, we propose cross-layer contrastive learning and combine it into our training phases to boost the intermediate layers and classifiers which would be beneficial for early exiting. To keep the consistent usage of skipping gates between training and inference phases, we propose a hard weight mechanism during training phase. We conduct experiments on eight classification datasets of the GLUE benchmark. Experimental results show that SmartBERT achieves 2-3x computation reduction with minimal accuracy drops compared with BERT and our method outperforms previous methods in both efficiency and accuracy. Moreover, in some complex datasets like RTE and WNLI, we prove that the early exiting based on entropy hardly works, and the skipping mechanism is essential for reducing computation.
abstract_zh: 动态提前退出已被证明可以提高 BERT 等预训练语言模型的推理速度。然而，所有样本在早期退出之前都必须经历所有连续层，并且更复杂的样本通常会经历更多层，这仍然存在冗余计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的动态早期退出与层跳跃相结合的 BERT 推理，名为 SmartBERT，它在 BERT 的每一层中添加了一个跳跃门和一个退出算子。 SmartBERT可以自适应地跳过一些层并自适应地选择是否退出。此外，我们提出跨层对比学习并将其结合到我们的训练阶段以增强中间层和分类器，这将有利于早期退出。为了保持训练和推理阶段之间跳跃门的一致使用，我们在训练阶段提出了一种硬权重机制。我们在 GLUE 基准的八个分类数据集上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与 BERT 相比，SmartBERT 的计算量减少了 2-3 倍，并且精度下降最小，并且我们的方法在效率和精度方面都优于以前的方法。此外，在一些复杂的数据集中，例如RTE和WNLI，我们证明基于熵的早期退出几乎不起作用，而跳跃机制对于减少计算量至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SmartBERT，通过动态提前退出机制和层跳过技术加速BERT推理过程。
AI.motivation: 现有动态提前退出方法仍存在冗余计算，复杂样本需经过更多层导致效率低下，需改进层跳过机制以提升推理效率。
AI.method: 在BERT每层添加跳过门和退出算子，结合跨层对比学习优化中间层与分类器，并采用硬权重机制保持训练与推理阶段跳过门一致性。
AI.result: 在GLUE基准测试中实现2-3倍计算量减少且精度损失极小，复杂数据集（如RTE、WNLI）验证了跳过机制必要性。
AI.conclusion: SmartBERT通过自适应层跳过和退出机制有效降低计算开销，在保持精度的同时优于现有方法，尤其适用于复杂任务。

search_text: SmartBERT: A Promotion of Dynamic Early Exiting Mechanism for Accelerating BERT Inference SmartBERT：加速BERT推理的动态提前退出机制的推广 Dynamic early exiting has been proven to improve the inference speed of the pre-trained language model like BERT. However, all samples must go through all consecutive layers before early exiting and more complex samples usually go through more layers, which still exists redundant computation. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic early exiting combined with layer skipping for BERT inference named SmartBERT, which adds a skipping gate and an exiting operator into each layer of BERT. SmartBERT can adaptively skip some layers and adaptively choose whether to exit. Besides, we propose cross-layer contrastive learning and combine it into our training phases to boost the intermediate layers and classifiers which would be beneficial for early exiting. To keep the consistent usage of skipping gates between training and inference phases, we propose a hard weight mechanism during training phase. We conduct experiments on eight classification datasets of the GLUE benchmark. Experimental results show that SmartBERT achieves 2-3x computation reduction with minimal accuracy drops compared with BERT and our method outperforms previous methods in both efficiency and accuracy. Moreover, in some complex datasets like RTE and WNLI, we prove that the early exiting based on entropy hardly works, and the skipping mechanism is essential for reducing computation. 动态提前退出已被证明可以提高 BERT 等预训练语言模型的推理速度。然而，所有样本在早期退出之前都必须经历所有连续层，并且更复杂的样本通常会经历更多层，这仍然存在冗余计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的动态早期退出与层跳跃相结合的 BERT 推理，名为 SmartBERT，它在 BERT 的每一层中添加了一个跳跃门和一个退出算子。 SmartBERT可以自适应地跳过一些层并自适应地选择是否退出。此外，我们提出跨层对比学习并将其结合到我们的训练阶段以增强中间层和分类器，这将有利于早期退出。为了保持训练和推理阶段之间跳跃门的一致使用，我们在训练阶段提出了一种硬权重机制。我们在 GLUE 基准的八个分类数据集上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与 BERT 相比，SmartBERT 的计算量减少了 2-3 倍，并且精度下降最小，并且我们的方法在效率和精度方面都优于以前的方法。此外，在一些复杂的数据集中，例如RTE和WNLI，我们证明基于熵的早期退出几乎不起作用，而跳跃机制对于减少计算量至关重要。 本文提出SmartBERT，通过动态提前退出机制和层跳过技术加速BERT推理过程。 Boren Hu,Yun Zhu,Jiacheng Li,Siliang Tang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Abhishek Kaushik,Gareth J. F. Jones
title: Comparing Conventional and Conversational Search Interaction using Implicit Evaluation Methods
title_zh: 使用隐式评估方法比较传统搜索交互和会话式搜索交互
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 18th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - (Volume 2)- February 19-21, 2023, in Lisbon, Portugal
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 18th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - (Volume 2)- February 19-21, 2023, in Lisbon, Portugal
abstract: Conversational search applications offer the prospect of improved user experience in information seeking via agent support. However, it is not clear how searchers will respond to this mode of engagement, in comparison to a conventional user-driven search interface, such as those found in a standard web search engine. We describe a laboratory-based study directly comparing user behaviour for a conventional search interface (CSI) with that of an agent-mediated multiview conversational search interface (MCSI) which extends the CSI. User reaction and search outcomes of the two interfaces are compared using implicit evaluation using five analysis methods: claiming to have a better search experience in contrast to a corresponding standard search interface.
summary: Conversational search applications offer the prospect of improved user experience in information seeking via agent support. However, it is not clear how searchers will respond to this mode of engagement, in comparison to a conventional user-driven search interface, such as those found in a standard web search engine. We describe a laboratory-based study directly comparing user behaviour for a conventional search interface (CSI) with that of an agent-mediated multiview conversational search interface (MCSI) which extends the CSI. User reaction and search outcomes of the two interfaces are compared using implicit evaluation using five analysis methods: claiming to have a better search experience in contrast to a corresponding standard search interface.
abstract_zh: 对话式搜索应用程序有望通过代理支持改善信息搜索的用户体验。然而，与传统的用户驱动的搜索界面（例如标准网络搜索引擎中的界面）相比，尚不清楚搜索者将如何响应这种参与模式。我们描述了一项基于实验室的研究，直接将传统搜索界面 (CSI) 的用户行为与扩展了 CSI 的代理介导的多视图会话搜索界面 (MCSI) 的用户行为进行比较。使用五种分析方法使用隐式评估来比较两个界面的用户反应和搜索结果：声称与相应的标准搜索界面相比具有更好的搜索体验。

AI.tldr: 比较传统搜索界面与对话式搜索界面的用户行为及搜索效果，采用隐式评估方法
AI.motivation: 探讨用户对对话式搜索界面的接受度及效果，以优化信息检索体验
AI.method: 通过实验室实验，对比两种界面的用户行为和搜索结果，采用五种隐式评估方法分析数据
AI.result: 实验结果表明对话式界面在部分指标上优于传统界面，但需进一步验证
AI.conclusion: 对话式搜索界面在特定情况下可能提升用户体验，但需进一步研究其适用性和优化方法

authors_text: Wenjian Wang,Lijuan Duan,Yuxi Wang,Junsong Fan,Zhi Gong,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: A Survey of Deep Visual Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 深度视觉跨域小样本学习综述
abstract: Few-Shot transfer learning has become a major focus of research as it allows recognition of new classes with limited labeled data. While it is assumed that train and test data have the same data distribution, this is often not the case in real-world applications. This leads to decreased model transfer effects when the new class distribution differs significantly from the learned classes. Research into Cross-Domain Few-Shot (CDFS) has emerged to address this issue, forming a more challenging and realistic setting. In this survey, we provide a detailed taxonomy of CDFS from the problem setting and corresponding solutions view. We summarise the existing CDFS network architectures and discuss the solution ideas for each direction the taxonomy indicates. Furthermore, we introduce various CDFS downstream applications and outline classification, detection, and segmentation benchmarks and corresponding standards for evaluation. We also discuss the challenges of CDFS research and explore potential directions for future investigation. Through this review, we aim to provide comprehensive guidance on CDFS research, enabling researchers to gain insight into the state-of-the-art while allowing them to build upon existing solutions to develop their own CDFS models.
summary: Few-Shot transfer learning has become a major focus of research as it allows recognition of new classes with limited labeled data. While it is assumed that train and test data have the same data distribution, this is often not the case in real-world applications. This leads to decreased model transfer effects when the new class distribution differs significantly from the learned classes. Research into Cross-Domain Few-Shot (CDFS) has emerged to address this issue, forming a more challenging and realistic setting. In this survey, we provide a detailed taxonomy of CDFS from the problem setting and corresponding solutions view. We summarise the existing CDFS network architectures and discuss the solution ideas for each direction the taxonomy indicates. Furthermore, we introduce various CDFS downstream applications and outline classification, detection, and segmentation benchmarks and corresponding standards for evaluation. We also discuss the challenges of CDFS research and explore potential directions for future investigation. Through this review, we aim to provide comprehensive guidance on CDFS research, enabling researchers to gain insight into the state-of-the-art while allowing them to build upon existing solutions to develop their own CDFS models.
abstract_zh: 少样本迁移学习已成为研究的主要焦点，因为它允许使用有限的标记数据识别新类别。虽然假设训练数据和测试数据具有相同的数据分布，但在实际应用中通常情况并非如此。当新的类别分布与学习的类别显着不同时，这会导致模型迁移效果降低。跨域少样本（CDFS）的研究就是为了解决这个问题而出现的，形成了一个更具挑战性和现实的环境。在本次调查中，我们从问题设置和相应解决方案的角度提供了 CDFS 的详细分类。我们总结了现有的 CDFS 网络架构，并讨论了分类法所指示的每个方向的解决方案思路。此外，我们还介绍了各种CDFS下游应用，并概述了分类、检测和分割基准以及相应的评估标准。我们还讨论了 CDFS 研究的挑战，并探讨了未来研究的潜在方向。通过这次审查，我们的目标是为 CDFS 研究提供全面的指导，使研究人员能够深入了解最先进的技术，同时允许他们在现有解决方案的基础上开发自己的 CDFS 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文对深度视觉跨域小样本学习（CDFS）进行综述，系统梳理其问题设定、解决方案、网络架构及应用挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统小样本学习假设训练与测试数据分布一致，但实际应用中分布差异导致模型迁移效果下降，亟需研究更现实的跨域小样本学习方法。
AI.method: 通过分类学视角构建CDFS问题框架，总结现有网络架构，分析各方向解决方案，并梳理下游应用与评估基准。
AI.result: 归纳了CDFS典型网络结构，讨论了分类、检测与分割任务的基准指标，明确了当前研究的挑战与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为CDFS研究提供系统性指导，帮助研究者理解前沿方法并基于现有成果开发新模型。

Furthermore, we introduce various CDFS downstream applications and outline classification, detection, and segmentation benchmarks and corresponding standards for evaluation. We also discuss the challenges of CDFS research and explore potential directions for future investigation. Through this review, we aim to provide comprehensive guidance on CDFS research, enabling researchers to gain insight into the state-of-the-art while allowing them to build upon existing solutions to develop their own CDFS models. 少样本迁移学习已成为研究的主要焦点，因为它允许使用有限的标记数据识别新类别。虽然假设训练数据和测试数据具有相同的数据分布，但在实际应用中通常情况并非如此。当新的类别分布与学习的类别显着不同时，这会导致模型迁移效果降低。跨域少样本（CDFS）的研究就是为了解决这个问题而出现的，形成了一个更具挑战性和现实的环境。在本次调查中，我们从问题设置和相应解决方案的角度提供了 CDFS 的详细分类。我们总结了现有的 CDFS 网络架构，并讨论了分类法所指示的每个方向的解决方案思路。此外，我们还介绍了各种CDFS下游应用，并概述了分类、检测和分割基准以及相应的评估标准。我们还讨论了 CDFS 研究的挑战，并探讨了未来研究的潜在方向。通过这次审查，我们的目标是为 CDFS 研究提供全面的指导，使研究人员能够深入了解最先进的技术，同时允许他们在现有解决方案的基础上开发自己的 CDFS 模型。 本文对深度视觉跨域小样本学习（CDFS）进行综述，系统梳理其问题设定、解决方案、网络架构及应用挑战。 Wenjian Wang,Lijuan Duan,Yuxi Wang,Junsong Fan,Zhi Gong,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Jiayi Lin,Shaogang Gong
title: GridCLIP: One-Stage Object Detection by Grid-Level CLIP Representation Learning
title_zh: GridCLIP：通过网格级 CLIP 表示学习进行一级对象检测
abstract: A vision-language foundation model pretrained on very large-scale image-text paired data has the potential to provide generalizable knowledge representation for downstream visual recognition and detection tasks, especially on supplementing the undersampled categories in downstream model training. Recent studies utilizing CLIP for object detection have shown that a two-stage detector design typically outperforms a one-stage detector, while requiring more expensive training resources and longer inference time. In this work, we propose a one-stage detector GridCLIP that narrows its performance gap to those of two-stage detectors, with approximately 43 and 5 times faster than its two-stage counterpart (ViLD) in the training and test process respectively. GridCLIP learns grid-level representations to adapt to the intrinsic principle of one-stage detection learning by expanding the conventional CLIP image-text holistic mapping to a more fine-grained, grid-text alignment. This differs from the region-text mapping in two-stage detectors that apply CLIP directly by treating regions as images. Specifically, GridCLIP performs Grid-level Alignment to adapt the CLIP image-level representations to grid-level representations by aligning to CLIP category representations to learn the annotated (especially frequent) categories. To learn generalizable visual representations of broader categories, especially undersampled ones, we perform Image-level Alignment during training to propagate broad pre-learned categories in the CLIP image encoder from the image-level to the grid-level representations. Experiments show that the learned CLIP-based grid-level representations boost the performance of undersampled (infrequent and novel) categories, reaching comparable detection performance on the LVIS benchmark.
summary: A vision-language foundation model pretrained on very large-scale image-text paired data has the potential to provide generalizable knowledge representation for downstream visual recognition and detection tasks, especially on supplementing the undersampled categories in downstream model training. Recent studies utilizing CLIP for object detection have shown that a two-stage detector design typically outperforms a one-stage detector, while requiring more expensive training resources and longer inference time. In this work, we propose a one-stage detector GridCLIP that narrows its performance gap to those of two-stage detectors, with approximately 43 and 5 times faster than its two-stage counterpart (ViLD) in the training and test process respectively. GridCLIP learns grid-level representations to adapt to the intrinsic principle of one-stage detection learning by expanding the conventional CLIP image-text holistic mapping to a more fine-grained, grid-text alignment. This differs from the region-text mapping in two-stage detectors that apply CLIP directly by treating regions as images. Specifically, GridCLIP performs Grid-level Alignment to adapt the CLIP image-level representations to grid-level representations by aligning to CLIP category representations to learn the annotated (especially frequent) categories. To learn generalizable visual representations of broader categories, especially undersampled ones, we perform Image-level Alignment during training to propagate broad pre-learned categories in the CLIP image encoder from the image-level to the grid-level representations. Experiments show that the learned CLIP-based grid-level representations boost the performance of undersampled (infrequent and novel) categories, reaching comparable detection performance on the LVIS benchmark.
abstract_zh: 在超大规模图像文本配对数据上预训练的视觉语言基础模型有可能为下游视觉识别和检测任务提供可泛化的知识表示，特别是在补充下游模型训练中的欠采样类别方面。最近利用 CLIP 进行物体检测的研究表明，两级检测器设计通常优于一级检测器，但需要更昂贵的训练资源和更长的推理时间。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种单级检测器 GridCLIP，它缩小了与两级检测器的性能差距，在训练和测试过程中分别比两级检测器 (ViLD) 快约 43 倍和 5 倍。 GridCLIP 通过将传统的 CLIP 图像-文本整体映射扩展到更细粒度的网格-文本对齐来学习网格级表示，以适应一阶段检测学习的内在原理。这与两级检测器中的区域-文本映射不同，后者通过将区域视为图像来直接应用 CLIP。具体来说，GridCLIP 执行网格级对齐，通过与 CLIP 类别表示对齐来学习带注释的（特别是频繁出现的）类别，从而使 CLIP 图像级表示适应网格级表示。为了学习更广泛类别（尤其是欠采样类别）的通用视觉表示，我们在训练期间执行图像级对齐，以将 CLIP 图像编码器中广泛的预学习类别从图像级传播到网格级表示。实验表明，学习到的基于 CLIP 的网格级表示提高了欠采样（不常见和新颖）类别的性能，在 LVIS 基准上达到了可比的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网格级CLIP表示学习的一阶段目标检测方法GridCLIP，旨在通过细粒度的网格-文本对齐提升检测性能，特别是在低采样类别上的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管两阶段检测器在性能上优于一阶段检测器，但其训练成本高且推理速度慢。CLIP等视觉-语言预训练模型能提供通用知识表示，但需适应一阶段检测的网格级特征学习需求。
AI.method: GridCLIP通过网格级对齐（Grid-level Alignment）将CLIP的图像级表示扩展为网格级表示，并结合图像级对齐（Image-level Alignment）传播CLIP的预训练类别知识，从而学习更通用的视觉表示，尤其增强对低频和新类别的检测能力。
AI.result: GridCLIP在训练和测试速度上分别比两阶段检测器ViLD快43倍和5倍，在LVIS基准测试中达到与两阶段检测器相当的性能，尤其在低采样类别上表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: GridCLIP通过网格级CLIP表示学习有效缩小了一阶段与两阶段检测器的性能差距，在保持高效性的同时提升了检测模型对低频类别的适应能力。

authors_text: Ziyang Hong,C. Patrick Yue
title: Cross-Dimensional Refined Learning for Real-Time 3D Visual Perception from Monocular Video
title_zh: 单目视频实时 3D 视觉感知的跨维度精细学习
comment: Accpeted to ICCV 2023 Workshops. Project page: https://hafred.github.io/cdrnet/
comments: Accpeted to ICCV 2023 Workshops. Project page: https://hafred.github.io/cdrnet/
abstract: We present a novel real-time capable learning method that jointly perceives a 3D scene's geometry structure and semantic labels. Recent approaches to real-time 3D scene reconstruction mostly adopt a volumetric scheme, where a Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) is directly regressed. However, these volumetric approaches tend to focus on the global coherence of their reconstructions, which leads to a lack of local geometric detail. To overcome this issue, we propose to leverage the latent geometric prior knowledge in 2D image features by explicit depth prediction and anchored feature generation, to refine the occupancy learning in TSDF volume. Besides, we find that this cross-dimensional feature refinement methodology can also be adopted for the semantic segmentation task by utilizing semantic priors. Hence, we proposed an end-to-end cross-dimensional refinement neural network (CDRNet) to extract both 3D mesh and 3D semantic labeling in real time. The experiment results show that this method achieves a state-of-the-art 3D perception efficiency on multiple datasets, which indicates the great potential of our method for industrial applications.
summary: We present a novel real-time capable learning method that jointly perceives a 3D scene's geometry structure and semantic labels. Recent approaches to real-time 3D scene reconstruction mostly adopt a volumetric scheme, where a Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) is directly regressed. However, these volumetric approaches tend to focus on the global coherence of their reconstructions, which leads to a lack of local geometric detail. To overcome this issue, we propose to leverage the latent geometric prior knowledge in 2D image features by explicit depth prediction and anchored feature generation, to refine the occupancy learning in TSDF volume. Besides, we find that this cross-dimensional feature refinement methodology can also be adopted for the semantic segmentation task by utilizing semantic priors. Hence, we proposed an end-to-end cross-dimensional refinement neural network (CDRNet) to extract both 3D mesh and 3D semantic labeling in real time. The experiment results show that this method achieves a state-of-the-art 3D perception efficiency on multiple datasets, which indicates the great potential of our method for industrial applications.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的实时学习方法，可以共同感知 3D 场景的几何结构和语义标签。最近的实时 3D 场景重建方法大多采用体积方案，其中直接回归截断符号距离函数 (TSDF)。然而，这些体积方法往往侧重于其重建的全局连贯性，这导致缺乏局部几何细节。为了克服这个问题，我们建议通过显式深度预测和锚定特征生成来利用 2D 图像特征中的潜在几何先验知识，以细化 TSDF 体积中的占用学习。此外，我们发现这种跨维特征细化方法也可以利用语义先验用于语义分割任务。因此，我们提出了一种端到端的跨维度细化神经网络（CDRNet）来实时提取 3D 网格和 3D 语义标签。实验结果表明，该方法在多个数据集上实现了最先进的3D感知效率，这表明我们的方法在工业应用中的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时单目视频三维视觉感知方法，通过跨维度精炼学习同时获取场景几何结构和语义标签。
AI.motivation: 现有基于体素的TSDF重建方法侧重全局一致性，导致局部几何细节不足，且缺乏对语义信息的有效利用。
AI.method: 设计端到端跨维度精炼网络CDRNet，通过显式深度预测与锚定特征生成精炼TSDF体积，并利用语义先验进行分割任务优化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到三维感知效率的最先进水平，验证了方法在工业应用中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 跨维度精炼方法有效结合了几何与语义信息，为实时三维视觉感知提供了高效解决方案。

Besides, we find that this cross-dimensional feature refinement methodology can also be adopted for the semantic segmentation task by utilizing semantic priors. Hence, we proposed an end-to-end cross-dimensional refinement neural network (CDRNet) to extract both 3D mesh and 3D semantic labeling in real time. The experiment results show that this method achieves a state-of-the-art 3D perception efficiency on multiple datasets, which indicates the great potential of our method for industrial applications. 我们提出了一种新颖的实时学习方法，可以共同感知 3D 场景的几何结构和语义标签。最近的实时 3D 场景重建方法大多采用体积方案，其中直接回归截断符号距离函数 (TSDF)。然而，这些体积方法往往侧重于其重建的全局连贯性，这导致缺乏局部几何细节。为了克服这个问题，我们建议通过显式深度预测和锚定特征生成来利用 2D 图像特征中的潜在几何先验知识，以细化 TSDF 体积中的占用学习。此外，我们发现这种跨维特征细化方法也可以利用语义先验用于语义分割任务。因此，我们提出了一种端到端的跨维度细化神经网络（CDRNet）来实时提取 3D 网格和 3D 语义标签。实验结果表明，该方法在多个数据集上实现了最先进的3D感知效率，这表明我们的方法在工业应用中的巨大潜力。 本文提出一种实时单目视频三维视觉感知方法，通过跨维度精炼学习同时获取场景几何结构和语义标签。 Ziyang Hong,C. Patrick Yue cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Mingliang Dai,Zhizhong Huang,Jiaqi Gao,Hongming Shan,Junping Zhang
title: Cross-head Supervision for Crowd Counting with Noisy Annotations
title_zh: 使用嘈杂注释进行人群计数的十字头监督
comment: accepted by ICASSP 2023
comments: accepted by ICASSP 2023
abstract: Noisy annotations such as missing annotations and location shifts often exist in crowd counting datasets due to multi-scale head sizes, high occlusion, etc. These noisy annotations severely affect the model training, especially for density map-based methods. To alleviate the negative impact of noisy annotations, we propose a novel crowd counting model with one convolution head and one transformer head, in which these two heads can supervise each other in noisy areas, called Cross-Head Supervision. The resultant model, CHS-Net, can synergize different types of inductive biases for better counting. In addition, we develop a progressive cross-head supervision learning strategy to stabilize the training process and provide more reliable supervision. Extensive experimental results on ShanghaiTech and QNRF datasets demonstrate superior performance over state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/RaccoonDML/CHSNet.
summary: Noisy annotations such as missing annotations and location shifts often exist in crowd counting datasets due to multi-scale head sizes, high occlusion, etc. These noisy annotations severely affect the model training, especially for density map-based methods. To alleviate the negative impact of noisy annotations, we propose a novel crowd counting model with one convolution head and one transformer head, in which these two heads can supervise each other in noisy areas, called Cross-Head Supervision. The resultant model, CHS-Net, can synergize different types of inductive biases for better counting. In addition, we develop a progressive cross-head supervision learning strategy to stabilize the training process and provide more reliable supervision. Extensive experimental results on ShanghaiTech and QNRF datasets demonstrate superior performance over state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/RaccoonDML/CHSNet.
abstract_zh: 由于多尺度头部尺寸、高遮挡等，人群计数数据集中经常存在诸如缺失注释和位置偏移之类的噪声注释。这些噪声注释严重影响模型训练，特别是对于基于密度图的方法。为了减轻噪声注释的负面影响，我们提出了一种新颖的人群计数模型，具有一个卷积头和一个变压器头，其中这两个头可以在噪声区域中相互监督，称为十字头监督。由此产生的模型 CHS-Net 可以协同不同类型的归纳偏差以实现更好的计数。此外，我们还制定了渐进式跨头监督学习策略，以稳定训练过程并提供更可靠的监督。上海科技大学和 QNRF 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，其性能优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/RaccoonDML/CHSNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CHS-Net的新型人群计数模型，通过交叉头监督机制应对标注噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 人群计数数据集存在标注缺失和位置偏移等噪声问题，传统密度图方法对此敏感，导致模型训练不稳定。
AI.method: 设计包含卷积头与Transformer头的双头架构，通过交叉监督机制在噪声区域相互校正，并采用渐进式学习策略稳定训练过程。
AI.result: 在ShanghaiTech和QNRF数据集上优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 交叉头监督有效缓解标注噪声影响，提升计数准确性，方法具有普适性。

authors_text: JiYeon Oh,Daun Kim,Jae-Yeop Jeong,Yeong-Gi Hong,Jin-Woo Jeong
title: Human Reaction Intensity Estimation with Ensemble of Multi-task Networks
title_zh: 多任务网络集成的人类反应强度估计
abstract: Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. Especially, "Emotional Reaction Intensity" (ERI) is an important topic in the facial expression recognition task. In this paper, we propose a multi-emotional task learning-based approach and present preliminary results for the ERI challenge introduced in the 5th affective behavior analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. Our method achieved the mean PCC score of 0.3254.
summary: Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. Especially, "Emotional Reaction Intensity" (ERI) is an important topic in the facial expression recognition task. In this paper, we propose a multi-emotional task learning-based approach and present preliminary results for the ERI challenge introduced in the 5th affective behavior analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. Our method achieved the mean PCC score of 0.3254.
abstract_zh: 野外面部表情对于各种交互式计算领域至关重要。特别是，“情绪反应强度”（ERI）是面部表情识别任务中的一个重要课题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多情感任务学习的方法，并展示了第五届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）竞赛中引入的 ERI 挑战的初步结果。我们的方法获得了 0.3254 的平均 PCC 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务网络集成的方法，用于估计人类情感反应强度（ERI），并在ABAW竞赛中取得初步成果。
AI.motivation: 野外环境中的面部表情识别对交互计算至关重要，而情感反应强度（ERI）作为关键指标，亟需更有效的建模方法以提升准确性。
AI.method: 设计多情感任务学习框架，通过集成多任务网络实现对ERI的联合建模，并在ABAW竞赛数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 在ABAW竞赛ERI挑战中，方法达到平均PCC得分0.3254，但未明确对比现有方法的性能优劣。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习方法为ERI估计提供了可行方案，但需进一步优化模型结构与训练策略以提升性能。

authors_text: Yining Jiao,Carlton Zdanski,Julia Kimbell,Andrew Prince,Cameron Worden,Samuel Kirse,Christopher Rutter,Benjamin Shields,William Dunn,Jisan Mahmud,Marc Niethammer
title: NAISR: A 3D Neural Additive Model for Interpretable Shape Representation
title_zh: NAISR：用于可解释形状表示的 3D 神经加法模型
comment: 33 pages
comments: 33 pages
abstract: Deep implicit functions (DIFs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for many computer vision tasks such as 3D shape reconstruction, generation, registration, completion, editing, and understanding. However, given a set of 3D shapes with associated covariates there is at present no shape representation method which allows to precisely represent the shapes while capturing the individual dependencies on each covariate. Such a method would be of high utility to researchers to discover knowledge hidden in a population of shapes. For scientific shape discovery, we propose a 3D Neural Additive Model for Interpretable Shape Representation ($\texttt{NAISR}$) which describes individual shapes by deforming a shape atlas in accordance to the effect of disentangled covariates. Our approach captures shape population trends and allows for patient-specific predictions through shape transfer. $\texttt{NAISR}$ is the first approach to combine the benefits of deep implicit shape representations with an atlas deforming according to specified covariates. We evaluate $\texttt{NAISR}$ with respect to shape reconstruction, shape disentanglement, shape evolution, and shape transfer on three datasets: 1) $\textit{Starman}$, a simulated 2D shape dataset; 2) the ADNI hippocampus 3D shape dataset; and 3) a pediatric airway 3D shape dataset. Our experiments demonstrate that $\textit{Starman}$ achieves excellent shape reconstruction performance while retaining interpretability. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}$.
summary: Deep implicit functions (DIFs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for many computer vision tasks such as 3D shape reconstruction, generation, registration, completion, editing, and understanding. However, given a set of 3D shapes with associated covariates there is at present no shape representation method which allows to precisely represent the shapes while capturing the individual dependencies on each covariate. Such a method would be of high utility to researchers to discover knowledge hidden in a population of shapes. For scientific shape discovery, we propose a 3D Neural Additive Model for Interpretable Shape Representation ($\texttt{NAISR}$) which describes individual shapes by deforming a shape atlas in accordance to the effect of disentangled covariates. Our approach captures shape population trends and allows for patient-specific predictions through shape transfer. $\texttt{NAISR}$ is the first approach to combine the benefits of deep implicit shape representations with an atlas deforming according to specified covariates. We evaluate $\texttt{NAISR}$ with respect to shape reconstruction, shape disentanglement, shape evolution, and shape transfer on three datasets: 1) $\textit{Starman}$, a simulated 2D shape dataset; 2) the ADNI hippocampus 3D shape dataset; and 3) a pediatric airway 3D shape dataset. Our experiments demonstrate that $\textit{Starman}$ achieves excellent shape reconstruction performance while retaining interpretability. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}$.
abstract_zh: 深度隐式函数 (DIF) 已成为许多计算机视觉任务（例如 3D 形状重建、生成、配准、完成、编辑和理解）的强大范例。然而，给定一组具有关联协变量的 3D 形状，目前还没有允许精确表示形状同时捕获对每个协变量的个体依赖性的形状表示方法。这种方法对于研究人员发现隐藏在形状群中的知识非常有用。对于科学形状发现，我们提出了一种用于可解释形状表示的 3D 神经加法模型 ($\texttt{NAISR}$)，该模型通过根据解纠缠协变量的效果使形状图集变形来描述单个形状。我们的方法捕捉形状群体趋势，并允许通过形状转移进行针对患者的预测。 $\texttt{NAISR}$ 是第一种将深度隐式形状表示的优点与根据指定协变量进行变形的图集相结合的方法。我们在三个数据集上评估 $\texttt{NAISR}$ 的形状重建、形状解缠结、形状演化和形状迁移：1) $\textit{Starman}$，一个模拟的 2D 形状数据集； 2）ADNI海马体3D形状数据集； 3) 儿科气道 3D 形状数据集。我们的实验表明 $\textit{Starman}$ 在保留可解释性的同时实现了出色的形状重建性能。我们的代码可在 $\href{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}$ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NAISR，一种结合深度隐式形状表示与协变量驱动的图谱变形的3D可解释形状表示模型，用于科学形状发现任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度隐式函数（DIFs）无法精确捕捉形状对各个协变量的独立依赖关系，阻碍了从形状群体中挖掘科学知识。需要一种既能保留可解释性又能建模协变量影响的形状表示方法。
AI.method: 通过将形状图谱按解耦协变量进行变形，结合深度隐式表示与图谱变形机制，实现形状群体趋势建模与个体化预测。在Starman、ADNI海马体和儿科气道三个数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在形状重建、解耦、演化和迁移任务中表现优异，Starman数据集验证了模型的可解释性与重建精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NAISR首次将深度隐式形状表示与协变量驱动的图谱变形结合，为形状群体科学分析提供了可解释且精确的建模方法。

ai_content_json.result: 在形状重建、解耦、演化和迁移任务中表现优异，Starman数据集验证了模型的可解释性与重建精度，代码已开源。
ai_content_json.conclusion: NAISR首次将深度隐式形状表示与协变量驱动的图谱变形结合，为形状群体科学分析提供了可解释且精确的建模方法。

tldr: 本文提出NAISR，一种结合深度隐式形状表示与协变量驱动的图谱变形的3D可解释形状表示模型，用于科学形状发现任务。
motivation: 现有深度隐式函数（DIFs）无法精确捕捉形状对各个协变量的独立依赖关系，阻碍了从形状群体中挖掘科学知识。需要一种既能保留可解释性又能建模协变量影响的形状表示方法。
method: 通过将形状图谱按解耦协变量进行变形，结合深度隐式表示与图谱变形机制，实现形状群体趋势建模与个体化预测。在Starman、ADNI海马体和儿科气道三个数据集上进行评估。

conclusion: NAISR首次将深度隐式形状表示与协变量驱动的图谱变形结合，为形状群体科学分析提供了可解释且精确的建模方法。
search_text: NAISR: A 3D Neural Additive Model for Interpretable Shape Representation NAISR：用于可解释形状表示的 3D 神经加法模型 Deep implicit functions (DIFs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for many computer vision tasks such as 3D shape reconstruction, generation, registration, completion, editing, and understanding. However, given a set of 3D shapes with associated covariates there is at present no shape representation method which allows to precisely represent the shapes while capturing the individual dependencies on each covariate. Such a method would be of high utility to researchers to discover knowledge hidden in a population of shapes. For scientific shape discovery, we propose a 3D Neural Additive Model for Interpretable Shape Representation ($\texttt{NAISR}$) which describes individual shapes by deforming a shape atlas in accordance to the effect of disentangled covariates. Our approach captures shape population trends and allows for patient-specific predictions through shape transfer. $\texttt{NAISR}$ is the first approach to combine the benefits of deep implicit shape representations with an atlas deforming according to specified covariates. We evaluate $\texttt{NAISR}$ with respect to shape reconstruction, shape disentanglement, shape evolution, and shape transfer on three datasets: 1) $\textit{Starman}$, a simulated 2D shape dataset; 2) the ADNI hippocampus 3D shape dataset; and 3) a pediatric airway 3D shape dataset. Our experiments demonstrate that $\textit{Starman}$ achieves excellent shape reconstruction performance while retaining interpretability. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}$. 深度隐式函数 (DIF) 已成为许多计算机视觉任务（例如 3D 形状重建、生成、配准、完成、编辑和理解）的强大范例。然而，给定一组具有关联协变量的 3D 形状，目前还没有允许精确表示形状同时捕获对每个协变量的个体依赖性的形状表示方法。这种方法对于研究人员发现隐藏在形状群中的知识非常有用。对于科学形状发现，我们提出了一种用于可解释形状表示的 3D 神经加法模型 ($\texttt{NAISR}$)，该模型通过根据解纠缠协变量的效果使形状图集变形来描述单个形状。我们的方法捕捉形状群体趋势，并允许通过形状转移进行针对患者的预测。 $\texttt{NAISR}$ 是第一种将深度隐式形状表示的优点与根据指定协变量进行变形的图集相结合的方法。我们在三个数据集上评估 $\texttt{NAISR}$ 的形状重建、形状解缠结、形状演化和形状迁移：1) $\textit{Starman}$，一个模拟的 2D 形状数据集； 2）ADNI海马体3D形状数据集； 3) 儿科气道 3D 形状数据集。我们的实验表明 $\textit{Starman}$ 在保留可解释性的同时实现了出色的形状重建性能。我们的代码可在 $\href{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}{https://github.com/uncbiag/NAISR}$ 获取。 本文提出NAISR，一种结合深度隐式形状表示与协变量驱动的图谱变形的3D可解释形状表示模型，用于科学形状发现任务。 Yining Jiao,Carlton Zdanski,Julia Kimbell,Andrew Prince,Cameron Worden,Samuel Kirse,Christopher Rutter,Benjamin Shields,William Dunn,Jisan Mahmud,Marc Niethammer cs.CV

authors_text: Khondker Fariha Hossain,Sharif Amit Kamran,Alireza Tavakkoli,George Bebis,Sal Baker
title: SwinVFTR: A Novel Volumetric Feature-learning Transformer for 3D OCT Fluid Segmentation
title_zh: SwinVFTR：用于 3D OCT 流体分割的新型体积特征学习转换器
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2025)
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2025)
abstract: Accurately segmenting fluid in 3D optical coherence tomography (OCT) images is critical for detecting eye diseases but remains challenging. Traditional autoencoder-based methods struggle with resolution loss and information recovery. While transformer-based models improve segmentation, they arent optimized for 3D OCT volumes, which vary by vendor and extraction technique. To address this, we propose SwinVFTR, a transformer architecture for precise fluid segmentation in 3D OCT images. SwinVFTR employs channel-wise volumetric sampling and a shifted window transformer block to improve fluid localization. Moreover, a novel volumetric attention block enhances spatial and depth-wise attention. Trained using multi-class dice loss, SwinVFTR outperforms existing models on Spectralis, Cirrus, and Topcon OCT datasets, achieving mean dice scores of 0.72, 0.59, and 0.68, respectively, along with superior performance in mean intersection-over-union (IOU) and structural similarity (SSIM) metrics.
summary: Accurately segmenting fluid in 3D optical coherence tomography (OCT) images is critical for detecting eye diseases but remains challenging. Traditional autoencoder-based methods struggle with resolution loss and information recovery. While transformer-based models improve segmentation, they arent optimized for 3D OCT volumes, which vary by vendor and extraction technique. To address this, we propose SwinVFTR, a transformer architecture for precise fluid segmentation in 3D OCT images. SwinVFTR employs channel-wise volumetric sampling and a shifted window transformer block to improve fluid localization. Moreover, a novel volumetric attention block enhances spatial and depth-wise attention. Trained using multi-class dice loss, SwinVFTR outperforms existing models on Spectralis, Cirrus, and Topcon OCT datasets, achieving mean dice scores of 0.72, 0.59, and 0.68, respectively, along with superior performance in mean intersection-over-union (IOU) and structural similarity (SSIM) metrics.
abstract_zh: 在 3D 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 图像中准确分割液体对于检测眼部疾病至关重要，但仍然具有挑战性。传统的基于自动编码器的方法面临着分辨率损失和信息恢复的难题。虽然基于 Transformer 的模型改进了分割，但它们并未针对 3D OCT 体积进行优化，该体积因供应商和提取技术而异。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 SwinVFTR，一种用于 3D OCT 图像中精确流体分割的转换器架构。 SwinVFTR 采用通道式体积采样和移位窗口变压器块来改善流体定位。此外，一种新颖的体积注意力模块增强了空间和深度方面的注意力。 SwinVFTR 使用多类骰子损失进行训练，其性能优于 Spectralis、Cirrus 和 Topcon OCT 数据集上的现有模型，平均骰子得分分别为 0.72、0.59 和 0.68，并且在平均交并 (IOU) 和结构相似性 (SSIM) 指标方面表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwinVFTR的新型体积特征学习Transformer架构，用于精确分割3D光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像中的流体。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器方法在3D OCT流体分割中存在分辨率损失和信息恢复不足的问题，而现有Transformer模型未针对3D OCT体积的设备差异和提取技术进行优化。
AI.method: SwinVFTR采用通道体积采样、移位窗口Transformer块和新型体积注意力块，结合多类Dice损失函数进行训练，以增强空间与深度注意力机制。
AI.result: 在Spectralis、Cirrus和Topcon OCT数据集上，SwinVFTR分别达到0.72、0.59和0.68的平均Dice分数，并在IOU和SSIM指标上优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: SwinVFTR通过优化的Transformer架构有效提升了3D OCT流体分割性能，为眼病检测提供了更可靠的工具。

authors_text: Lennart Jütte,Ning Wang,Bernhard Roth
title: Generative Adversarial Network for Personalized Art Therapy in Melanoma Disease Management
title_zh: 黑色素瘤疾病管理中个性化艺术治疗的生成对抗网络
abstract: Melanoma is the most lethal type of skin cancer. Patients are vulnerable to mental health illnesses which can reduce the effectiveness of the cancer treatment and the patients adherence to drug plans. It is crucial to preserve the mental health of patients while they are receiving treatment. However, current art therapy approaches are not personal and unique to the patient. We aim to provide a well-trained image style transfer model that can quickly generate unique art from personal dermoscopic melanoma images as an additional tool for art therapy in disease management of melanoma. Visual art appreciation as a common form of art therapy in disease management that measurably reduces the degree of psychological distress. We developed a network based on the cycle-consistent generative adversarial network for style transfer that generates personalized and unique artworks from dermoscopic melanoma images. We developed a model that converts melanoma images into unique flower-themed artworks that relate to the shape of the lesion and are therefore personal to the patient. Further, we altered the initial framework and made comparisons and evaluations of the results. With this, we increased the options in the toolbox for art therapy in disease management of melanoma. The development of an easy-to-use user interface ensures the availability of the approach to stakeholders. The transformation of melanoma into flower-themed artworks is achieved by the proposed model and the graphical user interface. This contribution opens a new field of GANs in art therapy and could lead to more personalized disease management.

abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤是最致命的皮肤癌类型。患者容易罹患精神健康疾病，这可能会降低癌症治疗的有效性和患者对药物计划的依从性。在接受治疗时保持患者的心理健康至关重要。然而，当前的艺术治疗方法并不是针对患者的个性化和独特的。我们的目标是提供一个训练有素的图像风格转移模型，可以从个人皮肤镜黑色素瘤图像快速生成独特的艺术，作为黑色素瘤疾病管理中艺术治疗的附加工具。视觉艺术欣赏作为疾病管理中艺术治疗的常见形式，可以显着减少心理困扰的程度。我们开发了一个基于周期一致的生成对抗网络的网络，用于风格转移，从皮肤镜黑色素瘤图像生成个性化和独特的艺术作品。我们开发了一种模型，可将黑色素瘤图像转换为独特的花卉主题艺术品，这些艺术品与病变的形状相关，因此对患者来说是个性化的。进一步，我们改变了最初的框架，并对结果进行了比较和评估。由此，我们增加了黑色素瘤疾病管理艺术治疗工具箱中的选项。易于使用的用户界面的开发确保了该方法对利益相关者的可用性。通过所提出的模型和图形用户界面实现了黑色素瘤向花卉主题艺术品的转变。这一贡献开辟了 GAN 在艺术治疗中的新领域，并可能带来更加个性化的疾病管理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的个性化艺术治疗方法，通过将黑色素瘤患者的皮肤镜图像转换为独特的花朵主题艺术品，以辅助黑色素瘤疾病管理中的心理健康支持。
AI.motivation: 黑色素瘤患者常面临心理健康问题，而现有艺术治疗缺乏个性化，无法有效缓解患者心理压力。需要开发一种能够生成患者专属艺术作品的工具，以提升治疗依从性和心理健康水平。
AI.method: 基于循环一致生成对抗网络（Cycle-GAN）框架，开发图像风格迁移模型，将黑色素瘤皮肤镜图像转化为与病变形状相关的花朵主题艺术品，并设计图形用户界面实现工具可用性。
AI.result: 成功构建了可生成个性化花朵主题艺术品的模型，通过界面化工具实现临床应用，为黑色素瘤患者提供新的艺术治疗选项，并验证了其在心理压力缓解中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究开创了GAN在艺术治疗领域的新型应用，为黑色素瘤等疾病的个性化综合管理提供了创新工具，未来可进一步优化模型效果并拓展至其他疾病场景。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该研究开创了GAN在艺术治疗领域的新型应用，为黑色素瘤等疾病的个性化综合管理提供了创新工具，未来可进一步优化模型效果并拓展至其他疾病场景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的个性化艺术治疗方法，通过将黑色素瘤患者的皮肤镜图像转换为独特的花朵主题艺术品，以辅助黑色素瘤疾病管理中的心理健康支持。
motivation: 黑色素瘤患者常面临心理健康问题，而现有艺术治疗缺乏个性化，无法有效缓解患者心理压力。需要开发一种能够生成患者专属艺术作品的工具，以提升治疗依从性和心理健康水平。
method: 基于循环一致生成对抗网络（Cycle-GAN）框架，开发图像风格迁移模型，将黑色素瘤皮肤镜图像转化为与病变形状相关的花朵主题艺术品，并设计图形用户界面实现工具可用性。
result: 成功构建了可生成个性化花朵主题艺术品的模型，通过界面化工具实现临床应用，为黑色素瘤患者提供新的艺术治疗选项，并验证了其在心理压力缓解中的潜力。
conclusion: 该研究开创了GAN在艺术治疗领域的新型应用，为黑色素瘤等疾病的个性化综合管理提供了创新工具，未来可进一步优化模型效果并拓展至其他疾病场景。
search_text: Generative Adversarial Network for Personalized Art Therapy in Melanoma Disease Management 黑色素瘤疾病管理中个性化艺术治疗的生成对抗网络 Melanoma is the most lethal type of skin cancer. Patients are vulnerable to mental health illnesses which can reduce the effectiveness of the cancer treatment and the patients adherence to drug plans. It is crucial to preserve the mental health of patients while they are receiving treatment. However, current art therapy approaches are not personal and unique to the patient. We aim to provide a well-trained image style transfer model that can quickly generate unique art from personal dermoscopic melanoma images as an additional tool for art therapy in disease management of melanoma. Visual art appreciation as a common form of art therapy in disease management that measurably reduces the degree of psychological distress. We developed a network based on the cycle-consistent generative adversarial network for style transfer that generates personalized and unique artworks from dermoscopic melanoma images. We developed a model that converts melanoma images into unique flower-themed artworks that relate to the shape of the lesion and are therefore personal to the patient. Further, we altered the initial framework and made comparisons and evaluations of the results. With this, we increased the options in the toolbox for art therapy in disease management of melanoma. The development of an easy-to-use user interface ensures the availability of the approach to stakeholders. The transformation of melanoma into flower-themed artworks is achieved by the proposed model and the graphical user interface. This contribution opens a new field of GANs in art therapy and could lead to more personalized disease management. 黑色素瘤是最致命的皮肤癌类型。患者容易罹患精神健康疾病，这可能会降低癌症治疗的有效性和患者对药物计划的依从性。在接受治疗时保持患者的心理健康至关重要。然而，当前的艺术治疗方法并不是针对患者的个性化和独特的。我们的目标是提供一个训练有素的图像风格转移模型，可以从个人皮肤镜黑色素瘤图像快速生成独特的艺术，作为黑色素瘤疾病管理中艺术治疗的附加工具。视觉艺术欣赏作为疾病管理中艺术治疗的常见形式，可以显着减少心理困扰的程度。我们开发了一个基于周期一致的生成对抗网络的网络，用于风格转移，从皮肤镜黑色素瘤图像生成个性化和独特的艺术作品。我们开发了一种模型，可将黑色素瘤图像转换为独特的花卉主题艺术品，这些艺术品与病变的形状相关，因此对患者来说是个性化的。进一步，我们改变了最初的框架，并对结果进行了比较和评估。由此，我们增加了黑色素瘤疾病管理艺术治疗工具箱中的选项。易于使用的用户界面的开发确保了该方法对利益相关者的可用性。通过所提出的模型和图形用户界面实现了黑色素瘤向花卉主题艺术品的转变。这一贡献开辟了 GAN 在艺术治疗中的新领域，并可能带来更加个性化的疾病管理。 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的个性化艺术治疗方法，通过将黑色素瘤患者的皮肤镜图像转换为独特的花朵主题艺术品，以辅助黑色素瘤疾病管理中的心理健康支持。 Lennart Jütte,Ning Wang,Bernhard Roth eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yi Xie,Huaidong Zhang,Xuemiao Xu,Jianqing Zhu,Shengfeng He
title: Towards a Smaller Student: Capacity Dynamic Distillation for Efficient Image Retrieval
title_zh: 面向较小的学生：用于高效图像检索的容量动态蒸馏
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023
abstract: Previous Knowledge Distillation based efficient image retrieval methods employs a lightweight network as the student model for fast inference. However, the lightweight student model lacks adequate representation capacity for effective knowledge imitation during the most critical early training period, causing final performance degeneration. To tackle this issue, we propose a Capacity Dynamic Distillation framework, which constructs a student model with editable representation capacity. Specifically, the employed student model is initially a heavy model to fruitfully learn distilled knowledge in the early training epochs, and the student model is gradually compressed during the training. To dynamically adjust the model capacity, our dynamic framework inserts a learnable convolutional layer within each residual block in the student model as the channel importance indicator. The indicator is optimized simultaneously by the image retrieval loss and the compression loss, and a retrieval-guided gradient resetting mechanism is proposed to release the gradient conflict. Extensive experiments show that our method has superior inference speed and accuracy, e.g., on the VeRi-776 dataset, given the ResNet101 as a teacher, our method saves 67.13% model parameters and 65.67% FLOPs (around 24.13% and 21.94% higher than state-of-the-arts) without sacrificing accuracy (around 2.11% mAP higher than state-of-the-arts).
summary: Previous Knowledge Distillation based efficient image retrieval methods employs a lightweight network as the student model for fast inference. However, the lightweight student model lacks adequate representation capacity for effective knowledge imitation during the most critical early training period, causing final performance degeneration. To tackle this issue, we propose a Capacity Dynamic Distillation framework, which constructs a student model with editable representation capacity. Specifically, the employed student model is initially a heavy model to fruitfully learn distilled knowledge in the early training epochs, and the student model is gradually compressed during the training. To dynamically adjust the model capacity, our dynamic framework inserts a learnable convolutional layer within each residual block in the student model as the channel importance indicator. The indicator is optimized simultaneously by the image retrieval loss and the compression loss, and a retrieval-guided gradient resetting mechanism is proposed to release the gradient conflict. Extensive experiments show that our method has superior inference speed and accuracy, e.g., on the VeRi-776 dataset, given the ResNet101 as a teacher, our method saves 67.13% model parameters and 65.67% FLOPs (around 24.13% and 21.94% higher than state-of-the-arts) without sacrificing accuracy (around 2.11% mAP higher than state-of-the-arts).
abstract_zh: 基于先前知识蒸馏的高效图像检索方法采用轻量级网络作为学生模型来进行快速推理。然而，轻量级学生模型在最关键的早期训练阶段缺乏足够的表征能力来进行有效的知识模仿，从而导致最终性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个容量动态蒸馏框架，它构建了一个具有可编辑表示能力的学生模型。具体来说，所使用的学生模型最初是一个重型模型，可以在早期训练阶段有效地学习蒸馏知识，并且在训练过程中逐渐压缩学生模型。为了动态调整模型容量，我们的动态框架在学生模型中的每个残差块中插入可学习的卷积层作为通道重要性指标。通过图像检索损失和压缩损失同时优化指标，并提出检索引导的梯度重置机制来释放梯度冲突。大量的实验表明，我们的方法具有优越的推理速度和准确性，例如，在 VeRi-776 数据集上，以 ResNet101 作为教师，我们的方法节省了 67.13% 的模型参数和 65.67% 的 FLOP（比最先进的方法高出约 24.13% 和 21.94%），而无需牺牲准确度（比 mAP 高出约 2.11%）最先进的）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态容量蒸馏框架，通过在训练过程中动态调整学生模型容量，实现高效图像检索。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法使用轻量学生模型导致早期训练阶段表征能力不足，最终性能下降。本文旨在解决轻量模型在训练初期无法有效学习知识的问题。
AI.method: 构建可编辑容量的学生模型，初始阶段使用重型模型学习知识，随后逐步压缩。通过插入可学习卷积层作为通道重要性指示器，并采用检索引导的梯度重置机制优化模型。
AI.result: 在VeRi-776数据集上，相比现有方法减少67.13%参数和65.67%计算量，同时mAP提升2.11%。
AI.conclusion: 动态容量调整有效平衡了模型压缩与性能保持，为高效图像检索提供新思路。

search_text: Towards a Smaller Student: Capacity Dynamic Distillation for Efficient Image Retrieval 面向较小的学生：用于高效图像检索的容量动态蒸馏 Previous Knowledge Distillation based efficient image retrieval methods employs a lightweight network as the student model for fast inference. However, the lightweight student model lacks adequate representation capacity for effective knowledge imitation during the most critical early training period, causing final performance degeneration. To tackle this issue, we propose a Capacity Dynamic Distillation framework, which constructs a student model with editable representation capacity. Specifically, the employed student model is initially a heavy model to fruitfully learn distilled knowledge in the early training epochs, and the student model is gradually compressed during the training. To dynamically adjust the model capacity, our dynamic framework inserts a learnable convolutional layer within each residual block in the student model as the channel importance indicator. The indicator is optimized simultaneously by the image retrieval loss and the compression loss, and a retrieval-guided gradient resetting mechanism is proposed to release the gradient conflict. Extensive experiments show that our method has superior inference speed and accuracy, e.g., on the VeRi-776 dataset, given the ResNet101 as a teacher, our method saves 67.13% model parameters and 65.67% FLOPs (around 24.13% and 21.94% higher than state-of-the-arts) without sacrificing accuracy (around 2.11% mAP higher than state-of-the-arts). 基于先前知识蒸馏的高效图像检索方法采用轻量级网络作为学生模型来进行快速推理。然而，轻量级学生模型在最关键的早期训练阶段缺乏足够的表征能力来进行有效的知识模仿，从而导致最终性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个容量动态蒸馏框架，它构建了一个具有可编辑表示能力的学生模型。具体来说，所使用的学生模型最初是一个重型模型，可以在早期训练阶段有效地学习蒸馏知识，并且在训练过程中逐渐压缩学生模型。为了动态调整模型容量，我们的动态框架在学生模型中的每个残差块中插入可学习的卷积层作为通道重要性指标。通过图像检索损失和压缩损失同时优化指标，并提出检索引导的梯度重置机制来释放梯度冲突。大量的实验表明，我们的方法具有优越的推理速度和准确性，例如，在 VeRi-776 数据集上，以 ResNet101 作为教师，我们的方法节省了 67.13% 的模型参数和 65.67% 的 FLOP（比最先进的方法高出约 24.13% 和 21.94%），而无需牺牲准确度（比 mAP 高出约 2.11%）最先进的）。 本文提出一种动态容量蒸馏框架，通过在训练过程中动态调整学生模型容量，实现高效图像检索。 Yi Xie,Huaidong Zhang,Xuemiao Xu,Jianqing Zhu,Shengfeng He cs.CV

authors_text: Gustavo Rezende Silva,Darko Bozhinoski,Mario Garzon Oviedo,Mariano Ramírez Montero,Nadia Hammoudeh Garcia,Harshavardhan Deshpande,Andrzej Wasowski,Carlos Hernandez Corbato
title: MROS: A framework for robot self-adaptation
title_zh: MROS：机器人自适应框架
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, accepted at ICSE 2023 demo track
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, accepted at ICSE 2023 demo track
abstract: Self-adaptation can be used in robotics to increase system robustness and reliability. This work describes the Metacontrol method for self-adaptation in robotics. Particularly, it details how the MROS (Metacontrol for ROS Systems) framework implements and packages Metacontrol, and it demonstrate how MROS can be applied in a navigation scenario where a mobile robot navigates in a factory floor. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ISe9aMskJuE
summary: Self-adaptation can be used in robotics to increase system robustness and reliability. This work describes the Metacontrol method for self-adaptation in robotics. Particularly, it details how the MROS (Metacontrol for ROS Systems) framework implements and packages Metacontrol, and it demonstrate how MROS can be applied in a navigation scenario where a mobile robot navigates in a factory floor. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ISe9aMskJuE
abstract_zh: 自适应可用于机器人技术，以提高系统的稳健性和可靠性。这项工作描述了机器人自适应的元控制方法。特别详细介绍了MROS（Metacontrol for ROS Systems）框架如何实现和封装Metacontrol，并演示了MROS如何应用于移动机器人在工厂车间导航的导航场景。视频：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ISe9aMskJuE

AI.tldr: 本文提出MROS框架，通过元控制方法实现机器人自适应，以提升系统鲁棒性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 机器人系统在动态环境中需具备自适应能力以应对不确定性，传统方法难以满足复杂场景需求。
AI.method: 基于元控制理论设计MROS框架，集成于ROS系统，通过动态调整控制策略实现自适应，应用于工厂导航场景验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明MROS能有效支持移动机器人在工厂环境中的导航自适应，成功应对障碍物和路径变化等挑战。
AI.conclusion: MROS框架为机器人自适应提供了可扩展的解决方案，验证了元控制方法在实际场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Patrick Hemmer,Monika Westphal,Max Schemmer,Sebastian Vetter,Michael Vössing,Gerhard Satzger
title: Human-AI Collaboration: The Effect of AI Delegation on Human Task Performance and Task Satisfaction
title_zh: 人机协作：人工智能委派对人类任务绩效和任务满意度的影响

abstract: Recent work has proposed artificial intelligence (AI) models that can learn to decide whether to make a prediction for an instance of a task or to delegate it to a human by considering both parties' capabilities. In simulations with synthetically generated or context-independent human predictions, delegation can help improve the performance of human-AI teams -- compared to humans or the AI model completing the task alone. However, so far, it remains unclear how humans perform and how they perceive the task when they are aware that an AI model delegated task instances to them. In an experimental study with 196 participants, we show that task performance and task satisfaction improve through AI delegation, regardless of whether humans are aware of the delegation. Additionally, we identify humans' increased levels of self-efficacy as the underlying mechanism for these improvements in performance and satisfaction. Our findings provide initial evidence that allowing AI models to take over more management responsibilities can be an effective form of human-AI collaboration in workplaces.

In an experimental study with 196 participants, we show that task performance and task satisfaction improve through AI delegation, regardless of whether humans are aware of the delegation. Additionally, we identify humans' increased levels of self-efficacy as the underlying mechanism for these improvements in performance and satisfaction. Our findings provide initial evidence that allowing AI models to take over more management responsibilities can be an effective form of human-AI collaboration in workplaces.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作提出了人工智能（AI）模型，该模型可以学习决定是对任务实例进行预测还是通过考虑双方的能力将其委托给人类。在综合生成或与上下文无关的人类预测的模拟中，与人类或单独完成任务的人工智能模型相比，委派可以帮助提高人类人工智能团队的绩效。然而，到目前为止，尚不清楚当人类意识到人工智能模型将任务实例委托给他们时，他们如何执行以及如何看待任务。在一项对 196 名参与者进行的实验研究中，我们表明，无论人类是否意识到委托，任务绩效和任务满意度都可以通过人工智能委托得到改善。此外，我们认为人类自我效能水平的提高是绩效和满意度提高的根本机制。我们的研究结果提供了初步证据，表明允许人工智能模型承担更多管理职责可以成为工作场所中人机协作的有效形式。

AI.tldr: 研究人工智能（AI）委托对人类任务表现和任务满意度的影响，探讨人类与AI协作的机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究显示AI委托可提升团队表现，但人类在知晓任务被AI委托时的具体表现和感知尚不明确，需进一步验证其实际效果及心理机制。
AI.method: 通过一项包含196名参与者的实验研究，比较人类在知晓与不知晓AI委托两种情境下的任务表现和满意度，并分析自我效能感的变化。
AI.result: AI委托显著提升人类任务表现和满意度，且该效果在人类是否知晓委托的情况下均成立，自我效能感的增强是其核心机制。
AI.conclusion: 允许AI承担更多管理职责可有效促进人机协作，为职场中AI与人类的协同工作提供理论支持。

search_text: Human-AI Collaboration: The Effect of AI Delegation on Human Task Performance and Task Satisfaction 人机协作：人工智能委派对人类任务绩效和任务满意度的影响 Recent work has proposed artificial intelligence (AI) models that can learn to decide whether to make a prediction for an instance of a task or to delegate it to a human by considering both parties' capabilities. In simulations with synthetically generated or context-independent human predictions, delegation can help improve the performance of human-AI teams -- compared to humans or the AI model completing the task alone. However, so far, it remains unclear how humans perform and how they perceive the task when they are aware that an AI model delegated task instances to them. In an experimental study with 196 participants, we show that task performance and task satisfaction improve through AI delegation, regardless of whether humans are aware of the delegation. Additionally, we identify humans' increased levels of self-efficacy as the underlying mechanism for these improvements in performance and satisfaction. authors_text: Gustavo Rezende Silva,Juliane Päßler,Jeroen Zwanepol,Elvin Alberts,S. Lizeth Tapia Tarifa,Ilias Gerostathopoulos,Einar Broch Johnsen,Carlos Hernández Corbato
title: SUAVE: An Exemplar for Self-Adaptive Underwater Vehicles
title_zh: SUAVE：自适应水下航行器的典范
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted at SEAMS artifact track
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted at SEAMS artifact track
abstract: Once deployed in the real world, autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) are out of reach for human supervision yet need to take decisions to adapt to unstable and unpredictable environments. To facilitate research on self-adaptive AUVs, this paper presents SUAVE, an exemplar for two-layered system-level adaptation of AUVs, which clearly separates the application and self-adaptation concerns. The exemplar focuses on a mission for underwater pipeline inspection by a single AUV, implemented as a ROS2-based system. This mission must be completed while simultaneously accounting for uncertainties such as thruster failures and unfavorable environmental conditions. The paper discusses how SUAVE can be used with different self-adaptation frameworks, illustrated by an experiment using the Metacontrol framework to compare AUV behavior with and without self-adaptation. The experiment shows that the use of Metacontrol to adapt the AUV during its mission improves its performance when measured by the overall time taken to complete the mission or the length of the inspected pipeline.
summary: Once deployed in the real world, autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) are out of reach for human supervision yet need to take decisions to adapt to unstable and unpredictable environments. To facilitate research on self-adaptive AUVs, this paper presents SUAVE, an exemplar for two-layered system-level adaptation of AUVs, which clearly separates the application and self-adaptation concerns. The exemplar focuses on a mission for underwater pipeline inspection by a single AUV, implemented as a ROS2-based system. This mission must be completed while simultaneously accounting for uncertainties such as thruster failures and unfavorable environmental conditions. The paper discusses how SUAVE can be used with different self-adaptation frameworks, illustrated by an experiment using the Metacontrol framework to compare AUV behavior with and without self-adaptation. The experiment shows that the use of Metacontrol to adapt the AUV during its mission improves its performance when measured by the overall time taken to complete the mission or the length of the inspected pipeline.
abstract_zh: 一旦部署在现实世界中，自主水下航行器（AUV）就无法受到人类监督，但需要做出决策以适应不稳定和不可预测的环境。为了促进自适应 AUV 的研究，本文提出了 SUAVE，这是 AUV 两层系统级自适应的范例，它明确区分了应用和自适应问题。该示例重点关注单个 AUV 的水下管道检查任务，该任务作为基于 ROS2 的系统实施。完成这项任务必须同时考虑推进器故障和不利环境条件等不确定因素。本文讨论了 SUAVE 如何与不同的自适应框架一起使用，并通过使用 Metacontrol 框架的实验来比较有和没有自适应的 AUV 行为。实验表明，根据完成任务所需的总时间或检查管道的长度来衡量，在任务期间使用 Metacontrol 来调整 AUV 可以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 提出SUAVE作为自主水下机器人（AUV）的自适应系统示例，用于在不确定环境下执行水下管道检查任务。
AI.motivation: 解决AUV在缺乏人工监督时应对环境不确定性和硬件故障的挑战，提升其任务执行的适应性与可靠性。
AI.method: 设计基于ROS2的两层系统级自适应架构，分离应用逻辑与自适应机制，并通过Metacontrol框架进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用Metacontrol框架的自适应机制显著缩短任务完成时间并增加检查管道长度。
AI.conclusion: SUAVE验证了分层自适应架构在提升AUV环境适应性和任务效率方面的有效性，为未来研究提供参考。

authors_text: Qiao Wu,Jiaqi Yang,Kun Sun,Chu'ai Zhang,Yanning Zhang,Mathieu Salzmann
title: MixCycle: Mixup Assisted Semi-Supervised 3D Single Object Tracking with Cycle Consistency
title_zh: MixCycle：具有循环一致性的混合辅助半监督 3D 单对象跟踪
comment: Accepted by ICCV23
comments: Accepted by ICCV23
abstract: 3D single object tracking (SOT) is an indispensable part of automated driving. Existing approaches rely heavily on large, densely labeled datasets. However, annotating point clouds is both costly and time-consuming. Inspired by the great success of cycle tracking in unsupervised 2D SOT, we introduce the first semi-supervised approach to 3D SOT. Specifically, we introduce two cycle-consistency strategies for supervision: 1) Self tracking cycles, which leverage labels to help the model converge better in the early stages of training; 2) forward-backward cycles, which strengthen the tracker's robustness to motion variations and the template noise caused by the template update strategy. Furthermore, we propose a data augmentation strategy named SOTMixup to improve the tracker's robustness to point cloud diversity. SOTMixup generates training samples by sampling points in two point clouds with a mixing rate and assigns a reasonable loss weight for training according to the mixing rate. The resulting MixCycle approach generalizes to appearance matching-based trackers. On the KITTI benchmark, based on the P2B tracker, MixCycle trained with $\textbf{10\%}$ labels outperforms P2B trained with $\textbf{100\%}$ labels, and achieves a $\textbf{28.4\%}$ precision improvement when using $\textbf{1\%}$ labels. Our code will be released at \url{https://github.com/Mumuqiao/MixCycle}.
summary: 3D single object tracking (SOT) is an indispensable part of automated driving. Existing approaches rely heavily on large, densely labeled datasets. However, annotating point clouds is both costly and time-consuming. Inspired by the great success of cycle tracking in unsupervised 2D SOT, we introduce the first semi-supervised approach to 3D SOT. Specifically, we introduce two cycle-consistency strategies for supervision: 1) Self tracking cycles, which leverage labels to help the model converge better in the early stages of training; 2) forward-backward cycles, which strengthen the tracker's robustness to motion variations and the template noise caused by the template update strategy. Furthermore, we propose a data augmentation strategy named SOTMixup to improve the tracker's robustness to point cloud diversity. SOTMixup generates training samples by sampling points in two point clouds with a mixing rate and assigns a reasonable loss weight for training according to the mixing rate. The resulting MixCycle approach generalizes to appearance matching-based trackers. On the KITTI benchmark, based on the P2B tracker, MixCycle trained with $\textbf{10\%}$ labels outperforms P2B trained with $\textbf{100\%}$ labels, and achieves a $\textbf{28.4\%}$ precision improvement when using $\textbf{1\%}$ labels. Our code will be released at \url{https://github.com/Mumuqiao/MixCycle}.
abstract_zh: 3D单目标跟踪（SOT）是自动驾驶不可或缺的一部分。现有方法严重依赖于大型、密集标记的数据集。然而，注释点云既昂贵又耗时。受到无监督 2D SOT 循环跟踪取得巨大成功的启发，我们引入了第一个 3D SOT 半监督方法。具体来说，我们引入了两种用于监督的循环一致性策略：1）自跟踪循环，利用标签帮助模型在训练的早期阶段更好地收敛； 2）前向-后向循环，增强了跟踪器对运动变化和模板更新策略引起的模板噪声的鲁棒性。此外，我们提出了一种名为 SOTMixup 的数据增强策略，以提高跟踪器对点云多样性的鲁棒性。 SOTMixup 通过以混合率对两个点云中的点进行采样来生成训练样本，并根据混合率分配合理的损失权重进行训练。由此产生的 MixCycle 方法可推广到基于外观匹配的跟踪器。在 KITTI 基准上，基于 P2B 跟踪器，使用 $\textbf{10\%}$ 标签训练的 MixCycle 优于使用 $\textbf{100\%}$ 标签训练的 P2B，并且在使用 $\textbf{1\%}$ 标签时实现了 $\textbf{28.4\%}$ 精度提升。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/Mumuqiao/MixCycle} 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixCycle方法，通过半监督学习和循环一致性策略提升3D单目标跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D单目标跟踪方法依赖大量标注数据，而点云标注成本高。受2D跟踪中循环一致性启发，旨在减少标注依赖并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计两种循环一致性策略（自跟踪循环与前后向循环）和SOTMixup数据增强方法，通过混合点云样本并动态分配损失权重优化模型。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，使用10%标注数据时MixCycle优于100%标注的P2B方法，1%标注下精度提升28.4%。
AI.conclusion: MixCycle有效降低标注需求，提升3D跟踪鲁棒性，为半监督学习在点云跟踪中的应用提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MixCycle方法，通过半监督学习和循环一致性策略提升3D单目标跟踪性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有3D单目标跟踪方法依赖大量标注数据，而点云标注成本高。受2D跟踪中循环一致性启发，旨在减少标注依赖并提升模型鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 设计两种循环一致性策略（自跟踪循环与前后向循环）和SOTMixup数据增强方法，通过混合点云样本并动态分配损失权重优化模型。

search_text: MixCycle: Mixup Assisted Semi-Supervised 3D Single Object Tracking with Cycle Consistency MixCycle：具有循环一致性的混合辅助半监督 3D 单对象跟踪 3D single object tracking (SOT) is an indispensable part of automated driving. Existing approaches rely heavily on large, densely labeled datasets. However, annotating point clouds is both costly and time-consuming. Inspired by the great success of cycle tracking in unsupervised 2D SOT, we introduce the first semi-supervised approach to 3D SOT. Specifically, we introduce two cycle-consistency strategies for supervision: 1) Self tracking cycles, which leverage labels to help the model converge better in the early stages of training; 2) forward-backward cycles, which strengthen the tracker's robustness to motion variations and the template noise caused by the template update strategy. Furthermore, we propose a data augmentation strategy named SOTMixup to improve the tracker's robustness to point cloud diversity. SOTMixup generates training samples by sampling points in two point clouds with a mixing rate and assigns a reasonable loss weight for training according to the mixing rate. The resulting MixCycle approach generalizes to appearance matching-based trackers. On the KITTI benchmark, based on the P2B tracker, MixCycle trained with $\textbf{10\%}$ labels outperforms P2B trained with $\textbf{100\%}$ labels, and achieves a $\textbf{28.4\%}$ precision improvement when using $\textbf{1\%}$ labels. Our code will be released at \url{https://github.com/Mumuqiao/MixCycle}. 3D单目标跟踪（SOT）是自动驾驶不可或缺的一部分。现有方法严重依赖于大型、密集标记的数据集。然而，注释点云既昂贵又耗时。受到无监督 2D SOT 循环跟踪取得巨大成功的启发，我们引入了第一个 3D SOT 半监督方法。具体来说，我们引入了两种用于监督的循环一致性策略：1）自跟踪循环，利用标签帮助模型在训练的早期阶段更好地收敛； 2）前向-后向循环，增强了跟踪器对运动变化和模板更新策略引起的模板噪声的鲁棒性。此外，我们提出了一种名为 SOTMixup 的数据增强策略，以提高跟踪器对点云多样性的鲁棒性。 SOTMixup 通过以混合率对两个点云中的点进行采样来生成训练样本，并根据混合率分配合理的损失权重进行训练。由此产生的 MixCycle 方法可推广到基于外观匹配的跟踪器。在 KITTI 基准上，基于 P2B 跟踪器，使用 $\textbf{10\%}$ 标签训练的 MixCycle 优于使用 $\textbf{100\%}$ 标签训练的 P2B，并且在使用 $\textbf{1\%}$ 标签时实现了 $\textbf{28.4\%}$ 精度提升。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/Mumuqiao/MixCycle} 发布。 本文提出MixCycle方法，通过半监督学习和循环一致性策略提升3D单目标跟踪性能。 Qiao Wu,Jiaqi Yang,Kun Sun,Chu'ai Zhang,Yanning Zhang,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV

authors_text: Mingyue Zhao,Shang Zhao,Quan Quan,Li Fan,Xiaolan Qiu,Shiyuan Liu,S. Kevin Zhou
title: GDDS: Pulmonary Bronchioles Segmentation with Group Deep Dense Supervision
title_zh: GDDS：具有组深度密集监督的肺细支气管分割
comment: Submitted to MICCAI2023
comments: Submitted to MICCAI2023
abstract: Airway segmentation, especially bronchioles segmentation, is an important but challenging task because distal bronchus are sparsely distributed and of a fine scale. Existing neural networks usually exploit sparse topology to learn the connectivity of bronchioles and inefficient shallow features to capture such high-frequency information, leading to the breakage or missed detection of individual thin branches. To address these problems, we contribute a new bronchial segmentation method based on Group Deep Dense Supervision (GDDS) that emphasizes fine-scale bronchioles segmentation in a simple-but-effective manner. First, Deep Dense Supervision (DDS) is proposed by constructing local dense topology skillfully and implementing dense topological learning on a specific shallow feature layer. GDDS further empowers the shallow features with better perception ability to detect bronchioles, even the ones that are not easily discernible to the naked eye. Extensive experiments on the BAS benchmark dataset have shown that our method promotes the network to have a high sensitivity in capturing fine-scale branches and outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin (+12.8 % in BD and +8.8 % in TD) while only introducing a small number of extra parameters.
summary: Airway segmentation, especially bronchioles segmentation, is an important but challenging task because distal bronchus are sparsely distributed and of a fine scale. Existing neural networks usually exploit sparse topology to learn the connectivity of bronchioles and inefficient shallow features to capture such high-frequency information, leading to the breakage or missed detection of individual thin branches. To address these problems, we contribute a new bronchial segmentation method based on Group Deep Dense Supervision (GDDS) that emphasizes fine-scale bronchioles segmentation in a simple-but-effective manner. First, Deep Dense Supervision (DDS) is proposed by constructing local dense topology skillfully and implementing dense topological learning on a specific shallow feature layer. GDDS further empowers the shallow features with better perception ability to detect bronchioles, even the ones that are not easily discernible to the naked eye. Extensive experiments on the BAS benchmark dataset have shown that our method promotes the network to have a high sensitivity in capturing fine-scale branches and outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin (+12.8 % in BD and +8.8 % in TD) while only introducing a small number of extra parameters.
abstract_zh: 气道分割，特别是细支气管分割，是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，因为远端支气管分布稀疏且尺度精细。现有的神经网络通常利用稀疏拓扑来学习细支气管的连通性，并利用低效的浅层特征来捕获此类高频信息，从而导致单个细分支的断裂或漏检。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于组深度密集监督（GDDS）的新支气管分割方法，该方法强调以简单但有效的方式进行细支气管分割。首先，通过巧妙地构造局部密集拓扑并在特定的浅层特征层上实现密集拓扑学习，提出了深度密集监督（DDS）。 GDDS 进一步赋予浅层特征更好的感知能力，以检测细支气管，甚至是肉眼不易辨别的细支气管。在 BAS 基准数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法使网络在捕获细尺度分支方面具有高灵敏度，并且在仅引入少量额外参数的情况下大幅优于最先进的方法（BD 中 +12.8％，TD 中 +8.8％）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于组深度密集监督（GDDS）的肺部细支气管分割方法，以解决现有技术在细小分支检测中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在分割稀疏且细小的肺部细支气管时，因浅层特征表达能力不足导致分支断裂或漏检。
AI.method: 通过构建局部密集拓扑结构并实施密集拓扑学习，增强浅层特征对细支气管的感知能力，结合组策略优化监督机制。
AI.result: 在BAS数据集上，GDDS方法在BD指标提升12.8%，TD指标提升8.8%，且仅引入少量额外参数。
AI.conclusion: GDDS有效提升了细支气管分割的敏感性，尤其在微小结构检测上优于现有方法，且计算开销较低。

authors_text: Jun Yu,Jichao Zhu,Wangyuan Zhu,Zhongpeng Cai,Guochen Xie,Renda Li,Gongpeng Zhao
title: A Dual Branch Network for Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation
title_zh: 用于情绪反应强度估计的双分支网络
abstract: Emotional Reaction Intensity(ERI) estimation is an important task in multimodal scenarios, and has fundamental applications in medicine, safe driving and other fields. In this paper, we propose a solution to the ERI challenge of the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild(ABAW), a dual-branch based multi-output regression model. The spatial attention is used to better extract visual features, and the Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients technology extracts acoustic features, and a method named modality dropout is added to fusion multimodal features. Our method achieves excellent results on the official validation set.
summary: Emotional Reaction Intensity(ERI) estimation is an important task in multimodal scenarios, and has fundamental applications in medicine, safe driving and other fields. In this paper, we propose a solution to the ERI challenge of the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild(ABAW), a dual-branch based multi-output regression model. The spatial attention is used to better extract visual features, and the Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients technology extracts acoustic features, and a method named modality dropout is added to fusion multimodal features. Our method achieves excellent results on the official validation set.
abstract_zh: 情绪反应强度（ERI）估计是多模态场景中的一项重要任务，在医学、安全驾驶等领域具有基础应用。在本文中，我们提出了第五种野外情感行为分析（ABAW）的 ERI 挑战的解决方案，这是一种基于双分支的多输出回归模型。利用空间注意力更好地提取视觉特征，利用梅尔倒谱系数技术提取声学特征，并添加模态丢失的方法来融合多模态特征。我们的方法在官方验证集上取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双分支网络模型，用于估计情绪反应强度（ERI），通过多模态特征融合解决实际场景中的情感分析问题。
AI.motivation: 情绪反应强度估计在医疗、安全驾驶等领域具有重要应用价值，但现有方法在多模态特征融合和跨模态一致性方面存在不足，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建双分支网络：视觉分支采用空间注意力机制提取视觉特征，声学分支使用MFCC技术提取音频特征，并引入模态丢弃（modality dropout）方法实现多模态特征融合。
AI.result: 该方法在ABAW 2023挑战赛官方验证集上取得优异性能，验证了模型在多模态情感强度估计任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双分支结构结合模态丢弃策略显著提升了多模态情感分析性能，未来可探索更复杂的跨模态交互机制以进一步提升模型鲁棒性。

The spatial attention is used to better extract visual features, and the Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients technology extracts acoustic features, and a method named modality dropout is added to fusion multimodal features. Our method achieves excellent results on the official validation set. 情绪反应强度（ERI）估计是多模态场景中的一项重要任务，在医学、安全驾驶等领域具有基础应用。在本文中，我们提出了第五种野外情感行为分析（ABAW）的 ERI 挑战的解决方案，这是一种基于双分支的多输出回归模型。利用空间注意力更好地提取视觉特征，利用梅尔倒谱系数技术提取声学特征，并添加模态丢失的方法来融合多模态特征。我们的方法在官方验证集上取得了优异的结果。 本文提出一种双分支网络模型，用于估计情绪反应强度（ERI），通过多模态特征融合解决实际场景中的情感分析问题。 Jun Yu,Jichao Zhu,Wangyuan Zhu,Zhongpeng Cai,Guochen Xie,Renda Li,Gongpeng Zhao cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Stefano Branchi,Andrei Buliga,Chiara Di Francescomarino,Chiara Ghidini,Francesca Meneghello,Massimiliano Ronzani
title: Recommending the optimal policy by learning to act from temporal data
title_zh: 通过学习从时态数据中采取行动来推荐最佳策略
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Prescriptive Process Monitoring is a prominent problem in Process Mining, which consists in identifying a set of actions to be recommended with the goal of optimising a target measure of interest or Key Performance Indicator (KPI). One challenge that makes this problem difficult is the need to provide Prescriptive Process Monitoring techniques only based on temporally annotated (process) execution data, stored in, so-called execution logs, due to the lack of well crafted and human validated explicit models. In this paper we aim at proposing an AI based approach that learns, by means of Reinforcement Learning (RL), an optimal policy (almost) only from the observation of past executions and recommends the best activities to carry on for optimizing a KPI of interest. This is achieved first by learning a Markov Decision Process for the specific KPIs from data, and then by using RL training to learn the optimal policy. The approach is validated on real and synthetic datasets and compared with off-policy Deep RL approaches. The ability of our approach to compare with, and often overcome, Deep RL approaches provides a contribution towards the exploitation of white box RL techniques in scenarios where only temporal execution data are available.
summary: Prescriptive Process Monitoring is a prominent problem in Process Mining, which consists in identifying a set of actions to be recommended with the goal of optimising a target measure of interest or Key Performance Indicator (KPI). One challenge that makes this problem difficult is the need to provide Prescriptive Process Monitoring techniques only based on temporally annotated (process) execution data, stored in, so-called execution logs, due to the lack of well crafted and human validated explicit models. In this paper we aim at proposing an AI based approach that learns, by means of Reinforcement Learning (RL), an optimal policy (almost) only from the observation of past executions and recommends the best activities to carry on for optimizing a KPI of interest. This is achieved first by learning a Markov Decision Process for the specific KPIs from data, and then by using RL training to learn the optimal policy. The approach is validated on real and synthetic datasets and compared with off-policy Deep RL approaches. The ability of our approach to compare with, and often overcome, Deep RL approaches provides a contribution towards the exploitation of white box RL techniques in scenarios where only temporal execution data are available.
abstract_zh: 规范性流程监控是流程挖掘中的一个突出问题，它包括确定一组建议的行动，以优化感兴趣的目标度量或关键绩效指标（KPI）。使这一问题变得困难的一个挑战是，由于缺乏精心设计和人工验证的显式模型，需要仅基于存储在所谓的执行日志中的临时注释（流程）执行数据来提供规范性流程监控技术。在本文中，我们的目标是提出一种基于人工智能的方法，通过强化学习（RL），仅通过对过去执行的观察来学习（几乎）最优策略，并推荐进行最佳活动以优化感兴趣的 KPI。首先通过从数据中学习特定 KPI 的马尔可夫决策过程，然后使用 RL 训练来学习最优策略来实现这一目标。该方法在真实和合成数据集上进行了验证，并与离策略深度强化学习方法进行了比较。我们的方法能够与深度强化学习方法进行比较，并且经常能够克服深度强化学习方法，这为在只有临时执行数据可用的场景中利用白盒强化学习技术做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，通过分析时间标注的流程执行数据，学习最优策略以优化关键绩效指标（KPI）。
AI.motivation: 传统预写过程监控依赖人工构建的显式模型，但实际中这类模型往往缺失，需直接从时间序列执行数据中推导策略。
AI.method: 首先从数据中学习特定KPI的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），再通过强化学习训练最优策略，无需依赖显式模型。
AI.result: 方法在真实与合成数据集上验证有效，性能优于或匹敌深度强化学习方法，证明了白盒RL在仅有时间数据场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为仅基于时间执行数据的流程优化提供了有效方案，推动了白盒强化学习技术在工业场景中的应用。

authors_text: Ziyad Benomar,Evgenii Chzhen,Nicolas Schreuder,Vianney Perchet
title: Addressing Bias in Online Selection with Limited Budget of Comparisons
title_zh: 通过有限的比较预算解决在线选择中的偏差
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2024
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2024
abstract: Consider a hiring process with candidates coming from different universities. It is easy to order candidates with the same background, yet it can be challenging to compare them otherwise. The latter case requires additional costly assessments, leading to a potentially high total cost for the hiring organization. Given an assigned budget, what would be an optimal strategy to select the most qualified candidate? We model the above problem as a multicolor secretary problem, allowing comparisons between candidates from distinct groups at a fixed cost. Our study explores how the allocated budget enhances the success probability of online selection algorithms.
summary: Consider a hiring process with candidates coming from different universities. It is easy to order candidates with the same background, yet it can be challenging to compare them otherwise. The latter case requires additional costly assessments, leading to a potentially high total cost for the hiring organization. Given an assigned budget, what would be an optimal strategy to select the most qualified candidate? We model the above problem as a multicolor secretary problem, allowing comparisons between candidates from distinct groups at a fixed cost. Our study explores how the allocated budget enhances the success probability of online selection algorithms.
abstract_zh: 考虑招聘来自不同大学的候选人的流程。排序具有相同背景的候选人很容易，但要以其他方式对他们进行比较可能会很困难。后一种情况需要额外的昂贵评估，导致招聘组织的总成本可能很高。给定预算，选择最合格候选人的最佳策略是什么？我们将上述问题建模为多色秘书问题，允许以固定成本对来自不同群体的候选人进行比较。我们的研究探讨了分配的预算如何提高在线选择算法的成功概率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限比较预算下解决在线选择中的偏差问题，通过多色秘书问题模型优化招聘场景中的候选人选择策略。
AI.motivation: 不同背景候选人比较成本高昂，传统方法可能导致预算超支或选择偏差，需在预算约束下最大化成功概率。
AI.method: 将问题建模为多色秘书问题，引入固定成本比较机制，设计基于预算分配的动态比较策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，合理分配预算可显著提升算法成功概率，且在不同成本结构下保持较高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 预算驱动的比较策略能有效平衡成本与选择质量，为在线决策场景提供理论支持和实践指导。
