authors_text: Aurélien Colin,Pierre Tandeo,Charles Peureux,Romain Husson,Ronan Fablet
title: Reduction of rain-induced errors for wind speed estimation on SAR observations using convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络减少 SAR 观测风速估计中降雨引起的误差
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures
comments: 13 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar is known to be able to provide high-resolution estimates of surface wind speed. These estimates usually rely on a Geophysical Model Function (GMF) that has difficulties accounting for non-wind processes such as rain events. Convolutional neural network, on the other hand, have the capacity to use contextual information and have demonstrated their ability to delimit rainfall areas. By carefully building a large dataset of SAR observations from the Copernicus Sentinel-1 mission, collocated with both GMF and atmospheric model wind speeds as well as rainfall estimates, we were able to train a wind speed estimator with reduced errors under rain. Collocations with in-situ wind speed measurements from buoys show a root mean square error that is reduced by 27% (resp. 45%) under rainfall estimated at more than 1 mm/h (resp. 3 mm/h). These results demonstrate the capacity of deep learning models to correct rain-related errors in SAR products.
summary: Synthetic Aperture Radar is known to be able to provide high-resolution estimates of surface wind speed. These estimates usually rely on a Geophysical Model Function (GMF) that has difficulties accounting for non-wind processes such as rain events. Convolutional neural network, on the other hand, have the capacity to use contextual information and have demonstrated their ability to delimit rainfall areas. By carefully building a large dataset of SAR observations from the Copernicus Sentinel-1 mission, collocated with both GMF and atmospheric model wind speeds as well as rainfall estimates, we were able to train a wind speed estimator with reduced errors under rain. Collocations with in-situ wind speed measurements from buoys show a root mean square error that is reduced by 27% (resp. 45%) under rainfall estimated at more than 1 mm/h (resp. 3 mm/h). These results demonstrate the capacity of deep learning models to correct rain-related errors in SAR products.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，合成孔径雷达能够提供表面风速的高分辨率估计。这些估计通常依赖于地球物理模型函数（GMF），该函数难以解释降雨事件等非风过程。另一方面，卷积神经网络具有使用上下文信息的能力，并已证明其划定降雨区域的能力。通过精心构建哥白尼 Sentinel-1 任务的 SAR 观测大型数据集，并与 GMF 和大气模型风速以及降雨量估计相结合，我们能够训练风速估计器，并在雨天减少误差。浮标现场风速测量的搭配显示，在估计降雨量超过 1 毫米/小时（分别为 3 毫米/小时）的情况下，均方根误差减少了 27%（分别为 45%）。这些结果证明了深度学习模型纠正 SAR 产品中与降雨相关的误差的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文利用卷积神经网络（CNN）减少合成孔径雷达（SAR）观测中降雨引起的风速估计误差。
AI.motivation: 传统风速估算方法依赖于难以处理降雨等非风过程的物理模型，需通过深度学习改进降雨干扰下的估算精度。
AI.method: 构建包含Sentinel-1 SAR数据、GMF风速、大气模型风速及降雨估计的大规模数据集，训练CNN模型以学习降雨与风速误差的关系。
AI.result: 在降雨强度超过1mm/h和3mm/h时，模型将风速估算的均方根误差分别降低27%和45%（基于浮标实测数据验证）。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型能有效修正SAR风速产品中的降雨相关误差，提升极端天气下的观测可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文利用卷积神经网络（CNN）减少合成孔径雷达（SAR）观测中降雨引起的风速估计误差。

ai_content.method: 构建包含Sentinel-1 SAR数据、GMF风速、大气模型风速及降雨估计的大规模数据集，训练CNN模型以学习降雨与风速误差的关系。
ai_content.result: 在降雨强度超过1mm/h和3mm/h时，模型将风速估算的均方根误差分别降低27%和45%（基于浮标实测数据验证）。

ai_content_json.method: 构建包含Sentinel-1 SAR数据、GMF风速、大气模型风速及降雨估计的大规模数据集，训练CNN模型以学习降雨与风速误差的关系。
ai_content_json.result: 在降雨强度超过1mm/h和3mm/h时，模型将风速估算的均方根误差分别降低27%和45%（基于浮标实测数据验证）。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 深度学习模型能有效修正SAR风速产品中的降雨相关误差，提升极端天气下的观测可靠性。

search_text: Reduction of rain-induced errors for wind speed estimation on SAR observations using convolutional neural networks 使用卷积神经网络减少 SAR 观测风速估计中降雨引起的误差 Synthetic Aperture Radar is known to be able to provide high-resolution estimates of surface wind speed. These estimates usually rely on a Geophysical Model Function (GMF) that has difficulties accounting for non-wind processes such as rain events. Convolutional neural network, on the other hand, have the capacity to use contextual information and have demonstrated their ability to delimit rainfall areas. By carefully building a large dataset of SAR observations from the Copernicus Sentinel-1 mission, collocated with both GMF and atmospheric model wind speeds as well as rainfall estimates, we were able to train a wind speed estimator with reduced errors under rain. Collocations with in-situ wind speed measurements from buoys show a root mean square error that is reduced by 27% (resp. 45%) under rainfall estimated at more than 1 mm/h (resp. 3 mm/h). These results demonstrate the capacity of deep learning models to correct rain-related errors in SAR products. 众所周知，合成孔径雷达能够提供表面风速的高分辨率估计。这些估计通常依赖于地球物理模型函数（GMF），该函数难以解释降雨事件等非风过程。另一方面，卷积神经网络具有使用上下文信息的能力，并已证明其划定降雨区域的能力。通过精心构建哥白尼 Sentinel-1 任务的 SAR 观测大型数据集，并与 GMF 和大气模型风速以及降雨量估计相结合，我们能够训练风速估计器，并在雨天减少误差。浮标现场风速测量的搭配显示，在估计降雨量超过 1 毫米/小时（分别为 3 毫米/小时）的情况下，均方根误差减少了 27%（分别为 45%）。这些结果证明了深度学习模型纠正 SAR 产品中与降雨相关的误差的能力。 本文利用卷积神经网络（CNN）减少合成孔径雷达（SAR）观测中降雨引起的风速估计误差。 Aurélien Colin,Pierre Tandeo,Charles Peureux,Romain Husson,Ronan Fablet cs.CV,physics.ao-ph

authors_text: Mingyang Song,Yang Zhang,Tunç O. Aydın,Elham Amin Mansour,Christopher Schroers
title: A Generative Model for Digital Camera Noise Synthesis
title_zh: 数码相机噪声合成的生成模型
abstract: Noise synthesis is a challenging low-level vision task aiming to generate realistic noise given a clean image along with the camera settings. To this end, we propose an effective generative model which utilizes clean features as guidance followed by noise injections into the network. Specifically, our generator follows a UNet-like structure with skip connections but without downsampling and upsampling layers. Firstly, we extract deep features from a clean image as the guidance and concatenate a Gaussian noise map to the transition point between the encoder and decoder as the noise source. Secondly, we propose noise synthesis blocks in the decoder in each of which we inject Gaussian noise to model the noise characteristics. Thirdly, we propose to utilize an additional Style Loss and demonstrate that this allows better noise characteristics supervision in the generator. Through a number of new experiments, we evaluate the temporal variance and the spatial correlation of the generated noise which we hope can provide meaningful insights for future works. Finally, we show that our proposed approach outperforms existing methods for synthesizing camera noise.
summary: Noise synthesis is a challenging low-level vision task aiming to generate realistic noise given a clean image along with the camera settings. To this end, we propose an effective generative model which utilizes clean features as guidance followed by noise injections into the network. Specifically, our generator follows a UNet-like structure with skip connections but without downsampling and upsampling layers. Firstly, we extract deep features from a clean image as the guidance and concatenate a Gaussian noise map to the transition point between the encoder and decoder as the noise source. Secondly, we propose noise synthesis blocks in the decoder in each of which we inject Gaussian noise to model the noise characteristics. Thirdly, we propose to utilize an additional Style Loss and demonstrate that this allows better noise characteristics supervision in the generator. Through a number of new experiments, we evaluate the temporal variance and the spatial correlation of the generated noise which we hope can provide meaningful insights for future works. Finally, we show that our proposed approach outperforms existing methods for synthesizing camera noise.
abstract_zh: 噪声合成是一项具有挑战性的低级视觉任务，旨在在给定清晰图像和相机设置的情况下生成逼真的噪声。为此，我们提出了一种有效的生成模型，该模型利用干净的特征作为指导，然后将噪声注入网络。具体来说，我们的生成器遵循类似 UNet 的结构，具有跳跃连接，但没有下采样和上采样层。首先，我们从干净图像中提取深层特征作为指导，并将高斯噪声图连接到编码器和解码器之间的过渡点作为噪声源。其次，我们在解码器中提出了噪声合成块，在每个块中我们注入高斯噪声来对噪声特性进行建模。第三，我们建议利用额外的风格损失，并证明这可以在发生器中更好地监控噪声特性。通过一些新的实验，我们评估了生成的噪声的时间方差和空间相关性，我们希望这能为未来的工作提供有意义的见解。最后，我们表明我们提出的方法优于合成相机噪声的现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成模型，用于根据干净图像和相机设置合成逼真的数字相机噪声。
AI.motivation: 相机噪声合成是低级视觉任务中的挑战，现有方法难以准确建模噪声特性，需更有效的生成策略。
AI.method: 采用类似UNet的结构，通过提取干净图像特征并注入高斯噪声，结合Style Loss优化噪声生成，利用解码器中的噪声合成模块建模空间相关性与时间方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在噪声真实性上优于现有技术，并通过分析时空特性为后续研究提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 提出的生成模型有效提升了相机噪声合成质量，验证了噪声特征监督与结构设计的合理性。

authors_text: Y. Munro,C. Sarmiento,I. Bloch,G. Bourgne,M. -J. Lesot
title: Integrating Temporality and Causality into Acyclic Argumentation Frameworks using a Transition System
title_zh: 使用转换系统将时间性和因果性整合到非循环论证框架中
abstract: In the context of abstract argumentation, we present the benefits of considering temporality, i.e. the order in which arguments are enunciated, as well as causality. We propose a formal method to rewrite the concepts of acyclic abstract argumentation frameworks into an action language, that allows us to model the evolution of the world, and to establish causal relationships between the enunciation of arguments and their consequences, whether direct or indirect. An Answer Set Programming implementation is also proposed, as well as perspectives towards explanations.
summary: In the context of abstract argumentation, we present the benefits of considering temporality, i.e. the order in which arguments are enunciated, as well as causality. We propose a formal method to rewrite the concepts of acyclic abstract argumentation frameworks into an action language, that allows us to model the evolution of the world, and to establish causal relationships between the enunciation of arguments and their consequences, whether direct or indirect. An Answer Set Programming implementation is also proposed, as well as perspectives towards explanations.
abstract_zh: 在抽象论证的背景下，我们提出了考虑时间性的好处，即阐明论证的顺序以及因果关系。我们提出了一种形式方法，将非循环抽象论证框架的概念重写为一种行动语言，使我们能够模拟世界的演变，并在论证的阐述与其后果之间建立因果关系，无论是直接的还是间接的。还提出了答案集编程实现以及解释的观点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用转换系统将时序性和因果性整合到无环抽象论证框架中的方法，以建模世界演变和论证间的因果关系。
AI.motivation: 传统抽象论证框架缺乏对时序性和因果关系的建模，限制了其在动态场景中的应用，需通过引入时序和因果关系提升框架的表达能力。
AI.method: 通过形式化方法将无环抽象论证框架转换为动作语言，结合转换系统建模世界演变，并利用答案集编程实现因果关系的建立。
AI.result: 实现了基于答案集编程的框架，能够有效建模论证的时序演化及因果关系，并为后续解释机制提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 整合时序与因果关系提升了无环论证框架的动态建模能力，为复杂场景下的论证分析提供了新方法，并为未来解释机制的研究奠定了基础。

authors_text: Yuhang He,Irving Fang,Yiming Li,Rushi Bhavesh Shah,Chen Feng
title: Metric-Free Exploration for Topological Mapping by Task and Motion Imitation in Feature Space
title_zh: 特征空间中任务和运动模仿的拓扑映射的无度量探索
abstract: We propose DeepExplorer, a simple and lightweight metric-free exploration method for topological mapping of unknown environments. It performs task and motion planning (TAMP) entirely in image feature space. The task planner is a recurrent network using the latest image observation sequence to hallucinate a feature as the next-best exploration goal. The motion planner then utilizes the current and the hallucinated features to generate an action taking the agent towards that goal. The two planners are jointly trained via deeply-supervised imitation learning from expert demonstrations. During exploration, we iteratively call the two planners to predict the next action, and the topological map is built by constantly appending the latest image observation and action to the map and using visual place recognition (VPR) for loop closing. The resulting topological map efficiently represents an environment's connectivity and traversability, so it can be used for tasks such as visual navigation. We show DeepExplorer's exploration efficiency and strong sim2sim generalization capability on large-scale simulation datasets like Gibson and MP3D. Its effectiveness is further validated via the image-goal navigation performance on the resulting topological map. We further show its strong zero-shot sim2real generalization capability in real-world experiments. The source code is available at \url{https://ai4ce.github.io/DeepExplorer/}.
summary: We propose DeepExplorer, a simple and lightweight metric-free exploration method for topological mapping of unknown environments. It performs task and motion planning (TAMP) entirely in image feature space. The task planner is a recurrent network using the latest image observation sequence to hallucinate a feature as the next-best exploration goal. The motion planner then utilizes the current and the hallucinated features to generate an action taking the agent towards that goal. The two planners are jointly trained via deeply-supervised imitation learning from expert demonstrations. During exploration, we iteratively call the two planners to predict the next action, and the topological map is built by constantly appending the latest image observation and action to the map and using visual place recognition (VPR) for loop closing. The resulting topological map efficiently represents an environment's connectivity and traversability, so it can be used for tasks such as visual navigation. We show DeepExplorer's exploration efficiency and strong sim2sim generalization capability on large-scale simulation datasets like Gibson and MP3D. Its effectiveness is further validated via the image-goal navigation performance on the resulting topological map. We further show its strong zero-shot sim2real generalization capability in real-world experiments. The source code is available at \url{https://ai4ce.github.io/DeepExplorer/}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeepExplorer，一种简单且轻量级的无度量探索方法，用于未知环境的拓扑映射。它完全在图像特征空间中执行任务和运动规划（TAMP）。任务规划器是一个循环网络，使用最新的图像观察序列将某个特征幻觉为下一个最佳探索目标。然后，运动规划器利用当前和幻觉特征来生成一个动作，使智能体朝着该目标前进。两位规划者通过专家演示的深度监督模仿学习进行联合培训。在探索过程中，我们迭代地调用两个规划器来预测下一个动作，并通过不断地将最新的图像观察和动作附加到地图上并使用视觉位置识别（VPR）进行闭环来构建拓扑图。生成的拓扑图有效地表示了环境的连通性和可遍历性，因此它可用于视觉导航等任务。我们在 Gibson 和 MP3D 等大规模仿真数据集上展示了 DeepExplorer 的探索效率和强大的 sim2sim 泛化能力。通过生成的拓扑图上的图像目标导航性能进一步验证了其有效性。我们在实际实验中进一步展示了其强大的零样本 sim2real 泛化能力。源代码可在 \url{https://ai4ce.github.io/DeepExplorer/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需度量的拓扑地图构建方法DeepExplorer，通过在特征空间中进行任务与运动模仿学习实现未知环境的高效探索。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑地图构建方法依赖复杂度量模型且泛化能力有限，需开发轻量级方法以提升未知环境探索效率与跨场景适应性。
AI.method: 采用递归网络预测图像特征序列的下一最佳探索目标，结合运动规划器生成动作；通过深度监督模仿学习联合训练任务与运动规划器，利用视觉地点识别实现拓扑地图闭环。
AI.result: 在Gibson和MP3D等大规模仿真数据集上展现优异探索效率与sim2sim泛化能力，并在真实场景中验证了零样本sim2real迁移有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeepExplorer通过特征空间任务运动模仿学习，实现了高效轻量的拓扑地图构建，为视觉导航等任务提供了可靠环境表示。

search_text: Metric-Free Exploration for Topological Mapping by Task and Motion Imitation in Feature Space 特征空间中任务和运动模仿的拓扑映射的无度量探索 We propose DeepExplorer, a simple and lightweight metric-free exploration method for topological mapping of unknown environments. It performs task and motion planning (TAMP) entirely in image feature space. The task planner is a recurrent network using the latest image observation sequence to hallucinate a feature as the next-best exploration goal. The motion planner then utilizes the current and the hallucinated features to generate an action taking the agent towards that goal. The two planners are jointly trained via deeply-supervised imitation learning from expert demonstrations. During exploration, we iteratively call the two planners to predict the next action, and the topological map is built by constantly appending the latest image observation and action to the map and using visual place recognition (VPR) for loop closing. The resulting topological map efficiently represents an environment's connectivity and traversability, so it can be used for tasks such as visual navigation. We show DeepExplorer's exploration efficiency and strong sim2sim generalization capability on large-scale simulation datasets like Gibson and MP3D. Its effectiveness is further validated via the image-goal navigation performance on the resulting topological map. We further show its strong zero-shot sim2real generalization capability in real-world experiments. The source code is available at \url{https://ai4ce.github.io/DeepExplorer/}. 我们提出了 DeepExplorer，一种简单且轻量级的无度量探索方法，用于未知环境的拓扑映射。它完全在图像特征空间中执行任务和运动规划（TAMP）。任务规划器是一个循环网络，使用最新的图像观察序列将某个特征幻觉为下一个最佳探索目标。然后，运动规划器利用当前和幻觉特征来生成一个动作，使智能体朝着该目标前进。两位规划者通过专家演示的深度监督模仿学习进行联合培训。在探索过程中，我们迭代地调用两个规划器来预测下一个动作，并通过不断地将最新的图像观察和动作附加到地图上并使用视觉位置识别（VPR）进行闭环来构建拓扑图。生成的拓扑图有效地表示了环境的连通性和可遍历性，因此它可用于视觉导航等任务。我们在 Gibson 和 MP3D 等大规模仿真数据集上展示了 DeepExplorer 的探索效率和强大的 sim2sim 泛化能力。通过生成的拓扑图上的图像目标导航性能进一步验证了其有效性。我们在实际实验中进一步展示了其强大的零样本 sim2real 泛化能力。源代码可在 \url{https://ai4ce.github.io/DeepExplorer/} 获取。 本文提出一种无需度量的拓扑地图构建方法DeepExplorer，通过在特征空间中进行任务与运动模仿学习实现未知环境的高效探索。 Yuhang He,Irving Fang,Yiming Li,Rushi Bhavesh Shah,Chen Feng cs.RO

authors_text: Rui-Yang Ju,Chih-Chia Chen,Jen-Shiun Chiang,Yu-Shian Lin,Wei-Han Chen,Chun-Tse Chien
title: Resolution Enhancement Processing on Low Quality Images Using Swin Transformer Based on Interval Dense Connection Strategy
title_zh: 基于区间密集连接策略的Swin Transformer对低质量图像的分辨率增强处理
comment: ef:Multimed Tools Appl 83 (2024) 14839-14855
comments: ef:Multimed Tools Appl 83 (2024) 14839-14855
abstract: The Transformer-based method has demonstrated remarkable performance for image super-resolution in comparison to the method based on the convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, using the self-attention mechanism like SwinIR (Image Restoration Using Swin Transformer) to extract feature information from images needs a significant amount of computational resources, which limits its application on low computing power platforms. To improve the model feature reuse, this research work proposes the Interval Dense Connection Strategy, which connects different blocks according to the newly designed algorithm. We apply this strategy to SwinIR and present a new model, which named SwinOIR (Object Image Restoration Using Swin Transformer). For image super-resolution, an ablation study is conducted to demonstrate the positive effect of the Interval Dense Connection Strategy on the model performance. Furthermore, we evaluate our model on various popular benchmark datasets, and compare it with other state-of-the-art (SOTA) lightweight models. For example, SwinOIR obtains a PSNR of 26.62 dB for x4 upscaling image super-resolution on Urban100 dataset, which is 0.15 dB higher than the SOTA model SwinIR. For real-life application, this work applies the lastest version of You Only Look Once (YOLOv8) model and the proposed model to perform object detection and real-life image super-resolution on low-quality images. This implementation code is publicly available at https://github.com/Rubbbbbbbbby/SwinOIR.

However, using the self-attention mechanism like SwinIR (Image Restoration Using Swin Transformer) to extract feature information from images needs a significant amount of computational resources, which limits its application on low computing power platforms. To improve the model feature reuse, this research work proposes the Interval Dense Connection Strategy, which connects different blocks according to the newly designed algorithm. We apply this strategy to SwinIR and present a new model, which named SwinOIR (Object Image Restoration Using Swin Transformer). For image super-resolution, an ablation study is conducted to demonstrate the positive effect of the Interval Dense Connection Strategy on the model performance. Furthermore, we evaluate our model on various popular benchmark datasets, and compare it with other state-of-the-art (SOTA) lightweight models. For example, SwinOIR obtains a PSNR of 26.62 dB for x4 upscaling image super-resolution on Urban100 dataset, which is 0.15 dB higher than the SOTA model SwinIR. For real-life application, this work applies the lastest version of You Only Look Once (YOLOv8) model and the proposed model to perform object detection and real-life image super-resolution on low-quality images. This implementation code is publicly available at https://github.com/Rubbbbbbbbby/SwinOIR.
abstract_zh: 与基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法相比，基于 Transformer 的方法在图像超分辨率方面表现出了卓越的性能。然而，使用SwinIR（使用Swin Transformer的图像恢复）等自注意力机制从图像中提取特征信息需要大量的计算资源，这限制了其在低计算能力平台上的应用。为了提高模型特征的重用性，本研究工作提出了间隔密集连接策略，根据新设计的算法连接不同的块。我们将此策略应用于 SwinIR 并提出了一个新模型，命名为 SwinOIR（使用 Swin Transformer 的对象图像恢复）。对于图像超分辨率，进行了消融研究，以证明间隔密集连接策略对模型性能的积极影响。此外，我们在各种流行的基准数据集上评估我们的模型，并将其与其他最先进的（SOTA）轻量级模型进行比较。例如，SwinOIR 在 Urban100 数据集上对 x4 放大图像超分辨率获得了 26.62 dB 的 PSNR，比 SOTA 模型 SwinIR 高 0.15 dB。对于现实生活中的应用，这项工作应用了最新版本的 You Only Look Once (YOLOv8) 模型和所提出的模型来对低质量图像执行对象检测和现实生活图像超分辨率。此实现代码可在 https://github.com/Rubbbbbbbbby/SwinOIR 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于间隔密集连接策略的Swin Transformer模型（SwinOIR），用于在低计算资源环境下提升低质量图像的分辨率。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型（如SwinIR）虽在图像超分辨率任务中表现优异，但其高计算资源需求限制了在低功耗平台的应用，需优化模型效率。
AI.method: 提出间隔密集连接策略，通过设计新算法连接不同模块，优化SwinIR模型结构，提升特征复用效率。
AI.result: 在Urban100数据集上，SwinOIR在x4超分任务中PSNR达到26.62dB，优于SOTA模型SwinIR；同时与YOLOv8结合实现实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 间隔密集连接策略有效提升模型性能并降低计算需求，为低资源环境下的图像超分提供可行方案。

authors_text: Zhongwei Qiu,Yang Qiansheng,Jian Wang,Haocheng Feng,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Chang Xu,Dongmei Fu,Jingdong Wang
title: PSVT: End-to-End Multi-person 3D Pose and Shape Estimation with Progressive Video Transformers
title_zh: PSVT：使用渐进式视频转换器进行端到端多人 3D 姿势和形状估计
comment: CVPR2023
comments: CVPR2023
abstract: Existing methods of multi-person video 3D human Pose and Shape Estimation (PSE) typically adopt a two-stage strategy, which first detects human instances in each frame and then performs single-person PSE with temporal model. However, the global spatio-temporal context among spatial instances can not be captured. In this paper, we propose a new end-to-end multi-person 3D Pose and Shape estimation framework with progressive Video Transformer, termed PSVT. In PSVT, a spatio-temporal encoder (STE) captures the global feature dependencies among spatial objects. Then, spatio-temporal pose decoder (STPD) and shape decoder (STSD) capture the global dependencies between pose queries and feature tokens, shape queries and feature tokens, respectively. To handle the variances of objects as time proceeds, a novel scheme of progressive decoding is used to update pose and shape queries at each frame. Besides, we propose a novel pose-guided attention (PGA) for shape decoder to better predict shape parameters. The two components strengthen the decoder of PSVT to improve performance. Extensive experiments on the four datasets show that PSVT achieves stage-of-the-art results.
summary: Existing methods of multi-person video 3D human Pose and Shape Estimation (PSE) typically adopt a two-stage strategy, which first detects human instances in each frame and then performs single-person PSE with temporal model. However, the global spatio-temporal context among spatial instances can not be captured. In this paper, we propose a new end-to-end multi-person 3D Pose and Shape estimation framework with progressive Video Transformer, termed PSVT. In PSVT, a spatio-temporal encoder (STE) captures the global feature dependencies among spatial objects. Then, spatio-temporal pose decoder (STPD) and shape decoder (STSD) capture the global dependencies between pose queries and feature tokens, shape queries and feature tokens, respectively. To handle the variances of objects as time proceeds, a novel scheme of progressive decoding is used to update pose and shape queries at each frame. Besides, we propose a novel pose-guided attention (PGA) for shape decoder to better predict shape parameters. The two components strengthen the decoder of PSVT to improve performance. Extensive experiments on the four datasets show that PSVT achieves stage-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 现有的多人视频3D人体姿势和形状估计（PSE）方法通常采用两阶段策略，首先检测每帧中的人体实例，然后使用时间模型执行单人PSE。然而，无法捕获空间实例之间的全局时空上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有渐进式视频转换器的新的端到端多人 3D 姿势和形状估计框架，称为 PSVT。在 PSVT 中，时空编码器 (STE) 捕获空间对象之间的全局特征依赖性。然后，时空姿态解码器（STPD）和形状解码器（STSD）分别捕获姿态查询和特征标记、形状查询和特征标记之间的全局依赖关系。为了处理对象随时间变化的变化，使用了一种新颖的渐进解码方案来更新每帧的姿势和形状查询。此外，我们为形状解码器提出了一种新颖的姿势引导注意力（PGA），以更好地预测形状参数。这两个组件增强了 PSVT 的解码器以提高性能。对四个数据集的大量实验表明 PSVT 取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的多人体3D姿态和形状估计框架PSVT，利用渐进式视频Transformer捕捉时空上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用两阶段策略无法有效捕捉多人体间的全局时空上下文关系，导致姿态和形状估计性能受限。
AI.method: 设计包含时空编码器（STE）、时空姿态解码器（STPD）和形状解码器（STSD）的PSVT框架，并引入渐进式解码和姿态引导注意力（PGA）机制。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上取得当时最先进的性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局时空特征建模和渐进式解码机制，PSVT显著提升了多人体3D姿态与形状估计的准确性。

search_text: PSVT: End-to-End Multi-person 3D Pose and Shape Estimation with Progressive Video Transformers PSVT：使用渐进式视频转换器进行端到端多人 3D 姿势和形状估计 Existing methods of multi-person video 3D human Pose and Shape Estimation (PSE) typically adopt a two-stage strategy, which first detects human instances in each frame and then performs single-person PSE with temporal model. However, the global spatio-temporal context among spatial instances can not be captured. In this paper, we propose a new end-to-end multi-person 3D Pose and Shape estimation framework with progressive Video Transformer, termed PSVT. In PSVT, a spatio-temporal encoder (STE) captures the global feature dependencies among spatial objects. Then, spatio-temporal pose decoder (STPD) and shape decoder (STSD) capture the global dependencies between pose queries and feature tokens, shape queries and feature tokens, respectively. To handle the variances of objects as time proceeds, a novel scheme of progressive decoding is used to update pose and shape queries at each frame. Besides, we propose a novel pose-guided attention (PGA) for shape decoder to better predict shape parameters. The two components strengthen the decoder of PSVT to improve performance. Extensive experiments on the four datasets show that PSVT achieves stage-of-the-art results. 现有的多人视频3D人体姿势和形状估计（PSE）方法通常采用两阶段策略，首先检测每帧中的人体实例，然后使用时间模型执行单人PSE。然而，无法捕获空间实例之间的全局时空上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有渐进式视频转换器的新的端到端多人 3D 姿势和形状估计框架，称为 PSVT。在 PSVT 中，时空编码器 (STE) 捕获空间对象之间的全局特征依赖性。然后，时空姿态解码器（STPD）和形状解码器（STSD）分别捕获姿态查询和特征标记、形状查询和特征标记之间的全局依赖关系。为了处理对象随时间变化的变化，使用了一种新颖的渐进解码方案来更新每帧的姿势和形状查询。此外，我们为形状解码器提出了一种新颖的姿势引导注意力（PGA），以更好地预测形状参数。这两个组件增强了 PSVT 的解码器以提高性能。对四个数据集的大量实验表明 PSVT 取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种端到端的多人体3D姿态和形状估计框架PSVT，利用渐进式视频Transformer捕捉时空上下文信息。 Zhongwei Qiu,Yang Qiansheng,Jian Wang,Haocheng Feng,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Chang Xu,Dongmei Fu,Jingdong Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Kunyang Han,Yong Liu,Jun Hao Liew,Henghui Ding,Yunchao Wei,Jiajun Liu,Yitong Wang,Yansong Tang,Yujiu Yang,Jiashi Feng,Yao Zhao
title: Global Knowledge Calibration for Fast Open-Vocabulary Segmentation
title_zh: 用于快速开放词汇分割的全局知识校准
comment: Accepted by ICCV2023
comments: Accepted by ICCV2023
abstract: Recent advancements in pre-trained vision-language models, such as CLIP, have enabled the segmentation of arbitrary concepts solely from textual inputs, a process commonly referred to as open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVS). However, existing OVS techniques confront a fundamental challenge: the trained classifier tends to overfit on the base classes observed during training, resulting in suboptimal generalization performance to unseen classes. To mitigate this issue, recent studies have proposed the use of an additional frozen pre-trained CLIP for classification. Nonetheless, this approach incurs heavy computational overheads as the CLIP vision encoder must be repeatedly forward-passed for each mask, rendering it impractical for real-world applications. To address this challenge, our objective is to develop a fast OVS model that can perform comparably or better without the extra computational burden of the CLIP image encoder during inference. To this end, we propose a core idea of preserving the generalizable representation when fine-tuning on known classes. Specifically, we introduce a text diversification strategy that generates a set of synonyms for each training category, which prevents the learned representation from collapsing onto specific known category names. Additionally, we employ a text-guided knowledge distillation method to preserve the generalizable knowledge of CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed model achieves robust generalization performance across various datasets. Furthermore, we perform a preliminary exploration of open-vocabulary video segmentation and present a benchmark that can facilitate future open-vocabulary research in the video domain.
summary: Recent advancements in pre-trained vision-language models, such as CLIP, have enabled the segmentation of arbitrary concepts solely from textual inputs, a process commonly referred to as open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVS). However, existing OVS techniques confront a fundamental challenge: the trained classifier tends to overfit on the base classes observed during training, resulting in suboptimal generalization performance to unseen classes. To mitigate this issue, recent studies have proposed the use of an additional frozen pre-trained CLIP for classification. Nonetheless, this approach incurs heavy computational overheads as the CLIP vision encoder must be repeatedly forward-passed for each mask, rendering it impractical for real-world applications. To address this challenge, our objective is to develop a fast OVS model that can perform comparably or better without the extra computational burden of the CLIP image encoder during inference. To this end, we propose a core idea of preserving the generalizable representation when fine-tuning on known classes. Specifically, we introduce a text diversification strategy that generates a set of synonyms for each training category, which prevents the learned representation from collapsing onto specific known category names. Additionally, we employ a text-guided knowledge distillation method to preserve the generalizable knowledge of CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed model achieves robust generalization performance across various datasets. Furthermore, we perform a preliminary exploration of open-vocabulary video segmentation and present a benchmark that can facilitate future open-vocabulary research in the video domain.
abstract_zh: 预训练视觉语言模型（例如 CLIP）的最新进展使得仅从文本输入中分割任意概念成为可能，这一过程通常称为开放词汇语义分割（OVS）。然而，现有的 OVS 技术面临着一个根本性的挑战：经过训练的分类器往往会过度拟合训练期间观察到的基类，从而导致对未见过的类的泛化性能不佳。为了缓解这个问题，最近的研究建议使用额外的冷冻预训练 CLIP 进行分类。尽管如此，这种方法会产生大量的计算开销，因为 CLIP 视觉编码器必须针对每个掩模重复前向传递，这使得它对于实际应用来说不切实际。为了应对这一挑战，我们的目标是开发一种快速 OVS 模型，该模型在推理过程中无需 CLIP 图像编码器的额外计算负担，即可实现相当或更好的性能。为此，我们提出了在对已知类进行微调时保留可泛化表示的核心思想。具体来说，我们引入了一种文本多样化策略，该策略为每个训练类别生成一组同义词，这可以防止学习到的表示崩溃到特定的已知类别名称。此外，我们采用文本引导的知识蒸馏方法来保留 CLIP 的通用知识。大量的实验表明，我们提出的模型在各种数据集上实现了稳健的泛化性能。此外，我们对开放词汇视频分割进行了初步探索，并提出了一个可以促进视频领域未来开放词汇研究的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖CLIP图像编码器的快速开放词汇分割方法，通过知识校准提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇分割方法因过度依赖CLIP模型导致计算开销大，且在未见类别上泛化能力不足，亟需轻量化高效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出文本多样化策略生成同义词增强表示，并采用文本引导的知识蒸馏方法保留CLIP的可迁移知识，避免表示坍缩。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现与CLIP基线相当的分割性能，且推理速度提升显著；构建了首个开放词汇视频分割基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过知识校准有效平衡了模型效率与泛化能力，为开放词汇分割的实用化和视频领域研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Hao Liu,Xin Li,Mingming Gong,Bing Liu,Yunfei Wu,Deqiang Jiang,Yinsong Liu,Xing Sun
title: Grab What You Need: Rethinking Complex Table Structure Recognition with Flexible Components Deliberation
title_zh: 抓住你所需要的：通过灵活的组件审议重新思考复杂的表结构识别
comment: Tech report
comments: Tech report
abstract: Recently, Table Structure Recognition (TSR) task, aiming at identifying table structure into machine readable formats, has received increasing interest in the community. While impressive success, most single table component-based methods can not perform well on unregularized table cases distracted by not only complicated inner structure but also exterior capture distortion. In this paper, we raise it as Complex TSR problem, where the performance degeneration of existing methods is attributable to their inefficient component usage and redundant post-processing. To mitigate it, we shift our perspective from table component extraction towards the efficient multiple components leverage, which awaits further exploration in the field. Specifically, we propose a seminal method, termed GrabTab, equipped with newly proposed Component Deliberator. Thanks to its progressive deliberation mechanism, our GrabTab can flexibly accommodate to most complex tables with reasonable components selected but without complicated post-processing involved. Quantitative experimental results on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts, especially under more challenging scenes.
summary: Recently, Table Structure Recognition (TSR) task, aiming at identifying table structure into machine readable formats, has received increasing interest in the community. While impressive success, most single table component-based methods can not perform well on unregularized table cases distracted by not only complicated inner structure but also exterior capture distortion. In this paper, we raise it as Complex TSR problem, where the performance degeneration of existing methods is attributable to their inefficient component usage and redundant post-processing. To mitigate it, we shift our perspective from table component extraction towards the efficient multiple components leverage, which awaits further exploration in the field. Specifically, we propose a seminal method, termed GrabTab, equipped with newly proposed Component Deliberator. Thanks to its progressive deliberation mechanism, our GrabTab can flexibly accommodate to most complex tables with reasonable components selected but without complicated post-processing involved. Quantitative experimental results on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts, especially under more challenging scenes.
abstract_zh: 最近，旨在将表结构识别为机器可读格式的表结构识别（TSR）任务越来越受到社区的关注。虽然取得了令人印象深刻的成功，但大多数基于单表组件的方法在非正则表情况下表现不佳，不仅因为复杂的内部结构而且还因为外部捕获失真而分散注意力。在本文中，我们将其称为复杂 TSR 问题，其中现有方法的性能下降可归因于其低效的组件使用和冗余的后处理。为了缓解这个问题，我们将视角从表组件提取转向高效的多组件利用，这有待该领域的进一步探索。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为 GrabTab 的开创性方法，配备了新提出的 Component Deliberator。得益于其渐进式审议机制，我们的 GrabTab 可以灵活地适应大多数复杂的表格，选择合理的组件，但无需复杂的后处理。公共基准的定量实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法，特别是在更具挑战性的场景下。

AI.tldr: 解决复杂表格结构识别问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂表格时因组件使用效率低和冗余后处理导致性能下降
AI.method: 提出GrabTab方法，包含组件审议器，通过逐步审议机制灵活选择组件，减少后处理
AI.result: 在基准测试中显著优于现有方法，尤其在挑战性场景下表现优异
AI.conclusion: 通过高效组件利用和简化后处理，有效解决复杂表格识别问题

search_text: Grab What You Need: Rethinking Complex Table Structure Recognition with Flexible Components Deliberation 抓住你所需要的：通过灵活的组件审议重新思考复杂的表结构识别 Recently, Table Structure Recognition (TSR) task, aiming at identifying table structure into machine readable formats, has received increasing interest in the community. While impressive success, most single table component-based methods can not perform well on unregularized table cases distracted by not only complicated inner structure but also exterior capture distortion. In this paper, we raise it as Complex TSR problem, where the performance degeneration of existing methods is attributable to their inefficient component usage and redundant post-processing. To mitigate it, we shift our perspective from table component extraction towards the efficient multiple components leverage, which awaits further exploration in the field. Specifically, we propose a seminal method, termed GrabTab, equipped with newly proposed Component Deliberator. Thanks to its progressive deliberation mechanism, our GrabTab can flexibly accommodate to most complex tables with reasonable components selected but without complicated post-processing involved. Quantitative experimental results on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts, especially under more challenging scenes. 最近，旨在将表结构识别为机器可读格式的表结构识别（TSR）任务越来越受到社区的关注。虽然取得了令人印象深刻的成功，但大多数基于单表组件的方法在非正则表情况下表现不佳，不仅因为复杂的内部结构而且还因为外部捕获失真而分散注意力。在本文中，我们将其称为复杂 TSR 问题，其中现有方法的性能下降可归因于其低效的组件使用和冗余的后处理。为了缓解这个问题，我们将视角从表组件提取转向高效的多组件利用，这有待该领域的进一步探索。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为 GrabTab 的开创性方法，配备了新提出的 Component Deliberator。得益于其渐进式审议机制，我们的 GrabTab 可以灵活地适应大多数复杂的表格，选择合理的组件，但无需复杂的后处理。公共基准的定量实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法，特别是在更具挑战性的场景下。 解决复杂表格结构识别问题 Hao Liu,Xin Li,Mingming Gong,Bing Liu,Yunfei Wu,Deqiang Jiang,Yinsong Liu,Xing Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Giulio Mazzi,Daniele Meli,Alberto Castellini,Alessandro Farinelli
title: Learning Logic Specifications for Soft Policy Guidance in POMCP
title_zh: 学习 POMCP 中软策略指导的逻辑规范
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS) 2023
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS) 2023
abstract: Partially Observable Monte Carlo Planning (POMCP) is an efficient solver for Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs). It allows scaling to large state spaces by computing an approximation of the optimal policy locally and online, using a Monte Carlo Tree Search based strategy. However, POMCP suffers from sparse reward function, namely, rewards achieved only when the final goal is reached, particularly in environments with large state spaces and long horizons. Recently, logic specifications have been integrated into POMCP to guide exploration and to satisfy safety requirements. However, such policy-related rules require manual definition by domain experts, especially in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we use inductive logic programming to learn logic specifications from traces of POMCP executions, i.e., sets of belief-action pairs generated by the planner. Specifically, we learn rules expressed in the paradigm of answer set programming. We then integrate them inside POMCP to provide soft policy bias toward promising actions. In the context of two benchmark scenarios, rocksample and battery, we show that the integration of learned rules from small task instances can improve performance with fewer Monte Carlo simulations and in larger task instances. We make our modified version of POMCP publicly available at https://github.com/GiuMaz/pomcp_clingo.git.
summary: Partially Observable Monte Carlo Planning (POMCP) is an efficient solver for Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs). It allows scaling to large state spaces by computing an approximation of the optimal policy locally and online, using a Monte Carlo Tree Search based strategy. However, POMCP suffers from sparse reward function, namely, rewards achieved only when the final goal is reached, particularly in environments with large state spaces and long horizons. Recently, logic specifications have been integrated into POMCP to guide exploration and to satisfy safety requirements. However, such policy-related rules require manual definition by domain experts, especially in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we use inductive logic programming to learn logic specifications from traces of POMCP executions, i.e., sets of belief-action pairs generated by the planner. Specifically, we learn rules expressed in the paradigm of answer set programming. We then integrate them inside POMCP to provide soft policy bias toward promising actions. In the context of two benchmark scenarios, rocksample and battery, we show that the integration of learned rules from small task instances can improve performance with fewer Monte Carlo simulations and in larger task instances. We make our modified version of POMCP publicly available at https://github.com/GiuMaz/pomcp_clingo.git.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察蒙特卡罗规划 (POMCP) 是部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 的高效求解器。它允许通过使用基于蒙特卡罗树搜索的策略在本地和在线计算最佳策略的近似值来扩展到大型状态空间。然而，POMCP 的奖励函数稀疏，即仅在达到最终目标时才获得奖励，特别是在状态空间大、视野长的环境中。最近，逻辑规范已集成到 POMCP 中，以指导探索并满足安全要求。然而，此类与策略相关的规则需要领域专家手动定义，尤其是在现实场景中。在本文中，我们使用归纳逻辑编程从 POMCP 执行的痕迹中学习逻辑规范，即由规划器生成的信念-动作对集。具体来说，我们学习以答案集编程范式表达的规则。然后，我们将它们集成到 POMCP 中，为有希望的行动提供软政策偏向。在rocksample和battery这两个基准场景的背景下，我们表明，从小任务实例中学习的规则的集成可以通过更少的蒙特卡罗模拟和更大的任务实例来提高性能。我们在 https://github.com/GiuMaz/pomcp_clingo.git 上公开提供 POMCP 的修改版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过归纳逻辑编程从POMCP执行轨迹中学习逻辑规范，以软性策略引导提升部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程的求解效率。
AI.motivation: POMCP在稀疏奖励环境下探索效率低下，且现有逻辑规范需人工定义，难以适应复杂现实场景。
AI.method: 利用归纳逻辑编程从POMCP生成的信念-动作对轨迹中学习答案集编程规则，并将其集成到POMCP中作为软性策略偏置。
AI.result: 在rocksample和battery基准场景中，学习到的规则使POMCP在更少蒙特卡洛模拟下提升性能，并可扩展至更大规模任务。
AI.conclusion: 自动化学习逻辑规范可有效增强POMCP的探索效率与安全性，为实际应用提供可扩展解决方案。

authors_text: Changqing Qiu,Fusheng Jin,Yining Zhang
title: Empowering CAM-Based Methods with Capability to Generate Fine-Grained and High-Faithfulness Explanations
title_zh: 使基于 CAM 的方法能够生成细粒度和高可信度的解释
comment: This paper has been accepted by AAAI2024
comments: This paper has been accepted by AAAI2024
abstract: Recently, the explanation of neural network models has garnered considerable research attention. In computer vision, CAM (Class Activation Map)-based methods and LRP (Layer-wise Relevance Propagation) method are two common explanation methods. However, since most CAM-based methods can only generate global weights, they can only generate coarse-grained explanations at a deep layer. LRP and its variants, on the other hand, can generate fine-grained explanations. But the faithfulness of the explanations is too low. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose FG-CAM (Fine-Grained CAM), which extends CAM-based methods to enable generating fine-grained and high-faithfulness explanations. FG-CAM uses the relationship between two adjacent layers of feature maps with resolution differences to gradually increase the explanation resolution, while finding the contributing pixels and filtering out the pixels that do not contribute. Our method not only solves the shortcoming of CAM-based methods without changing their characteristics, but also generates fine-grained explanations that have higher faithfulness than LRP and its variants. We also present FG-CAM with denoising, which is a variant of FG-CAM and is able to generate less noisy explanations with almost no change in explanation faithfulness. Experimental results show that the performance of FG-CAM is almost unaffected by the explanation resolution. FG-CAM outperforms existing CAM-based methods significantly in both shallow and intermediate layers, and outperforms LRP and its variants significantly in the input layer. Our code is available at https://github.com/dongmo-qcq/FG-CAM.
summary: Recently, the explanation of neural network models has garnered considerable research attention. In computer vision, CAM (Class Activation Map)-based methods and LRP (Layer-wise Relevance Propagation) method are two common explanation methods. However, since most CAM-based methods can only generate global weights, they can only generate coarse-grained explanations at a deep layer. LRP and its variants, on the other hand, can generate fine-grained explanations. But the faithfulness of the explanations is too low. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose FG-CAM (Fine-Grained CAM), which extends CAM-based methods to enable generating fine-grained and high-faithfulness explanations. FG-CAM uses the relationship between two adjacent layers of feature maps with resolution differences to gradually increase the explanation resolution, while finding the contributing pixels and filtering out the pixels that do not contribute. Our method not only solves the shortcoming of CAM-based methods without changing their characteristics, but also generates fine-grained explanations that have higher faithfulness than LRP and its variants. We also present FG-CAM with denoising, which is a variant of FG-CAM and is able to generate less noisy explanations with almost no change in explanation faithfulness. Experimental results show that the performance of FG-CAM is almost unaffected by the explanation resolution. FG-CAM outperforms existing CAM-based methods significantly in both shallow and intermediate layers, and outperforms LRP and its variants significantly in the input layer. Our code is available at https://github.com/dongmo-qcq/FG-CAM.
abstract_zh: 最近，神经网络模型的解释引起了相当多的研究关注。在计算机视觉中，基于CAM（类激活图）的方法和LRP（分层相关性传播）方法是两种常见的解释方法。然而，由于大多数基于 CAM 的方法只能生成全局权重，因此它们只能在深层生成粗粒度的解释。另一方面，LRP 及其变体可以生成细粒度的解释。但解释的可信度太低。为了应对这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了 FG-CAM（细粒度 CAM），它扩展了基于 CAM 的方法，以生成细粒度和高可信度的解释。 FG-CAM利用具有分辨率差异的相邻两层特征图之间的关系来逐渐提高解释分辨率，同时找到有贡献的像素并滤除无贡献的像素。我们的方法不仅解决了基于 CAM 的方法的缺点而不改变其特征，而且生成的细粒度解释比 LRP 及其变体具有更高的可信度。我们还提出了具有降噪功能的 FG-CAM，它是 FG-CAM 的变体，能够生成噪声较小的解释，而解释的可信度几乎没有变化。实验结果表明FG-CAM的性能几乎不受解释分辨率的影响。 FG-CAM 在浅层和中间层都显着优于现有的基于 CAM 的方法，并且在输入层显着优于 LRP 及其变体。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dongmo-qcq/FG-CAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FG-CAM方法，解决CAM和LRP方法在生成模型解释时的粗粒度与低保真度问题，实现细粒度且高保真的图像解释。
AI.motivation: 现有CAM方法仅能生成粗粒度解释，LRP虽细粒度但保真度不足，需兼顾分辨率与解释可信度的新方法。
AI.method: FG-CAM通过相邻层特征图的分辨率差异逐步提升解释精度，筛选贡献像素并过滤无关区域，同时提出去噪变体降低噪声。
AI.result: FG-CAM在浅层、中间层及输入层均显著优于现有CAM和LRP方法，且性能不受解释分辨率影响。
AI.conclusion: FG-CAM有效结合CAM与LRP优势，生成高质量解释，代码开源促进方法复用与改进。

FG-CAM uses the relationship between two adjacent layers of feature maps with resolution differences to gradually increase the explanation resolution, while finding the contributing pixels and filtering out the pixels that do not contribute. Our method not only solves the shortcoming of CAM-based methods without changing their characteristics, but also generates fine-grained explanations that have higher faithfulness than LRP and its variants. We also present FG-CAM with denoising, which is a variant of FG-CAM and is able to generate less noisy explanations with almost no change in explanation faithfulness. Experimental results show that the performance of FG-CAM is almost unaffected by the explanation resolution. FG-CAM outperforms existing CAM-based methods significantly in both shallow and intermediate layers, and outperforms LRP and its variants significantly in the input layer. Our code is available at https://github.com/dongmo-qcq/FG-CAM. 最近，神经网络模型的解释引起了相当多的研究关注。在计算机视觉中，基于CAM（类激活图）的方法和LRP（分层相关性传播）方法是两种常见的解释方法。然而，由于大多数基于 CAM 的方法只能生成全局权重，因此它们只能在深层生成粗粒度的解释。另一方面，LRP 及其变体可以生成细粒度的解释。但解释的可信度太低。为了应对这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了 FG-CAM（细粒度 CAM），它扩展了基于 CAM 的方法，以生成细粒度和高可信度的解释。 FG-CAM利用具有分辨率差异的相邻两层特征图之间的关系来逐渐提高解释分辨率，同时找到有贡献的像素并滤除无贡献的像素。我们的方法不仅解决了基于 CAM 的方法的缺点而不改变其特征，而且生成的细粒度解释比 LRP 及其变体具有更高的可信度。我们还提出了具有降噪功能的 FG-CAM，它是 FG-CAM 的变体，能够生成噪声较小的解释，而解释的可信度几乎没有变化。实验结果表明FG-CAM的性能几乎不受解释分辨率的影响。 FG-CAM 在浅层和中间层都显着优于现有的基于 CAM 的方法，并且在输入层显着优于 LRP 及其变体。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dongmo-qcq/FG-CAM 获取。 本文提出FG-CAM方法，解决CAM和LRP方法在生成模型解释时的粗粒度与低保真度问题，实现细粒度且高保真的图像解释。 Changqing Qiu,Fusheng Jin,Yining Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yaosen Chen,Han Yang,Yuexin Yang,Yuegen Liu,Wei Wang,Xuming Wen,Chaoping Xie
title: NLUT: Neural-based 3D Lookup Tables for Video Photorealistic Style Transfer
title_zh: NLUT：用于视频真实感风格迁移的基于神经的 3D 查找表
abstract: Video photorealistic style transfer is desired to generate videos with a similar photorealistic style to the style image while maintaining temporal consistency. However, existing methods obtain stylized video sequences by performing frame-by-frame photorealistic style transfer, which is inefficient and does not ensure the temporal consistency of the stylized video. To address this issue, we use neural network-based 3D Lookup Tables (LUTs) for the photorealistic transfer of videos, achieving a balance between efficiency and effectiveness. We first train a neural network for generating photorealistic stylized 3D LUTs on a large-scale dataset; then, when performing photorealistic style transfer for a specific video, we select a keyframe and style image in the video as the data source and fine-turn the neural network; finally, we query the 3D LUTs generated by the fine-tuned neural network for the colors in the video, resulting in a super-fast photorealistic style transfer, even processing 8K video takes less than 2 millisecond per frame. The experimental results show that our method not only realizes the photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images but also outperforms the existing methods in terms of visual quality and consistency. Project page:https://semchan.github.io/NLUT_Project.
summary: Video photorealistic style transfer is desired to generate videos with a similar photorealistic style to the style image while maintaining temporal consistency. However, existing methods obtain stylized video sequences by performing frame-by-frame photorealistic style transfer, which is inefficient and does not ensure the temporal consistency of the stylized video. To address this issue, we use neural network-based 3D Lookup Tables (LUTs) for the photorealistic transfer of videos, achieving a balance between efficiency and effectiveness. We first train a neural network for generating photorealistic stylized 3D LUTs on a large-scale dataset; then, when performing photorealistic style transfer for a specific video, we select a keyframe and style image in the video as the data source and fine-turn the neural network; finally, we query the 3D LUTs generated by the fine-tuned neural network for the colors in the video, resulting in a super-fast photorealistic style transfer, even processing 8K video takes less than 2 millisecond per frame. The experimental results show that our method not only realizes the photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images but also outperforms the existing methods in terms of visual quality and consistency. Project page:https://semchan.github.io/NLUT_Project.
abstract_zh: 视频真实感风格迁移需要生成与风格图像具有相似真实感风格的视频，同时保持时间一致性。然而，现有方法通过逐帧进行真实感风格迁移来获得风格化视频序列，效率低下并且不能保证风格化视频的时间一致性。为了解决这个问题，我们使用基于神经网络的 3D 查找表 (LUT) 来进行视频的真实感传输，实现效率和效果之间的平衡。我们首先训练一个神经网络，用于在大规模数据集上生成逼真的风格化 3D LUT；然后，当对特定视频进行真实感风格迁移时，我们选择视频中的关键帧和风格图像作为数据源并对神经网络进行微调；最后，我们查询由微调神经网络生成的 3D LUT 以获取视频中的颜色，从而实现超快速的真实感风格传输，即使处理 8K 视频每帧也只需不到 2 毫秒。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅实现了任意风格图像的真实感风格迁移，而且在视觉质量和一致性方面优于现有方法。项目页面：https://semchan.github.io/NLUT_Project。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NLUT方法，利用基于神经网络的3D查找表实现高效且保持时间一致性的视频写实风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有视频风格迁移方法逐帧处理效率低且无法保证时间一致性，需寻找更高效且保持视觉连贯性的解决方案。
AI.method: 训练神经网络生成写实风格3D LUT，通过选择关键帧和风格图像微调网络，最终利用生成的LUT快速查询视频颜色实现风格迁移。
AI.result: 方法在保持视觉质量与一致性的同时，实现超快速处理（8K视频每帧低于2毫秒），优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: NLUT通过神经网络生成的3D LUT有效平衡了效率与效果，为任意风格图像的视频写实风格迁移提供了新方案。

authors_text: Shangfei Wang,Jiaqiang Wu,Feiyi Zheng,Xin Li,Xuewei Li,Suwen Wang,Yi Wu,Yanan Chang,Xiangyu Miao
title: Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation Based on Multimodal Data
title_zh: 基于多模态数据的情绪反应强度估计
abstract: This paper introduces our method for the Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation Challenge, in CVPR 2023: 5th Workshop and Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). Based on the multimodal data provided by the originazers, we extract acoustic and visual features with different pretrained models. The multimodal features are mixed together by Transformer Encoders with cross-modal attention mechnism. In this paper, 1. better features are extracted with the SOTA pretrained models. 2. Compared with the baseline, we improve the Pearson's Correlations Coefficient a lot. 3. We process the data with some special skills to enhance performance ability of our model.
summary: This paper introduces our method for the Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation Challenge, in CVPR 2023: 5th Workshop and Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). Based on the multimodal data provided by the originazers, we extract acoustic and visual features with different pretrained models. The multimodal features are mixed together by Transformer Encoders with cross-modal attention mechnism. In this paper, 1. better features are extracted with the SOTA pretrained models. 2. Compared with the baseline, we improve the Pearson's Correlations Coefficient a lot. 3. We process the data with some special skills to enhance performance ability of our model.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们在 CVPR 2023：第五届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 研讨会和竞赛中的情绪反应强度 (ERI) 估计挑战赛的方法。基于原创者提供的多模态数据，我们使用不同的预训练模型提取声学和视觉特征。多模态特征通过 Transformer 编码器与跨模态注意机制混合在一起。本文中，1.使用SOTA预训练模型提取了更好的特征。 2. 与基线相比，我们将皮尔逊相关系数提高了很多。 3.我们用一些特殊的技巧来处理数据，以增强我们模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 基于多模态数据估计情绪反应强度
AI.motivation: 现有情绪强度估计方法在多模态数据融合和特征提取方面存在不足，需探索更有效的模型架构和预训练方法以提高预测性能
AI.method: 采用SOTA预训练模型提取声学和视觉特征，通过Transformer编码器结合交叉模态注意力机制进行多模态特征融合，并应用特殊数据处理技巧增强模型表现
AI.result: 相比基线方法显著提升皮尔逊相关系数，取得挑战赛优异成绩
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与先进预训练模型结合能有效提升情绪强度估计性能，方法具有良好的泛化能力

authors_text: Hui Tang,Kui Jia
title: A New Benchmark: On the Utility of Synthetic Data with Blender for Bare Supervised Learning and Downstream Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 新基准：关于 Blender 合成数据在裸监督学习和下游领域适应中的效用
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures, 5 tables, accepted by the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2023. The proposed new synthetic-to-real benchmark S2RDA is available at https://pan.baidu.com/s/1fHHaqrEHbUZLXEg9XKpgSg?pwd=w9wa. The project page is available at https://huitangtang.github.io/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data/
comments: 24 pages, 14 figures, 5 tables, accepted by the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2023. The proposed new synthetic-to-real benchmark S2RDA is available at https://pan.baidu.com/s/1fHHaqrEHbUZLXEg9XKpgSg?pwd=w9wa. The project page is available at https://huitangtang.github.io/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data/
abstract: Deep learning in computer vision has achieved great success with the price of large-scale labeled training data. However, exhaustive data annotation is impracticable for each task of all domains of interest, due to high labor costs and unguaranteed labeling accuracy. Besides, the uncontrollable data collection process produces non-IID training and test data, where undesired duplication may exist. All these nuisances may hinder the verification of typical theories and exposure to new findings. To circumvent them, an alternative is to generate synthetic data via 3D rendering with domain randomization. We in this work push forward along this line by doing profound and extensive research on bare supervised learning and downstream domain adaptation. Specifically, under the well-controlled, IID data setting enabled by 3D rendering, we systematically verify the typical, important learning insights, e.g., shortcut learning, and discover the new laws of various data regimes and network architectures in generalization. We further investigate the effect of image formation factors on generalization, e.g., object scale, material texture, illumination, camera viewpoint, and background in a 3D scene. Moreover, we use the simulation-to-reality adaptation as a downstream task for comparing the transferability between synthetic and real data when used for pre-training, which demonstrates that synthetic data pre-training is also promising to improve real test results. Lastly, to promote future research, we develop a new large-scale synthetic-to-real benchmark for image classification, termed S2RDA, which provides more significant challenges for transfer from simulation to reality. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/huitangtang/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data.
summary: Deep learning in computer vision has achieved great success with the price of large-scale labeled training data. However, exhaustive data annotation is impracticable for each task of all domains of interest, due to high labor costs and unguaranteed labeling accuracy. Besides, the uncontrollable data collection process produces non-IID training and test data, where undesired duplication may exist. All these nuisances may hinder the verification of typical theories and exposure to new findings. To circumvent them, an alternative is to generate synthetic data via 3D rendering with domain randomization. We in this work push forward along this line by doing profound and extensive research on bare supervised learning and downstream domain adaptation. Specifically, under the well-controlled, IID data setting enabled by 3D rendering, we systematically verify the typical, important learning insights, e.g., shortcut learning, and discover the new laws of various data regimes and network architectures in generalization. We further investigate the effect of image formation factors on generalization, e.g., object scale, material texture, illumination, camera viewpoint, and background in a 3D scene. Moreover, we use the simulation-to-reality adaptation as a downstream task for comparing the transferability between synthetic and real data when used for pre-training, which demonstrates that synthetic data pre-training is also promising to improve real test results. Lastly, to promote future research, we develop a new large-scale synthetic-to-real benchmark for image classification, termed S2RDA, which provides more significant challenges for transfer from simulation to reality. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/huitangtang/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉领域的深度学习以大规模标记训练数据为代价取得了巨大成功。然而，由于高昂的劳动力成本和无法保证的标记准确性，对所有感兴趣领域的每项任务进行详尽的数据注释是不切实际的。此外，不可控的数据收集过程会产生非独立同分布的训练和测试数据，其中可能存在不期望的重复。所有这些麻烦可能会阻碍典型理论的验证和新发现的接触。为了规避它们，另一种方法是通过域随机化的 3D 渲染生成合成数据。我们在这项工作中通过对裸监督学习和下游领域适应进行深入而广泛的研究，沿着这条路线推进。具体来说，在3D渲染实现的良好控制的IID数据设置下，我们系统地验证了典型的、重要的学习见解，例如快捷学习，并发现了各种数据机制和网络架构的新规律。我们进一步研究图像形成因素对泛化的影响，例如 3D 场景中的物体尺度、材质纹理、照明、相机视点和背景。此外，我们使用模拟到现实的适应作为下游任务，以比较用于预训练时合成数据和真实数据之间的可转移性，这表明合成数据预训练也有望改善真实测试结果。最后，为了促进未来的研究，我们开发了一种新的大规模图像分类合成到真实基准，称为 S2RDA，它为从模拟到现实的转移提供了更重大的挑战。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/huitangtang/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出使用Blender生成的合成数据作为基准，用于监督学习和领域适应，验证理论并提升真实场景性能。
AI.motivation: 真实场景数据标注成本高且存在分布不一致问题，限制了理论验证与新发现，需通过可控合成数据解决此问题。
AI.method: 基于3D渲染生成IID合成数据，系统验证学习理论（如捷径学习），分析图像生成因素影响，并开发模拟到现实的领域适应任务。
AI.result: 发现数据分布与网络结构对泛化的影响规律，证明合成数据预训练可提升真实场景性能，并发布S2RDA基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效验证理论并促进领域适应研究，S2RDA基准为未来研究提供更具挑战性的测试平台。

search_text: A New Benchmark: On the Utility of Synthetic Data with Blender for Bare Supervised Learning and Downstream Domain Adaptation 新基准：关于 Blender 合成数据在裸监督学习和下游领域适应中的效用 Deep learning in computer vision has achieved great success with the price of large-scale labeled training data. However, exhaustive data annotation is impracticable for each task of all domains of interest, due to high labor costs and unguaranteed labeling accuracy. Besides, the uncontrollable data collection process produces non-IID training and test data, where undesired duplication may exist. All these nuisances may hinder the verification of typical theories and exposure to new findings. To circumvent them, an alternative is to generate synthetic data via 3D rendering with domain randomization. We in this work push forward along this line by doing profound and extensive research on bare supervised learning and downstream domain adaptation. Specifically, under the well-controlled, IID data setting enabled by 3D rendering, we systematically verify the typical, important learning insights, e.g., shortcut learning, and discover the new laws of various data regimes and network architectures in generalization. We further investigate the effect of image formation factors on generalization, e.g., object scale, material texture, illumination, camera viewpoint, and background in a 3D scene. Moreover, we use the simulation-to-reality adaptation as a downstream task for comparing the transferability between synthetic and real data when used for pre-training, which demonstrates that synthetic data pre-training is also promising to improve real test results. Lastly, to promote future research, we develop a new large-scale synthetic-to-real benchmark for image classification, termed S2RDA, which provides more significant challenges for transfer from simulation to reality. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/huitangtang/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data. 计算机视觉领域的深度学习以大规模标记训练数据为代价取得了巨大成功。然而，由于高昂的劳动力成本和无法保证的标记准确性，对所有感兴趣领域的每项任务进行详尽的数据注释是不切实际的。此外，不可控的数据收集过程会产生非独立同分布的训练和测试数据，其中可能存在不期望的重复。所有这些麻烦可能会阻碍典型理论的验证和新发现的接触。为了规避它们，另一种方法是通过域随机化的 3D 渲染生成合成数据。我们在这项工作中通过对裸监督学习和下游领域适应进行深入而广泛的研究，沿着这条路线推进。具体来说，在3D渲染实现的良好控制的IID数据设置下，我们系统地验证了典型的、重要的学习见解，例如快捷学习，并发现了各种数据机制和网络架构的新规律。我们进一步研究图像形成因素对泛化的影响，例如 3D 场景中的物体尺度、材质纹理、照明、相机视点和背景。此外，我们使用模拟到现实的适应作为下游任务，以比较用于预训练时合成数据和真实数据之间的可转移性，这表明合成数据预训练也有望改善真实测试结果。最后，为了促进未来的研究，我们开发了一种新的大规模图像分类合成到真实基准，称为 S2RDA，它为从模拟到现实的转移提供了更重大的挑战。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/huitangtang/On_the_Utility_of_Synthetic_Data 获取。 提出使用Blender生成的合成数据作为基准，用于监督学习和领域适应，验证理论并提升真实场景性能。 Hui Tang,Kui Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Jia Li,Yin Chen,Xuesong Zhang,Jiantao Nie,Ziqiang Li,Yangchen Yu,Yan Zhang,Richang Hong,Meng Wang
title: Multimodal Feature Extraction and Fusion for Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation and Expression Classification in Videos with Transformers
title_zh: 多模态特征提取和融合，用于变压器视频中的情绪反应强度估计和表情分类
comment: Solutions of HFUT-CVers Team at the 5th ABAW Competition (CVPR 2023 workshop)
comments: Solutions of HFUT-CVers Team at the 5th ABAW Competition (CVPR 2023 workshop)
abstract: In this paper, we present our advanced solutions to the two sub-challenges of Affective Behavior Analysis in the wild (ABAW) 2023: the Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation Challenge and Expression (Expr) Classification Challenge. ABAW 2023 aims to tackle the challenge of affective behavior analysis in natural contexts, with the ultimate goal of creating intelligent machines and robots that possess the ability to comprehend human emotions, feelings, and behaviors. For the Expression Classification Challenge, we propose a streamlined approach that handles the challenges of classification effectively. However, our main contribution lies in our use of diverse models and tools to extract multimodal features such as audio and video cues from the Hume-Reaction dataset. By studying, analyzing, and combining these features, we significantly enhance the model's accuracy for sentiment prediction in a multimodal context. Furthermore, our method achieves outstanding results on the Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation Challenge, surpassing the baseline method by an impressive 84\% increase, as measured by the Pearson Coefficient, on the validation dataset.
summary: In this paper, we present our advanced solutions to the two sub-challenges of Affective Behavior Analysis in the wild (ABAW) 2023: the Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation Challenge and Expression (Expr) Classification Challenge. ABAW 2023 aims to tackle the challenge of affective behavior analysis in natural contexts, with the ultimate goal of creating intelligent machines and robots that possess the ability to comprehend human emotions, feelings, and behaviors. For the Expression Classification Challenge, we propose a streamlined approach that handles the challenges of classification effectively. However, our main contribution lies in our use of diverse models and tools to extract multimodal features such as audio and video cues from the Hume-Reaction dataset. By studying, analyzing, and combining these features, we significantly enhance the model's accuracy for sentiment prediction in a multimodal context. Furthermore, our method achieves outstanding results on the Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation Challenge, surpassing the baseline method by an impressive 84\% increase, as measured by the Pearson Coefficient, on the validation dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对 2023 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 的两个子挑战提出了先进的解决方案：情绪反应强度 (ERI) 估计挑战和表达 (Expr) 分类挑战。 ABAW 2023 旨在应对自然环境中情感行为分析的挑战，最终目标是创造能够理解人类情感、感受和行为的智能机器和机器人。对于表达分类挑战，我们提出了一种简化的方法，可以有效地应对分类挑战。然而，我们的主要贡献在于使用不同的模型和工具从休谟反应数据集中提取多模态特征，例如音频和视频线索。通过研究、分析和组合这些特征，我们显着提高了模型在多模态环境下进行情感预测的准确性。此外，我们的方法在情绪反应强度 (ERI) 估计挑战赛中取得了出色的结果，在验证数据集上通过皮尔逊系数测量，比基线方法提高了 84%，令人印象深刻。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的多模态特征提取与融合方法，用于视频中情感反应强度估计和表情分类任务。
AI.motivation: 为实现机器对人类情感、行为的自然场景下理解，需解决多模态情感分析中的特征融合与模型精度提升问题。
AI.method: 采用多样化模型工具从Hume-Reaction数据集提取音频、视频多模态特征，通过Transformer架构进行特征分析与融合，优化情感预测准确性。
AI.result: 在情感反应强度估计任务中，验证集Pearson系数较基线提升84%；表情分类任务中提出高效分类方法取得优异结果。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合方法显著提升情感分析性能，为自然场景下的情感计算提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Andrey V. Savchenko
title: EmotiEffNet Facial Features in Uni-task Emotion Recognition in Video at ABAW-5 competition
title_zh: ABAW-5 竞赛视频中单任务情感识别中的 EmotiEffNet 面部特征
comment: 7 pages; 5 figures; 3 tables
comments: 7 pages; 5 figures; 3 tables
abstract: In this article, the results of our team for the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition are presented. The usage of the pre-trained convolutional networks from the EmotiEffNet family for frame-level feature extraction is studied. In particular, we propose an ensemble of a multi-layered perceptron and the LightAutoML-based classifier. The post-processing by smoothing the results for sequential frames is implemented. Experimental results for the large-scale Aff-Wild2 database demonstrate that our model achieves a much greater macro-averaged F1-score for facial expression recognition and action unit detection and concordance correlation coefficients for valence/arousal estimation when compared to baseline.
summary: In this article, the results of our team for the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition are presented. The usage of the pre-trained convolutional networks from the EmotiEffNet family for frame-level feature extraction is studied. In particular, we propose an ensemble of a multi-layered perceptron and the LightAutoML-based classifier. The post-processing by smoothing the results for sequential frames is implemented. Experimental results for the large-scale Aff-Wild2 database demonstrate that our model achieves a much greater macro-averaged F1-score for facial expression recognition and action unit detection and concordance correlation coefficients for valence/arousal estimation when compared to baseline.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，介绍了我们团队第五届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛的结果。研究了使用 EmotiEffNet 系列的预训练卷积网络进行帧级特征提取。特别是，我们提出了多层感知器和基于 LightAutoML 的分类器的集成。通过平滑连续帧的结果来实现后处理。大规模 Aff-Wild2 数据库的实验结果表明，与基线相比，我们的模型在面部表情识别和动作单元检测方面实现了更高的宏观平均 F1 分数，在效价/唤醒估计方面实现了更高的一致性相关系数。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了团队在第五屆ABAW競賽中使用EmotiEffNet進行視頻單任務情緒識別的結果。
AI.motivation: 現有方法在處理視頻情緒識別時存在特徵提取與模型效能不足的問題，需更高效的解決方案。
AI.method: 採用EmotiEffNet預訓練網絡提取幀級特徵，結合多層感知機與LightAutoML分類器進行集成，並通過序列幀結果平滑處理提升穩定性。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2數據集上，模型在表情識別、動作單元檢測及情緒估值任務中均超越基線方法，取得更高的宏平均F1分數與一致性係數。
AI.conclusion: 提出的特徵提取與模型集成方法有效提升視頻情緒識別性能，驗證了EmotiEffNet與後處理策略的優越性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 提出的特徵提取與模型集成方法有效提升視頻情緒識別性能，驗證了EmotiEffNet與後處理策略的優越性。

search_text: EmotiEffNet Facial Features in Uni-task Emotion Recognition in Video at ABAW-5 competition ABAW-5 竞赛视频中单任务情感识别中的 EmotiEffNet 面部特征 In this article, the results of our team for the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition are presented. The usage of the pre-trained convolutional networks from the EmotiEffNet family for frame-level feature extraction is studied. In particular, we propose an ensemble of a multi-layered perceptron and the LightAutoML-based classifier. The post-processing by smoothing the results for sequential frames is implemented. Experimental results for the large-scale Aff-Wild2 database demonstrate that our model achieves a much greater macro-averaged F1-score for facial expression recognition and action unit detection and concordance correlation coefficients for valence/arousal estimation when compared to baseline. 在本文中，介绍了我们团队第五届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛的结果。研究了使用 EmotiEffNet 系列的预训练卷积网络进行帧级特征提取。特别是，我们提出了多层感知器和基于 LightAutoML 的分类器的集成。通过平滑连续帧的结果来实现后处理。大规模 Aff-Wild2 数据库的实验结果表明，与基线相比，我们的模型在面部表情识别和动作单元检测方面实现了更高的宏观平均 F1 分数，在效价/唤醒估计方面实现了更高的一致性相关系数。 本文介绍了团队在第五屆ABAW競賽中使用EmotiEffNet進行視頻單任務情緒識別的結果。 Andrey V. Savchenko cs.CV

authors_text: Ziyang Zhang,Liuwei An,Zishun Cui,Ao xu,Tengteng Dong,Yueqi Jiang,Jingyi Shi,Xin Liu,Xiao Sun,Meng Wang
title: Facial Affect Recognition based on Transformer Encoder and Audiovisual Fusion for the ABAW5 Challenge
title_zh: ABAW5 挑战赛中基于 Transformer Encoder 和视听融合的面部表情识别
abstract: In this paper, we present our solutions for the 5th Workshop and Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW), which includes four sub-challenges of Valence-Arousal (VA) Estimation, Expression (Expr) Classification, Action Unit (AU) Detection and Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation. The 5th ABAW competition focuses on facial affect recognition utilizing different modalities and datasets. In our work, we extract powerful audio and visual features using a large number of sota models. These features are fused by Transformer Encoder and TEMMA. Besides, to avoid the possible impact of large dimensional differences between various features, we design an Affine Module to align different features to the same dimension. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the superiority of the proposed method. For the VA Estimation sub-challenge, our method obtains the mean Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) of 0.6066. For the Expression Classification sub-challenge, the average F1 Score is 0.4055. For the AU Detection sub-challenge, the average F1 Score is 0.5296. For the Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation sub-challenge, the average pearson's correlations coefficient on the validation set is 0.3968. All of the results of four sub-challenges outperform the baseline with a large margin.
summary: In this paper, we present our solutions for the 5th Workshop and Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW), which includes four sub-challenges of Valence-Arousal (VA) Estimation, Expression (Expr) Classification, Action Unit (AU) Detection and Emotional Reaction Intensity (ERI) Estimation. The 5th ABAW competition focuses on facial affect recognition utilizing different modalities and datasets. In our work, we extract powerful audio and visual features using a large number of sota models. These features are fused by Transformer Encoder and TEMMA. Besides, to avoid the possible impact of large dimensional differences between various features, we design an Affine Module to align different features to the same dimension. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the superiority of the proposed method. For the VA Estimation sub-challenge, our method obtains the mean Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) of 0.6066. For the Expression Classification sub-challenge, the average F1 Score is 0.4055. For the AU Detection sub-challenge, the average F1 Score is 0.5296. For the Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation sub-challenge, the average pearson's correlations coefficient on the validation set is 0.3968. All of the results of four sub-challenges outperform the baseline with a large margin.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了第五届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）研讨会和竞赛的解决方案，其中包括效价唤醒（VA）估计、表达（Expr）分类、动作单元（AU）检测和情绪反应强度（ERI）估计四个子挑战。第五届 ABAW 竞赛的重点是利用不同模式和数据集进行面部表情识别。在我们的工作中，我们使用大量 sota 模型提取强大的音频和视觉特征。这些特征由 Transformer Encoder 和 TEMMA 融合在一起。此外，为了避免不同特征之间较大尺寸差异可能产生的影响，我们设计了仿射模块将不同特征对齐到相同尺寸。大量的实验证明了所提出方法的优越性。对于 VA 估计子挑战，我们的方法获得的平均一致性相关系数 (CCC) 为 0.6066。对于表达分类子挑战，平均 F1 分数为 0.4055。对于 AU 检测子挑战，平均 F1 分数为 0.5296。对于情绪反应强度估计子挑战，验证集上的平均皮尔逊相关系数为 0.3968。四个子挑战的所有结果都大幅优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Transformer编码器和视听融合的面部情感识别方法，用于ABAW5挑战赛的四个子任务。
AI.motivation: 为了解决面部情感识别中多模态特征融合与维度差异问题，提升情感分析的准确性。
AI.method: 使用SOTA模型提取音频和视觉特征，通过Transformer Encoder和TEMMA融合，并设计仿射模块对齐特征维度。
AI.result: VA估计CCC达0.6066，表情分类F1为0.4055，AU检测F1为0.5296，ERI估计Pearson相关系数为0.3968，均优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在ABAW5四个子挑战中均显著优于基线，验证了视听融合与特征对齐的有效性。

authors_text: Naoki Hayashi,Yoshihide Sawada
title: Bayesian Generalization Error in Linear Neural Networks with Concept Bottleneck Structure and Multitask Formulation
title_zh: 具有概念瓶颈结构和多任务公式的线性神经网络中的贝叶斯泛化误差
comment: 31 pages, 14 figures, to be submitted to Neurocomputing
comments: 31 pages, 14 figures, to be submitted to Neurocomputing
abstract: Concept bottleneck model (CBM) is a ubiquitous method that can interpret neural networks using concepts. In CBM, concepts are inserted between the output layer and the last intermediate layer as observable values. This helps in understanding the reason behind the outputs generated by the neural networks: the weights corresponding to the concepts from the last hidden layer to the output layer. However, it has not yet been possible to understand the behavior of the generalization error in CBM since a neural network is a singular statistical model in general. When the model is singular, a one to one map from the parameters to probability distributions cannot be created. This non-identifiability makes it difficult to analyze the generalization performance. In this study, we mathematically clarify the Bayesian generalization error and free energy of CBM when its architecture is three-layered linear neural networks. We also consider a multitask problem where the neural network outputs not only the original output but also the concepts. The results show that CBM drastically changes the behavior of the parameter region and the Bayesian generalization error in three-layered linear neural networks as compared with the standard version, whereas the multitask formulation does not.
summary: Concept bottleneck model (CBM) is a ubiquitous method that can interpret neural networks using concepts. In CBM, concepts are inserted between the output layer and the last intermediate layer as observable values. This helps in understanding the reason behind the outputs generated by the neural networks: the weights corresponding to the concepts from the last hidden layer to the output layer. However, it has not yet been possible to understand the behavior of the generalization error in CBM since a neural network is a singular statistical model in general. When the model is singular, a one to one map from the parameters to probability distributions cannot be created. This non-identifiability makes it difficult to analyze the generalization performance. In this study, we mathematically clarify the Bayesian generalization error and free energy of CBM when its architecture is three-layered linear neural networks. We also consider a multitask problem where the neural network outputs not only the original output but also the concepts. The results show that CBM drastically changes the behavior of the parameter region and the Bayesian generalization error in three-layered linear neural networks as compared with the standard version, whereas the multitask formulation does not.
abstract_zh: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）是一种普遍存在的方法，可以使用概念解释神经网络。在 CBM 中，概念作为可观察值插入到输出层和最后一个中间层之间。这有助于理解神经网络生成输出背后的原因：与从最后一个隐藏层到输出层的概念相对应的权重。然而，由于神经网络通常是一个奇异的统计模型，因此目前还不可能理解 CBM 中泛化误差的行为。当模型是奇异的时，无法创建从参数到概率分布的一对一映射。这种不可识别性使得分析泛化性能变得困难。在本研究中，我们从数学上阐明了当 CBM 架构为三层线性神经网络时的贝叶斯泛化误差和自由能。我们还考虑一个多任务问题，其中神经网络不仅输出原始输出，还输出概念。结果表明，与标准版本相比，CBM 极大地改变了三层线性神经网络中参数区域的行为和贝叶斯泛化误差，而多任务公式却没有。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过数学方法分析概念瓶颈模型（CBM）在三层线性神经网络中的贝叶斯泛化误差及自由能，并探讨多任务设定下的影响。
AI.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）虽能提升神经网络可解释性，但其泛化误差行为因神经网络的奇异性难以分析。现有研究缺乏对CBM泛化性能的数学解释。
AI.method: 基于三层线性神经网络架构，结合贝叶斯理论推导CBM的泛化误差与自由能，并引入多任务设定比较不同输出模式的影响。
AI.result: CBM显著改变了线性神经网络的参数区域分布及贝叶斯泛化误差行为，而多任务设定未产生类似影响。
AI.conclusion: CBM结构对线性神经网络的泛化误差具有决定性影响，但多任务设定无法改变这一特性，为CBM的理论分析提供了新视角。

In this study, we mathematically clarify the Bayesian generalization error and free energy of CBM when its architecture is three-layered linear neural networks. The results show that CBM drastically changes the behavior of the parameter region and the Bayesian generalization error in three-layered linear neural networks as compared with the standard version, whereas the multitask formulation does not. 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）是一种普遍存在的方法，可以使用概念解释神经网络。在 CBM 中，概念作为可观察值插入到输出层和最后一个中间层之间。这有助于理解神经网络生成输出背后的原因：与从最后一个隐藏层到输出层的概念相对应的权重。然而，由于神经网络通常是一个奇异的统计模型，因此目前还不可能理解 CBM 中泛化误差的行为。当模型是奇异的时，无法创建从参数到概率分布的一对一映射。这种不可识别性使得分析泛化性能变得困难。在本研究中，我们从数学上阐明了当 CBM 架构为三层线性神经网络时的贝叶斯泛化误差和自由能。我们还考虑一个多任务问题，其中神经网络不仅输出原始输出，还输出概念。结果表明，与标准版本相比，CBM 极大地改变了三层线性神经网络中参数区域的行为和贝叶斯泛化误差，而多任务公式却没有。 该论文通过数学方法分析概念瓶颈模型（CBM）在三层线性神经网络中的贝叶斯泛化误差及自由能，并探讨多任务设定下的影响。 Naoki Hayashi,Yoshihide Sawada stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.ST

authors_text: Zheyan Jin,Shiqi Chen,Huajun Feng,Zhihai Xu,Qi Li,Yueting Chen
title: Reliable Image Dehazing by NeRF
title_zh: NeRF 可靠的图像去雾
comment: 12pages, 8figures
comments: 12pages, 8figures
abstract: We present an image dehazing algorithm with high quality, wide application, and no data training or prior needed. We analyze the defects of the original dehazing model, and propose a new and reliable dehazing reconstruction and dehazing model based on the combination of optical scattering model and computer graphics lighting rendering model. Based on the new haze model and the images obtained by the cameras, we can reconstruct the three-dimensional space, accurately calculate the objects and haze in the space, and use the transparency relationship of haze to perform accurate haze removal. To obtain a 3D simulation dataset we used the Unreal 5 computer graphics rendering engine. In order to obtain real shot data in different scenes, we used fog generators, array cameras, mobile phones, underwater cameras and drones to obtain haze data. We use formula derivation, simulation data set and real shot data set result experimental results to prove the feasibility of the new method. Compared with various other methods, we are far ahead in terms of calculation indicators (4 dB higher quality average scene), color remains more natural, and the algorithm is more robust in different scenarios and best in the subjective perception.
summary: We present an image dehazing algorithm with high quality, wide application, and no data training or prior needed. We analyze the defects of the original dehazing model, and propose a new and reliable dehazing reconstruction and dehazing model based on the combination of optical scattering model and computer graphics lighting rendering model. Based on the new haze model and the images obtained by the cameras, we can reconstruct the three-dimensional space, accurately calculate the objects and haze in the space, and use the transparency relationship of haze to perform accurate haze removal. To obtain a 3D simulation dataset we used the Unreal 5 computer graphics rendering engine. In order to obtain real shot data in different scenes, we used fog generators, array cameras, mobile phones, underwater cameras and drones to obtain haze data. We use formula derivation, simulation data set and real shot data set result experimental results to prove the feasibility of the new method. Compared with various other methods, we are far ahead in terms of calculation indicators (4 dB higher quality average scene), color remains more natural, and the algorithm is more robust in different scenarios and best in the subjective perception.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种高质量、应用广泛、无需数据训练或先验的图像去雾算法。我们分析了原始去雾模型的缺陷，提出了一种基于光学散射模型和计算机图形照明渲染模型相结合的新的可靠的去雾重建和去雾模型。基于新的雾霾模型和摄像机获取的图像，我们可以重建三维空间，精确计算空间中的物体和雾霾，并利用雾霾的透明度关系进行精确的去雾。为了获得 3D 模拟数据集，我们使用了 Unreal 5 计算机图形渲染引擎。为了获得不同场景下的实拍数据，我们使用了雾发生器、阵列相机、手机、水下相机和无人机来获取雾霾数据。我们利用公式推导、仿真数据集和实拍数据集结果实验结果证明了新方法的可行性。与其他各种方法相比，我们在计算指标方面遥遥领先（平均场景质量较高4 dB），色彩保持更自然，算法在不同场景下更加鲁棒，主观感知最好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练数据的高质量图像去雾算法，结合光学散射模型与计算机图形渲染模型，通过NeRF技术实现三维空间重建与精确去雾。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法依赖训练数据或先验知识，存在场景适应性差、计算复杂度高及颜色失真等问题，亟需一种无需训练且鲁棒性强的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合光学散射模型与光照渲染模型，利用NeRF重建三维场景，通过 haze 透明度关系计算物体与雾的分布，结合Unreal 5模拟数据及多设备采集的真实数据验证方法。
AI.result: 新方法在计算指标（平均质量高4dB）、颜色自然度、多场景鲁棒性及主观感知评价上均优于现有算法，尤其在复杂光照与动态场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于NeRF的去雾框架无需训练数据，通过物理模型与三维重建实现高效去雾，在真实与模拟场景中均展现优异性能，为可靠图像增强提供了新思路。
