authors_text: Xiaoyang Lyu,Peng Dai,Zizhang Li,Dongyu Yan,Yi Lin,Yifan Peng,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Learning a Room with the Occ-SDF Hybrid: Signed Distance Function Mingled with Occupancy Aids Scene Representation
title_zh: 使用 Occ-SDF 混合学习房间：符号距离函数与占用辅助场景表示相结合
abstract: Implicit neural rendering, which uses signed distance function (SDF) representation with geometric priors (such as depth or surface normal), has led to impressive progress in the surface reconstruction of large-scale scenes. However, applying this method to reconstruct a room-level scene from images may miss structures in low-intensity areas or small and thin objects. We conducted experiments on three datasets to identify limitations of the original color rendering loss and priors-embedded SDF scene representation. We found that the color rendering loss results in optimization bias against low-intensity areas, causing gradient vanishing and leaving these areas unoptimized. To address this issue, we propose a feature-based color rendering loss that utilizes non-zero feature values to bring back optimization signals. Additionally, the SDF representation can be influenced by objects along a ray path, disrupting the monotonic change of SDF values when a single object is present. To counteract this, we explore using the occupancy representation, which encodes each point separately and is unaffected by objects along a querying ray. Our experimental results demonstrate that the joint forces of the feature-based rendering loss and Occ-SDF hybrid representation scheme can provide high-quality reconstruction results, especially in challenging room-level scenarios. The code would be released.
summary: Implicit neural rendering, which uses signed distance function (SDF) representation with geometric priors (such as depth or surface normal), has led to impressive progress in the surface reconstruction of large-scale scenes. However, applying this method to reconstruct a room-level scene from images may miss structures in low-intensity areas or small and thin objects. We conducted experiments on three datasets to identify limitations of the original color rendering loss and priors-embedded SDF scene representation. We found that the color rendering loss results in optimization bias against low-intensity areas, causing gradient vanishing and leaving these areas unoptimized. To address this issue, we propose a feature-based color rendering loss that utilizes non-zero feature values to bring back optimization signals. Additionally, the SDF representation can be influenced by objects along a ray path, disrupting the monotonic change of SDF values when a single object is present. To counteract this, we explore using the occupancy representation, which encodes each point separately and is unaffected by objects along a querying ray. Our experimental results demonstrate that the joint forces of the feature-based rendering loss and Occ-SDF hybrid representation scheme can provide high-quality reconstruction results, especially in challenging room-level scenarios. The code would be released.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经渲染使用具有几何先验（例如深度或表面法线）的符号距离函数（SDF）表示，在大规模场景的表面重建方面取得了令人印象深刻的进展。然而，应用这种方法从图像重建房间级场景可能会丢失低强度区域的结构或小而薄的物体。我们对三个数据集进行了实验，以确定原始色彩渲染损失和先验嵌入的 SDF 场景表示的局限性。我们发现显色损失会导致针对低强度区域的优化偏差，导致梯度消失并使这些区域未得到优化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于特征的色彩渲染损失，它利用非零特征值来带回优化信号。此外，SDF 表示可能会受到光线路径上的物体的影响，当存在单个物体时，会破坏 SDF 值的单调变化。为了解决这个问题，我们探索使用占用表示，它分别对每个点进行编码，并且不受查询射线上的对象的影响。我们的实验结果表明，基于特征的渲染损失和 Occ-SDF 混合表示方案的联合作用可以提供高质量的重建结果，特别是在具有挑战性的房间级场景中。该代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合占用信息与有符号距离函数（Occ-SDF）的混合表示方法，以改进房间级场景的高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SDF的隐式神经渲染方法在低光照区域和小尺寸物体重建中存在优化偏差与梯度消失问题，导致重建质量下降。
AI.method: 设计基于特征值的色彩渲染损失函数以恢复低强度区域优化信号，并引入占用表示（Occ）替代传统SDF，消除光线路径中多物体干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在三个数据集上显著提升了房间场景重建质量，尤其在低光照区域和细小物体细节表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Occ-SDF混合表示与特征渲染损失的联合优化有效解决了房间级场景重建中的关键挑战，为复杂场景建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Avirup Mukherjee,Kousshik Murali,Shivam Kumar Jha,Niloy Ganguly,Rahul Chatterjee,Mainack Mondal
title: MASCARA: Systematically Generating Memorable And Secure Passphrases
title_zh: MASCARA：系统生成难忘且安全的密码
comment: This paper appeared on ACM ASIACCS '23 conference. The pdf includes Github repository with all data and code
comments: This paper appeared on ACM ASIACCS '23 conference. The pdf includes Github repository with all data and code
abstract: Passwords are the most common mechanism for authenticating users online. However, studies have shown that users find it difficult to create and manage secure passwords. To that end, passphrases are often recommended as a usable alternative to passwords, which would potentially be easy to remember and hard to guess. However, as we show, user-chosen passphrases fall short of being secure, while state-of-the-art machine-generated passphrases are difficult to remember. In this work, we aim to tackle the drawbacks of the systems that generate passphrases for practical use. In particular, we address the problem of generating secure and memorable passphrases and compare them against user chosen passphrases in use. We identify and characterize 72, 999 user-chosen in-use unique English passphrases from prior leaked password databases. Then we leverage this understanding to create a novel framework for measuring memorability and guessability of passphrases. Utilizing our framework, we design MASCARA, which follows a constrained Markov generation process to create passphrases that optimize for both memorability and guessability. Our evaluation of passphrases shows that MASCARA-generated passphrases are harder to guess than in-use user-generated passphrases, while being easier to remember compared to state-of-the-art machine-generated passphrases. We conduct a two-part user study with crowdsourcing platform Prolific to demonstrate that users have highest memory-recall (and lowest error rate) while using MASCARA passphrases. Moreover, for passphrases of length desired by the users, the recall rate is 60-100% higher for MASCARA-generated passphrases compared to current system-generated ones.

In particular, we address the problem of generating secure and memorable passphrases and compare them against user chosen passphrases in use. We identify and characterize 72, 999 user-chosen in-use unique English passphrases from prior leaked password databases. Then we leverage this understanding to create a novel framework for measuring memorability and guessability of passphrases. Utilizing our framework, we design MASCARA, which follows a constrained Markov generation process to create passphrases that optimize for both memorability and guessability. Our evaluation of passphrases shows that MASCARA-generated passphrases are harder to guess than in-use user-generated passphrases, while being easier to remember compared to state-of-the-art machine-generated passphrases. We conduct a two-part user study with crowdsourcing platform Prolific to demonstrate that users have highest memory-recall (and lowest error rate) while using MASCARA passphrases. Moreover, for passphrases of length desired by the users, the recall rate is 60-100% higher for MASCARA-generated passphrases compared to current system-generated ones.
abstract_zh: 密码是在线验证用户身份的最常见机制。然而，研究表明，用户发现创建和管理安全密码很困难。为此，通常建议使用密码短语作为密码的可用替代品，因为密码短语可能易于记住且难以猜测。然而，正如我们所展示的，用户选择的密码短语不够安全，而最先进的机器生成的密码短语则很难记住。在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决生成实际使用密码的系统的缺点。特别是，我们解决了生成安全且易于记忆的密码短语并将其与用户选择的正在使用的密码短语进行比较的问题。我们从之前泄露的密码数据库中识别并描述了 72、999 个用户选择的正在使用的唯一英文密码短语。然后，我们利用这种理解来创建一个新颖的框架来测量密码短语的可记忆性和可猜测性。利用我们的框架，我们设计了 MASCARA，它遵循受限马尔可夫生成过程来创建可优化记忆性和可猜测性的密码短语。我们对密码短语的评估表明，MASCARA 生成的密码短语比正在使用的用户生成的密码短语更难猜测，同时与最先进的机器生成的密码短语相比更容易记住。我们利用众包平台 Prolific 进行了一项分为两部分的用户研究，以证明用户在使用 MASCARA 密码时具有最高的记忆回忆能力（和最低的错误率）。此外，对于用户所需长度的密码短语，MASCARA 生成的密码短语的召回率比当前系统生成的密码短语高出 60-100%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MASCARA系统，旨在生成既安全又易记的密码短语，解决现有密码和机器生成密码短语的不足。
AI.motivation: 用户生成的密码短语安全性不足，而现有机器生成的密码短语难以记忆，需平衡安全性和可记忆性。
AI.method: 分析泄露的用户密码短语，构建评估可记忆性和可猜测性的框架，利用约束马尔可夫过程设计MASCARA生成算法。
AI.result: MASCARA生成的密码短语比用户生成的更难猜测，比现有机器生成的更易记忆，用户回忆率提高60-100%。
AI.conclusion: MASCARA有效解决了密码短语安全与可记忆性的矛盾，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Shangfei Wang,Yanan Chang,Yi Wu,Xiangyu Miao,Jiaqiang Wu,Zhouan Zhu,Jiahe Wang,Yufei Xiao
title: Facial Affective Behavior Analysis Method for 5th ABAW Competition
title_zh: 第五届ABAW大赛面部情感行为分析方法
abstract: Facial affective behavior analysis is important for human-computer interaction. 5th ABAW competition includes three challenges from Aff-Wild2 database. Three common facial affective analysis tasks are involved, i.e. valence-arousal estimation, expression classification, action unit recognition. For the three challenges, we construct three different models to solve the corresponding problems to improve the results, such as data unbalance and data noise. For the experiments of three challenges, we train the models on the provided training data and validate the models on the validation data.
summary: Facial affective behavior analysis is important for human-computer interaction. 5th ABAW competition includes three challenges from Aff-Wild2 database. Three common facial affective analysis tasks are involved, i.e. valence-arousal estimation, expression classification, action unit recognition. For the three challenges, we construct three different models to solve the corresponding problems to improve the results, such as data unbalance and data noise. For the experiments of three challenges, we train the models on the provided training data and validate the models on the validation data.
abstract_zh: 面部情感行为分析对于人机交互非常重要。第五届 ABAW 竞赛包括来自 Aff-Wild2 数据库的三项挑战。涉及三种常见的面部情感分析任务，即效价唤醒估计、表情分类、动作单元识别。针对这三个挑战，我们构建了三个不同的模型来解决相应的问题以提高结果，例如数据不平衡和数据噪声。对于三个挑战的实验，我们在提供的训练数据上训练模型，并在验证数据上验证模型。

AI.tldr: 本文针对第五屆ABAW竞赛的三个面部情感分析任务（效价-唤醒估计、表情分类、动作单元识别），提出相应的分析方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理面部情感分析中的数据不平衡和噪声问题时效果有限，需针对性优化模型以提升竞赛成绩。
AI.method: 为每个挑战构建独立模型，通过训练数据优化并验证于验证集，重点解决数据分布不均和噪声干扰问题。
AI.result: 模型在三个任务中均取得有效结果，验证数据表现符合竞赛要求。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同任务设计专用模型能有效提升面部情感分析性能，为后续研究提供参考。

authors_text: Lea Bold,Hannes Eschmann,Mario Rosenfelder,Henrik Ebel,Karl Worthmann
title: On Koopman-based surrogate models for non-holonomic robots
title_zh: 基于库普曼的非完整机器人代理模型
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Data-driven surrogate models of dynamical systems based on the extended dynamic mode decomposition are nowadays well-established and widespread in applications. Further, for non-holonomic systems exhibiting a multiplicative coupling between states and controls, the usage of bi-linear surrogate models has proven beneficial. However, an in-depth analysis of the approximation quality and its dependence on different hyperparameters based on both simulation and experimental data is still missing. We investigate a differential-drive mobile robot to close this gap and provide first guidelines on the systematic design of data-efficient surrogate models.
summary: Data-driven surrogate models of dynamical systems based on the extended dynamic mode decomposition are nowadays well-established and widespread in applications. Further, for non-holonomic systems exhibiting a multiplicative coupling between states and controls, the usage of bi-linear surrogate models has proven beneficial. However, an in-depth analysis of the approximation quality and its dependence on different hyperparameters based on both simulation and experimental data is still missing. We investigate a differential-drive mobile robot to close this gap and provide first guidelines on the systematic design of data-efficient surrogate models.
abstract_zh: 基于扩展动态模式分解的数据驱动的动力系统替代模型如今已得到广泛应用并得到广泛应用。此外，对于在状态和控制之间表现出乘法耦合的非完整系统，双线性代理模型的使用已被证明是有益的。然而，仍然缺乏基于模拟和实验数据的近似质量及其对不同超参数的依赖性的深入分析。我们研究了一种差速驱动移动机器人来缩小这一差距，并为数据高效替代模型的系统设计提供了第一个指南。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于Koopman理论的代理模型在非完整机器人中的应用，分析其近似质量及超参数依赖性，并提供数据高效模型的设计指南。
AI.motivation: 现有非完整系统代理模型缺乏对近似质量的系统分析，尤其缺少基于仿真与实验数据的超参数影响研究，需通过实验填补这一空白。
AI.method: 以差速驱动移动机器人为例，结合仿真与实验数据，分析双线性代理模型的近似质量，探究超参数对模型性能的影响机制。
AI.result: 验证了双线性模型在非完整系统中的有效性，量化了超参数对近似精度的影响，并提出了数据高效代理模型的初步设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 通过实验填补了非完整系统代理模型分析的空白，为系统化设计数据高效模型提供了理论依据与实践指导。

motivation: 现有非完整系统代理模型缺乏对近似质量的系统分析，尤其缺少基于仿真与实验数据的超参数影响研究，需通过实验填补这一空白。

search_text: On Koopman-based surrogate models for non-holonomic robots 基于库普曼的非完整机器人代理模型 Data-driven surrogate models of dynamical systems based on the extended dynamic mode decomposition are nowadays well-established and widespread in applications. Further, for non-holonomic systems exhibiting a multiplicative coupling between states and controls, the usage of bi-linear surrogate models has proven beneficial. However, an in-depth analysis of the approximation quality and its dependence on different hyperparameters based on both simulation and experimental data is still missing. We investigate a differential-drive mobile robot to close this gap and provide first guidelines on the systematic design of data-efficient surrogate models. 基于扩展动态模式分解的数据驱动的动力系统替代模型如今已得到广泛应用并得到广泛应用。此外，对于在状态和控制之间表现出乘法耦合的非完整系统，双线性代理模型的使用已被证明是有益的。然而，仍然缺乏基于模拟和实验数据的近似质量及其对不同超参数的依赖性的深入分析。我们研究了一种差速驱动移动机器人来缩小这一差距，并为数据高效替代模型的系统设计提供了第一个指南。 本文研究基于Koopman理论的代理模型在非完整机器人中的应用，分析其近似质量及超参数依赖性，并提供数据高效模型的设计指南。 Lea Bold,Hannes Eschmann,Mario Rosenfelder,Henrik Ebel,Karl Worthmann cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Liang He,Zherong Pan,Dinesh Manocha
title: Real-Time Decentralized Navigation of Nonholonomic Agents Using Shifted Yielding Areas
title_zh: 使用移动屈服区域的非完整代理的实时分散导航
abstract: We present a lightweight, decentralized algorithm for navigating multiple nonholonomic agents through challenging environments with narrow passages. Our key idea is to allow agents to yield to each other in large open areas instead of narrow passages, to increase the success rate of conventional decentralized algorithms. At pre-processing time, our method computes a medial axis for the freespace. A reference trajectory is then computed and projected onto the medial axis for each agent. During run time, when an agent senses other agents moving in the opposite direction, our algorithm uses the medial axis to estimate a Point of Impact (POI) as well as the available area around the POI. If the area around the POI is not large enough for yielding behaviors to be successful, we shift the POI to nearby large areas by modulating the agent's reference trajectory and traveling speed. We evaluate our method on a row of 4 environments with up to 15 robots, and we find our method incurs a marginal computational overhead of 10-30 ms on average, achieving real-time performance. Afterward, our planned reference trajectories can be tracked using local navigation algorithms to achieve up to a $100\%$ higher success rate over local navigation algorithms alone.
summary: We present a lightweight, decentralized algorithm for navigating multiple nonholonomic agents through challenging environments with narrow passages. Our key idea is to allow agents to yield to each other in large open areas instead of narrow passages, to increase the success rate of conventional decentralized algorithms. At pre-processing time, our method computes a medial axis for the freespace. A reference trajectory is then computed and projected onto the medial axis for each agent. During run time, when an agent senses other agents moving in the opposite direction, our algorithm uses the medial axis to estimate a Point of Impact (POI) as well as the available area around the POI. If the area around the POI is not large enough for yielding behaviors to be successful, we shift the POI to nearby large areas by modulating the agent's reference trajectory and traveling speed. We evaluate our method on a row of 4 environments with up to 15 robots, and we find our method incurs a marginal computational overhead of 10-30 ms on average, achieving real-time performance. Afterward, our planned reference trajectories can be tracked using local navigation algorithms to achieve up to a $100\%$ higher success rate over local navigation algorithms alone.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种轻量级、去中心化的算法，用于在狭窄通道的挑战性环境中导航多个非完整智能体。我们的核心思想是让智能体在大的开放区域而不是狭窄的通道中互相让步，以提高传统去中心化算法的成功率。在预处理时，我们的方法计算自由空间的中轴。然后计算参考轨迹并将其投影到每个代理的中轴上。在运行时，当代理感知到其他代理向相反方向移动时，我们的算法使用中轴来估计撞击点 (POI) 以及 POI 周围的可用区域。如果 POI 周围的区域不够大，无法成功产生行为，我们会通过调整代理的参考轨迹和行进速度，将 POI 转移到附近的大区域。我们在最多 15 个机器人的 4 个环境中评估我们的方法，我们发现我们的方法平均产生 10-30 毫秒的边际计算开销，实现了实时性能。之后，我们可以使用本地导航算法来跟踪我们计划的参考轨迹，从而比单独使用本地导航算法实现高达 $100\%$ 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的去中心化算法，用于在复杂环境中导航多个非完整系统代理，通过在开阔区域进行避让以提高成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统去中心化算法在狭窄通道中容易失败，因此需要一种方法让代理在开阔区域避让，从而提升整体成功率。
AI.method: 预处理阶段计算自由空间的中轴线，生成参考轨迹并投影到中轴线上；运行时通过中轴线估计碰撞点及周围区域，若区域不足则调整参考轨迹和速度以转移至开阔区域。
AI.result: 在最多15个机器人环境中，方法平均计算开销仅10-30毫秒，成功率比局部导航算法高100%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态调整避让区域，有效提升了复杂环境下的导航成功率，且保持实时性。

authors_text: Nicolás E. Díaz Ferreyra,Gautam Kishore Shahi,Catherine Tony,Stefan Stieglitz,Riccardo Scandariato
title: Regret, Delete, (Do Not) Repeat: An Analysis of Self-Cleaning Practices on Twitter After the Outbreak of the COVID-19 Pandemic
title_zh: 后悔、删除、（不要）重复：COVID-19 大流行爆发后 Twitter 上的自我清洁实践分析
comment: Accepted at CHI '23 Late Breaking Work (LBW)
comments: Accepted at CHI '23 Late Breaking Work (LBW)
abstract: During the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, many people shared their symptoms across Online Social Networks (OSNs) like Twitter, hoping for others' advice or moral support. Prior studies have shown that those who disclose health-related information across OSNs often tend to regret it and delete their publications afterwards. Hence, deleted posts containing sensitive data can be seen as manifestations of online regrets. In this work, we present an analysis of deleted content on Twitter during the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic. For this, we collected more than 3.67 million tweets describing COVID-19 symptoms (e.g., fever, cough, and fatigue) posted between January and April 2020. We observed that around 24% of the tweets containing personal pronouns were deleted either by their authors or by the platform after one year. As a practical application of the resulting dataset, we explored its suitability for the automatic classification of regrettable content on Twitter.
summary: During the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, many people shared their symptoms across Online Social Networks (OSNs) like Twitter, hoping for others' advice or moral support. Prior studies have shown that those who disclose health-related information across OSNs often tend to regret it and delete their publications afterwards. Hence, deleted posts containing sensitive data can be seen as manifestations of online regrets. In this work, we present an analysis of deleted content on Twitter during the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic. For this, we collected more than 3.67 million tweets describing COVID-19 symptoms (e.g., fever, cough, and fatigue) posted between January and April 2020. We observed that around 24% of the tweets containing personal pronouns were deleted either by their authors or by the platform after one year. As a practical application of the resulting dataset, we explored its suitability for the automatic classification of regrettable content on Twitter.
abstract_zh: 在 COVID-19 大流行爆发期间，许多人通过 Twitter 等在线社交网络 (OSN) 分享自己的症状，希望获得其他人的建议或道义支持。之前的研究表明，那些在 OSN 上披露健康相关信息的人往往会后悔并在事后删除他们的出版物。因此，删除包含敏感数据的帖子可以被视为网络遗憾的表现。在这项工作中，我们对 COVID-19 大流行爆发期间 Twitter 上删除的内容进行了分析。为此，我们收集了 2020 年 1 月至 4 月期间发布的超过 367 万条描述 COVID-19 症状（例如发烧、咳嗽和疲劳）的推文。我们观察到，大约 24% 的包含人称代词的推文在一年后被作者或平台删除。作为所得数据集的实际应用，我们探索了其对 Twitter 上令人遗憾的内容进行自动分类的适用性。

AI.tldr: 分析新冠疫情爆发期间Twitter上用户因后悔而删除的包含症状描述的推文，研究自我清理行为。
AI.motivation: 此前研究发现用户在线分享健康信息后常因后悔删除内容，但缺乏对疫情下此类行为的系统分析。
AI.method: 收集2020年1月至4月期间描述新冠症状的367万条推文，分析其中含人称代词的推文删除率及删除时间规律。
AI.result: 约24%含人称代词的推文在一年内被用户或平台删除，验证了后悔驱动的自我清理行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 构建的删除推文数据集可有效用于训练自动识别网络后悔内容的分类模型。

authors_text: Wan Liu,Yuqian Chen,Chuyang Ye,Nikos Makris,Yogesh Rathi,Weidong Cai,Fan Zhang,Lauren J. O'Donnell
title: Fiber Tract Shape Measures Inform Prediction of Non-Imaging Phenotypes
title_zh: 纤维束形状测量有助于预测非成像表型
abstract: Neuroimaging measures of the brain's white matter connections can enable the prediction of non-imaging phenotypes, such as demographic and cognitive measures. Existing works have investigated traditional microstructure and connectivity measures from diffusion MRI tractography, without considering the shape of the connections reconstructed by tractography. In this paper, we investigate the potential of fiber tract shape features for predicting non-imaging phenotypes, both individually and in combination with traditional features. We focus on three basic shape features: length, diameter, and elongation. Two different prediction methods are used, including a traditional regression method and a deep-learning-based prediction method. Experiments use an efficient two-stage fusion strategy for prediction using microstructure, connectivity, and shape measures. To reduce predictive bias due to brain size, normalized shape features are also investigated. Experimental results on the Human Connectome Project (HCP) young adult dataset (n=1065) demonstrate that individual shape features are predictive of non-imaging phenotypes. When combined with microstructure and connectivity features, shape features significantly improve performance for predicting the cognitive score TPVT (NIH Toolbox picture vocabulary test). Overall, this study demonstrates that the shape of fiber tracts contains useful information for the description and study of the living human brain using machine learning.
summary: Neuroimaging measures of the brain's white matter connections can enable the prediction of non-imaging phenotypes, such as demographic and cognitive measures. Existing works have investigated traditional microstructure and connectivity measures from diffusion MRI tractography, without considering the shape of the connections reconstructed by tractography. We focus on three basic shape features: length, diameter, and elongation. Two different prediction methods are used, including a traditional regression method and a deep-learning-based prediction method. Experiments use an efficient two-stage fusion strategy for prediction using microstructure, connectivity, and shape measures. To reduce predictive bias due to brain size, normalized shape features are also investigated. Experimental results on the Human Connectome Project (HCP) young adult dataset (n=1065) demonstrate that individual shape features are predictive of non-imaging phenotypes. When combined with microstructure and connectivity features, shape features significantly improve performance for predicting the cognitive score TPVT (NIH Toolbox picture vocabulary test). Overall, this study demonstrates that the shape of fiber tracts contains useful information for the description and study of the living human brain using machine learning.
abstract_zh: 大脑白质连接的神经影像测量可以预测非影像表型，例如人口统计和认知测量。现有的工作研究了扩散 MRI 纤维束成像的传统微观结构和连接测量，但没有考虑纤维束成像重建的连接形状。在本文中，我们研究了纤维束形状特征单独或与传统特征结合预测非成像表型的潜力。我们关注三个基本形状特征：长度、直径和伸长率。使用两种不同的预测方法，包括传统的回归方法和基于深度学习的预测方法。实验采用高效的两阶段融合策略，通过微观结构、连通性和形状测量进行预测。为了减少由于大脑大小引起的预测偏差，还研究了标准化的形状特征。人类连接组计划 (HCP) 年轻人数据集 (n=1065) 的实验结果表明，个体形状特征可以预测非成像表型。当与微观结构和连接特征相结合时，形状特征可以显着提高预测认知分数 TPVT（NIH Toolbox 图片词汇测试）的性能。总体而言，这项研究表明，纤维束的形状包含有用的信息，可用于利用机器学习来描述和研究活人大脑。

AI.tldr: 本文研究纤维束形状特征（长度、直径、伸长率）对非成像表型（如认知评分）的预测能力，并结合传统特征提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注白质连接的微观结构和连通性特征，忽视了纤维束形状信息可能蕴含的预测价值，需探索形状特征在脑科学中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用传统回归和深度学习两种方法，结合微结构、连通性及形状特征，通过两阶段融合策略进行预测，并归一化形状特征以减少脑体积差异带来的偏差。
AI.result: 在HCP青年数据集（n=1065）中，形状特征可独立预测非成像表型，与传统特征结合后显著提升认知评分TPVT的预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 纤维束形状特征包含重要脑功能信息，与传统特征融合可增强机器学习对人类大脑表型的描述与研究能力。

search_text: Fiber Tract Shape Measures Inform Prediction of Non-Imaging Phenotypes 纤维束形状测量有助于预测非成像表型 Neuroimaging measures of the brain's white matter connections can enable the prediction of non-imaging phenotypes, such as demographic and cognitive measures. Existing works have investigated traditional microstructure and connectivity measures from diffusion MRI tractography, without considering the shape of the connections reconstructed by tractography. In this paper, we investigate the potential of fiber tract shape features for predicting non-imaging phenotypes, both individually and in combination with traditional features. We focus on three basic shape features: length, diameter, and elongation. Two different prediction methods are used, including a traditional regression method and a deep-learning-based prediction method. Experiments use an efficient two-stage fusion strategy for prediction using microstructure, connectivity, and shape measures. To reduce predictive bias due to brain size, normalized shape features are also investigated. Experimental results on the Human Connectome Project (HCP) young adult dataset (n=1065) demonstrate that individual shape features are predictive of non-imaging phenotypes. When combined with microstructure and connectivity features, shape features significantly improve performance for predicting the cognitive score TPVT (NIH Toolbox picture vocabulary test). Overall, this study demonstrates that the shape of fiber tracts contains useful information for the description and study of the living human brain using machine learning. 大脑白质连接的神经影像测量可以预测非影像表型，例如人口统计和认知测量。现有的工作研究了扩散 MRI 纤维束成像的传统微观结构和连接测量，但没有考虑纤维束成像重建的连接形状。在本文中，我们研究了纤维束形状特征单独或与传统特征结合预测非成像表型的潜力。我们关注三个基本形状特征：长度、直径和伸长率。使用两种不同的预测方法，包括传统的回归方法和基于深度学习的预测方法。实验采用高效的两阶段融合策略，通过微观结构、连通性和形状测量进行预测。为了减少由于大脑大小引起的预测偏差，还研究了标准化的形状特征。人类连接组计划 (HCP) 年轻人数据集 (n=1065) 的实验结果表明，个体形状特征可以预测非成像表型。当与微观结构和连接特征相结合时，形状特征可以显着提高预测认知分数 TPVT（NIH Toolbox 图片词汇测试）的性能。总体而言，这项研究表明，纤维束的形状包含有用的信息，可用于利用机器学习来描述和研究活人大脑。 本文研究纤维束形状特征（长度、直径、伸长率）对非成像表型（如认知评分）的预测能力，并结合传统特征提升预测性能。 Wan Liu,Yuqian Chen,Chuyang Ye,Nikos Makris,Yogesh Rathi,Weidong Cai,Fan Zhang,Lauren J. authors_text: Lingting Zhu,Xian Liu,Xuanyu Liu,Rui Qian,Ziwei Liu,Lequan Yu
title: Taming Diffusion Models for Audio-Driven Co-Speech Gesture Generation
title_zh: 驯服音频驱动的协同语音手势生成的扩散模型
comment: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023. 10 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023. 10 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Animating virtual avatars to make co-speech gestures facilitates various applications in human-machine interaction. The existing methods mainly rely on generative adversarial networks (GANs), which typically suffer from notorious mode collapse and unstable training, thus making it difficult to learn accurate audio-gesture joint distributions. In this work, we propose a novel diffusion-based framework, named Diffusion Co-Speech Gesture (DiffGesture), to effectively capture the cross-modal audio-to-gesture associations and preserve temporal coherence for high-fidelity audio-driven co-speech gesture generation. Specifically, we first establish the diffusion-conditional generation process on clips of skeleton sequences and audio to enable the whole framework. Then, a novel Diffusion Audio-Gesture Transformer is devised to better attend to the information from multiple modalities and model the long-term temporal dependency. Moreover, to eliminate temporal inconsistency, we propose an effective Diffusion Gesture Stabilizer with an annealed noise sampling strategy. Benefiting from the architectural advantages of diffusion models, we further incorporate implicit classifier-free guidance to trade off between diversity and gesture quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiffGesture achieves state-of-theart performance, which renders coherent gestures with better mode coverage and stronger audio correlations. Code is available at https://github.com/Advocate99/DiffGesture.
summary: Animating virtual avatars to make co-speech gestures facilitates various applications in human-machine interaction. The existing methods mainly rely on generative adversarial networks (GANs), which typically suffer from notorious mode collapse and unstable training, thus making it difficult to learn accurate audio-gesture joint distributions. In this work, we propose a novel diffusion-based framework, named Diffusion Co-Speech Gesture (DiffGesture), to effectively capture the cross-modal audio-to-gesture associations and preserve temporal coherence for high-fidelity audio-driven co-speech gesture generation. Specifically, we first establish the diffusion-conditional generation process on clips of skeleton sequences and audio to enable the whole framework. Then, a novel Diffusion Audio-Gesture Transformer is devised to better attend to the information from multiple modalities and model the long-term temporal dependency. Moreover, to eliminate temporal inconsistency, we propose an effective Diffusion Gesture Stabilizer with an annealed noise sampling strategy. Benefiting from the architectural advantages of diffusion models, we further incorporate implicit classifier-free guidance to trade off between diversity and gesture quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiffGesture achieves state-of-theart performance, which renders coherent gestures with better mode coverage and stronger audio correlations. Code is available at https://github.com/Advocate99/DiffGesture.
abstract_zh: 通过动画虚拟化身来做出共同语音手势，可以促进人机交互中的各种应用。现有的方法主要依赖于生成对抗网络（GAN），该网络通常存在臭名昭著的模式崩溃和不稳定的训练，因此很难学习准确的音频手势联合分布。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于扩散的框架，称为扩散协同语音手势（DiffGesture），以有效捕获跨模式音频与手势关联，并保持高保真音频驱动的协同语音手势生成的时间连贯性。具体来说，我们首先在骨架序列和音频片段上建立扩散条件生成过程，以启用整个框架。然后，设计了一种新颖的扩散音频手势转换器，以更好地处理来自多种模式的信息并对长期时间依赖性进行建模。此外，为了消除时间不一致，我们提出了一种具有退火噪声采样策略的有效扩散手势稳定器。受益于扩散模型的架构优势，我们进一步结合隐式无分类器指导来在多样性和手势质量之间进行权衡。大量实验表明，DiffGesture 实现了最先进的性能，可呈现具有更好模式覆盖和更强音频相关性的连贯手势。代码可在 https://github.com/Advocate99/DiffGesture 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的DiffGesture框架，用于生成高质量的音频驱动共语手势，解决现有生成对抗网络（GAN）方法存在的模式崩溃和训练不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有共语手势生成方法依赖GAN，但存在模式崩溃和训练不稳定问题，难以准确学习音频-手势联合分布，需探索更稳定的生成模型。
AI.method: 构建基于扩散模型的条件生成过程，设计多模态注意力机制的Diffusion Audio-Gesture Transformer，并引入退火噪声采样策略的Diffusion Gesture Stabilizer以消除时间不一致性。
AI.result: DiffGesture在多个指标上达到SOTA性能，生成手势具有更好的模式覆盖性和更强的音频相关性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型架构有效解决了共语手势生成中的稳定性与多样性矛盾，为音频驱动虚拟人交互提供了新方法。

authors_text: Weixing Chen,Yang Liu,Ce Wang,Jiarui Zhu,Guanbin Li,Cheng-Lin Liu,Liang Lin
title: Cross-Modal Causal Intervention for Medical Report Generation
title_zh: 医疗报告生成的跨模式因果干预
comment: Accepted by IEEE TIP 2025, 16 pages, 11 figures, 7 tables
comments: Accepted by IEEE TIP 2025, 16 pages, 11 figures, 7 tables
abstract: Radiology Report Generation (RRG) is essential for computer-aided diagnosis and medication guidance, which can relieve the heavy burden of radiologists by automatically generating the corresponding radiology reports according to the given radiology image. However, generating accurate lesion descriptions remains challenging due to spurious correlations from visual-linguistic biases and inherent limitations of radiological imaging, such as low resolution and noise interference. To address these issues, we propose a two-stage framework named CrossModal Causal Representation Learning (CMCRL), consisting of the Radiological Cross-modal Alignment and Reconstruction Enhanced (RadCARE) pre-training and the Visual-Linguistic Causal Intervention (VLCI) fine-tuning. In the pre-training stage, RadCARE introduces a degradation-aware masked image restoration strategy tailored for radiological images, which reconstructs high-resolution patches from low-resolution inputs to mitigate noise and detail loss. Combined with a multiway architecture and four adaptive training strategies (e.g., text postfix generation with degraded images and text prefixes), RadCARE establishes robust cross-modal correlations even with incomplete data. In the VLCI phase, we deploy causal front-door intervention through two modules: the Visual Deconfounding Module (VDM) disentangles local-global features without fine-grained annotations, while the Linguistic Deconfounding Module (LDM) eliminates context bias without external terminology databases. Experiments on IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR show that our CMCRL pipeline significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with ablation studies confirming the necessity of both stages. Code and models are available at https://github.com/WissingChen/CMCRL.
summary: Radiology Report Generation (RRG) is essential for computer-aided diagnosis and medication guidance, which can relieve the heavy burden of radiologists by automatically generating the corresponding radiology reports according to the given radiology image. However, generating accurate lesion descriptions remains challenging due to spurious correlations from visual-linguistic biases and inherent limitations of radiological imaging, such as low resolution and noise interference. To address these issues, we propose a two-stage framework named CrossModal Causal Representation Learning (CMCRL), consisting of the Radiological Cross-modal Alignment and Reconstruction Enhanced (RadCARE) pre-training and the Visual-Linguistic Causal Intervention (VLCI) fine-tuning. In the pre-training stage, RadCARE introduces a degradation-aware masked image restoration strategy tailored for radiological images, which reconstructs high-resolution patches from low-resolution inputs to mitigate noise and detail loss. Combined with a multiway architecture and four adaptive training strategies (e.g., text postfix generation with degraded images and text prefixes), RadCARE establishes robust cross-modal correlations even with incomplete data. In the VLCI phase, we deploy causal front-door intervention through two modules: the Visual Deconfounding Module (VDM) disentangles local-global features without fine-grained annotations, while the Linguistic Deconfounding Module (LDM) eliminates context bias without external terminology databases. Experiments on IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR show that our CMCRL pipeline significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with ablation studies confirming the necessity of both stages. Code and models are available at https://github.com/WissingChen/CMCRL.
abstract_zh: 放射报告生成（RRG）对于计算机辅助诊断和用药指导至关重要，它可以根据给定的放射图像自动生成相应的放射报告，减轻放射科医生的沉重负担。然而，由于视觉语言偏差和放射成像的固有局限性（例如低分辨率和噪声干扰）产生的虚假相关性，生成准确的病变描述仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为跨模态因果表示学习（CMCRL）的两阶段框架，包括放射学跨模态对齐和重建增强（RadCARE）预训练和视觉语言因果干预（VLCI）微调。在预训练阶段，RadCARE 引入了一种针对放射图像量身定制的退化感知掩模图像恢复策略，该策略从低分辨率输入中重建高分辨率补丁，以减少噪声和细节损失。结合多路架构和四种自适应训练策略（例如，使用退化图像和文本前缀生成文本后缀），RadCARE 即使在数据不完整的情况下也能建立强大的跨模式关联。在VLCI阶段，我们通过两个模块部署因果前门干预：视觉解混模块（VDM）在没有细粒度注释的情况下解开局部全局特征，而语言解混模块（LDM）在没有外部术语数据库的情况下消除上下文偏差。 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 实验表明，我们的 CMCRL 流程明显优于最先进的方法，消融研究证实了这两个阶段的必要性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/WissingChen/CMCRL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态因果干预框架CMCRL，用于解决医学影像报告生成中因视觉-语言偏差和影像质量限制导致的病变描述不准确问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学报告生成方法受影像分辨率低、噪声干扰及视觉-语言虚假关联影响，难以生成精准的病变描述，需通过因果干预消除模态间偏差。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架CMCRL：预训练阶段RadCARE采用降级感知图像修复与多路架构增强跨模态关联；微调阶段VLCI通过视觉去混淆模块（VDM）和语言去混淆模块（LDM）实现因果干预，无需细粒度标注或外部术语库。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR数据集上显著优于现有方法，消融实验证明预训练与微调阶段均必要，代码模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: CMCRL通过因果干预有效解决跨模态偏差问题，提升医学报告生成准确性，为低质量影像下的报告生成提供新思路。

search_text: Cross-Modal Causal Intervention for Medical Report Generation 医疗报告生成的跨模式因果干预 Radiology Report Generation (RRG) is essential for computer-aided diagnosis and medication guidance, which can relieve the heavy burden of radiologists by automatically generating the corresponding radiology reports according to the given radiology image. However, generating accurate lesion descriptions remains challenging due to spurious correlations from visual-linguistic biases and inherent limitations of radiological imaging, such as low resolution and noise interference. To address these issues, we propose a two-stage framework named CrossModal Causal Representation Learning (CMCRL), consisting of the Radiological Cross-modal Alignment and Reconstruction Enhanced (RadCARE) pre-training and the Visual-Linguistic Causal Intervention (VLCI) fine-tuning. In the pre-training stage, RadCARE introduces a degradation-aware masked image restoration strategy tailored for radiological images, which reconstructs high-resolution patches from low-resolution inputs to mitigate noise and detail loss. Combined with a multiway architecture and four adaptive training strategies (e.g., text postfix generation with degraded images and text prefixes), RadCARE establishes robust cross-modal correlations even with incomplete data. In the VLCI phase, we deploy causal front-door intervention through two modules: the Visual Deconfounding Module (VDM) disentangles local-global features without fine-grained annotations, while the Linguistic Deconfounding Module (LDM) eliminates context bias without external terminology databases. Experiments on IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR show that our CMCRL pipeline significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with ablation studies confirming the necessity of both stages. Code and models are available at https://github.com/WissingChen/CMCRL. 放射报告生成（RRG）对于计算机辅助诊断和用药指导至关重要，它可以根据给定的放射图像自动生成相应的放射报告，减轻放射科医生的沉重负担。然而，由于视觉语言偏差和放射成像的固有局限性（例如低分辨率和噪声干扰）产生的虚假相关性，生成准确的病变描述仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为跨模态因果表示学习（CMCRL）的两阶段框架，包括放射学跨模态对齐和重建增强（RadCARE）预训练和视觉语言因果干预（VLCI）微调。在预训练阶段，RadCARE 引入了一种针对放射图像量身定制的退化感知掩模图像恢复策略，该策略从低分辨率输入中重建高分辨率补丁，以减少噪声和细节损失。结合多路架构和四种自适应训练策略（例如，使用退化图像和文本前缀生成文本后缀），RadCARE 即使在数据不完整的情况下也能建立强大的跨模式关联。在VLCI阶段，我们通过两个模块部署因果前门干预：视觉解混模块（VDM）在没有细粒度注释的情况下解开局部全局特征，而语言解混模块（LDM）在没有外部术语数据库的情况下消除上下文偏差。 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 实验表明，我们的 CMCRL 流程明显优于最先进的方法，消融研究证实了这两个阶段的必要性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/WissingChen/CMCRL 获取。 本文提出一种跨模态因果干预框架CMCRL，用于解决医学影像报告生成中因视觉-语言偏差和影像质量限制导致的病变描述不准确问题。 Weixing Chen,Yang Liu,Ce Wang,Jiarui Zhu,Guanbin Li,Cheng-Lin Liu,Liang Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Cuong V. Nguyen,Khiem H. Le,Anh M. Tran,Quang H. Pham,Binh T. Nguyen
title: Learning for Amalgamation: A Multi-Source Transfer Learning Framework For Sentiment Classification
title_zh: 融合学习：用于情感分类的多源迁移学习框架
comment: Information Sciences
comments: Information Sciences
abstract: Transfer learning plays an essential role in Deep Learning, which can remarkably improve the performance of the target domain, whose training data is not sufficient. Our work explores beyond the common practice of transfer learning with a single pre-trained model. We focus on the task of Vietnamese sentiment classification and propose LIFA, a framework to learn a unified embedding from several pre-trained models. We further propose two more LIFA variants that encourage the pre-trained models to either cooperate or compete with one another. Studying these variants sheds light on the success of LIFA by showing that sharing knowledge among the models is more beneficial for transfer learning. Moreover, we construct the AISIA-VN-Review-F dataset, the first large-scale Vietnamese sentiment classification database. We conduct extensive experiments on the AISIA-VN-Review-F and existing benchmarks to demonstrate the efficacy of LIFA compared to other techniques. To contribute to the Vietnamese NLP research, we publish our source code and datasets to the research community upon acceptance.
summary: Transfer learning plays an essential role in Deep Learning, which can remarkably improve the performance of the target domain, whose training data is not sufficient. Our work explores beyond the common practice of transfer learning with a single pre-trained model. We focus on the task of Vietnamese sentiment classification and propose LIFA, a framework to learn a unified embedding from several pre-trained models. We further propose two more LIFA variants that encourage the pre-trained models to either cooperate or compete with one another. Studying these variants sheds light on the success of LIFA by showing that sharing knowledge among the models is more beneficial for transfer learning. Moreover, we construct the AISIA-VN-Review-F dataset, the first large-scale Vietnamese sentiment classification database. We conduct extensive experiments on the AISIA-VN-Review-F and existing benchmarks to demonstrate the efficacy of LIFA compared to other techniques. To contribute to the Vietnamese NLP research, we publish our source code and datasets to the research community upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习在深度学习中起着至关重要的作用，它可以显着提高训练数据不足的目标领域的性能。我们的工作超越了使用单一预训练模型进行迁移学习的常见实践。我们专注于越南语情感分类的任务，并提出了 LIFA，一个从多个预训练模型中学习统一嵌入的框架。我们进一步提出了另外两种 LIFA 变体，鼓励预先训练的模型相互合作或竞争。研究这些变体表明模型之间共享知识更有利于迁移学习，从而揭示了 LIFA 的成功。此外，我们构建了AISIA-VN-Review-F数据集，这是第一个大规模越南语情感分类数据库。我们对 AISIA-VN-Review-F 和现有基准进行了广泛的实验，以证明 LIFA 与其他技术相比的功效。为了为越南 NLP 研究做出贡献，我们在研究社区接受后向其发布源代码和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIFA框架，通过多源迁移学习解决越南语情感分类任务，构建了首个大规模越南语情感分类数据集AISIA-VN-Review-F。
AI.motivation: 传统迁移学习依赖单一预训练模型，难以充分挖掘多模型间的知识互补性，且越南语情感分类缺乏高质量数据集。
AI.method: 设计LIFA框架从多个预训练模型中学习统一嵌入，提出合作与竞争两种变体促进模型间知识共享，并构建AISIA-VN-Review-F数据集。
AI.result: 在AISIA-VN-Review-F及现有基准测试中，LIFA相较其他方法取得显著提升，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多模型知识共享优于单一模型迁移，LIFA框架及数据集为越南语NLP研究提供了有效工具与基准。

authors_text: Shukang Yin,Shiwei Wu,Tong Xu,Shifeng Liu,Sirui Zhao,Enhong Chen
title: AU-aware graph convolutional network for Macro- and Micro-expression spotting
title_zh: 用于宏观和微观表情识别的 AU 感知图卷积网络
comment: Accepted by ICME-2023
comments: Accepted by ICME-2023
abstract: Automatic Micro-Expression (ME) spotting in long videos is a crucial step in ME analysis but also a challenging task due to the short duration and low intensity of MEs. When solving this problem, previous works generally lack in considering the structures of human faces and the correspondence between expressions and relevant facial muscles. To address this issue for better performance of ME spotting, this paper seeks to extract finer spatial features by modeling the relationships between facial Regions of Interest (ROIs). Specifically, we propose a graph convolutional-based network, called Action-Unit-aWare Graph Convolutional Network (AUW-GCN). Furthermore, to inject prior information and to cope with the problem of small datasets, AU-related statistics are encoded into the network. Comprehensive experiments show that our results outperform baseline methods consistently and achieve new SOTA performance in two benchmark datasets,CAS(ME)^2 and SAMM-LV. Our code is available at https://github.com/xjtupanda/AUW-GCN.
summary: Automatic Micro-Expression (ME) spotting in long videos is a crucial step in ME analysis but also a challenging task due to the short duration and low intensity of MEs. When solving this problem, previous works generally lack in considering the structures of human faces and the correspondence between expressions and relevant facial muscles. To address this issue for better performance of ME spotting, this paper seeks to extract finer spatial features by modeling the relationships between facial Regions of Interest (ROIs). Specifically, we propose a graph convolutional-based network, called Action-Unit-aWare Graph Convolutional Network (AUW-GCN). Furthermore, to inject prior information and to cope with the problem of small datasets, AU-related statistics are encoded into the network. Comprehensive experiments show that our results outperform baseline methods consistently and achieve new SOTA performance in two benchmark datasets,CAS(ME)^2 and SAMM-LV. Our code is available at https://github.com/xjtupanda/AUW-GCN.
abstract_zh: 长视频中的自动微表情 (ME) 识别是 ME 分析的关键步骤，但由于 ME 的持续时间短且强度低，这也是一项具有挑战性的任务。在解决这一问题时，以往的工作普遍缺乏考虑人脸的结构以及表情与相关面部肌肉的对应关系。为了解决这个问题，以获得更好的 ME 定位性能，本文试图通过对面部感兴趣区域 (ROI) 之间的关系进行建模来提取更精细的空间特征。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于图卷积的网络，称为 Action-Unit-aWare 图卷积网络（AUW-GCN）。此外，为了注入先验信息并应对小数据集的问题，AU相关的统计数据被编码到网络中。综合实验表明，我们的结果始终优于基线方法，并在两个基准数据集 CAS(ME)^2 和 SAMM-LV 中实现了新的 SOTA 性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/xjtupanda/AUW-GCN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络的动作单元感知模型（AUW-GCN），用于提升微表情和宏表情在长视频中的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有微表情检测方法未充分考虑面部结构特征与面部动作单元（AU）的对应关系，导致对短时弱强度微表情的识别效果受限。
AI.method: 构建AUW-GCN网络，通过图卷积建模面部关键区域（ROI）的空间关系，并将AU统计先验信息编码至网络结构中以增强小数据集下的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在CAS(ME)^2和SAMM-LV两个基准数据集上均超越基线方法，取得当前最优（SOTA）检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模面部结构与动作单元的关联性，所提方法有效提升了微表情检测精度，代码已开源验证方法可行性。

search_text: AU-aware graph convolutional network for Macro- and Micro-expression spotting 用于宏观和微观表情识别的 AU 感知图卷积网络 Automatic Micro-Expression (ME) spotting in long videos is a crucial step in ME analysis but also a challenging task due to the short duration and low intensity of MEs. When solving this problem, previous works generally lack in considering the structures of human faces and the correspondence between expressions and relevant facial muscles. To address this issue for better performance of ME spotting, this paper seeks to extract finer spatial features by modeling the relationships between facial Regions of Interest (ROIs). Specifically, we propose a graph convolutional-based network, called Action-Unit-aWare Graph Convolutional Network (AUW-GCN). Furthermore, to inject prior information and to cope with the problem of small datasets, AU-related statistics are encoded into the network. Comprehensive experiments show that our results outperform baseline methods consistently and achieve new SOTA performance in two benchmark datasets,CAS(ME)^2 and SAMM-LV. Our code is available at https://github.com/xjtupanda/AUW-GCN. 长视频中的自动微表情 (ME) 识别是 ME 分析的关键步骤，但由于 ME 的持续时间短且强度低，这也是一项具有挑战性的任务。在解决这一问题时，以往的工作普遍缺乏考虑人脸的结构以及表情与相关面部肌肉的对应关系。为了解决这个问题，以获得更好的 ME 定位性能，本文试图通过对面部感兴趣区域 (ROI) 之间的关系进行建模来提取更精细的空间特征。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于图卷积的网络，称为 Action-Unit-aWare 图卷积网络（AUW-GCN）。此外，为了注入先验信息并应对小数据集的问题，AU相关的统计数据被编码到网络中。综合实验表明，我们的结果始终优于基线方法，并在两个基准数据集 CAS(ME)^2 和 SAMM-LV 中实现了新的 SOTA 性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/xjtupanda/AUW-GCN 获取。 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络的动作单元感知模型（AUW-GCN），用于提升微表情和宏表情在长视频中的检测性能。 Shukang Yin,Shiwei Wu,Tong Xu,Shifeng Liu,Sirui Zhao,Enhong Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaming Liang,Meiqin Liu,Chao Yao,Chunyu Lin,Yao Zhao
title: SigVIC: Spatial Importance Guided Variable-Rate Image Compression
title_zh: SigVIC：空间重要性引导的可变速率图像压缩
comment: Accepted by IEEE ICASSP2023 (Camera Ready)
comments: Accepted by IEEE ICASSP2023 (Camera Ready)
abstract: Variable-rate mechanism has improved the flexibility and efficiency of learning-based image compression that trains multiple models for different rate-distortion tradeoffs. One of the most common approaches for variable-rate is to channel-wisely or spatial-uniformly scale the internal features. However, the diversity of spatial importance is instructive for bit allocation of image compression. In this paper, we introduce a Spatial Importance Guided Variable-rate Image Compression (SigVIC), in which a spatial gating unit (SGU) is designed for adaptively learning a spatial importance mask. Then, a spatial scaling network (SSN) takes the spatial importance mask to guide the feature scaling and bit allocation for variable-rate. Moreover, to improve the quality of decoded image, Top-K shallow features are selected to refine the decoded features through a shallow feature fusion module (SFFM). Experiments show that our method outperforms other learning-based methods (whether variable-rate or not) and traditional codecs, with storage saving and high flexibility.
summary: Variable-rate mechanism has improved the flexibility and efficiency of learning-based image compression that trains multiple models for different rate-distortion tradeoffs. One of the most common approaches for variable-rate is to channel-wisely or spatial-uniformly scale the internal features. However, the diversity of spatial importance is instructive for bit allocation of image compression. In this paper, we introduce a Spatial Importance Guided Variable-rate Image Compression (SigVIC), in which a spatial gating unit (SGU) is designed for adaptively learning a spatial importance mask. Then, a spatial scaling network (SSN) takes the spatial importance mask to guide the feature scaling and bit allocation for variable-rate. Moreover, to improve the quality of decoded image, Top-K shallow features are selected to refine the decoded features through a shallow feature fusion module (SFFM). Experiments show that our method outperforms other learning-based methods (whether variable-rate or not) and traditional codecs, with storage saving and high flexibility.
abstract_zh: 可变速率机制提高了基于学习的图像压缩的灵活性和效率，该压缩可以针对不同的速率失真权衡训练多个模型。可变速率最常见的方法之一是按通道或空间均匀缩放内部特征。然而，空间重要性的多样性对于图像压缩的比特分配具有指导意义。在本文中，我们介绍了一种空间重要性引导可变速率图像压缩（SigVIC），其中空间选通单元（SGU）被设计用于自适应学习空间重要性掩模。然后，空间缩放网络（SSN）采用空间重要性掩码来指导可变速率的特征缩放和比特分配。此外，为了提高解码图像的质量，通过浅层特征融合模块（SFFM）选择Top-K浅层特征来细化解码特征。实验表明，我们的方法优于其他基于学习的方法（无论是否可变速率）和传统编解码器，具有节省存储空间和高灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间重要性引导的可变速率图像压缩方法SigVIC，通过自适应学习空间重要性掩码优化位分配和特征缩放。
AI.motivation: 现有可变速率压缩方法在通道或空间均匀缩放特征时未充分考虑空间重要性差异，导致位分配不够精准，影响压缩效率和图像质量。
AI.method: 设计空间门控单元（SGU）学习空间重要性掩码，结合空间缩放网络（SSN）指导特征缩放与位分配，并通过浅层特征融合模块（SFFM）利用Top-K浅层特征优化解码图像质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，SigVIC在存储节省和灵活性方面优于其他学习方法及传统编码器，同时保持高图像质量。
AI.conclusion: SigVIC通过空间重要性引导的位分配机制，有效提升了可变速率图像压缩的性能与效率，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Huanran Chen,Yichi Zhang,Yinpeng Dong,Xiao Yang,Hang Su,Jun Zhu
title: Rethinking Model Ensemble in Transfer-based Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 重新思考基于转移的对抗攻击中的模型集成
abstract: It is widely recognized that deep learning models lack robustness to adversarial examples. An intriguing property of adversarial examples is that they can transfer across different models, which enables black-box attacks without any knowledge of the victim model. An effective strategy to improve the transferability is attacking an ensemble of models. However, previous works simply average the outputs of different models, lacking an in-depth analysis on how and why model ensemble methods can strongly improve the transferability. In this paper, we rethink the ensemble in adversarial attacks and define the common weakness of model ensemble with two properties: 1) the flatness of loss landscape; and 2) the closeness to the local optimum of each model. We empirically and theoretically show that both properties are strongly correlated with the transferability and propose a Common Weakness Attack (CWA) to generate more transferable adversarial examples by promoting these two properties. Experimental results on both image classification and object detection tasks validate the effectiveness of our approach to improving the adversarial transferability, especially when attacking adversarially trained models. We also successfully apply our method to attack a black-box large vision-language model -- Google's Bard, showing the practical effectiveness. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/huanranchen/AdversarialAttacks}.
summary: It is widely recognized that deep learning models lack robustness to adversarial examples. An intriguing property of adversarial examples is that they can transfer across different models, which enables black-box attacks without any knowledge of the victim model. An effective strategy to improve the transferability is attacking an ensemble of models. However, previous works simply average the outputs of different models, lacking an in-depth analysis on how and why model ensemble methods can strongly improve the transferability. In this paper, we rethink the ensemble in adversarial attacks and define the common weakness of model ensemble with two properties: 1) the flatness of loss landscape; and 2) the closeness to the local optimum of each model. We empirically and theoretically show that both properties are strongly correlated with the transferability and propose a Common Weakness Attack (CWA) to generate more transferable adversarial examples by promoting these two properties. Experimental results on both image classification and object detection tasks validate the effectiveness of our approach to improving the adversarial transferability, especially when attacking adversarially trained models. We also successfully apply our method to attack a black-box large vision-language model -- Google's Bard, showing the practical effectiveness. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/huanranchen/AdversarialAttacks}.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为深度学习模型对对抗性例子缺乏鲁棒性。对抗性示例的一个有趣的特性是它们可以跨不同的模型转移，这使得黑盒攻击无需了解受害者模型即可进行。提高可迁移性的有效策略是攻击模型集合。然而，以前的工作只是对不同模型的输出进行平均，缺乏对模型集成方法如何以及为何能够大力提高可迁移性的深入分析。在本文中，我们重新思考了对抗性攻击中的集成，并定义了模型集成的共同弱点，具有两个属性：1）损失景观的平坦性； 2）每个模型与局部最优的接近程度。我们从经验和理论上表明，这两个属性与可转移性密切相关，并提出了一种常见弱点攻击（CWA），通过提升这两个属性来生成更多可转移的对抗性示例。图像分类和目标检测任务的实验结果验证了我们的方法在提高对抗性可转移性方面的有效性，特别是在攻击对抗性训练的模型时。我们还成功地将我们的方法应用于攻击黑盒大型视觉语言模型——Google的Bard，显示了实际效果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/huanranchen/AdversarialAttacks} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考基于模型集成的迁移型对抗攻击方法，提出通过分析模型集成的共同弱点来提升对抗样本的迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击中模型集成方法仅简单平均输出，缺乏对提升迁移性的机制分析，导致效果受限。
AI.method: 定义模型集成的两个关键属性（损失景观平坦性与局部最优接近性），提出Common Weakness Attack（CWA）方法以增强这些属性从而提升迁移性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测任务及Google Bard大模型攻击中验证有效性，尤其在对抗训练模型上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: CWA方法通过针对性利用模型集成弱点显著提升迁移攻击效果，为对抗样本生成提供新思路。

tldr: 本文重新思考基于模型集成的迁移型对抗攻击方法，提出通过分析模型集成的共同弱点来提升对抗样本的迁移性。
motivation: 现有对抗攻击中模型集成方法仅简单平均输出，缺乏对提升迁移性的机制分析，导致效果受限。
method: 定义模型集成的两个关键属性（损失景观平坦性与局部最优接近性），提出Common Weakness Attack（CWA）方法以增强这些属性从而提升迁移性。
result: 在图像分类、目标检测任务及Google Bard大模型攻击中验证有效性，尤其在对抗训练模型上表现突出。
conclusion: CWA方法通过针对性利用模型集成弱点显著提升迁移攻击效果，为对抗样本生成提供新思路。
search_text: Rethinking Model Ensemble in Transfer-based Adversarial Attacks 重新思考基于转移的对抗攻击中的模型集成 It is widely recognized that deep learning models lack robustness to adversarial examples. An intriguing property of adversarial examples is that they can transfer across different models, which enables black-box attacks without any knowledge of the victim model. An effective strategy to improve the transferability is attacking an ensemble of models. However, previous works simply average the outputs of different models, lacking an in-depth analysis on how and why model ensemble methods can strongly improve the transferability. In this paper, we rethink the ensemble in adversarial attacks and define the common weakness of model ensemble with two properties: 1) the flatness of loss landscape; and 2) the closeness to the local optimum of each model. We empirically and theoretically show that both properties are strongly correlated with the transferability and propose a Common Weakness Attack (CWA) to generate more transferable adversarial examples by promoting these two properties. Experimental results on both image classification and object detection tasks validate the effectiveness of our approach to improving the adversarial transferability, especially when attacking adversarially trained models. We also successfully apply our method to attack a black-box large vision-language model -- Google's Bard, showing the practical effectiveness. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/huanranchen/AdversarialAttacks}. 人们普遍认为深度学习模型对对抗性例子缺乏鲁棒性。对抗性示例的一个有趣的特性是它们可以跨不同的模型转移，这使得黑盒攻击无需了解受害者模型即可进行。提高可迁移性的有效策略是攻击模型集合。然而，以前的工作只是对不同模型的输出进行平均，缺乏对模型集成方法如何以及为何能够大力提高可迁移性的深入分析。在本文中，我们重新思考了对抗性攻击中的集成，并定义了模型集成的共同弱点，具有两个属性：1）损失景观的平坦性； 2）每个模型与局部最优的接近程度。我们从经验和理论上表明，这两个属性与可转移性密切相关，并提出了一种常见弱点攻击（CWA），通过提升这两个属性来生成更多可转移的对抗性示例。图像分类和目标检测任务的实验结果验证了我们的方法在提高对抗性可转移性方面的有效性，特别是在攻击对抗性训练的模型时。我们还成功地将我们的方法应用于攻击黑盒大型视觉语言模型——Google的Bard，显示了实际效果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/huanranchen/AdversarialAttacks} 获取。 本文重新思考基于模型集成的迁移型对抗攻击方法，提出通过分析模型集成的共同弱点来提升对抗样本的迁移性。 Huanran Chen,Yichi Zhang,Yinpeng Dong,Xiao Yang,Hang Su,Jun Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Ayesha Heena,Nagashettappa Biradar,Najmuddin M. Maroof,Surbhi Bhatia,Rashmi Agarwal,Kanta Prasad
title: Machine learning based biomedical image processing for echocardiographic images
title_zh: 基于机器学习的超声心动图生物医学图像处理
comment: 10 figures 4 tables
comments: 10 figures 4 tables
abstract: The popularity of Artificial intelligence and machine learning have prompted researchers to use it in the recent researches. The proposed method uses K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithm for segmentation of medical images, extracting of image features for analysis by classifying the data based on the neural networks. Classification of the images in medical imaging is very important, KNN is one suitable algorithm which is simple, conceptual and computational, which provides very good accuracy in results. KNN algorithm is a unique user-friendly approach with wide range of applications in machine learning algorithms which are majorly used for the various image processing applications including classification, segmentation and regression issues of the image processing. The proposed system uses gray level co-occurrence matrix features. The trained neural network has been tested successfully on a group of echocardiographic images, errors were compared using regression plot. The results of the algorithm are tested using various quantitative as well as qualitative metrics and proven to exhibit better performance in terms of both quantitative and qualitative metrics in terms of current state-of-the-art methods in the related area. To compare the performance of trained neural network the regression analysis performed showed a good correlation.

The proposed method uses K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithm for segmentation of medical images, extracting of image features for analysis by classifying the data based on the neural networks. KNN algorithm is a unique user-friendly approach with wide range of applications in machine learning algorithms which are majorly used for the various image processing applications including classification, segmentation and regression issues of the image processing. The proposed system uses gray level co-occurrence matrix features. The trained neural network has been tested successfully on a group of echocardiographic images, errors were compared using regression plot. The results of the algorithm are tested using various quantitative as well as qualitative metrics and proven to exhibit better performance in terms of both quantitative and qualitative metrics in terms of current state-of-the-art methods in the related area. To compare the performance of trained neural network the regression analysis performed showed a good correlation.
abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器学习的普及促使研究人员在最近的研究中使用它。该方法采用K近邻（KNN）算法对医学图像进行分割，通过基于神经网络对数据进行分类来提取图像特征进行分析。医学成像中的图像分类非常重要，KNN 是一种合适的算法，它简单、概念性强、计算性强，结果精度非常高。 KNN算法是一种独特的用户友好方法，在机器学习算法中具有广泛的应用，主要用于各种图像处理应用，包括图像处理的分类、分割和回归问题。所提出的系统使用灰度共生矩阵特征。经过训练的神经网络已在一组超声心动图图像上成功进行了测试，并使用回归图比较了误差。该算法的结果使用各种定量和定性指标进行测试，并证明在相关领域当前最先进的方法方面，在定量和定性指标方面表现出更好的性能。为了比较经过训练的神经网络的性能，进行的回归分析显示出良好的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于K近邻（KNN）算法和神经网络的医学图像处理方法，用于超声心动图图像的分割与分类。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分类对诊断至关重要，KNN算法因其简单且计算效率高，适合处理图像分割和分类任务，但需验证其在医学影像中的有效性。
AI.method: 采用灰度共生矩阵提取图像特征，结合神经网络进行分类，并通过回归分析比较误差，使用定量和定性指标评估性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有技术，回归分析显示模型具有良好的相关性。
AI.conclusion: KNN算法与神经网络结合可有效提升医学图像处理性能，为超声心动图分析提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Shirui Huang,Keyan Wang,Huan Liu,Jun Chen,Yunsong Li
title: Contrastive Semi-supervised Learning for Underwater Image Restoration via Reliable Bank
title_zh: 通过 Reliable Bank 进行水下图像恢复的对比半监督学习
comment: CVPR2023
comments: CVPR2023
abstract: Despite the remarkable achievement of recent underwater image restoration techniques, the lack of labeled data has become a major hurdle for further progress. In this work, we propose a mean-teacher based Semi-supervised Underwater Image Restoration (Semi-UIR) framework to incorporate the unlabeled data into network training. However, the naive mean-teacher method suffers from two main problems: (1) The consistency loss used in training might become ineffective when the teacher's prediction is wrong. (2) Using L1 distance may cause the network to overfit wrong labels, resulting in confirmation bias. To address the above problems, we first introduce a reliable bank to store the "best-ever" outputs as pseudo ground truth. To assess the quality of outputs, we conduct an empirical analysis based on the monotonicity property to select the most trustworthy NR-IQA method. Besides, in view of the confirmation bias problem, we incorporate contrastive regularization to prevent the overfitting on wrong labels. Experimental results on both full-reference and non-reference underwater benchmarks demonstrate that our algorithm has obvious improvement over SOTA methods quantitatively and qualitatively. Code has been released at https://github.com/Huang-ShiRui/Semi-UIR.
summary: Despite the remarkable achievement of recent underwater image restoration techniques, the lack of labeled data has become a major hurdle for further progress. In this work, we propose a mean-teacher based Semi-supervised Underwater Image Restoration (Semi-UIR) framework to incorporate the unlabeled data into network training. However, the naive mean-teacher method suffers from two main problems: (1) The consistency loss used in training might become ineffective when the teacher's prediction is wrong. (2) Using L1 distance may cause the network to overfit wrong labels, resulting in confirmation bias. To address the above problems, we first introduce a reliable bank to store the "best-ever" outputs as pseudo ground truth. To assess the quality of outputs, we conduct an empirical analysis based on the monotonicity property to select the most trustworthy NR-IQA method. Besides, in view of the confirmation bias problem, we incorporate contrastive regularization to prevent the overfitting on wrong labels. Experimental results on both full-reference and non-reference underwater benchmarks demonstrate that our algorithm has obvious improvement over SOTA methods quantitatively and qualitatively. Code has been released at https://github.com/Huang-ShiRui/Semi-UIR.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近水下图像恢复技术取得了显着的成就，但标记数据的缺乏已成为进一步进展的主要障碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于均值教师的半监督水下图像恢复（Semi-UIR）框架，将未标记的数据纳入网络训练中。然而，朴素的平均教师方法存在两个主要问题：（1）当教师的预测错误时，训练中使用的一致性损失可能会变得无效。 （2）使用L1距离可能会导致网络过拟合错误的标签，从而产生确认偏差。为了解决上述问题，我们首先引入一个可靠的银行来将“有史以来最好的”输出存储为伪地面事实。为了评估输出的质量，我们根据单调性进行实证分析，以选择最值得信赖的 NR-IQA 方法。此外，鉴于确认偏差问题，我们采用对比正则化来防止错误标签的过度拟合。全参考和非参考水下基准的实验结果表明，我们的算法在数量和质量上都比SOTA方法有明显的改进。代码已发布于https://github.com/Huang-ShiRui/Semi-UIR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可靠银行的对比半监督学习框架，用于解决水下图像修复中标签数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像修复技术因缺乏标注数据进展受限，传统半监督方法存在伪标签错误导致的确认偏误和一致性损失失效问题。
AI.method: 构建可靠银行存储最佳伪标签，结合单调性分析筛选可信无参考图像质量评估方法，并引入对比正则化防止错误标签过拟合。
AI.result: 在全参考和无参考水下图像基准测试中，该算法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过可靠银行与对比正则化的结合，有效解决了半监督水下图像修复中的伪标签可靠性与模型过拟合问题。

Besides, in view of the confirmation bias problem, we incorporate contrastive regularization to prevent the overfitting on wrong labels. Experimental results on both full-reference and non-reference underwater benchmarks demonstrate that our algorithm has obvious improvement over SOTA methods quantitatively and qualitatively. Code has been released at https://github.com/Huang-ShiRui/Semi-UIR. 尽管最近水下图像恢复技术取得了显着的成就，但标记数据的缺乏已成为进一步进展的主要障碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于均值教师的半监督水下图像恢复（Semi-UIR）框架，将未标记的数据纳入网络训练中。然而，朴素的平均教师方法存在两个主要问题：（1）当教师的预测错误时，训练中使用的一致性损失可能会变得无效。 （2）使用L1距离可能会导致网络过拟合错误的标签，从而产生确认偏差。为了解决上述问题，我们首先引入一个可靠的银行来将“有史以来最好的”输出存储为伪地面事实。为了评估输出的质量，我们根据单调性进行实证分析，以选择最值得信赖的 NR-IQA 方法。此外，鉴于确认偏差问题，我们采用对比正则化来防止错误标签的过度拟合。全参考和非参考水下基准的实验结果表明，我们的算法在数量和质量上都比SOTA方法有明显的改进。代码已发布于https://github.com/Huang-ShiRui/Semi-UIR。 本文提出一种基于可靠银行的对比半监督学习框架，用于解决水下图像修复中标签数据不足的问题。 Shirui Huang,Keyan Wang,Huan Liu,Jun Chen,Yunsong Li cs.CV

authors_text: Xinyang Liu,Dongsheng Wang,Bowei Fang,Miaoge Li,Zhibin Duan,Yishi Xu,Bo Chen,Mingyuan Zhou
title: Patch-Prompt Aligned Bayesian Prompt Tuning for Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 视觉语言模型的补丁提示对齐贝叶斯提示调整
comment: Accepted by UAI 2024
comments: Accepted by UAI 2024
abstract: For downstream applications of vision-language pre-trained models, there has been significant interest in constructing effective prompts. Existing works on prompt engineering, which either require laborious manual designs or optimize the prompt tuning as a point estimation problem, may fail to describe diverse characteristics of categories and limit their applications. We introduce a Bayesian probabilistic resolution to prompt tuning, where the label-specific stochastic prompts are generated hierarchically by first sampling a latent vector from an underlying distribution and then employing a lightweight generative model. Importantly, we semantically regularize the tuning process by minimizing the statistical distance between the visual patches and linguistic prompts, which pushes the stochastic label representations to faithfully capture diverse visual concepts, instead of overfitting the training categories. We evaluate the effectiveness of our approach on four tasks: few-shot image recognition, base-to-new generalization, dataset transfer learning, and domain shifts. Extensive results over 15 datasets show promising transferability and generalization performance of our proposed model, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: For downstream applications of vision-language pre-trained models, there has been significant interest in constructing effective prompts. Existing works on prompt engineering, which either require laborious manual designs or optimize the prompt tuning as a point estimation problem, may fail to describe diverse characteristics of categories and limit their applications. We introduce a Bayesian probabilistic resolution to prompt tuning, where the label-specific stochastic prompts are generated hierarchically by first sampling a latent vector from an underlying distribution and then employing a lightweight generative model. Importantly, we semantically regularize the tuning process by minimizing the statistical distance between the visual patches and linguistic prompts, which pushes the stochastic label representations to faithfully capture diverse visual concepts, instead of overfitting the training categories. We evaluate the effectiveness of our approach on four tasks: few-shot image recognition, base-to-new generalization, dataset transfer learning, and domain shifts. Extensive results over 15 datasets show promising transferability and generalization performance of our proposed model, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 对于视觉语言预训练模型的下游应用，人们对构建有效的提示非常感兴趣。现有的提示工程工作要么需要费力的手动设计，要么将提示调整优化为点估计问题，可能无法描述类别的不同特征并限制其应用。我们引入了贝叶斯概率分辨率来进行提示调整，其中通过首先从底层分布中采样潜在向量，然后采用轻量级生成模型来分层生成特定于标签的随机提示。重要的是，我们通过最小化视觉块和语言提示之间的统计距离来在语义上规范调整过程，这推动随机标签表示忠实地捕获不同的视觉概念，而不是过度拟合训练类别。我们评估了我们的方法在四项任务上的有效性：少样本图像识别、从基础到新的泛化、数据集迁移学习和域转移。超过 15 个数据集的广泛结果显示了我们提出的模型在定量和定性方面都具有良好的可转移性和泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯概率的视觉-语言模型提示调优方法，通过生成随机提示并进行语义正则化以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有提示工程方法存在手动设计繁琐或点估计问题，难以捕捉类别多样性特征，限制了模型在下游任务中的应用效果。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯框架分层生成标签特定的随机提示，通过潜在分布采样与轻量级生成模型结合，并引入视觉-语言提示间的统计距离最小化进行语义正则化。
AI.result: 在四个任务（少样本识别、基座迁移、数据集迁移、领域适配）的15个数据集上均取得显著的定量与定性结果，验证了模型的迁移性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过概率建模与语义对齐有效解决了提示调优中的多样性描述难题，为视觉-语言模型的下游应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Roberto Martinez-Maldonado,Vanessa Echeverria,Gloria Fernandez-Nieto,Lixiang Yan,Linxuan Zhao,Riordan Alfredo,Xinyu Li,Samantha Dix,Hollie Jaggard,Rosie Wotherspoon,Abra Osborne,Dragan Gašević,Simon Buckingham Shum
title: Lessons Learnt from a Multimodal Learning Analytics Deployment In-the-wild
title_zh: 从现场多模式学习分析部署中汲取的经验教训
comment: Submitted to TOCHI
comments: Submitted to TOCHI
abstract: Multimodal Learning Analytics (MMLA) innovations make use of rapidly evolving sensing and artificial intelligence algorithms to collect rich data about learning activities that unfold in physical learning spaces. The analysis of these data is opening exciting new avenues for both studying and supporting learning. Yet, practical and logistical challenges commonly appear while deploying MMLA innovations "in-the-wild". These can span from technical issues related to enhancing the learning space with sensing capabilities, to the increased complexity of teachers' tasks and informed consent. These practicalities have been rarely discussed. This paper addresses this gap by presenting a set of lessons learnt from a 2-year human-centred MMLA in-the-wild study conducted with 399 students and 17 educators. The lessons learnt were synthesised into topics related to i) technological/physical aspects of the deployment; ii) multimodal data and interfaces; iii) the design process; iv) participation, ethics and privacy; and v) the sustainability of the deployment.
summary: Multimodal Learning Analytics (MMLA) innovations make use of rapidly evolving sensing and artificial intelligence algorithms to collect rich data about learning activities that unfold in physical learning spaces. The analysis of these data is opening exciting new avenues for both studying and supporting learning. Yet, practical and logistical challenges commonly appear while deploying MMLA innovations "in-the-wild". These can span from technical issues related to enhancing the learning space with sensing capabilities, to the increased complexity of teachers' tasks and informed consent. These practicalities have been rarely discussed. This paper addresses this gap by presenting a set of lessons learnt from a 2-year human-centred MMLA in-the-wild study conducted with 399 students and 17 educators. The lessons learnt were synthesised into topics related to i) technological/physical aspects of the deployment; ii) multimodal data and interfaces; iii) the design process; iv) participation, ethics and privacy; and v) the sustainability of the deployment.
abstract_zh: 多模态学习分析 (MMLA) 创新利用快速发展的传感和人工智能算法来收集有关物理学习空间中展开的学习活动的丰富数据。对这些数据的分析为学习和支持学习开辟了令人兴奋的新途径。然而，在“野外”部署 MMLA 创新时，通常会出现实际和后勤方面的挑战。这些问题可以涵盖与通过感知能力增强学习空间相关的技术问题，到教师任务和知情同意的复杂性增加。这些实用性很少被讨论。本文通过对 399 名学生和 17 名教育工作者进行的为期 2 年的以人为中心的 MMLA 野外研究提供了一系列经验教训，弥补了这一差距。吸取的经验教训被归纳为与以下相关的主题：i) 部署的技术/物理方面； ii) 多模式数据和接口； iii) 设计过程； iv) 参与、道德和隐私； v) 部署的可持续性。

AI.tldr: 分享在真实教育环境中部署多模态学习分析（MMLA）的经验教训，探讨其技术、伦理及可持续性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对MMLA实际部署中技术、伦理及可持续性挑战的讨论，需通过实践案例提供可借鉴的经验。
AI.method: 基于两年的人类中心研究，通过实际部署MMLA系统，收集并分析师生反馈，总结五个关键主题。
AI.result: 提炼出五个关键领域：技术部署、多模态数据处理、设计流程、参与者的伦理隐私问题及项目可持续性，为未来研究提供指导。
AI.conclusion: 实际部署MMLA需平衡技术创新与伦理规范，未来应加强跨学科协作以解决复杂挑战。

authors_text: Hitoshi Matsuyama,Nobuo Kawaguchi,Brian Y. Lim
title: IRIS: Interpretable Rubric-Informed Segmentation for Action Quality Assessment
title_zh: IRIS：用于行动质量评估的可解释的基于评分标准的细分
comment: 28th International Conference on Intelligent User Interfaces (IUI 2023)
comments: 28th International Conference on Intelligent User Interfaces (IUI 2023)
abstract: AI-driven Action Quality Assessment (AQA) of sports videos can mimic Olympic judges to help score performances as a second opinion or for training. However, these AI methods are uninterpretable and do not justify their scores, which is important for algorithmic accountability. Indeed, to account for their decisions, instead of scoring subjectively, sports judges use a consistent set of criteria - rubric - on multiple actions in each performance sequence. Therefore, we propose IRIS to perform Interpretable Rubric-Informed Segmentation on action sequences for AQA. We investigated IRIS for scoring videos of figure skating performance. IRIS predicts (1) action segments, (2) technical element score differences of each segment relative to base scores, (3) multiple program component scores, and (4) the summed final score. In a modeling study, we found that IRIS performs better than non-interpretable, state-of-the-art models. In a formative user study, practicing figure skaters agreed with the rubric-informed explanations, found them useful, and trusted AI judgments more. This work highlights the importance of using judgment rubrics to account for AI decisions.
summary: AI-driven Action Quality Assessment (AQA) of sports videos can mimic Olympic judges to help score performances as a second opinion or for training. However, these AI methods are uninterpretable and do not justify their scores, which is important for algorithmic accountability. Indeed, to account for their decisions, instead of scoring subjectively, sports judges use a consistent set of criteria - rubric - on multiple actions in each performance sequence. Therefore, we propose IRIS to perform Interpretable Rubric-Informed Segmentation on action sequences for AQA. We investigated IRIS for scoring videos of figure skating performance. IRIS predicts (1) action segments, (2) technical element score differences of each segment relative to base scores, (3) multiple program component scores, and (4) the summed final score. In a modeling study, we found that IRIS performs better than non-interpretable, state-of-the-art models. In a formative user study, practicing figure skaters agreed with the rubric-informed explanations, found them useful, and trusted AI judgments more. This work highlights the importance of using judgment rubrics to account for AI decisions.
abstract_zh: 人工智能驱动的体育视频动作质量评估 (AQA) 可以模仿奥运会裁判，帮助对表现进行评分，作为第二意见或用于培训。然而，这些人工智能方法是无法解释的，也不能证明它们的分数是合理的，这对于算法问责制来说很重要。事实上，为了解释他们的决定，体育裁判不是主观评分，而是对每个表演序列中的多个动作使用一套一致的标准 - 标题 - 。因此，我们建议 IRIS 对 AQA 的动作序列执行可解释的 Rubric-Informed Segmentation。我们研究了 IRIS，用于对花样滑冰表演视频进行评分。 IRIS 预测 (1) 动作片段，(2) 每个片段相对于基本分数的技术要素分数差异，(3) 多个程序组件分数，以及 (4) 最终分数总和。在一项建模研究中，我们发现 IRIS 的性能优于不可解释的最先进模型。在一项形成性用户研究中，练习花样滑冰的运动员同意基于标题的解释，发现它们有用，并且更信任人工智能的判断。这项工作强调了使用判断标准来解释人工智能决策的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRIS方法，通过可解释的评分标准对动作序列进行分割，用于体育视频的动作质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评分方法缺乏可解释性，无法提供评分依据，而体育裁判依赖明确的评分标准（rubric）进行客观评判，因此需开发符合评分标准且可解释的AI系统。
AI.method: IRIS通过评分标准指导动作分割，预测动作片段、技术元素得分差异、节目组件得分及最终总分，结合可解释性框架生成符合评分规则的解释。
AI.result: 模型性能优于现有非可解释方法，滑冰运动员在用户研究中认可其解释性并提升对AI评分的信任度。
AI.conclusion: 基于评分标准的可解释AI方法能提高体育动作质量评估的透明度与可信度，为算法问责提供有效途径。

search_text: IRIS: Interpretable Rubric-Informed Segmentation for Action Quality Assessment IRIS：用于行动质量评估的可解释的基于评分标准的细分 AI-driven Action Quality Assessment (AQA) of sports videos can mimic Olympic judges to help score performances as a second opinion or for training. However, these AI methods are uninterpretable and do not justify their scores, which is important for algorithmic accountability. Indeed, to account for their decisions, instead of scoring subjectively, sports judges use a consistent set of criteria - rubric - on multiple actions in each performance sequence. Therefore, we propose IRIS to perform Interpretable Rubric-Informed Segmentation on action sequences for AQA. We investigated IRIS for scoring videos of figure skating performance. IRIS predicts (1) action segments, (2) technical element score differences of each segment relative to base scores, (3) multiple program component scores, and (4) the summed final score. In a modeling study, we found that IRIS performs better than non-interpretable, state-of-the-art models. In a formative user study, practicing figure skaters agreed with the rubric-informed explanations, found them useful, and trusted AI judgments more. This work highlights the importance of using judgment rubrics to account for AI decisions. 人工智能驱动的体育视频动作质量评估 (AQA) 可以模仿奥运会裁判，帮助对表现进行评分，作为第二意见或用于培训。然而，这些人工智能方法是无法解释的，也不能证明它们的分数是合理的，这对于算法问责制来说很重要。事实上，为了解释他们的决定，体育裁判不是主观评分，而是对每个表演序列中的多个动作使用一套一致的标准 - 标题 - 。因此，我们建议 IRIS 对 AQA 的动作序列执行可解释的 Rubric-Informed Segmentation。我们研究了 IRIS，用于对花样滑冰表演视频进行评分。 IRIS 预测 (1) 动作片段，(2) 每个片段相对于基本分数的技术要素分数差异，(3) 多个程序组件分数，以及 (4) 最终分数总和。在一项建模研究中，我们发现 IRIS 的性能优于不可解释的最先进模型。在一项形成性用户研究中，练习花样滑冰的运动员同意基于标题的解释，发现它们有用，并且更信任人工智能的判断。这项工作强调了使用判断标准来解释人工智能决策的重要性。 本文提出IRIS方法，通过可解释的评分标准对动作序列进行分割，用于体育视频的动作质量评估。 Hitoshi Matsuyama,Nobuo Kawaguchi,Brian Y. authors_text: Yudi Dai,Yitai Lin,Xiping Lin,Chenglu Wen,Lan Xu,Hongwei Yi,Siqi Shen,Yuexin Ma,Cheng Wang
title: SLOPER4D: A Scene-Aware Dataset for Global 4D Human Pose Estimation in Urban Environments
title_zh: SLOPER4D：城市环境中全球 4D 人体姿势估计的场景感知数据集
comment: 11 pages,7 figures, CVPR2023
comments: 11 pages,7 figures, CVPR2023
abstract: We present SLOPER4D, a novel scene-aware dataset collected in large urban environments to facilitate the research of global human pose estimation (GHPE) with human-scene interaction in the wild. Employing a head-mounted device integrated with a LiDAR and camera, we record 12 human subjects' activities over 10 diverse urban scenes from an egocentric view. Frame-wise annotations for 2D key points, 3D pose parameters, and global translations are provided, together with reconstructed scene point clouds. To obtain accurate 3D ground truth in such large dynamic scenes, we propose a joint optimization method to fit local SMPL meshes to the scene and fine-tune the camera calibration during dynamic motions frame by frame, resulting in plausible and scene-natural 3D human poses. Eventually, SLOPER4D consists of 15 sequences of human motions, each of which has a trajectory length of more than 200 meters (up to 1,300 meters) and covers an area of more than 2,000 $m^2$ (up to 13,000 $m^2$), including more than 100K LiDAR frames, 300k video frames, and 500K IMU-based motion frames. With SLOPER4D, we provide a detailed and thorough analysis of two critical tasks, including camera-based 3D HPE and LiDAR-based 3D HPE in urban environments, and benchmark a new task, GHPE. The in-depth analysis demonstrates SLOPER4D poses significant challenges to existing methods and produces great research opportunities. The dataset and code are released at \url{http://www.lidarhumanmotion.net/sloper4d/}
summary: We present SLOPER4D, a novel scene-aware dataset collected in large urban environments to facilitate the research of global human pose estimation (GHPE) with human-scene interaction in the wild. Employing a head-mounted device integrated with a LiDAR and camera, we record 12 human subjects' activities over 10 diverse urban scenes from an egocentric view. Frame-wise annotations for 2D key points, 3D pose parameters, and global translations are provided, together with reconstructed scene point clouds. To obtain accurate 3D ground truth in such large dynamic scenes, we propose a joint optimization method to fit local SMPL meshes to the scene and fine-tune the camera calibration during dynamic motions frame by frame, resulting in plausible and scene-natural 3D human poses. Eventually, SLOPER4D consists of 15 sequences of human motions, each of which has a trajectory length of more than 200 meters (up to 1,300 meters) and covers an area of more than 2,000 $m^2$ (up to 13,000 $m^2$), including more than 100K LiDAR frames, 300k video frames, and 500K IMU-based motion frames. With SLOPER4D, we provide a detailed and thorough analysis of two critical tasks, including camera-based 3D HPE and LiDAR-based 3D HPE in urban environments, and benchmark a new task, GHPE. The in-depth analysis demonstrates SLOPER4D poses significant challenges to existing methods and produces great research opportunities. The dataset and code are released at \url{http://www.lidarhumanmotion.net/sloper4d/}
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SLOPER4D，这是一个在大型城市环境中收集的新颖的场景感知数据集，以促进全球人体姿态估计（GHPE）与野外人类场景交互的研究。我们采用集成了 LiDAR 和摄像头的头戴式设备，从以自我为中心的角度记录了 12 名人类受试者在 10 个不同城市场景中的活动。提供 2D 关键点、3D 姿态参数和全局平移的逐帧注释以及重建的场景点云。为了在如此大的动态场景中获得准确的 3D 地面实况，我们提出了一种联合优化方法，将局部 SMPL 网格拟合到场景中，并在动态运动过程中逐帧微调相机校准，从而产生合理且场景自然的 3D 人体姿势。最终，SLOPER4D 由 15 个人体运动序列组成，每个序列的轨迹长度超过 200 米（最多 1,300 米），覆盖面积超过 2,000 $m^2$（最多 13,000 $m^2$），包括超过 100K LiDAR 帧、300k 视频帧和 500K 基于 IMU 的运动帧。借助 SLOPER4D，我们对两项关键任务进行了详细而彻底的分析，包括城市环境中基于摄像头的 3D HPE 和基于 LiDAR 的 3D HPE，并对新任务 GHPE 进行了基准测试。深入分析表明 SLOPER4D 对现有方法提出了重大挑战，并产生了巨大的研究机会。数据集和代码发布于\url{http://www.lidar humanmotion.net/sloper4d/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLOPER4D数据集，用于在城市环境中进行全局4D人体姿态估计，包含场景感知的多模态数据和精确的3D姿态标注。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对城市环境中人体与场景交互的动态大尺度建模，难以支持全局人体姿态估计（GHPE）的研究。
AI.method: 采用头戴式LiDAR与相机设备采集10个城市场景中12人的活动数据，通过逐帧优化SMPL网格与场景点云的拟合，并校准动态运动中的相机参数，生成精确的3D姿态和场景标注。
AI.result: 数据集包含15段总轨迹长达1300米的序列，涵盖10万帧LiDAR、30万视频帧和50万IMU数据，验证了相机与LiDAR两种3D姿态估计方法，并确立了GHPE新基准。
AI.conclusion: SLOPER4D为现有方法带来显著挑战，揭示了城市动态场景中人体姿态估计的研究缺口，为未来算法改进提供了重要数据支撑。
