authors_text: Ankita Joshi,Yi Hong
title: MetaRegNet: Metamorphic Image Registration Using Flow-Driven Residual Networks
title_zh: MetaRegNet：使用流驱动残差网络的变形图像配准
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Deep learning based methods provide efficient solutions to medical image registration, including the challenging problem of diffeomorphic image registration. However, most methods register normal image pairs, facing difficulty handling those with missing correspondences, e.g., in the presence of pathology like tumors. We desire an efficient solution to jointly account for spatial deformations and appearance changes in the pathological regions where the correspondences are missing, i.e., finding a solution to metamorphic image registration. Some approaches are proposed to tackle this problem, but they cannot properly handle large pathological regions and deformations around pathologies. In this paper, we propose a deep metamorphic image registration network (MetaRegNet), which adopts time-varying flows to drive spatial diffeomorphic deformations and generate intensity variations. We evaluate MetaRegNet on two datasets, i.e., BraTS 2021 with brain tumors and 3D-IRCADb-01 with liver tumors, showing promising results in registering a healthy and tumor image pair. The source code is available online.
summary: Deep learning based methods provide efficient solutions to medical image registration, including the challenging problem of diffeomorphic image registration. However, most methods register normal image pairs, facing difficulty handling those with missing correspondences, e.g., in the presence of pathology like tumors. We desire an efficient solution to jointly account for spatial deformations and appearance changes in the pathological regions where the correspondences are missing, i.e., finding a solution to metamorphic image registration. Some approaches are proposed to tackle this problem, but they cannot properly handle large pathological regions and deformations around pathologies. In this paper, we propose a deep metamorphic image registration network (MetaRegNet), which adopts time-varying flows to drive spatial diffeomorphic deformations and generate intensity variations. We evaluate MetaRegNet on two datasets, i.e., BraTS 2021 with brain tumors and 3D-IRCADb-01 with liver tumors, showing promising results in registering a healthy and tumor image pair. The source code is available online.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的方法为医学图像配准提供了有效的解决方案，包括微分同胚图像配准的挑战性问题。然而，大多数方法注册正常图像对，在处理那些丢失对应关系的图像对时面临困难，例如，在存在肿瘤等病理情况下。我们希望有一种有效的解决方案来共同解释缺少对应关系的病理区域的空间变形和外观变化，即找到变质图像配准的解决方案。提出了一些方法来解决这个问题，但它们不能正确处理大的病理区域和病理周围的变形。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度变质图像配准网络（MetaRegNet），它采用时变流来驱动空间微分同胚变形并产生强度变化。我们在两个数据集（即脑肿瘤的 BraTS 2021 和肝肿瘤的 3D-IRCADb-01）上评估 MetaRegNet，在配准健康图像和肿瘤图像对方面显示出有希望的结果。源代码可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaRegNet，一种利用流驱动残差网络解决医学图像中病理性区域配准问题的深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理存在肿瘤等病理的医学图像配准问题，尤其在对应关系缺失和大变形区域表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计时间可变流驱动的残差网络，同时建模空间微分同胚变形和病灶区域强度变化，实现病理性图像的配准。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2021（脑肿瘤）和3D-IRCADb-01（肝肿瘤）数据集上验证，成功完成健康与肿瘤图像配准任务。
AI.conclusion: MetaRegNet有效解决了病理性区域配准难题，为医学图像分析提供了新思路，代码已开源。

search_text: MetaRegNet: Metamorphic Image Registration Using Flow-Driven Residual Networks MetaRegNet：使用流驱动残差网络的变形图像配准 Deep learning based methods provide efficient solutions to medical image registration, including the challenging problem of diffeomorphic image registration. However, most methods register normal image pairs, facing difficulty handling those with missing correspondences, e.g., in the presence of pathology like tumors. We desire an efficient solution to jointly account for spatial deformations and appearance changes in the pathological regions where the correspondences are missing, i.e., finding a solution to metamorphic image registration. Some approaches are proposed to tackle this problem, but they cannot properly handle large pathological regions and deformations around pathologies. In this paper, we propose a deep metamorphic image registration network (MetaRegNet), which adopts time-varying flows to drive spatial diffeomorphic deformations and generate intensity variations. We evaluate MetaRegNet on two datasets, i.e., BraTS 2021 with brain tumors and 3D-IRCADb-01 with liver tumors, showing promising results in registering a healthy and tumor image pair. The source code is available online. 基于深度学习的方法为医学图像配准提供了有效的解决方案，包括微分同胚图像配准的挑战性问题。然而，大多数方法注册正常图像对，在处理那些丢失对应关系的图像对时面临困难，例如，在存在肿瘤等病理情况下。我们希望有一种有效的解决方案来共同解释缺少对应关系的病理区域的空间变形和外观变化，即找到变质图像配准的解决方案。提出了一些方法来解决这个问题，但它们不能正确处理大的病理区域和病理周围的变形。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度变质图像配准网络（MetaRegNet），它采用时变流来驱动空间微分同胚变形并产生强度变化。我们在两个数据集（即脑肿瘤的 BraTS 2021 和肝肿瘤的 3D-IRCADb-01）上评估 MetaRegNet，在配准健康图像和肿瘤图像对方面显示出有希望的结果。源代码可在线获取。 本文提出MetaRegNet，一种利用流驱动残差网络解决医学图像中病理性区域配准问题的深度学习方法。 Ankita Joshi,Yi Hong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Dongyue Li,Tina Eliassi-Rad,Hongyang R. Zhang
title: Optimal Intervention on Weighted Networks via Edge Centrality
title_zh: 通过边缘中心性对加权网络进行最优干预
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. SIAM International Conference on Data Mining, 2023 (Extended version)
comments: 15 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. SIAM International Conference on Data Mining, 2023 (Extended version)
abstract: Suppose there is a spreading process such as an infectious disease propagating on a graph. How would we reduce the number of affected nodes in the spreading process? This question appears in recent studies about implementing mobility interventions on mobility networks (Chang et al. (2021)). A practical algorithm to reduce infections on unweighted graphs is to remove edges with the highest edge centrality score (Tong et al. (2012)), which is the product of two adjacent nodes' eigenscores. However, mobility networks have weighted edges; Thus, an intervention measure would involve edge-weight reduction besides edge removal. Motivated by this example, we revisit the problem of minimizing top eigenvalue(s) on weighted graphs by decreasing edge weights up to a fixed budget. We observe that the edge centrality score of Tong et al. (2012) is equal to the gradient of the largest eigenvalue of $WW^{\top}$, where $W$ denotes the weight matrix of the graph. We then present generalized edge centrality scores as the gradient of the sum of the largest $r$ eigenvalues of $WW^{\top}$. With this generalization, we design an iterative algorithm to find the optimal edge-weight reduction to shrink the largest $r$ eigenvalues of $WW^{\top}$ under a given edge-weight reduction budget. We also extend our algorithm and its guarantee to time-varying graphs, whose weights evolve over time. We perform a detailed empirical study to validate our approach. Our algorithm significantly reduces the number of infections compared with existing methods on eleven weighted networks. Further, we illustrate several properties of our algorithm, including the benefit of choosing the rank $r$, fast convergence to global optimum, and an almost linear runtime per iteration.
summary: Suppose there is a spreading process such as an infectious disease propagating on a graph. How would we reduce the number of affected nodes in the spreading process? This question appears in recent studies about implementing mobility interventions on mobility networks (Chang et al. (2021)). A practical algorithm to reduce infections on unweighted graphs is to remove edges with the highest edge centrality score (Tong et al. (2012)), which is the product of two adjacent nodes' eigenscores. However, mobility networks have weighted edges; Thus, an intervention measure would involve edge-weight reduction besides edge removal. Motivated by this example, we revisit the problem of minimizing top eigenvalue(s) on weighted graphs by decreasing edge weights up to a fixed budget. We observe that the edge centrality score of Tong et al. (2012) is equal to the gradient of the largest eigenvalue of $WW^{\top}$, where $W$ denotes the weight matrix of the graph. We then present generalized edge centrality scores as the gradient of the sum of the largest $r$ eigenvalues of $WW^{\top}$. With this generalization, we design an iterative algorithm to find the optimal edge-weight reduction to shrink the largest $r$ eigenvalues of $WW^{\top}$ under a given edge-weight reduction budget. We also extend our algorithm and its guarantee to time-varying graphs, whose weights evolve over time. We perform a detailed empirical study to validate our approach. Our algorithm significantly reduces the number of infections compared with existing methods on eleven weighted networks. Further, we illustrate several properties of our algorithm, including the benefit of choosing the rank $r$, fast convergence to global optimum, and an almost linear runtime per iteration.
abstract_zh: 假设有一个传播过程，例如传染病在图上传播。如何减少传播过程中受影响的节点数量？这个问题出现在最近关于对移动网络实施移动干预的研究中（Chang 等人（2021））。减少未加权图感染的实用算法是删除具有最高边中心性得分的边（Tong 等人（2012）），该边中心性得分是两个相邻节点特征得分的乘积。然而，移动网络具有加权边缘；因此，除了边缘去除之外，干预措施还包括减少边缘权重。受此示例的启发，我们重新审视通过将边权重减少到固定预算来最小化加权图上的顶部特征值的问题。我们观察到 Tong 等人的边缘中心性得分。 (2012) 等于 $WW^{\top}$ 的最大特征值的梯度，其中 $W$ 表示图的权重矩阵。然后，我们将广义边缘中心性分数表示为 $WW^{\top}$ 的最大 $r$ 特征值之和的梯度。通过这种概括，我们设计了一种迭代算法来找到最佳的边权重减少，以在给定的边权重减少预算下缩小 $WW^{\top}$ 的最大 $r$ 特征值。我们还将我们的算法及其保证扩展到时变图，其权重随着时间的推移而变化。我们进行了详细的实证研究来验证我们的方法。与十一个加权网络上的现有方法相比，我们的算法显着减少了感染数量。此外，我们还说明了算法的几个属性，包括选择排名 $r$ 的好处、快速收敛到全局最优以及每次迭代的几乎线性运行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过调整加权网络中的边权重来最小化传播过程中的受影响节点数量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法针对无权图的边中心性无法直接应用于具有权重的移动网络，且需考虑边权重调整预算约束。
AI.method: 将边中心性推广为权重矩阵最大r个特征值的梯度，设计迭代算法在预算内优化边权重，并扩展至时变网络。
AI.result: 算法在11个加权网络中显著减少感染数量，且具有快速收敛、近线性运行时等优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化边权重有效抑制网络传播，为加权网络干预提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xinyue Huo,Lingxi Xie,Wengang Zhou,Houqiang Li,Qi Tian
title: Focus on Your Target: A Dual Teacher-Student Framework for Domain-adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 专注于你的目标：领域自适应语义分割的双师生框架
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, 10 tables
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures, 10 tables
abstract: We study unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation. Currently, a popular UDA framework lies in self-training which endows the model with two-fold abilities: (i) learning reliable semantics from the labeled images in the source domain, and (ii) adapting to the target domain via generating pseudo labels on the unlabeled images. We find that, by decreasing/increasing the proportion of training samples from the target domain, the 'learning ability' is strengthened/weakened while the 'adapting ability' goes in the opposite direction, implying a conflict between these two abilities, especially for a single model. To alleviate the issue, we propose a novel dual teacher-student (DTS) framework and equip it with a bidirectional learning strategy. By increasing the proportion of target-domain data, the second teacher-student model learns to 'Focus on Your Target' while the first model is not affected. DTS is easily plugged into existing self-training approaches. In a standard UDA scenario (training on synthetic, labeled data and real, unlabeled data), DTS shows consistent gains over the baselines and sets new state-of-the-art results of 76.5\% and 75.1\% mIoUs on GTAv$\rightarrow$Cityscapes and SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$Cityscapes, respectively.
summary: We study unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation. Currently, a popular UDA framework lies in self-training which endows the model with two-fold abilities: (i) learning reliable semantics from the labeled images in the source domain, and (ii) adapting to the target domain via generating pseudo labels on the unlabeled images. We find that, by decreasing/increasing the proportion of training samples from the target domain, the 'learning ability' is strengthened/weakened while the 'adapting ability' goes in the opposite direction, implying a conflict between these two abilities, especially for a single model. To alleviate the issue, we propose a novel dual teacher-student (DTS) framework and equip it with a bidirectional learning strategy. By increasing the proportion of target-domain data, the second teacher-student model learns to 'Focus on Your Target' while the first model is not affected. DTS is easily plugged into existing self-training approaches. In a standard UDA scenario (training on synthetic, labeled data and real, unlabeled data), DTS shows consistent gains over the baselines and sets new state-of-the-art results of 76.5\% and 75.1\% mIoUs on GTAv$\rightarrow$Cityscapes and SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$Cityscapes, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们研究用于语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）。目前，流行的 UDA 框架在于自我训练，它赋予模型双重能力：（i）从源域中的标记图像中学习可靠的语义，以及（ii）通过在未标记图像上生成伪标签来适应目标域。我们发现，通过减少/增加来自目标域的训练样本的比例，“学习能力”会增强/减弱，而“适应能力”则相反，这意味着这两种能力之间存在冲突，特别是对于单个模型而言。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双师生（DTS）框架，并为其配备了双向学习策略。通过增加目标域数据的比例，第二个师生模型学会“专注于你的目标”，而第一个模型不受影响。 DTS 可以轻松插入现有的自我训练方法中。在标准 UDA 场景中（对合成、标记数据和真实、未标记数据进行训练），DTS 在基线上表现出一致的增益，并在 GTAv$\rightarrow$Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$Cityscapes 上分别设置了 76.5\% 和 75.1\% mIoU 的新的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双教师-学生框架（DTS），用于解决领域自适应语义分割中的学习与适应能力冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法在学习源域语义和适应目标域之间存在能力冲突，调整目标域数据比例会导致二者此消彼长。
AI.method: 设计双教师-学生框架，通过增加目标域数据比例使第二个模型专注目标域适应，而第一个模型保持源域学习能力，采用双向学习策略实现解耦。
AI.result: 在GTAv→Cityscapes和SYNTHIA→Cityscapes数据集上分别达到76.5%和75.1%的mIoU，刷新了领域自适应语义分割的SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: DTS框架有效缓解了学习与适应能力的冲突，通过解耦双模型协作机制显著提升了领域自适应性能。

search_text: Focus on Your Target: A Dual Teacher-Student Framework for Domain-adaptive Semantic Segmentation 专注于你的目标：领域自适应语义分割的双师生框架 We study unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation. Currently, a popular UDA framework lies in self-training which endows the model with two-fold abilities: (i) learning reliable semantics from the labeled images in the source domain, and (ii) adapting to the target domain via generating pseudo labels on the unlabeled images. We find that, by decreasing/increasing the proportion of training samples from the target domain, the 'learning ability' is strengthened/weakened while the 'adapting ability' goes in the opposite direction, implying a conflict between these two abilities, especially for a single model. To alleviate the issue, we propose a novel dual teacher-student (DTS) framework and equip it with a bidirectional learning strategy. By increasing the proportion of target-domain data, the second teacher-student model learns to 'Focus on Your Target' while the first model is not affected. DTS is easily plugged into existing self-training approaches. In a standard UDA scenario (training on synthetic, labeled data and real, unlabeled data), DTS shows consistent gains over the baselines and sets new state-of-the-art results of 76.5\% and 75.1\% mIoUs on GTAv$\rightarrow$Cityscapes and SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$Cityscapes, respectively. 我们研究用于语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）。目前，流行的 UDA 框架在于自我训练，它赋予模型双重能力：（i）从源域中的标记图像中学习可靠的语义，以及（ii）通过在未标记图像上生成伪标签来适应目标域。我们发现，通过减少/增加来自目标域的训练样本的比例，“学习能力”会增强/减弱，而“适应能力”则相反，这意味着这两种能力之间存在冲突，特别是对于单个模型而言。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双师生（DTS）框架，并为其配备了双向学习策略。通过增加目标域数据的比例，第二个师生模型学会“专注于你的目标”，而第一个模型不受影响。 DTS 可以轻松插入现有的自我训练方法中。在标准 UDA 场景中（对合成、标记数据和真实、未标记数据进行训练），DTS 在基线上表现出一致的增益，并在 GTAv$\rightarrow$Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$Cityscapes 上分别设置了 76.5\% 和 75.1\% mIoU 的新的最先进结果。 本文提出了一种双教师-学生框架（DTS），用于解决领域自适应语义分割中的学习与适应能力冲突问题。 Xinyue Huo,Lingxi Xie,Wengang Zhou,Houqiang Li,Qi Tian cs.CV

authors_text: Mengxin Zheng,Jiaqi Xue,Zihao Wang,Xun Chen,Qian Lou,Lei Jiang,Xiaofeng Wang
title: SSL-Cleanse: Trojan Detection and Mitigation in Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: SSL-Cleanse：自我监督学习中的木马检测和缓解
comment: Accepted by the 18th European Conference on Computer Vision ECCV 2024
comments: Accepted by the 18th European Conference on Computer Vision ECCV 2024
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is a prevalent approach for encoding data representations. Using a pre-trained SSL image encoder and subsequently training a downstream classifier, impressive performance can be achieved on various tasks with very little labeled data. The growing adoption of SSL has led to an increase in security research on SSL encoders and associated Trojan attacks. Trojan attacks embedded in SSL encoders can operate covertly, spreading across multiple users and devices. The presence of backdoor behavior in Trojaned encoders can inadvertently be inherited by downstream classifiers, making it even more difficult to detect and mitigate the threat. Although current Trojan detection methods in supervised learning can potentially safeguard SSL downstream classifiers, identifying and addressing triggers in the SSL encoder before its widespread dissemination is a challenging task. This challenge arises because downstream tasks might be unknown, dataset labels may be unavailable, and the original unlabeled training dataset might be inaccessible during Trojan detection in SSL encoders. We introduce SSL-Cleanse as a solution to identify and mitigate backdoor threats in SSL encoders. We evaluated SSL-Cleanse on various datasets using 1200 encoders, achieving an average detection success rate of 82.2% on ImageNet-100. After mitigating backdoors, on average, backdoored encoders achieve 0.3% attack success rate without great accuracy loss, proving the effectiveness of SSL-Cleanse. The source code of SSL-Cleanse is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SSL-Cleanse.

Using a pre-trained SSL image encoder and subsequently training a downstream classifier, impressive performance can be achieved on various tasks with very little labeled data. The growing adoption of SSL has led to an increase in security research on SSL encoders and associated Trojan attacks. Trojan attacks embedded in SSL encoders can operate covertly, spreading across multiple users and devices. The presence of backdoor behavior in Trojaned encoders can inadvertently be inherited by downstream classifiers, making it even more difficult to detect and mitigate the threat. Although current Trojan detection methods in supervised learning can potentially safeguard SSL downstream classifiers, identifying and addressing triggers in the SSL encoder before its widespread dissemination is a challenging task. This challenge arises because downstream tasks might be unknown, dataset labels may be unavailable, and the original unlabeled training dataset might be inaccessible during Trojan detection in SSL encoders. We introduce SSL-Cleanse as a solution to identify and mitigate backdoor threats in SSL encoders. We evaluated SSL-Cleanse on various datasets using 1200 encoders, achieving an average detection success rate of 82.2% on ImageNet-100. After mitigating backdoors, on average, backdoored encoders achieve 0.3% attack success rate without great accuracy loss, proving the effectiveness of SSL-Cleanse. The source code of SSL-Cleanse is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SSL-Cleanse.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）是一种流行的数据表示编码方法。使用预先训练的 SSL 图像编码器并随后训练下游分类器，可以使用很少的标记数据在各种任务上实现令人印象深刻的性能。 SSL 的日益普及导致了对 SSL 编码器和相关特洛伊木马攻击的安全研究的增加。 SSL 编码器中嵌入的特洛伊木马攻击可以秘密运行，并在多个用户和设备上传播。木马编码器中存在的后门行为可能会无意中被下游分类器继承，从而使检测和减轻威胁变得更加困难。尽管监督学习中当前的木马检测方法可以潜在地保护 SSL 下游分类器，但在 SSL 编码器广泛传播之前识别和解决 SSL 编码器中的触发器是一项具有挑战性的任务。出现这一挑战的原因是下游任务可能未知，数据集标签可能不可用，并且在 SSL 编码器中的木马检测期间原始未标记的训练数据集可能无法访问。我们引入 SSL-Cleanse 作为识别和减轻 SSL 编码器中后门威胁的解决方案。我们使用 1200 个编码器在各种数据集上评估了 SSL-Cleanse，在 ImageNet-100 上实现了 82.2% 的平均检测成功率。在减少后门后，后门编码器平均可以达到 0.3% 的攻击成功率，而没有大幅的精度损失，证明了 SSL-Cleanse 的有效性。 SSL-Cleanse 的源代码可在 https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SSL-Cleanse 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSL-Cleanse方法，用于检测和缓解自监督学习（SSL）编码器中的木马后门威胁。
AI.motivation: SSL编码器的广泛使用使其成为木马攻击的目标，现有监督学习检测方法难以应对SSL场景中下游任务未知、数据标签不可用等挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析SSL编码器的特征分布与激活模式，设计无需依赖下游任务和原始训练数据的检测框架，结合触发器识别与模型净化技术实现后门缓解。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-100等数据集上，SSL-Cleanse检测准确率达82.2%，净化后木马攻击成功率降至0.3%，且模型精度损失极小。
AI.conclusion: SSL-Cleanse有效解决了SSL编码器中木马检测与缓解的难题，为保障自监督学习安全性提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zachary D King,Han Yu,Thomas Vaessen,Iniz Myin-Germeys,Akane Sano
title: Towards the Understanding of Receptivity and Affect in EMAs using Physiological based Machine Learning Method: Analysis of Receptivity and Affect
title_zh: 使用基于生理的机器学习方法理解 EMA 的接受性和影响：接受性和影响分析
abstract: As mobile health (mHealth) studies become increasingly productive due to the advancements in wearable and mobile sensor technology, our ability to monitor and model human behavior will be constrained by participant receptivity. The reliance on subjective responses for health constructs poses challenges, especially in populations with lower receptivity rates. Researchers have proposed machine-learning approaches to optimize survey timing and delivery to address this. However, there are concerns regarding potential biases or unintended influences on participant responses. Our study delves into factors impacting receptivity to ecological momentary assessments (EMA) in a 10-day mHealth study, exploring physiological relationships indicative of receptivity and affect. Utilizing data from 45 participants with wearable devices measuring various biometrics, we employ unsupervised (k-means clustering) and supervised (Random Forest and Neural Networks) machine learning methods to infer affect during non-responses. Findings reveal that triggering EMAs based on a receptivity model reduces reported negative affect by over 3 points (0.29 standard deviations). The predicted affect during non-responses exhibits a bimodal distribution, suggesting more frequent initiation during states of higher positive emotions. The study underscores a clear relationship between affect and receptivity, impacting mHealth study efficacy, especially those using machine learning for EMA triggering. Therefore, we propose a smart trigger that promotes EMA receptivity without influencing affect during sampled time points as future work.
summary: As mobile health (mHealth) studies become increasingly productive due to the advancements in wearable and mobile sensor technology, our ability to monitor and model human behavior will be constrained by participant receptivity. The reliance on subjective responses for health constructs poses challenges, especially in populations with lower receptivity rates. Researchers have proposed machine-learning approaches to optimize survey timing and delivery to address this. However, there are concerns regarding potential biases or unintended influences on participant responses. Our study delves into factors impacting receptivity to ecological momentary assessments (EMA) in a 10-day mHealth study, exploring physiological relationships indicative of receptivity and affect. Utilizing data from 45 participants with wearable devices measuring various biometrics, we employ unsupervised (k-means clustering) and supervised (Random Forest and Neural Networks) machine learning methods to infer affect during non-responses. Findings reveal that triggering EMAs based on a receptivity model reduces reported negative affect by over 3 points (0.29 standard deviations). The predicted affect during non-responses exhibits a bimodal distribution, suggesting more frequent initiation during states of higher positive emotions. The study underscores a clear relationship between affect and receptivity, impacting mHealth study efficacy, especially those using machine learning for EMA triggering. Therefore, we propose a smart trigger that promotes EMA receptivity without influencing affect during sampled time points as future work.
abstract_zh: 由于可穿戴和移动传感器技术的进步，移动健康（mHealth）研究变得越来越富有成效，我们监测和建模人类行为的能力将受到参与者接受度的限制。对健康结构的主观反应的依赖带来了挑战，特别是在接受率较低的人群中。研究人员提出了机器学习方法来优化调查时间和交付，以解决这个问题。然而，人们担心参与者的反应可能存在偏见或意外影响。我们的研究在为期 10 天的移动健康研究中深入探讨了影响生态瞬时评估 (EMA) 接受度的因素，探索了指示接受度和情感的生理关系。利用 45 名使用可穿戴设备测量各种生物特征的参与者的数据，我们采用无监督（k 均值聚类）和监督（随机森林和神经网络）机器学习方法来推断无响应期间的影响。研究结果表明，基于接受性模型触发 EMA 可以将报告的负面影响减少超过 3 个百分点（0.29 个标准差）。无反应期间的预测影响呈现双峰分布，表明在较高积极情绪状态期间更频繁地启动。该研究强调了情感和接受性之间的明确关系，影响了移动医疗研究的效果，尤其是那些使用机器学习来触发 EMA 的研究。因此，我们提出了一种智能触发器，作为未来的工作，它可以在不影响采样时间点期间的影响的情况下促进 EMA 接受性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过生理数据与机器学习方法，研究生态瞬时评估（EMA）中的接受度与情绪关系，优化EMA触发策略以减少负面影响。
AI.motivation: 传统EMA依赖主观反馈存在局限，尤其在低接受度人群中。机器学习优化EMA触发可能引入偏差，需探索生理指标与接受度/情绪的关联以提升mHealth研究有效性。
AI.method: 基于45名参与者佩戴设备采集的生理数据，采用k-means聚类（无监督）及随机森林、神经网络（有监督）分析非响应时段情绪，结合接受度模型优化EMA触发时机。
AI.result: 基于接受度模型的EMA触发使负面情绪降低3点（0.29SD），非响应时段情绪呈双峰分布，提示在积极情绪状态下更频繁触发EMA可能更有效。
AI.conclusion: 情绪与接受度存在显著关联，直接影响mHealth研究效果。未来需开发智能触发机制，在提升EMA接受度的同时避免干扰被试情绪状态。

search_text: Towards the Understanding of Receptivity and Affect in EMAs using Physiological based Machine Learning Method: Analysis of Receptivity and Affect 使用基于生理的机器学习方法理解 EMA 的接受性和影响：接受性和影响分析 As mobile health (mHealth) studies become increasingly productive due to the advancements in wearable and mobile sensor technology, our ability to monitor and model human behavior will be constrained by participant receptivity. The reliance on subjective responses for health constructs poses challenges, especially in populations with lower receptivity rates. Researchers have proposed machine-learning approaches to optimize survey timing and delivery to address this. However, there are concerns regarding potential biases or unintended influences on participant responses. Our study delves into factors impacting receptivity to ecological momentary assessments (EMA) in a 10-day mHealth study, exploring physiological relationships indicative of receptivity and affect. Utilizing data from 45 participants with wearable devices measuring various biometrics, we employ unsupervised (k-means clustering) and supervised (Random Forest and Neural Networks) machine learning methods to infer affect during non-responses. Findings reveal that triggering EMAs based on a receptivity model reduces reported negative affect by over 3 points (0.29 standard deviations). The predicted affect during non-responses exhibits a bimodal distribution, suggesting more frequent initiation during states of higher positive emotions. The study underscores a clear relationship between affect and receptivity, impacting mHealth study efficacy, especially those using machine learning for EMA triggering. Therefore, we propose a smart trigger that promotes EMA receptivity without influencing affect during sampled time points as future work. 由于可穿戴和移动传感器技术的进步，移动健康（mHealth）研究变得越来越富有成效，我们监测和建模人类行为的能力将受到参与者接受度的限制。对健康结构的主观反应的依赖带来了挑战，特别是在接受率较低的人群中。研究人员提出了机器学习方法来优化调查时间和交付，以解决这个问题。然而，人们担心参与者的反应可能存在偏见或意外影响。我们的研究在为期 10 天的移动健康研究中深入探讨了影响生态瞬时评估 (EMA) 接受度的因素，探索了指示接受度和情感的生理关系。利用 45 名使用可穿戴设备测量各种生物特征的参与者的数据，我们采用无监督（k 均值聚类）和监督（随机森林和神经网络）机器学习方法来推断无响应期间的影响。研究结果表明，基于接受性模型触发 EMA 可以将报告的负面影响减少超过 3 个百分点（0.29 个标准差）。无反应期间的预测影响呈现双峰分布，表明在较高积极情绪状态期间更频繁地启动。该研究强调了情感和接受性之间的明确关系，影响了移动医疗研究的效果，尤其是那些使用机器学习来触发 EMA 的研究。因此，我们提出了一种智能触发器，作为未来的工作，它可以在不影响采样时间点期间的影响的情况下促进 EMA 接受性。 本文通过生理数据与机器学习方法，研究生态瞬时评估（EMA）中的接受度与情绪关系，优化EMA触发策略以减少负面影响。 Zachary D King,Han Yu,Thomas Vaessen,Iniz Myin-Germeys,Akane Sano cs.HC

authors_text: Litao Hu,Huaijin Chen,Jan P. Allebach
title: Joint Multi-Scale Tone Mapping and Denoising for HDR Image Enhancement
title_zh: 用于 HDR 图像增强的联合多尺度色调映射和去噪
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, WACVW2022. Codes available at https://github.com/hulitaotom/Joint-Multi-Scale-Tone-Mapping-and-Denoising-for-HDR-Image-Enhancement
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, WACVW2022. Codes available at https://github.com/hulitaotom/Joint-Multi-Scale-Tone-Mapping-and-Denoising-for-HDR-Image-Enhancement
abstract: An image processing unit (IPU), or image signal processor (ISP) for high dynamic range (HDR) imaging usually consists of demosaicing, white balancing, lens shading correction, color correction, denoising, and tone-mapping. Besides noise from the imaging sensors, almost every step in the ISP introduces or amplifies noise in different ways, and denoising operators are designed to reduce the noise from these sources. Designed for dynamic range compressing, tone-mapping operators in an ISP can significantly amplify the noise level, especially for images captured in low-light conditions, making denoising very difficult. Therefore, we propose a joint multi-scale denoising and tone-mapping framework that is designed with both operations in mind for HDR images. Our joint network is trained in an end-to-end format that optimizes both operators together, to prevent the tone-mapping operator from overwhelming the denoising operator. Our model outperforms existing HDR denoising and tone-mapping operators both quantitatively and qualitatively on most of our benchmarking datasets.
summary: An image processing unit (IPU), or image signal processor (ISP) for high dynamic range (HDR) imaging usually consists of demosaicing, white balancing, lens shading correction, color correction, denoising, and tone-mapping. Besides noise from the imaging sensors, almost every step in the ISP introduces or amplifies noise in different ways, and denoising operators are designed to reduce the noise from these sources. Designed for dynamic range compressing, tone-mapping operators in an ISP can significantly amplify the noise level, especially for images captured in low-light conditions, making denoising very difficult. Therefore, we propose a joint multi-scale denoising and tone-mapping framework that is designed with both operations in mind for HDR images. Our joint network is trained in an end-to-end format that optimizes both operators together, to prevent the tone-mapping operator from overwhelming the denoising operator. Our model outperforms existing HDR denoising and tone-mapping operators both quantitatively and qualitatively on most of our benchmarking datasets.
abstract_zh: 用于高动态范围 (HDR) 成像的图像处理单元 (IPU) 或图像信号处理器 (ISP) 通常包括去马赛克、白平衡、镜头阴影校正、色彩校正、去噪和色调映射。除了来自成像传感器的噪声之外，ISP 中的几乎每个步骤都会以不同的方式引入或放大噪声，而去噪算子旨在减少这些来源的噪声。 ISP 中的色调映射算子专为动态范围压缩而设计，可以显着放大噪声水平，尤其是在低光条件下捕获的图像，从而使去噪变得非常困难。因此，我们提出了一个联合多尺度去噪和色调映射框架，该框架在设计时考虑了 HDR 图像的这两种操作。我们的联合网络以端到端格式进行训练，同时优化两个算子，以防止色调映射算子压倒降噪算子。在我们的大多数基准数据集上，我们的模型在数量和质量上都优于现有的 HDR 去噪和色调映射算子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合多尺度去噪和色调映射的框架，用于高动态范围（HDR）图像增强。
AI.motivation: 传统ISP流程中，色调映射操作会放大噪声，尤其在低光条件下导致去噪困难，现有方法难以同时优化两者。
AI.method: 设计端到端联合网络，整合多尺度去噪与色调映射操作，通过协同优化抑制噪声放大。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该模型在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于现有HDR去噪与色调映射方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化框架有效解决了HDR图像处理中噪声放大问题，为ISP流程提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Jong-Ik Park,Sihoon Seong,JunKyu Lee,Cheol-Ho Hong
title: Vortex Feature Positioning: Bridging Tabular IIoT Data and Image-Based Deep Learning
title_zh: Vortex 特征定位：桥接表格 IIoT 数据和基于图像的深度学习
abstract: Tabular data from IIoT devices are typically analyzed using decision tree-based machine learning techniques, which struggle with high-dimensional and numeric data. To overcome these limitations, techniques converting tabular data into images have been developed, leveraging the strengths of image-based deep learning approaches such as Convolutional Neural Networks. These methods cluster similar features into distinct image areas with fixed sizes, regardless of the number of features, resembling actual photographs. However, this increases the possibility of overfitting, as similar features, when selected carefully in a tabular format, are often discarded to prevent this issue. Additionally, fixed image sizes can lead to wasted pixels with fewer features, resulting in computational inefficiency. We introduce Vortex Feature Positioning (VFP) to address these issues. VFP arranges features based on their correlation, spacing similar ones in a vortex pattern from the image center, with the image size determined by the attribute count. VFP outperforms traditional machine learning methods and existing conversion techniques in tests across seven datasets with varying real-valued attributes.
summary: Tabular data from IIoT devices are typically analyzed using decision tree-based machine learning techniques, which struggle with high-dimensional and numeric data. To overcome these limitations, techniques converting tabular data into images have been developed, leveraging the strengths of image-based deep learning approaches such as Convolutional Neural Networks. These methods cluster similar features into distinct image areas with fixed sizes, regardless of the number of features, resembling actual photographs. However, this increases the possibility of overfitting, as similar features, when selected carefully in a tabular format, are often discarded to prevent this issue. Additionally, fixed image sizes can lead to wasted pixels with fewer features, resulting in computational inefficiency. We introduce Vortex Feature Positioning (VFP) to address these issues. VFP arranges features based on their correlation, spacing similar ones in a vortex pattern from the image center, with the image size determined by the attribute count. VFP outperforms traditional machine learning methods and existing conversion techniques in tests across seven datasets with varying real-valued attributes.
abstract_zh: 来自工业物联网设备的表格数据通常使用基于决策树的机器学习技术进行分析，该技术难以处理高维和数字数据。为了克服这些限制，利用基于图像的深度学习方法（例如卷积神经网络）的优势，开发了将表格数据转换为图像的技术。这些方法将相似的特征聚集到具有固定大小的不同图像区域中，而不管特征的数量有多少，类似于实际照片。然而，这增加了过度拟合的可能性，因为当以表格格式仔细选择类似的特征时，通常会丢弃这些特征以防止出现此问题。此外，固定的图像尺寸可能会导致特征较少的像素浪费，从而导致计算效率低下。我们引入 Vortex 特征定位 (VFP) 来解决这些问题。 VFP 根据特征的相关性来排列特征，将相似的特征以漩涡图案从图像中心间隔开，图像大小由属性计数决定。在具有不同实值属性的七个数据集的测试中，VFP 的性能优于传统的机器学习方法和现有的转换技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Vortex Feature Positioning（VFP）的方法，用于将工业物联网（IIoT）的表格数据转换为图像，以克服传统方法在处理高维数值数据时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于决策树的机器学习方法难以处理高维和数值型IIoT表格数据，而现有表格转图像技术存在固定图像尺寸导致的过拟合风险和计算效率低下问题。
AI.method: VFP根据特征相关性动态调整图像尺寸，通过漩涡模式在图像中心分散相似特征，避免固定尺寸带来的像素浪费和过拟合问题。
AI.result: 在七个包含不同实值属性的数据集测试中，VFP在性能上优于传统机器学习方法和现有转换技术。
AI.conclusion: VFP通过动态特征布局有效解决了表格数据转图像过程中的过拟合和计算效率问题，为IIoT数据的深度学习分析提供了更优方案。

motivation: 传统基于决策树的机器学习方法难以处理高维和数值型IIoT表格数据，而现有表格转图像技术存在固定图像尺寸导致的过拟合风险和计算效率低下问题。
method: VFP根据特征相关性动态调整图像尺寸，通过漩涡模式在图像中心分散相似特征，避免固定尺寸带来的像素浪费和过拟合问题。
result: 在七个包含不同实值属性的数据集测试中，VFP在性能上优于传统机器学习方法和现有转换技术。
conclusion: VFP通过动态特征布局有效解决了表格数据转图像过程中的过拟合和计算效率问题，为IIoT数据的深度学习分析提供了更优方案。
search_text: Vortex Feature Positioning: Bridging Tabular IIoT Data and Image-Based Deep Learning Vortex 特征定位：桥接表格 IIoT 数据和基于图像的深度学习 Tabular data from IIoT devices are typically analyzed using decision tree-based machine learning techniques, which struggle with high-dimensional and numeric data. To overcome these limitations, techniques converting tabular data into images have been developed, leveraging the strengths of image-based deep learning approaches such as Convolutional Neural Networks. These methods cluster similar features into distinct image areas with fixed sizes, regardless of the number of features, resembling actual photographs. However, this increases the possibility of overfitting, as similar features, when selected carefully in a tabular format, are often discarded to prevent this issue. Additionally, fixed image sizes can lead to wasted pixels with fewer features, resulting in computational inefficiency. We introduce Vortex Feature Positioning (VFP) to address these issues. VFP arranges features based on their correlation, spacing similar ones in a vortex pattern from the image center, with the image size determined by the attribute count. VFP outperforms traditional machine learning methods and existing conversion techniques in tests across seven datasets with varying real-valued attributes. 来自工业物联网设备的表格数据通常使用基于决策树的机器学习技术进行分析，该技术难以处理高维和数字数据。为了克服这些限制，利用基于图像的深度学习方法（例如卷积神经网络）的优势，开发了将表格数据转换为图像的技术。这些方法将相似的特征聚集到具有固定大小的不同图像区域中，而不管特征的数量有多少，类似于实际照片。然而，这增加了过度拟合的可能性，因为当以表格格式仔细选择类似的特征时，通常会丢弃这些特征以防止出现此问题。此外，固定的图像尺寸可能会导致特征较少的像素浪费，从而导致计算效率低下。我们引入 Vortex 特征定位 (VFP) 来解决这些问题。 VFP 根据特征的相关性来排列特征，将相似的特征以漩涡图案从图像中心间隔开，图像大小由属性计数决定。在具有不同实值属性的七个数据集的测试中，VFP 的性能优于传统的机器学习方法和现有的转换技术。 本文提出了一种名为Vortex Feature Positioning（VFP）的方法，用于将工业物联网（IIoT）的表格数据转换为图像，以克服传统方法在处理高维数值数据时的局限性。 Jong-Ik Park,Sihoon Seong,JunKyu Lee,Cheol-Ho Hong cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV
